title: Unified Communications Engineer (Nha Trang/Remote)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Effective Personal & Professional Development
- Onsite Opportunity to the Netherlands
- ATTRACTIVE SALARY & Relaxing Working Environment
jobDescription:
Excellent opportunities await.

1. UC Platform Implementation & Activation

- Configure and deploy new customer environments on UC platforms such as BroadSoft and 3CX.
- Create and manage users, extensions, device profiles, and endpoint configurations.
- Configure call flows, hunt groups, call queues, IVR, and auto-attendant structures.
- Configure SIP trunks and support number porting activities.
- Provision IP phones and communication devices.
- Perform testing and validation before production go-live.
- Maintain technical documentation and standard configuration templates.

2. Change Management

- Implement configuration changes for existing customer environments.
- Update call routing, call forwarding, numbering plans, and PBX configurations.
- Add, modify, or remove users, extensions, devices, licenses, and subscriptions.
- Process customer requests related to service expansions and modifications.
- Ensure all changes are documented and implemented according to operational procedures.

3. User Onboarding & Offboarding

- Configure communication services for new employees.
- Decommission users and communication services during offboarding.
- Reassign or release phone numbers and extensions.
- Update voicemail, permissions, call forwarding, and related configurations.
- Coordinate updates with administrative, procurement, billing, and carrier systems when required.

4. Support & Incident Management

- Investigate and resolve incidents affecting UC platforms and customer environments.
- Troubleshoot SIP registration, SIP trunk, and call setup issues.
- Diagnose voice quality problems, including latency, jitter, and packet loss.
- Analyze system logs and call traces to identify root causes.
- Handle support requests and incidents through the ticketing system.
- Escalate complex issues to vendors or telecommunications carriers when necessary.
- Ensure incidents are resolved within agreed service levels (SLAs).
requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Telecommunications, or a related field.
- At least 2 years of hands-on experience in Unified Communications (UC) or VoIP solutions implementation and support.
- Hands-on experience with BroadSoft and 3CX platforms.
- Knowledge of SIP, VoIP, IP Telephony, and PBX systems.
- Solid understanding of networking fundamentals, including TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLAN, NAT, QoS, and VPN.
- Experience troubleshooting voice quality and connectivity issues, including SIP registration, call routing, and trunk connectivity.
- Familiarity with ticketing systems and incident management processes.
- Ability to analyze logs, diagnose technical issues, and perform root cause analysis.

Nice to have

- Experience with Microsoft Teams Phone or Cisco Unified Communications.
- Knowledge of SBC (Session Border Controller) and SIP trunk providers.
- Experience working in a Managed Service Provider (MSP) or telecommunications environment.
- Relevant certifications such as Cisco CCNA, Microsoft Teams Administrator, or other UC-related certifications.

What we expect from you:

Is this you?

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Customer-oriented mindset with excellent communication skills.
- Ability to prioritize tasks and work effectively under pressure.
- Strong attention to detail and documentation practices.
- Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team.
- Familiarity with AI tools or willingness to adopt AI to improve work efficiency.
- Good English communication skills for technical support and collaboration.
benefits:
- A work environment so rewarding, you’ll soon forget anything less was even possible
- A work environment so rewarding/welcoming/comfortable/ambitious, you’ll soon forget the rest
- A collaborative, modern, and creative environment.
- Supportive working equipment (laptop, monitor, keyboard, etc.).
- Flexible working hours and a friendly, open culture.
- Attractive and competitive salary with 13th-month bonus.
- Premium annual health check-up.
- Gifts and allowances for special occasions: wedding, newborn babies, Women’s Day, Children’s Day, Mid-Autumn Children’s Festival, Men’s Day, and monthly birthday celebrations.
- We respect your time off: 12 days of annual leave, Christmas Day leave, plus 3 additional leave days for every 5-year milestone.
- Annual Performance Review and clear growth opportunities.
- Company trips, teambuilding activities, and internal engagement events.
- On-site opportunities in the Netherlands.
- Fully stocked pantry and indoor entertainment area

jobDescription:
- Triển khai các elements cần thiết để xây dựng và vận hành môi trường bảo mật trên nền tảng Cloud.
- Xây dựng kiến trúc bảo mật nền tảng (baseline security architecture) và các tiêu chuẩn cấu hình bảo mật cho môi trường Public Cloud cũng như các dịch vụ vận hành trên đó (ví dụ: network, firewall, OS, middleware, v.v.).
- Đánh giá các công nghệ, công cụ và dịch vụ bảo mật; theo dõi xu hướng thị trường và đưa ra các khuyến nghị cho đội ngũ CCoE (Cloud Center of Excellence) và các nhóm phát triển khác.
- Xác định, ghi nhận các rủi ro bảo mật trên môi trường Cloud và xây dựng kế hoạch giảm thiểu/khắc phục tương ứng.
- Xây dựng các tiêu chuẩn, quy trình tốt nhất về bảo mật, phối hợp cùng đội ngũ An toàn thông tin (Security Team).
- Giám sát và theo dõi mọi thay đổi trên môi trường Public Cloud nhằm đảm bảo tuân thủ chiến lược và các tiêu chuẩn bảo mật đã được ban hành.
- Theo dõi quá trình triển khai để đảm bảo các giải pháp tuân thủ chiến lược và tiêu chuẩn bảo mật do các nhóm EA (Enterprise Architecture), Security và CCoE đề ra.
- Đảm bảo tất cả các triển khai trên Public Cloud được tích hợp đúng cách với các công cụ bảo mật và giám sát, đồng thời được theo dõi đầy đủ thông qua các hệ thống như SIEM, NOC, SOC, v.v.
- Phối hợp với các nhóm DevOps để thúc đẩy việc áp dụng Secure Coding Practices, đồng thời báo cáo và nâng cấp các vấn đề liên quan đến chất lượng mã nguồn hoặc chất lượng code chưa đảm bảo an toàn tới CCoE, EA và CISO.
- Tư vấn cho các nhóm phát triển về các tiêu chuẩn và quy tắc bảo mật trong quá trình thiết kế, phát triển và vận hành hệ thống.

- Bridge the gap between business unit (BU) requirements and the to-be-developed system; collaborate with Enterprise Architects (EA) and vendors to design the target architecture for Collection systems, integration architecture, and data flow.
- Maintain the product backlog and organize sprints.
- Guide BUs in composing BRDs, defining business processes, and optimizing product logic.
- Work with selected vendors and Solution Architects (SA) to prepare FSDs/SRSs within the committed timeline.
- Consolidate business analysis and system documentation such as User Guides, Data Dictionaries, etc.

2. DEVELOPMENT

- Collaborate with BU and Operations teams to build system operation procedures and define SLAs.
- Support PDs, PMs, IT PMs, and SAs with project execution activities.
- Participate in assigned projects, ensuring timely and high-quality delivery of assigned tasks.

3. MONITOR & EVALUATE

- Manage changes during BAU phase from initiation to implementation (act as mini PM for change requests).
- Monitor and assess system readiness and adaptability to new or changing business requirements.

4. IMPROVE

- Research new banking products and processes, focusing on specific domains like Finance services, Collection, etc...
- Analyze and propose feasible solutions to meet business requirements, including effort estimation.
- Clarify business processes and rules; identify automation opportunities and make rules understandable for developers.

5. TRAIN & SUPPORT

- Provide consultation and support to end-users and BUs for issues or inquiries related to implemented business processes.
- Conduct internal training and prepare guidelines for team members on system capabilities and operations.
- Perform other tasks assigned by managers or directors.
requirements:
- A bachelor's or master's degree in computer science, information systems, business administration or related field
- Experience in IT/finance for 8-10 years, with a particular banking domain for at least 5 years
- Being able to understand and catch-up quickly with various business processes/rules or new products in banking domain
- Understand how to write a BRD/SRS for Banking Products/processes
- Experience in using case tool for analyzing and modeling
- Working with particular systems in banking domain (such as Bank products workflow, Collateral Mgmt, Document management, etc...)
- An in depth understanding of the software and application your customers/employees are using
- Strong capabilities in working with AI assisted tool is highly valued: Claude/Opencode/Google Antigravity/Cursor/Kiro etc..
- Ability to analyze, understand and effectively communicate between business requirements and technical design and implementation
- Business application life cycle experience
- System development life cycle skills
- Working knowledge of applications being supported
- Working knowledge of platform and technologies supporting the business application
- Budget planning and management expertise

title: QC Lead (Quality Assurance)
label: HOT
reasons:
- 100% salary is paid in probation.
- Annual Leave: 12 days/ year.
- Cash out leaves at lunar Tet
jobDescription:
We are seeking an experienced and proactive QC Lead to join our dedicated team in Vietnam.

You will own the quality of delivery across the team, working closely with developers, product owners, and the client to ensure work meets a high standard before it ships. This role goes well beyond basic ticket validation: we expect you to think critically about quality, surface risk early, and advocate for the end user throughout the delivery lifecycle.

Key Responsibilities

- Quality Assurance Ownership: Define, own, and continuously improve the QA process across the team, ensuring consistent quality standards are applied to every piece of work.

- Test Strategy: Design and maintain test plans, test cases, and acceptance criteria that cover functional, edge-case, and regression scenarios — not just the happy path described in a ticket.

- Risk Identification: Proactively identify quality, delivery, and user-experience risks early, raise them clearly, and drive them to resolution before they reach production.

- User Experience Advocacy: Assess features from the end user's perspective and flag usability, consistency, and experience issues that fall outside strict acceptance criteria.

- Defect Management: Reproduce, document, prioritise, and track defects with clear, actionable detail; verify fixes and prevent regressions.

- Test Automation: Contribute to and help grow automated test coverage to improve speed, reliability, and repeatability of testing.

- Collaboration: Participate in sizing, planning, and regular team meetings; give clear status updates and communicate quality concerns directly to developers, product owners, and the client.

- Continuous Improvement: Review recurring issues, identify root causes, and drive process changes that raise overall delivery quality.
requirements:
- Communication: Fluency in written and spoken English is essential — you will communicate directly with the client and internal teams

- Agency Experience: Previous experience working in an agency environment, managing quality across multiple projects or clients

- QA Depth: Proven ability to think beyond basic ticket validation and contribute to broader quality assurance, risk identification, and user experience.

- Attention to Detail: Demonstrated rigour and accuracy in test coverage, defect reporting, and verification.

- Proactive Thinking: Track record of anticipating problems and raising them early, rather than waiting to be told what to check.

- Test Process: Strong experience designing test plans, test cases, and acceptance criteria for functional, regression, and edge-case scenarios.

- Defect Tracking: Experience with defect tracking and QA tooling (e.g. Jira or equivalent) and Agile development methodologies.

- Leadership: Experience leading or mentoring QC work and setting quality standards for a team.

Desirable Skills and Experience

- Test Automation: Hands-on experience with test automation frameworks and tooling is highly desirable.

- API Testing: Experience testing APIs and integrations (e.g. Postman or equivalent).

- Performance: Exposure to performance, load, or security testing.

- CI/CD: Familiarity with running automated tests within a CI/CD pipeline.

- Domain: Experience delivering quality for web and/or complex platform builds.
benefits:
At SSTech, we focus on web development with emerging technologies providing lots of opportunities to learn new technology, new technical skill and knowledge.

We aim for a friendly and flexible working environment, a work-life balance to provide the best assist for our team members to work effectively.

Other than that, all the members are offered with many benefits:

- Attractive salary and benefits
- 13th-month salary & annual salary review.
- Added 1 day leaves/month & Cash out leaves at Lunar New Year (Tet). Furthermore, an additional day of leave will be granted for each year of seniority.
- All benefits under the labor code
- Annual company trip
- Well-equiped working condition
- In-house lunch
- Unlimited free coffee, tea, snacks, and fruit to keep you energized
- Dymanic and friendly working environment in a team of talented and experienced developers.
- 🕑Working time: Monday to Friday.

title: Senior NestJS Developer (Backend)
label: HOT
reasons:
- 100% salary is paid in probation.
- Annual Leave: 12 days/ year.
- Cash out leaves at lunar Tet
jobDescription:
We are seeking a highly skilled and communicative Senior NestJS Developer to join our dedicated team in Vietnam.

You will work closely with our existing Senior NestJS Developer and DevOps lead on the re-architecture and upgrade of a major client’s backend API. This role is highly impactful, focusing on migrating a legacy serverless backend to a modern, secure, and highly performant managed hosting architecture while delivering critical functional and compliance improvements.

title: OT Security Engineer
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Môi trường đẩy nhanh phát triển năng lực
- Nơi quy tụ nhân tài người Việt trên toàn cầu

jobDescription:
The OT Security Engineer is responsible for securing the airport's operational technology — baggage handling, building management, fire-safety interfaces, physical access control, CCTV, and supporting industrial systems — from design review through commissioning and into operations. Working on the owner's team, the role reviews and challenges the designs delivered by the systems integrator and M&E contractors, verifies security evidence before acceptance, and represents OT security at the project's Architecture Review Board.

The ideal candidate brings deep technical knowledge across ICS and building-automation systems, industrial networking, and OT security frameworks such as IEC 62443, NIST SP 800-82, and CIS Controls — with proven experience in greenfield deployments, design assurance, and security acceptance in critical infrastructure environments. Working proficiency in both Vietnamese and English is required.

Key Responsibilities

1. OT Security Architecture Review & Assurance

- Review the systems integrator's HLD/LLD network and security designs for the OT scope: zones and conduits per IEC 62443, firewall placement, and segmentation between IT, OT, and public-facing networks.
- Verify with L2/L3 evidence — VLAN, SVI, and routing records, management-plane and PAM design, wireless isolation proof — that no protected flow bypasses the designated firewalls.
- Review OT remote-access and patching paths (jump host, patch staging) to ensure no uncontrolled IT-to OT connectivity emerges.
- Track findings to closure through the project's decision and gap registers, distinguishing design risk from evidence gap.

2. Airport OT Systems & Safety Boundaries

- Own the OT security view of the airport systems: baggage handling (BHS), building management (BMS/HVAC), fire alarm (monitor-only integration), physical access control (PACS), CCTV, master clock, lifts and escalators, and power management.
- Defend safety boundaries: hardwired interlocks sit below the software layer and must remain independent of any network or command path.
- Participate in FAT/SAT/SIT and commissioning: witness command-verification, failuremode, and interlock override testing with the M&E contractors and the Commissioning Authority, and hold security acceptance criteria at each gate through ORAT.

3. Governance, Compliance & Regulatory Alignment

- Apply IEC 62443, NIST SP 800-82, and CIS Controls pragmatically to an airport OT environment.
- Operate within Vietnam's regulatory framework for critical information infrastructure: the Law on Cybersecurity, Decree 53, and personal data protection requirements, including reporting relationships with CAAV and the Ministry of Public Security.
- Prepare and defend OT security positions at the Architecture Review Board; produce documentation in both English and Vietnamese for the architecture team, contractors, and authorities.

4. OT Visibility, Monitoring & SOC Integration

- Build and maintain a comprehensive OT asset inventory (wired, wireless, and IIoT) as the foundation for segmentation and monitoring decisions.
- Define requirements and acceptance criteria for passive OT network monitoring and anomaly detection, evaluating platforms capability-first: asset-discovery depth, protocol coverage, and SIEM export quality.
- Integrate OT telemetry into the enterprise SIEM (Splunk-based), and define alert ownership together with the SOC and the operations team.

5. Secure Procurement & Supplier Gating

- Write capability-based security requirements for OT procurements and assess supplier responses.
- Operate device compliance questionnaires as procurement gates: protocol conformance, TLS support, authenticated access, safe-state behaviour on loss of communications, and interlock independence.
- Define proof-of-concept scope and acceptance criteria before any monitoring or enforcement platform is purchased.

6. Wireless & IIoT Security

- Review wireless designs for the OT estate and verify isolation evidence for guest and public Wi-Fi against corporate and OT networks (WLC placement, SSID/VLAN separation, 802.1X, WPA3-Enterprise).
- Assess IIoT and telemetry radio proposals (LoRa, private 5G) as they arise, including Vietnamese spectrum constraints.

7. Emerging OT Platform Security

- Contribute to security review of the next-phase OT platform: Unified Namespace (MQTT/Sparkplug B, OPC UA, Kafka), IT/OT Bridge with hardware data diode, and IEC 61499 software-defined automation — including engineering and deployment-plane security, recovery and IEC 61131-3 fallback, and autonomy governance.
requirements:
Qualifications & Requirements

Education

- Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Science, Electrical, Electronics, Industrial or Control Engineering, or equivalent experience.

Experience

- Min 3–5 years in OT/ICS security, industrial networking, or building-automation security.
- Experience in airports, critical infrastructure, or large campus environments strongly preferred; greenfield construction-phase experience is a significant advantage.

Languages

- Vietnamese and English at working proficiency (required).

Certifications (Preferred)

- ISA/IEC 62443 Expert / Practitioner, SANS GICSP, GRID, CISSP, CISM, CWSP / CWNA (for wireless OT).

Technical Competencies

- Proficient in BACnet/IP (mandatory building-systems protocol on this project), OPC UA, and IP networking and firewalling in segmented OT environments; TLS/PKI fundamentals.
- Working knowledge of MQTT/Sparkplug B, Modbus TCP (legacy-exception handling), and industrial wireless security.
- Hands-on experience with at least one passive OT monitoring / asset-discovery platform (e.g., Forescout, Nozomi Networks, Claroty, Dragos, Armis).
- Experience with enterprise SIEM (Splunk preferred), EDR in mixed IT/OT estates, and firewall review at both rulebase and architecture level.
- Familiarity with PLC/controller ecosystems (Schneider, Siemens, Rockwell) and exposure to IEC 61499 / IEC 61131-3 concepts.
- Familiar with risk management, threat modeling, and incident response for OT systems.

Soft Skills

- Evidence-driven mindset: comfortable withholding acceptance until proof is provided, and able to state precisely what evidence would close a finding.
- Able to hold a security position under pressure from vendors or contractors, and to revise it when the evidence changes.
- Balances security rigour with operational uptime and a fixed opening date.
- Strong documentation habits: registers, decision records, and review comments that others can act on.
- Clear communication and stakeholder coordination across engineering, operations, and regulatory audiences.
benefits:
Salary & Allowances

- 13-month salary with annual performance bonus, project incentives, sales incentives (based on position)
- Lunch allowance: 730.000 VND/month
- Special occasion bonus: 2.500.000VND/year
- Annual leaves: Up to 20 days/year (based on levels)
- Health: Social insurance, premium health insurance, yearly health check

Career Growth

- Diverse career path: Management or Expert and functions rotation opportunity
- Free learning sources in Udemy, Coursera, O'relly platforms; internal workshop, certification sponsorship, and exclusive mentoring from C-levels
- Recognition and awards at team and organizational levels.

Working Environment

- Open & collaborative working space foster both individual focus and teamwork activities
- Young, dynamic, and collaborative working atmosphere
- Unwind zones: gaming, table tennis, yoga, gyms, bath rooms, sleep corner.
- Quarterly/yearly teambuilding & engaged internal events.

title: Mid/Sr iOS Developer - English required
label: SUPER HOT

jobDescription:
Rakuten FinTech Vietnam Co., Ltd. is the company, which was established in 2021, and the subsidiary of Rakuten Card, which is one of the biggest credit card company in Japan. Our mission is to develop internal system and mission-critical system for Rakuten Card and FinTech group companies to contribute to FinTech business growth, also to provide attractive environment for talented engineers in both Vietnam and Japan.

Job Description

As an iOS Developer, you will be responsible for the full lifecycle of mobile application development for our FinTech services. You will design, develop, test, and deploy robust, user-friendly, and secure iOS applications that serve millions of users.

Responsibilities:

- Lead development activities for iOS mobile applications for our FinTech services, ensuring high quality, performance, and adherence to best practices using Swift.
- Conduct solution research and implementation studies for new mobile application features and proof-of-concepts (POCs), evaluating technical feasibility and proposing optimal solutions.
- Drive the improvement and enhancement of automated testing strategies including unit, integration, and UI tests (e.g., XCTest), to ensure high code quality and reliability.
- Propose and implement various technical improvements for our services within the iOS ecosystem, focusing on architecture, performance, and user experience.
- Actively contribute to the proposition of new functions and services, translating business requirements into technical solutions.
- Collaborate closely with product owners, UI/UX designers, and backend teams to define requirements, integrate APIs, and ensure seamless end-to-end functionality.
- Participate in code reviews, providing constructive feedback and ensuring adherence to coding standards and best practices.
- Ensure compliance with security best practices for mobile application development in a FinTech environment.
requirements:
Must have:

- At least 5+ years of professional experience in iOS application development using Swift.
- Proven experience consuming Web APIs for mobile application development.
- Intermediate-level in English communication (B2 or equivalent), capable of technical discussions.
- Strong knowledge of source control systems (e.g., Git) and defect tracking tools.
- Solid experience with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).
- Good knowledge of databases and SQL, with experience integrating mobile apps with backend databases.
- Must be independent, responsible, and self-motivated, with a proven ability to learn quickly and achieve superior results.
- Strong communication skills, with proven ability to present complex ideas and document technical solutions clearly and concisely.
- Experience with unit testing frameworks (e.g., XCTest) and writing testable code.
- Familiarity with UI/UX design tools and collaboration with designers (e.g., Figma, Sketch, Zeplin).

Nice to have:

- Experience with automated testing tools (e.g., Appium, XCUITest).
- Experience with building large-scale, enterprise-level mobile projects.
- Understanding of microservices architecture and cloud computing concepts.
- Experience with CI/CD pipelines for mobile apps.
- Experience in the FinTech domain.
- Experience with TestRails or similar test management tools.
- Experience with Android development is a plus.

title: Lead/Senior Security Engineer
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Flexible working time
- Hybrid working
- Competitive salary package
jobDescription:
ITviec's Client is seeking a highly skilled and hands-on Lead/Senior Security Engineer with a strong focus on secure coding and automation (Python) to join our Service Operations team. This role is ideal for engineers who are passionate about building secure, scalable systems, integrating security into development workflows, and supporting banking/financial domain applications in a cloud-native (AWS) environment.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain security automation tools and scripts using Python to support application security and DevSecOps processes
- Perform secure code reviews across platforms (Kotlin, Node.js, Android, iOS, Python), with strong emphasis on Python-based systems
- Integrate and automate security controls into CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions)
- Work closely with engineering teams to embed secure coding practices into the SDLC
- Implement and manage SAST/SCA/DAST tools and automate vulnerability detection and remediation workflows
- Support API and application security (REST, GraphQL), including authentication, authorization, and encryption practices
- Conduct basic penetration testing and vulnerability validation (mobile, web, APIs) – depth is not required, focus is on remediation and automation
- Perform threat modelling (e.g., STRIDE) and risk assessment for applications, especially in banking systems
- Collaborate with infrastructure teams to ensure secure deployment on AWS cloud environments
- Contribute to application security standards, policies, and best practices aligned with OWASP
- Monitor and respond to emerging security threats, including risks related to AI-enabled systems
- Support BAU security operations, vulnerability management, and continuous improvement initiatives
requirements:
Required Qualifications

- 5+ years of hands-on experience in Python development (mandatory, strong coding capability is critical)
- 8 years of experience in application security/DevSecOps
- Experience working in banking/financial services domain
- Strong experience with AWS cloud services and cloud security practices
- Solid understanding of secure coding practices and code review methodologies
- Experience integrating security tools into CI/CD pipelines
- Familiarity with SAST/SCA/DAST tools
- Basic understanding of penetration testing concepts and tools (e.g., Burp Suite, MobSF, Frida)
- Knowledge of API security, authentication mechanisms, and cryptographic fundamentals
- Experience working in Agile/DevOps environments

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with security automation frameworks and tooling in Python
- Exposure to AI/ML application security (e.g., prompt injection, model abuse)
- Certifications such as AWS Security Specialty, CSSLP, OSCP (optional)
- Experience with container security (Docker, Kubernetes) and IaC scanning
- Familiarity with banking security standards and compliance requirements
benefits:
Why Join ITviec's Client?

- A Top-Tier World-Ranking Corporation: Join a leading global IT powerhouse that drives digital transformation for the world’s top financial institutions and insurance companies.
- Latest Technology Updates: Work with the most updated and cutting-edge technologies, including Cloud migration, Next-Generation Mainframe, AI, and modern software architectures.
- Clear Career Progression Roadmap: Enjoy a transparent and clearly defined path for your career advancement within an agile, collaborative, and fast-growing international environment.

title: QA Lead (Manufacturing)
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Flexible Hybrid Working Style
- Open Communication & Comfortable Culture
- Abundant Progression via Dynamic Restructuring
jobDescription:
Role Summary: Itviec’s client is seeking a highly skilled QA Leader to lead the definition and execution of our product QA strategy and solutions. The QA Leader will work closely with cross-functional teams to build a scalable, efficient, innovative QA organization that delivers a seamless user experience. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in quality assurance methodologies, coupled with the ability to create and execute a vision for establishing the first QA team in the local organization from scratch.

Key Responsibilities:

- You'll lead the definition and execution of our product QA strategy. Your mission is to continuously deliver value and earn customer trust. You'll achieve this by collaborating and discussing with stakeholders from a broad perspective, moving beyond just "how to ensure quality and improve processes" to also consider "why quality is important and what we should prioritize right now".
- You will be responsible for establishing the first QA team in the Vietnamese organization from scratch.
- We expect the person who joins us in this position to work closely with both the Vietnamese development organization and the Japanese QA organization to propose and establish the ideal QA system.
- Improving non-functional requirements, including quality, is a key objective for the entire development organization, so this is a position with very high expectations.

The following are examples of specific tasks, but the scope of work is not limited to these.

- Defining the desired quality level based on product vision, business strategy, and organizational status
- Establishing QA systems and mechanisms to achieve the mission (including training and hiring QA members)
- Developing test strategies and leading test planning, design, and execution
- Reviewing product specifications from a quality perspective and proposing improvements
- Continuously promoting automated and manual testing throughout the software delivery process
- Other tasks include identifying quality-related issues and planning and promoting initiatives to address them.
requirements:
Must have:

- Proven track record of leading the formulation, design, and execution of comprehensive QA strategies.
- Fluent business-level English communication skills, with the ability to discuss technical concepts and align with global stakeholders.

Nice to have:

- Experience managing QA and development workflows for large-scale systems that span multiple cross-functional teams.
- Experience designing and implementing testing processes in accordance with standards such as ISTQB, ISO29119, or general global QA best practices.
- Direct people management and leadership experience overseeing QA engineering teams.
- Practical experience driving quality assurance within fast-paced Agile development environments.
benefits:
- Solid Financial Security & Career Growth We offer a highly competitive compensation package calibrated precisely to your advanced engineering expertise, featuring a guaranteed 13th-month salary and formal merit-based salary reviews conducted 2 times per year to reward your impact. You will receive 100% of your monthly basic salary and full mandatory social insurance coverage right from day one during your 2-month probation period. All statutory social, health, unemployment, and workers' accident compensation insurance contributions are fully provided in strict accordance with local labor laws, ensuring complete financial peace of mind.
- Premium Health & Growth Support Your physical well-being and continuous professional development are paramount to our growth. You will be fully enrolled in a comprehensive premium private medical insurance plan alongside regular annual comprehensive health checkups. To support your continuous upskilling, we provide robust financial backing for external training courses, technical workshops, intensive internal/external training programs, and server fee subsidies, while equipping you with high-end PCs and external monitors tailored specifically to your desired specifications.
- Excellent Work-Life Balance & Flexibility We strongly champion a healthy work-life equilibrium by operating on a modern hybrid working style that requires coming to the office at least once a week, offering great flexibility to manage your own schedule. Our premium office locations are situated in Binh Thanh District (HCMC) and Nam Tu Liem / Cau Giay District (Hanoi) to ensure a convenient and accessible commute. To ensure you have ample time to recharge, we offer a generous time-off policy featuring 12 days of standard annual paid leave, national public holidays, and dedicated year-end holidays, alongside useful perks like childcare allowances, commuting allowances, and life-event congratulatory gifts.
- Vibrant Office Perks & Culture Our workspace offers an inspiring environment designed to fuel your creativity and foster open, cross-cultural collaboration across international teams. We maintain a supportive, product-minded culture where engineers look past just writing code to truly care about the "Why" behind every feature to deliver maximum user value. Our vibrant community is enhanced by exciting team-building activities, grand Year-End parties, and an extensive rewards structure—including bi-annual corporate awards and MVP recognitions to celebrate your outstanding technical achievements.

The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in software engineering and hands-on coding, coupled with the ability to create and execute a vision for team management, continuous process improvement, and technical excellence.

Key Responsibilities:

- Team Leadership & Management: Start by managing a single development team with the expectation to scale and oversee multiple engineering squads in the future. Actively foster an internal culture of continuous improvement and technical excellence across the organization.
- Hands-on Development & Quality Assurance: Actively participate in the day-to-day development and maintenance of software products. Safeguard the high standards of the codebase and ensure exceptional code quality through continuous code reviews, pair programming, and direct coding contributions.
- Member Training & Professional Growth: Lead the training and development of engineering team members by executing purposeful 1-on-1 alignment sessions, providing detailed evaluation feedback, and offering career coaching.
- Architecture & Scalable Engineering Solutions: Collaborate tightly with product and engineering divisions to design, architect, and implement robust, highly scalable software solutions that align fluidly with the company's business goals.
- Organizational Design & Value Maximization: Handle strategic organizational design with a long-term eye on business and product scale. Proactively identify core engineering roadblocks, then plan and execute concrete measures to maximize the overall value of the engineering division.
- Tech Culture & Talent Recruitment: Act as a core ambassador to spread the corporate tech culture, drive engineering recruitment pipelines to attract top talent, and participate in external PR activities.
- Cross-Border Communication Coordination: Facilitate smooth technical collaboration and alignment across global, multi-national development centers using a dynamic mix of Japanese and English.
- Adaptable Work-Style Task Execution: Effectively balance and execute managerial and technical responsibilities by adapting to anticipated workplace work styles as required by the product's needs: Technical Guidance Style: Focus heavily on team management and leverage your deep technical expertise to guide the squad toward appropriate technical decisions. While this style presents fewer opportunities for day-to-day hands-on coding, it relies on your comprehensive technical capabilities as a foundation to protect product quality through conducting critical codebase reviews. Active On-Site Development Style: Commit actively to development on the ground while simultaneously managing the team. This style provides high-volume opportunities for actual hands-on coding, allowing you to build deep trust with stakeholders and climb to higher organizational layers by delivering concrete development results, unified implementations, code reviews, and deployments.
- Technical Guidance Style: Focus heavily on team management and leverage your deep technical expertise to guide the squad toward appropriate technical decisions. While this style presents fewer opportunities for day-to-day hands-on coding, it relies on your comprehensive technical capabilities as a foundation to protect product quality through conducting critical codebase reviews.
- Active On-Site Development Style: Commit actively to development on the ground while simultaneously managing the team. This style provides high-volume opportunities for actual hands-on coding, allowing you to build deep trust with stakeholders and climb to higher organizational layers by delivering concrete development results, unified implementations, code reviews, and deployments.
requirements:
Must have:

- Proven track record as a development team manager or Engineering Manager steering product squads to deliver results from highly complex requirements.
- Solid foundational background as a software engineer with hands-on coding experience, with a verified ability to develop, contribute to, and review complex codebases.
- Demonstrated experience navigating technology verification, requirements analysis, architectural design, and infrastructure construction for multiple projects or teams.
- Strong experience driving and optimizing Agile and Scrum development workflows.
- Excellent capability to balance technical and managerial responsibilities effectively to maintain high personal and team productivity.
- Fluent business-level communication skills in English (cross-team collaboration is a dynamic mix of English and Japanese).
- Current residency in Vietnam or concrete relocation plans (foreign nationals must possess a valid local work permit or legal eligibility).

Nice to have:

- Prior management experience working within a fast-growing, multinational, or multi-team development infrastructure.
- Business-level Japanese language proficiency is highly advantageous.
benefits:
- Solid Financial Security & Career Growth We offer a highly competitive compensation package calibrated precisely to your advanced engineering expertise, featuring a guaranteed 13th-month salary and formal merit-based salary reviews conducted 2 times per year to reward your impact. You will receive 100% of your monthly basic salary and full mandatory social insurance coverage right from day one during your 2-month probation period. All statutory social, health, unemployment, and workers' accident compensation insurance contributions are fully provided in strict accordance with local labor laws, ensuring complete financial peace of mind.
- Premium Health & Growth Support Your physical well-being and continuous professional development are paramount to our growth. You will be fully enrolled in a comprehensive premium private medical insurance plan alongside regular annual comprehensive health checkups. To support your continuous upskilling, we provide robust financial backing for external training courses, technical workshops, intensive internal/external training programs, and server fee subsidies, while equipping you with high-end PCs and external monitors tailored specifically to your desired specifications.
- Excellent Work-Life Balance & Flexibility We strongly champion a healthy work-life equilibrium by operating on a modern hybrid working style that requires coming to the office at least once a week, offering great flexibility to manage your own schedule. Our premium office locations are situated in Binh Thanh District (HCMC) and Nam Tu Liem / Cau Giay District (Hanoi) to ensure a convenient and accessible commute. To ensure you have ample time to recharge, we offer a generous time-off policy featuring 12 days of standard annual paid leave, national public holidays, and dedicated year-end holidays, alongside useful perks like childcare allowances, commuting allowances, and life-event congratulatory gifts.
- Vibrant Office Perks & Culture Our workspace offers an inspiring environment designed to fuel your creativity and foster open, cross-cultural collaboration across international teams. We maintain a supportive, product-minded culture where engineers look past just writing code to truly care about the "Why" behind every feature to deliver maximum user value. Our vibrant community is enhanced by exciting team-building activities, grand Year-End parties, and an extensive rewards structure—including bi-annual corporate awards and MVP recognitions to celebrate your outstanding technical achievements.

title: Analyst & Optimization Specialist (Python/C++)
company: Công ty cổ phần hàng hải Vsico
label: HOT
jobDescription:
MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆCVị trí: Analyst & Optimization Specialist (Python/C++)

- Mức lương; Trao đổi khi phỏng vấn
- Địa điểm làm việc: Hà Nội
- Thời gian làm việc: Từ thứ Hai đến thứ Sáu tại văn phòng, thứ Bảy làm online (WFH). Từ 8h00-17h15.
- Mô tả công việc: Chịu trách nhiệm nghiên cứu, xây dựng và vận hành các mô hình tính toán nhằm tối ưu hiệu quả khai thác đội tàu container.

I. Nhiệm vụ chính

- Phân tích và tối ưu phương án khai thác tàu trên các tuyến vận chuyển.
- Xây dựng mô hình tính toán tối ưu việc xếp container lên tàu (Container Stowage Planning).
- Phân tích hiệu quả sử dụng tải trọng, dung tích và khả năng khai thác của tàu.
- Xây dựng các thuật toán tối ưu hóa nhằm:
- Giảm chi phí khai thác.
- Tăng hệ số sử dụng sức chở.
- Giảm thời gian làm hàng tại cảng.
- Đảm bảo các yêu cầu về cân bằng, ổn định và an toàn xếp dỡ.
- Phân tích dữ liệu khai thác, xây dựng các báo cáo đánh giá hiệu quả tuyến vận tải.
- Phối hợp với bộ phận khai thác tàu và CNTT để phát triển các công cụ tính toán, phần mềm hỗ trợ ra quyết định.
- Thực hiện các nhiệm vụ nghiên cứu, mô phỏng và tối ưu theo yêu cầu của công ty.
requirements:
II.Yêu cầu

- Tốt nghiệp đại học chính quy chuyên ngành: Toán Tin, Toán ứng dụng, Khoa học dữ liệu, Khoa học máy tính có nền tảng mạnh về Toán. Ưu tiên ứng viên có scan bằng tốt nghiệp

Kiến thức

- Toán tối ưu (Optimization).
- Nghiên cứu tác nghiệp (Operations Research).
- Quy hoạch tuyến tính, quy hoạch nguyên.
- Thuật toán.
- Xác suất thống kê.
- Phân tích dữ liệu.

Kỹ năng

- Thành thạo Python hoặc C++.
- Thành thạo Excel.
- Có khả năng sử dụng một trong các công cụ tối ưu như Gurobi, CPLEX, OR-Tools hoặc tương đương là lợi thế.
- Tư duy logic, giải quyết bài toán tối ưu tốt.
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu tiếng Anh chuyên ngành.

Không yêu cầu

- Kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực hàng hải hoặc logistics.
- Kiến thức về container sẽ được đào tạo sau khi nhận việc.
benefits:
- Được đào tạo chuyên sâu về khai thác tàu container và nghiệp vụ hàng hải.
- Tham gia xây dựng các bài toán tối ưu quy mô lớn.
- Môi trường làm việc với dữ liệu thực tế và các bài toán có tính học thuật cao.
- Thu nhập cạnh tranh theo năng lực.
- Thưởng theo hiệu quả công việc.
- Đầy đủ chế độ bảo hiểm và phúc lợi theo quy định.

We are looking for a DevOps Engineer to build, maintain, and scale the technology infrastructure behind TeenCare‘s learning and operations platform.

- Research and implement emerging technologies such as AI Agents, RAG, workflow automation, and serverless architectures.
- Continuously improve platform stability, security, and engineering efficiency.

Strong Plus

benefits:

In addition, TeenUp also helps each individual satisfy and maximize their self-study needs through Learning Hub on Base Square technology application.

title: Senior Software Engineer – DevOps
label: HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
Job description

The Senior Software Engineer – DevOps is responsible to design, build, and maintain CI/CD solutions and cloud infrastructure automation for dedicated and hybrid cloud environments on Microsoft Azure. The role works closely with software developers, QA, and production IT teams to oversee code releases, streamline delivery, and ensure that engineering teams can ship features faster in an automated, repeatable, and secure way. The SSE DevOps also contributes to platform design decisions and mentors junior DevOps members.

- Work closely with development teams to analyze and implement branching strategies, and subsequently implement build and deploy automation using Azure Pipelines.
- Contribute to the design; develop, configure, administer, and maintain CI/CD tools and utilities across development, staging, UAT, and production environments on Microsoft Azure.
- Provision, version, and manage cloud infrastructure as code (IaC) using Terraform, including modularization, state management, and safe rollback.
- Containerize applications and manage deployments using Docker and Helm charts on Kubernetes (AKS), including release strategies such as blue/green and canary deployments.
- Implement, configure, and administer system logging, monitoring, and observability solutions using Prometheus, Grafana, Azure Monitor, and Application Insights.
- Work closely with development and testing teams to set up development environments and components required for automation testing and performance testing.
- Administer, deploy, monitor, and health-check systems; ensure high availability, backup, and disaster recovery across Azure workloads.
- Support development teams to troubleshoot and resolve system problems; drive root cause analysis (RCA) and preventive improvements for production incidents.
- Apply security, compliance, and secrets management best practices across pipelines and cloud workloads.
- Research new DevOps techniques and tools to continuously improve the productivity of the DevOps team.
- Train, coach, and mentor new/junior DevOps project members.
- Obtain professional certificates when required.
- Strictly follow customer processes (when required) and the company's processes and systems complying with CMMI standards.
requirements:
Qualifications

- Must-have4+ years' experience in DevOps, cloud/platform engineering, or infrastructure automation.Strong hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure, including Azure Administrator, Azure DevOps, and monitoring & observability on Azure.Proven experience designing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines with Azure Pipelines.Strong proficiency in Docker and deploying containerized workloads on Kubernetes (AKS) with Helm charts.Working proficiency in Terraform for Infrastructure as Code.Hands-on experience with Prometheus and Grafana for metrics, dashboards, and alerting.Strong scripting skills in PowerShell, Bash, or Python; solid understanding of security, load balancing, and cloud troubleshooting.Proven ability to mentor and coach junior DevOps engineers; strong ownership, communication, and documentation skills.
- 4+ years' experience in DevOps, cloud/platform engineering, or infrastructure automation.
- Strong hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure, including Azure Administrator, Azure DevOps, and monitoring & observability on Azure.
- Proven experience designing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines with Azure Pipelines.
- Strong proficiency in Docker and deploying containerized workloads on Kubernetes (AKS) with Helm charts.
- Working proficiency in Terraform for Infrastructure as Code.
- Hands-on experience with Prometheus and Grafana for metrics, dashboards, and alerting.
- Strong scripting skills in PowerShell, Bash, or Python; solid understanding of security, load balancing, and cloud troubleshooting.
- Proven ability to mentor and coach junior DevOps engineers; strong ownership, communication, and documentation skills.
- Additional / Nice-to-haveFamiliarity with SQL Server administration and query optimization; NoSQL experience is a plus.Exposure to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL workloads.Experience using Azure Application Insights for application performance monitoring (APM).Understanding of CDN configuration and optimization (e.g., Azure Front Door / Azure CDN).Experience with secrets management (Azure Key Vault / HashiCorp Vault).Experience with logging management tools such as ELK/EFK.Exposure to multi-cloud environments (AWS/GCP) is a plus.Familiarity with AI-assisted DevOps tools for pipeline generation, IaC, risk detection, and incident troubleshooting — with the ability to review and validate AI outputs before use.Relevant certifications preferred: Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator / Azure DevOps Engineer Expert, CKA/CKAD, or Terraform Associate.
- Familiarity with SQL Server administration and query optimization; NoSQL experience is a plus.
- Exposure to Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL workloads.
- Experience using Azure Application Insights for application performance monitoring (APM).
- Understanding of CDN configuration and optimization (e.g., Azure Front Door / Azure CDN).
- Experience with secrets management (Azure Key Vault / HashiCorp Vault).
- Experience with logging management tools such as ELK/EFK.
- Exposure to multi-cloud environments (AWS/GCP) is a plus.
- Familiarity with AI-assisted DevOps tools for pipeline generation, IaC, risk detection, and incident troubleshooting — with the ability to review and validate AI outputs before use.
- Relevant certifications preferred: Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator / Azure DevOps Engineer Expert, CKA/CKAD, or Terraform Associate.

Trung tâm Công nghệ thông tin - Trung tâm công nghệ lõi của Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Viễn thông Quân đội (VIC) đang tìm kiếm những AI Engineer đam mê công nghệ để cùng xây dựng các nền tảng AI thế hệ mới. Tại đây, bạn sẽ được trực tiếp tham gia các dự án về AI Agent, Generative AI, MLOps và các hệ thống AI quy mô lớn, tạo ra những sản phẩm có tác động thực tế đến hoạt động quản trị và chuyển đổi số của Viettel trên toàn cầu.

💡 BẠN SẼ LÀM GÌ?

- Phát triển các ứng dụng AI, AI Agent phục vụ tự động hóa và tối ưu vận hành doanh nghiệp.
- Xây dựng và tối ưu các giải pháp Generative AI, LLM, RAG, Multi-Agent.
- Thiết kế, triển khai và vận hành hệ thống AI trên môi trường thực tế.
- Xây dựng nền tảng MLOps, đảm bảo hệ thống AI hoạt động ổn định, bảo mật và có khả năng mở rộng.
- Nghiên cứu, đánh giá và ứng dụng các công nghệ AI mới vào các bài toán thực tiễn.
- Tham gia thiết kế kiến trúc hệ thống và phát triển các sản phẩm AI quy mô lớn của Tập đoàn.
requirements:

- Thành thạo các framework AI phổ biến như PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, HuggingFace, LlamaIndex...
- Có kinh nghiệm với RAG, AI Agent, Vector Database, SQL/NoSQL.
- Có kỹ năng sử dụng ngôn ngữ lập trình Python, Java.
- Có hiểu biết về quản trị hệ thống, hạ tầng triển khai AI (Docker, Kubernetes, Cloud AI services) là một lợi thế.
benefits:
Đãi ngộ

# Dẫn đầu thị trường

- Cơ hội được làm việc tại Tập đoàn tiên phong mở đường , kiến tạo tương lai thông minh, gắn kết của Việt Nam.
- Cơ hội được thử sức trong những lĩnh vực công nghệ tiên tiến, hiện đại nhất.

# Môi trường năng động sáng tạo

- Môi trường làm việc cởi mở và năng động, khuyến khích trao đổi ý tưởng ở mọi cấp, cho phép bạn làm việc, sáng tạo theo cách riêng.
- Được khơi gợi cảm hứng làm việc với văn phòng xanh, không gian mở, hiện đại tiêu chuẩn quốc tế.

# Cơ hội thử thách và phát triển

- Áp dụng kiến thức, kĩ năng, kinh nghiệm chuyên môn giải quyết các bài toán hấp dẫn, thử thách tại Viettel.
- Cơ hội thử sức ở nhiều lĩnh vực, sản phẩm và quốc gia khác nhau góp phần thay đổi xã hội .
- Viettel cam kết cho bạn nền tảng vững chắc để học hỏi và phát triển.
- Sẵn sàng trao quyền, cơ hội đột phá cho những người trẻ tuổi.
- Cơ hội học hỏi từ các chuyên gia hàng đầu, lãnh đạo và đồng nghiệp ưu tú.

# Chế ngộ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh

- Lương thưởng cạnh tranh trên thị trường, phản ánh đúng năng lực thực tế.
- Được thư giãn, khơi nguồn sáng tạo với Happy Time mỗi ngày .
- Thưởng thức bữa trưa thơm ngon tại Tập đoàn, được chọn lọc bởi các chuyên gia dinh dưỡng.
- Quà tặng, thưởng các dịp lễ Tết, nghỉ mát, hỗ trợ ăn trưa, hỗ trợ điện thoại; tổng giá trị phúc lợi bổ sung tối thiểu 1.500 USD mỗi năm.
- Tham gia đầy đủ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN và bảo hiểm sức khỏe riêng của Tập đoàn, khám sức khỏe định kỳ và ưu đãi mua bảo hiểm cho người thân. Chế độ chăm sóc y tế đặc biệt cho CBNV và người thân với trang thiết bị hiện đại.
- 12 ngày phép và 15 ngày nghỉ hưởng nguyên lương gồm 11 ngày lễ Tết, 3 ngày nghỉ mát và 1 ngày sáng tạo.
- Được tham gia đào tạo nâng cao chuyên môn theo nhu cầu công việc.
- Có cơ hội phát triển theo hướng Quân nhân chuyên nghiệp hoặc Sĩ quan.

Khác

Viettel tuyệt đối không thu bất cứ khoản tiền nào của ứng viên khi nộp hồ sơ tham gia dự tuyển và khi vào làm việc tại Viettel nếu trúng tuyển

- Implement CIS hardening standards across laptops, desktops, network appliances, Servers, containers, and cloud environments.
- Participate in security incident response: investigation, containment, and post-incident review.
- Partner with the Threat Detection team: tune existing detections and develop new rules.
- Apply threat intelligence: turn emerging threat data into stronger detection, containment, and response.

- Automation: Develop scripts and automation tools to streamline repetitive security operations and workflows.

Experience

- Experience operating in production environments at a meaningful scale.

Skills & Expertise

- Hands-on with: WAF, CDN, Firewall, SIEM, EDR, Cloud.

label: SUPER HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
Why We Are Hiring

We are hiring one Security Specialist to strengthen and grow the Corporate Security & Governance function at MFV. This person will:

- Take over and run the routine corporate security and governance operations currently handled by the Money Forward Japan (MFJ) side, and operate them locally at MFV.
- Gradually build up expertise and, over time, take ownership of security incident handling, focused primarily on MFV.
- Work alongside the existing security members to drive security improvements at MFV, collaborating on security education and training tailored to MFV’s current situation.

About the CISO Office

With the mission “Maximize the value we deliver to customers through security,” the CISO Office defines how security should work across the entire Money Forward group.

Keeping services running and preventing information leaks matter deeply—but they are only part of what we care about. Excessive security controls can slow development and reduce or delay the value we deliver to customers. As security professionals, we constantly weigh risk and design the security that is genuinely optimal for our customers.

Our security principles

- Embedded security in business strategy — Security is never considered in isolation. We design security measures together with the business strategy: the current business phase, cost, expected future revenue scale, and the potential losses if a risk materializes.
- Advanced balancing between security and experience — The strongest possible security is not always the right answer, as it raises cost and can harm usability. We assess risk and choose the optimal measures—sometimes taking on risk to pursue maximum user value—and drive automation to reconcile usability and security at a high level.
- Autonomous and scalable security organization — As the group’s development organization grows, a CISO Office that owns every security function would become a bottleneck. Each development team must be able to build secure services autonomously, and the CISO Office builds the mechanisms and support that make this possible.

What You Will Do

Drawing on your knowledge and experience in information security, coding, and infrastructure, you will maintain and improve Money Forward’s security in close collaboration with the Global IT department and the CISO Office. Your responsibilities include:

- Work closely with and report to the CISO Office in Japan on corporate security and security governance, ensuring effective cross-border collaboration—and, through this, contribute to group-wide (global) security matters.
- Take over routine corporate security and governance operations from the MFJ side and run them locally at MFV.
- Operate and manage security tooling such as EDR, SWG/DLP, and MDM.
- Perform security risk management for internal systems and external SaaS usage.
- Build controls that comply with security guidelines and governance requirements.
- Respond to security incidents for internal systems, progressively taking ownership of incident handling at MFV.
- Plan and drive device security measures.
- Implement and roll out frameworks such as NIST CSF and CIS Benchmarks.
- Gather information on and validate new technologies from major vendors (e.g., Microsoft).
- Collaborate with the existing to design and deliver security education and training suited to MFV’s situation.
requirements:
Required Skills & Experience

- Solid foundational understanding of computer science, including networking, operating systems, data structures, and cryptography.
- Development experience in at least one programming language.
- Hands-on experience building and operating internal systems (e.g., MDM, EDR, Entra ID).
- Experience building and operating security appliances (Firewall, IDS/IPS, etc.) and network equipment.
- Business-level English for professional communication with the Japan-based team and for documentation.

Preferred Skills & Experience

- Security certifications such as CISSP, CISM, OSCP, or GCIH.
- Deep understanding of authentication and authorization, OIDC, and OAuth.
- Experience with security-related work in the finance / fintech industry (e.g., FISC and similar standards).
- Experience developing AI, or developing with the help of AI tools. (As shared in Money Forward AI Vision 2025, Money Forward is actively using AI to improve operational efficiency and expects to introduce AI agents across all products in the future.)

label: SUPER HOT

jobDescription:
Job Summary

We are looking for a powerful, high-ownership Deputy QA Manager to help lead and transform our 50-person global QA team. This is a high-level strategic role for someone with 10+ years of management experience and a strong background in software development.

In this role, you won't just manage standard testing checklists. Instead, you will build a smart, flexible quality strategy that works perfectly even when project rules are changing fast or timelines are tight. You will bridge the gap between Traditional Testing (standard code automation) and AI Era Testing (testing smart AI tools and massive data flows), while making sure our systems are fast, secure, and built to handle massive traffic.

Core Strategic Responsibilities

1. Building a Smart, Flexible Quality Strategy

- Balancing Traditional & AI Testing: Create a clear strategy that handles standard code testing (automation, APIs) while also defining new ways to test smart AI models, data pipelines, and target databases (Data marts).
- Adapting to Tough Conditions: Design flexible quality processes that protect the product's stability even when project deadlines change quickly, requirements are unclear, or conditions are chaotic.
- Proactive Quality Culture: Move the team from simply finding bugs at the end of a project to preventing bugs from the very start.

2. Leading Non-Functional Testing (NFT) Strategy

- Performance & Speed: Oversee how we test our systems to handle massive user traffic and heavy data processing without slowing down or crashing.
- Security & Vulnerabilities: Work with security teams to automate security checks early in the development lifecycle, keeping data safe from threats.
- System Resilience: Push for testing methods that prove our systems can automatically recover if a server or network fails.

3. Leading and Scaling a 50-Person Team

- Large Team Management: Manage, guide, and inspire a large team of 50 QA members across different sub-teams (automation, performance, security, data QA).
- Resource Planning: Smartly assign people to projects so that we hit deadlines without burning out our engineers.
- Ownership Mindset: Build a strong culture where everyone takes full responsibility for their work, stays proactive, and looks for ways to improve every day.

4. Team Up-skilling & Future Planning

- Training and Mentorship: Design structured training paths to help traditional QA engineers learn advanced automation, non-functional testing, and AI validation.
requirements:
- Experience: 10+ years of proven experience in QA or software engineering management roles, with a track record of successfully running large teams (40–50+ members).
- Technical Background: Strong foundational knowledge of software development, code architecture, and system design (e.g., a former software developer or highly technical QA leader).
- Dual Testing Expertise: Clear strategic understanding of both standard automation (UI, API) and modern data/AI testing (data pipelines, AI model drift).
- NFT Experience: Strong experience directing strategies for Performance, Scalability, and Security testing.
- Mindset: An exceptional level of personal ownership and proactivity. You are someone who steps into ambiguous situations and creates a clear path forward.
- Communication: We are seeking a dynamic leader with exceptional communication skills in english to align and inspire cross-functional, globally distributed teams

title: Solution Architect - AI Domain, Cloud, Kubernetes
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN CMC OPENAI
label: HOT
jobDescription:
CMC OpenAI – Thành viên trẻ tuổi nhất của Tập đoàn Công nghệ CMC – nơi những con người Việt Nam đang không ngừng khai phá giới hạn của công nghệ, xây dựng nên một thế hệ trí tuệ nhân tạo mở, minh bạch và hướng đến con người.

CMC OpenAI tiên phong phát triển các sản phẩm trong lĩnh vực trí tuệ nhân tạo, hướng tới trở thành nền tảng AI mở và an toàn do Việt Nam xây dựng, phát triển.

Chúng tôi trân trọng sự khác biệt của từng cá nhân – và tin rằng sự đa dạng trong tư duy là cốt lõi của sáng tạo. Hãy trở thành một mảnh ghép của CMC OpenAI để cùng mở ra hành trình bước vào kỷ nguyên AI toàn diện, ghi dấu những sản phẩm Make in Viet Nam trên bản đồ AI thế giới.

MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC

- Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ và kỹ thuật từ Product Manager/Business để thiết kế giải pháp kiến trúc end-to-end cho sản phẩm AI/Data (data ingestion, storage, model serving, monitoring).
- Thiết kế kiến trúc hệ thống trên cloud (multi-region/HA), bao gồm microservices, event-driven pipelines, stream/batch processing, API gateway, và integration với hệ thống bên thứ ba.
- Xác định các thành phần hạ tầng (k8s, container, message broker, data warehouse, ML infra), đưa ra lựa chọn công nghệ và trade-off (scalability, cost, latency, security).
- Định nghĩa non-functional requirements: SLO/SLI/SLA, backup/DR, observability (logs/metrics/tracing), performance, bảo mật và compliance.
- Dẫn dắt kỹ thuật cho đội dev/infra: review kiến trúc, proof-of-concept (POC), mentoring.
- Hỗ trợ triển khai, chuyển giao kiến trúc, phối hợp với DevOps/Platform/QA để đảm bảo giải pháp được triển khai đúng thiết kế.
- Tham gia đánh giá rủi ro kỹ thuật, lập kế hoạch migration/refactor và ước lượng công việc.
- Xây dựng và duy trì tài liệu kiến trúc, diagram, guideline, patterns và standard cho team.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, Khoa học máy tính, Toán – Tin hoặc các chuyên ngành liên quan
- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong vai trò Software Engineer / Technical Lead / Principal Engineer hoặc Solution Architect; có kinh nghiệm thiết kế kiến trúc cho các hệ thống cloud-native hoặc AI/Data.
- Có kinh nghiệm thiết kế và triển khai giải pháp trên ít nhất một nền tảng Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure).
- Kinh nghiệm với container & orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).
- Kinh nghiệm thiết kế data pipelines (Kafka, Pub/Sub, Airflow), data stores (Postgres, BigQuery, Snowflake,hoặc tương đương) và giải pháp ML infra (MLflow, Seldon/BentoML hoặc tương đương).
- Kinh nghiệm xây dựng API (REST/gRPC), event-driven architecture và asynchronous processing.
- Am hiểu observability (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK/EFK, OpenTelemetry) và CI/CD (GitOps, Terraform, ArgoCD/Flux, Jenkins/GitHub Actions).
- Kỹ năng phân tích kiến trúc, trade-off, viết tài liệu kỹ thuật, diagram (C4/Arch).
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp và thuyết trình mạnh, có khả năng làm việc với stakeholders kỹ thuật & non-kỹ thuật.
- Tư duy hệ thống, leadership, khả năng dẫn dắt team kỹ thuật.
- Ưu tiên: Có chứng chỉ Cloud (AWS Solutions Architect, GCP Professional Cloud Architect, Azure Architect), kinh nghiệm MLOps hoặc phát triển AI Platform, có kinh nghiệm sản phẩm AI thương mại.
benefits:
- Thu nhập upto 65tr/tháng (Gross)
- Bảo hiểm sức khỏe và các chương trình, chế độ phúc lợi của Tập đoàn CMC (ngày nghỉ sinh nhật, thưởng các dịp lễ/tết/sinh nhật Tập đoàn,…) cùng các chế độ BHXH, BHYT,v.v theo quy định Pháp luật
- Thưởng hiệu quả công việc, đánh giá năng lực, review lương hàng năm
- Cơ hội học hỏi, tham gia đào tạo và phát triển bản thân tại một Tập đoàn công nghệ lớn hàng đầu Việt Nam, với lộ trình thăng tiến nghề nghiệp rõ ràng
- Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, năng động, cởi mở, sáng tạo, đồng nghiệp vui vẻ và luôn được tạo cơ hội tiếp cận những công nghệ mới, tiên tiến nhất
- Thời gian làm việc: Thứ Hai – Thứ Sáu, check-in linh hoạt từ 8:00 – 9:00, làm việc đủ 8 giờ/ngày (nghỉ trưa 12:00 – 13:30).

title: Principal PHP Software Engineer (SaaS product)
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:

- Chế độ nghỉ ngơi vượt trội 3 kỳ nghỉ dài

jobDescription:
Tổng quan

Gia nhập công ty sản phẩm 100% vốn đầu tư nước ngoài chuyên về các dịch vụ đám mây (SaaS) hàng đầu hiện nay. Bạn sẽ được lựa chọn tham gia phát triển một trong hai phân hệ cốt lõi thuộc chuỗi giải pháp đang chiếm thị phần lớn tại thị trường quốc tế: Phân hệ quản lý email (Hệ thống lớn phục vụ hơn 8.000 doanh nghiệp với quy mô đội ngũ 15 người) hoặc Phân hệ quản lý chấm công hoàn toàn mới được xây dựng trực tiếp trên nền tảng AWS. Cả hai dự án đều sở hữu hệ thống tài liệu đặc tả (Specification) chất lượng cao và yêu cầu khắt khe về mặt kỹ thuật. Cơ hội thăng tiến rõ ràng lên vị trí Technical Leader hoặc Principal Software Engineer cho những kỹ sư mong muốn tìm hiểu sâu về hệ thống và gắn bó lâu dài từ 3 năm trở lên.

Bạn sẽ chịu trách nhiệm

- Thiết kế, triển khai xây dựng và thực hiện unit test các tính năng mới tối ưu bằng ngôn ngữ PHP thuần (Pure PHP).
- Tận dụng triệt để các công cụ trí tuệ nhân tạo (AI) tiên tiến vào quy trình hằng ngày nhằm tăng tốc độ coding, refactoring và tự động hóa kiểm thử (test automation).
- Duy trì tư duy phát triển sản phẩm lâu dài, đặt trọng tâm vào chất lượng mã nguồn (Quality) và khả năng bảo trì hệ thống tối ưu (Maintainability).
requirements:
Yêu cầu cốt lõi:

- Sở hữu tối thiểu từ 6 năm kinh nghiệm thực chiến trở lên làm việc với ngôn ngữ PHP trong các dự án phát triển ứng dụng web (bao gồm các khâu Development, Refactoring và Unit Test).
- Có từ 1 năm kinh nghiệm lead team
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc tốt với ít nhất một trong các framework PHP như Laravel, CakePHP, Zend, CodeIgniter, hoặc Yii 2.
- Tối thiểu 2 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình giao diện và front-end với VueJS, HTML, CSS và JavaScript.
- Có kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt, phối hợp làm việc nhóm hiệu quả, có khả năng nghiên cứu độc lập và giải quyết các bài toán kỹ thuật phức tạp.
- Năng lực đọc hiểu, phân tích sâu các yêu cầu nghiệp vụ từ khách hàng và kỹ năng truyền đạt kiến thức, biên soạn tài liệu kỹ thuật rõ ràng.

Điểm cộng ưu tiên:

- Từng làm việc hoặc quen thuộc với các công cụ bổ trợ như Figma, PHPStorm, GitHub.
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu chuyên ngành bằng tiếng Anh tốt; am hiểu quy trình và phong cách làm việc của doanh nghiệp quốc tế là một lợi thế lớn.
benefits:
Chế độ Đãi ngộ & Tài chính vững mạnh:

- Cam kết thu nhập "14 tháng lương/năm": Bao gồm lương tháng 13 và 1 tháng thưởng cố định (đảm bảo chi trả không phụ thuộc KPI).
- Chế độ xét tăng lương định kỳ 2 lần/năm với lộ trình thăng tiến rõ nét.
- Công ty đóng BHXH full 100% dựa trên mức lương Gross.
- Nhận nguyên vẹn 100% lương trong suốt thời gian thử việc.

Chăm sóc Sức khỏe & Gia đình toàn diện:

- Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe cao cấp do công ty đài thọ, chi trả phần lớn các chi phí y tế phát sinh.
- Hỗ trợ thủ tục và tạo điều kiện cho người thân (vợ/chồng, con cái) tham gia vào gói bảo hiểm nhóm tự nguyện của công ty.
- Chế độ nghỉ phép siêu linh hoạt: 12 ngày phép năm có thể chia nhỏ để sử dụng theo "đơn vị 30 phút", giúp bạn dễ dàng cân bằng việc gia đình (đưa đón con, chăm sóc người thân...).
- Tổ chức khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm.

Cân bằng cuộc sống & Thời gian làm việc:

- Thời gian làm việc hành chính: Thứ 2 đến Thứ 6 (từ 8:30 ~ 17:30).
- Văn hóa tôn trọng thời gian cá nhân, hầu như không làm thêm giờ (No Overtime).
- Tổng số ngày nghỉ lễ và phép năm dồi dào (hơn 30 ngày/năm, kết hợp linh hoạt giữa lịch nghỉ lễ Việt Nam và quốc tế).

Gắn kết tập thể & Hoạt động phong phú:

- Chuyến du lịch công ty (Company Trip) tiêu chuẩn 5 sao hàng năm tại các resort cao cấp, tài trợ thêm 50% chi phí tour cho người thân của nhân viên.
- Quỹ dành riêng cho hoạt động Team Building định kỳ: 170.000 VND/người/tháng.
- Sự kiện nội bộ tổ chức liên tục: Tiệc sinh nhật tháng, Year End Party, Lì xì Tết, quà tặng các dịp lễ lớn (Trung thu, Giáng sinh, Ngày Phụ nữ, Ngày Nam nhân...).
- Hỗ trợ kinh phí tham gia các câu lạc bộ thể thao (Futsal, cầu lông...).

Đào tạo, Phát triển & Vinh danh:

- Cơ hội được cử đi đào tạo trực tiếp tại nước ngoài; làm việc trực tiếp dưới sự hỗ trợ (OJT) từ các chuyên gia công nghệ quốc tế.
- Tham gia các chương trình kỹ năng mềm theo cấp độ và seminar công nghệ tổ chức định kỳ hàng tháng.
- Hệ thống giải thưởng tôn vinh giá trị xứng đáng: Giải MVP of the Year (nhận 1 tuần trải nghiệm và làm việc tại trụ sở chính nước ngoài), Quarterly MVP, giải cống hiến 5 năm....

title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer (C/C++/AUTOSAR)
location: Ho Chi Minh - Ha Noi - Da Nang
label: HOT
reasons:
- Global Exposure
- Fast Track Career
- Diversified Jobs & Technologies
jobDescription:
JOB OVERVIEW

- An exciting role as an Embedded Software Developer, working on C/C++ software development for active chassis functions.
- You will join the Suspension Software and Function teams - cross functional groups responsible for the full software stack, including control algorithm development and all tool chains required to deliver state of theart active chassis performance.

RESPONSIBILITIES

- Work within our in house software team developing software for the Suspension ECU and Central ECU.
- Collaborate closely with developers, test engineers, system engineers, and safety engineers.
- Take on cross functional tasks depending on project needs.
- Develop application level software in C++, and middleware components in C.
requirements:
- Master’s degree in Electrical/Electronics Engineering, Software Engineering (Embedded Systems & Software Development), or related fields.
- Minimum 5 years of experience in C programming (C90/ C99).
- Minimum 5 years of hands on experience in real time embedded system development.
- Industry background in Automotive.
- Experience working with AUTOSAR.
- Solid knowledge of automotive communication protocols: CAN, Automotive Ethernet.
- Understanding of UDS (Unified Diagnostic Services).
- Experience with Vector tools: CANoe, CANalyzer, VTEST.
- Knowledge and hands-on experience in low level firmware protocols: SPI, UART, PWM, DIO, PSI5.
- Experience with HIL systems and real time simulation environments.
- Familiarity with ISO 26262 functional safety implementation.
- Understanding of automotive cybersecurity standards.
- Ability to collaborate in a multicultural environment.
- Proactive communication and strong teamwork mindset.

Nice to have

- Side projects or opensource contributions.
- Knowledge of suspension systems.
- Experience with Agile software development methodologies.
- Experience with C++11 or C++14.
benefits:
- FPT Care insurance plan tailored for FPT employees.
- Attractive annual summer vacation allowance.
- Sponsored training courses for personal growth and up to 100% coverage for certification costs.
- Global and inclusive workplace with monthly cross-cultural events.
- International exposure and career growth across global locations.
- Work-life balance benefits with a flexible leave policy and annual health check-ups to support employee well-being.

jobDescription:
Chuyên viên cao cấp, Chuyên gia Tuân thủ Công nghệ - Senior IT Compliance Specialist - Khối Pháp chế và Tuân thủ (2026TD450987)

- Theo dõi, cập nhật và phân tích các văn bản quy phạm pháp luật, thông tư, quy định mới của Ngân hàng Nhà nước, Bộ Thông tin & Truyền thông, Luật An ninh mạng, Luật An toàn thông tin mạng, Nghị định 117/2018/NĐ-CP, Thông tư 18/2018/TT-NHNN, 35/2016/TT-NHNN, 09/2020/TT-NHNN (về bảo mật, chia sẻ dữ liệu, quản lý rủi ro CNTT) và các quy định liên quan khác.
- Đề xuất sửa đổi chính sách, quy trình, hướng dẫn nội bộ về tuân thủ công nghệ (IT compliance policies), bao gồm: quản lý thay đổi (change management), quản lý truy cập, bảo mật dữ liệu, phòng chống tấn công mạng, sao lưu phục hồi, kiểm soát nhà cung cấp CNTT….
- Thực hiện đánh giá tuân thủ (compliance assessment) định kỳ và đột xuất đối với các dự án CNTT, hệ thống core banking, ứng dụng mobile banking, API, cloud, outsourcing CNTT.
- Hỗ trợ thực hiện kiểm tra, giám sát tuân thủ trước/sau triển khai (pre & post implementation review) các thay đổi hệ thống, nâng cấp phần mềm, tích hợp mới.
- Phối hợp với các phòng ban CNTT (DevOps, Security, Infrastructure, Data) để phát hiện, báo cáo và đề xuất khắc phục các sai phạm tuân thủ.
- Lập báo cáo tuân thủ CNTT định kỳ gửi Ban lãnh đạo, Kiểm toán nội bộ và cơ quan quản lý nhà nước (nếu yêu cầu).
- Hỗ trợ xử lý sự cố tuân thủ CNTT, điều tra nội bộ khi có vi phạm, phối hợp với cơ quan chức năng khi cần.
- Tham gia các cuộc kiểm toán nội bộ/ngoại bộ, kiểm tra của NHNN về lĩnh vực CNTT và bảo mật.
- Tư vấn cho các đơn vị kinh doanh và công nghệ về yêu cầu tuân thủ khi phát triển sản phẩm/dịch vụ mới (ví dụ: open banking, eKYC, AI, big data).
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên các chuyên ngành: Công nghệ thông tin, An toàn thông tin, Luật (hướng tin học), Quản trị kinh doanh, Tài chính – Ngân hàng (có kiến thức CNTT).
- Có ít nhất 2–5 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí liên quan: Tuân thủ CNTT, Kiểm soát nội bộ CNTT, An ninh thông tin (GRC), Kiểm toán CNTT, hoặc các vị trí tương đương trong ngân hàng/tổ chức tài chính.
- Hiểu biết sâu về quy định pháp luật Việt Nam liên quan đến CNTT ngân hàng (Thông tư NHNN, Luật ATTT mạng, Luật An ninh mạng…).
- Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ: CISA, CISSP, CRISC, ISO 27001 Lead Auditor, PCI-DSS Implementer, hoặc chứng chỉ tuân thủ ngân hàng.
- Ưu tiên có kỹ năng: phân tích rủi ro, soạn thảo văn bản quy trình, giao tiếp, làm việc nhóm, chịu áp lực cao.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên từng làm việc tại ngân hàng thương mại, công ty fintech, công ty kiểm toán Big4 (phần kiểm toán CNTT)

MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau:- Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính- Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ- Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp- Kinh nghiệm làm việc- Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật- Nguồn Tuyển dụngVì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển?- Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng.- Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất.- Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn.Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage:- Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers- Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers

Cơ hội nghề nghiệp và phát triển bản thân:

- Có cơ hội học hỏi từ các Chuyên gia, Lãnh đạo nội bộ hàng đầu tại MB trong lĩnh vực IT, Tài chính ngân hàng
