title: Software Engineer II
label: HOT
reasons:
- Highly competitive salary with annual reviews
- 13th-month salary
- A clear, structured career advancement path
jobDescription:
With many years of experience in delivering cutting-edge software solutions, our company specializes in fintech, banking, and nutrition & healthy diet solutions. We run a real production estate: mature, revenue-critical systems that have served clients for years, side by side with new, fast-moving platforms under active development. We are looking for engineers who respect both.

ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring a Mid-level Software Engineer (3-5 years) who thrives in a mixed environment: one week you may be safely extending a 10-year-old service nobody fully remembers, the next you are shipping a greenfield feature under a tight deadline. You will not be siloed into "legacy maintenance" or "new development" - you own problems end to end, wherever they live.

- Location: Ho Chi Minh City
- Job Type: Full Time
- Experience level: 3-5 years production experience (Middle Level)
- Salary range: based on technical skills and experience. Competitive with market salary.

Please make sure your CV pdf file are readable and scannable with a pdf scanner tool.  A poor-quality pdf file will hurt your chance to be reviewed and may get skipped by our recruiting tool.
requirements:
Engineering:

- Own features end-to-end across a mix of mature (legacy) systems and new platforms: design, implement, test, ship, monitor.
- Maintain, stabilize, and INCREMENTALLY modernize legacy services: add characterization tests before changing behavior, refactor in small safe steps, apply strangler-fig migration where justified - and know when a rewrite is NOT justified.
- Build new services and features with production discipline: automated tests, CI gates, observability (logs/metrics/traces), documented decisions.
- Debug systematically across unfamiliar code: reproduce, instrument, root-cause, fix, and prevent with a test.
- Work with data seriously across RDBMS and NoSQL, and design mobile offline data synchronization: schema design, indexes, query analysis, conflict resolution, data-integrity thinking (this is fintech - small details cause big difference).
- Use AI coding tools (Cursor/Claude/Ollama/Hermes) daily to accelerate, while owning output quality - understand both the good and the bad of AI assistance, review everything critically, and never ship what you cannot explain.

Collaboration:

- Teamwork is a key factor in this role: you succeed with your team, not around it. Share context, help unblock teammates, review pull requests generously, hand off cleanly, and put the team's outcome ahead of individual credit.
- Break down ambiguous product specs into tasks, estimate accurately (+/-20%), ship without handholding.
- Communicate openly and early: surface risks, slips, and bad news when they are still cheap to fix. Explain technical decisions to non-engineers clearly.
- Question requirements that don't make sense; propose better alternatives with trade-offs.

Requirements

Must-haves (Prove These):

- 3-5 years shipping production software in at least ONE mainstream stack (backend or frontend - e.g., .NET/Node/Python/PHP, or a modern web/mobile framework such as Flutter/VueJS/ReactJS), with evidence of depth: architecture decisions, real users, real incidents.
- Evidence of learning a SECOND stack or unfamiliar codebase fast and becoming productive in weeks - tell us the story.
- Legacy-code experience: you maintained, refactored, or extended a production system you did not write, safely. Describe how you avoided breaking it.
- Strong Computer Science fundamentals applied to real problems: data structures, complexity, concurrency basics, and systematic debugging.
- Testing discipline: named frameworks, real coverage, CI enforcement, and at least one regression you prevented.
- Production database competence across RDBMS and NoSQL: indexes, query plans, transactions - plus mobile offline data synchronization and conflict handling.
- Git fluency + CI/CD experience.
- Used AI coding tools regularly WITH critical review - show us one AI mistake you caught and rejected.

Nice-to-have:

- Fintech/banking/enterprise domain experience.
- Cross-stack range (backend engineer who shipped frontend, or vice versa).
- Observability tooling (Grafana/Prometheus/AppInsights or similar).

We Hire For:

- Critical thinking - question, challenge, improve. You push back on flawed requirements with better alternatives.
- Analytical thinking - analyze deeply, decide wisely. You decompose problems and decide with evidence, even when data is incomplete.
- Attention to detail - small details cause big difference. Especially in fintech: rounding, timezones, edge cases, data integrity.
- Long-term commitment - build lasting value, think long term. We invest in people who stay, grow, and build things that outlast them. Serial job-hopping without cause is a real concern for us; loyalty is rewarded.
- Transparency - open, honest, and clear in everything we do. Bad news early beats good news late.
- Integrity - do the right thing, always. Even when nobody is watching.

Teamwork is important to us and is a key factor in how we hire and grow people. It runs through all six values - transparency, honest collaboration, and shared ownership - and we assess it throughout the process.
benefits:
Financial Incentives:

- Highly competitive salary with annual reviews
- 13th-month salary
- Monthly performance bonus tied to achievement of agreed KPIs
- Social insurance provided in accordance with Vietnamese law

Professional Development:

- A clear, structured career advancement path
- Training in USA development processes, with guidance and coding best practices from USA-based experts
- Opportunities to tackle complex problem-solving and challenging projects to drive career growth
- Supportive work culture with collaborative projects across various domains
- Training in both soft skills and IT

Work-Life Balance:

- Yearly company trips, and birthday celebrations.

Embrace the opportunity to impact through innovation. Apply now to become a pivotal part of our forward-thinking team.

- We encourage applicants to include a Cover Letter with their application. While it is not required, a thoughtful Cover Letter helps demonstrate your genuine interest in both the position and Vincent Software.
- If you choose to submit one, we recommend 250+ words with specific examples showing how your experience matches our Must-Have requirements, particularly your experience with legacy code, learning new technologies quickly, and identifying mistakes made by AI coding tools.

Only shortlisted and qualified candidates will get our response. For those dis-qualified we’ll keep for reference for future matching suitable positions.

title: Fullstack Magento 2 Developer
label: HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
On Tap is a leading eCommerce agency with a legacy dating back to 2006 — the first Magento Solution Partner in the UK, and among the first five globally. Our expertise spans Adobe Commerce, Shopware, Shopify, BigCommerce, and more. Since September 2024, On Tap has been part of BSS Group, a trusted full-service eCommerce solutions provider, driving our global expansion.

Role Overview

We're looking for a Senior Fullstack Magento 2 Developer to build and maintain high-performance eCommerce solutions across both backend and frontend — from custom modules and API integrations to Hyvä-based storefronts. Shopify experience is a strong plus.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop and optimize Magento 2 backend modules, APIs, and third-party integrations (ERP, CRM, payment gateways).
- Build and customize Magento 2 frontend using Hyvä themes, Tailwind CSS, and GraphQL/API integration.
- Ensure performance, scalability, and reliability across the full stack.
- Translate Figma designs into functional, responsive Magento templates.
- Write clean, well-documented code following SOLID principles and Magento coding standards.
- Conduct code reviews and troubleshoot issues across environments.
requirements:

- Strong knowledge of Magento 2 architecture, module development, REST/GraphQL APIs, and DI.
- Proven experience with Hyvä themes, Tailwind CSS, and Alpine.js.
- Solid PHP, MySQL, and JavaScript (ES6+) skills; familiarity with EAV, indexing, and caching.
- Experience with Git, CI/CD, Linux/CLI, and Agile workflows.
- Good English communication skills.

Nice to Have

- Shopify experience (backend or frontend).
- Adobe Commerce Cloud setup/deployment knowledge.
- Contributions to Magento Open Source community.
- Familiarity with headless/microservices architecture.
benefits:

title: Project Manager (English)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Masan Group is digitizing and standardizing how core corporate functions operate across the Group and its subsidiaries (WinCommerce, Masan Consumer, Masan MEATLife, Phúc Long, WinX). Your first assignment is the Legal Transformation program — building a centralized legal technology platform covering contract lifecycle management, entity and corporate records, matter management, compliance tracking, and document automation across a multi-entity, high-volume legal function.

This is not a single-project role. Once Legal reaches steady state, you will lead transformation programs for other Group functions. We are hiring a transformation PM who can be dropped into any function, build from zero, and deliver — repeatedly.

What You Will Do

- Stand up the program from scratch within the PMO framework: charter, scope, phasing, budget, resourcing, program-level governance, and success metrics — aligned with the Group functional head and executive sponsors
- Define the delivery roadmap across multiple entities and manage sequencing of rollouts by BU
- Proactively drive alignment across a wide stakeholder network: Group Legal, BU legal teams, IT/Information Security, Finance, external vendors, and executive leadership — without waiting to be asked
- Manage senior stakeholders with competing priorities; escalate with judgment, not by default
- Serve as the single point of accountability for program status, risks, and decisions needed
- Lead the delivery team (BA, technical resources, vendor teams) through discovery, platform selection/build, UAT, rollout, and adoption
- Run vendor selection and manage vendor delivery against contract and milestones
- Own risk and issue management, change control, and cross-entity dependency management
- Design and drive change management so the platform is actually used across BUs — training, communication, adoption tracking
- Capture the playbook from each program so the next function's transformation starts faster
requirements:
Must-Have

- 7+ years of project/program management experience, with at least 3 years leading enterprise transformation, platform implementation, or system rollout programs end-to-end
- Proven track record of starting programs from zero — not inheriting a running project — including standing up governance, plans, and teams
- Demonstrated ability to manage senior, cross-functional stakeholders across multiple entities or business units; you drive alignment proactively rather than reactively
- Experience managing external vendors/system integrators through selection and delivery
- Strong delivery discipline: planning, risk management, budget tracking, structured status reporting
- Comfortable operating in ambiguity with minimal direction; high ownership

Về Trung tâm Thông tin tín dụng Quốc gia Việt Nam (CIC)

Gia nhập CIC, bạn sẽ trở thành một phần của đơn vị sự nghiệp công lập trực thuộc Ngân hàng Nhà nước Việt Nam, một trong những trụ cột quan trọng của hệ thống hạ tầng tài chính quốc gia. Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm những nhân sự tài năng, có đủ tiêu chuẩn về phẩm chất, đạo đức và trình độ chuyên môn để bổ sung cho đội ngũ tại

Phòng Phát triển phần mềm và Phòng Vận hành và an ninh thông tin.

Trong giai đoạn 2025 – 2030, CIC sẽ triển khai nhiều dự án lớn về công nghệ thông tin và phát triển nghiệp vụ , tập trung vào việc hiện đại hóa hệ thống và ứng dụng các thành tựu của cuộc cách mạng công nghiệp 4.0. Đây là cơ hội để bạn tham gia vào các dự án đầy thách thức, có tầm ảnh hưởng và phát triển sự nghiệp bền vững cùng chúng tôi.

- Mức lương thỏa thuận cạnh tranh, dựa trên năng lực và kinh nghiệm của bạn. Mức lương khởi điểm từ 15 -20, 20- 40, 40 -70 tuỳ vị trí và số năm kinh nghiệm làm việc.

Thiết kế và định hướng các giải pháp công nghệ tổng thể, đảm bảo hệ thống đáp ứng yêu cầu kinh doanh – kỹ thuật – bảo mật – hiệu năng, đồng thời có khả năng mở rộng và tích hợp lâu dài.

3. Trách nhiệm chính

3.1. Thiết kế kiến trúc hệ thống

- Xây dựng kiến trúc: Microservices / Monolith / HybridCloud-native / On-premise
- Lựa chọn công nghệ phù hợp với:Quy mô hệ thốngChi phí và chiến lược doanh nghiệp
- Quy mô hệ thống
- Chi phí và chiến lược doanh nghiệp

3.2. Định nghĩa giải pháp end-to-end

- Phân tích yêu cầu từ business và chuyển thành giải pháp kỹ thuật
- Thiết kế:System architecture diagramData flow, integration flow
- System architecture diagram
- Data flow, integration flow
- Đảm bảo: High availability, scalability, resilience

3.3. Dẫn dắt kỹ thuật (Technical Leadership)

- Định hướng công nghệ cho team: Backend, Frontend, Integration, DevOps
- Review:Solution designCode & architecture
- Solution design
- Code & architecture
- Đưa ra quyết định kỹ thuật quan trọng

3.4. Tích hợp hệ thống

- Thiết kế và giám sát:API integrationMiddleware, message queue
- API integration
- Middleware, message queue
- Đảm bảo kết nối:Hệ thống nội bộĐối tác bên ngoài
- Hệ thống nội bộ
- Đối tác bên ngoài

3.5. Bảo mật & tuân thủ

- Thiết kế kiến trúc bảo mật:Authentication/AuthorizationData protection
- Authentication/Authorization
- Data protection
- Áp dụng:Security best practices (OWASP, Zero Trust…)Đảm bảo tuân thủ quy định pháp lý và tiêu chuẩn ngành
- Security best practices (OWASP, Zero Trust…)
- Đảm bảo tuân thủ quy định pháp lý và tiêu chuẩn ngành

3.6. Tối ưu hiệu năng & chi phí

- Đánh giá: Performance bottlenecks

- System performance
- Infrastructure cost (đặc biệt trên cloud)

3.7. Phối hợp & tư vấn

- Business stakeholders

- Dev, QA, DevOps

Kinh nghiệm

4.2. Kinh nghiệm

- Tối thiểu 7–10 năm trong lĩnh vực phát triển phần mềm
- Ít nhất 3–5 năm ở vai trò: Solution Architect / Technical Architect / Lead Engineer

- Database: SQL, NoSQL

- Hiểu:Docker, KubernetesCI/CD pipelines

- CI/CD pipelines

Tích hợp API design:

- REST, SOAP API Gateway, ESB là lợi thế

4.4. Bảo mật

- Kiến thức: OWASP Top 10 Data security, encryption

- Kỹ năng giao tiếp và trình bày giải pháp
- Kỹ năng lãnh đạo, mentoring
- Khả năng ra quyết định và giải quyết vấn đề phức tạp

- Tham gia các câu lạc bộ thể thao (bóng đá, tenis, cầu lông, pickleball…)

- Sau thời gian thử việc 02 tháng (dự kiến), nếu đạt yêu cầu, bạn sẽ được ký hợp đồng lao động theo quy định, làm việc lâu dài trong một môi trường chuyên nghiệp, công bằng và minh bạch.

companyInfo.name: TRUNG TÂM THÔNG TIN TÍN DỤNG QUỐC GIA VIỆT NAM (CIC)

title: Tech Lead (MDM, Golang, Java, IOS)
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Đóng BHXH – BHYT – BHTN trên lương đầy đủ.
- Lương tháng 13, thưởng Tết và hiệu quả công việc.
- Ngân sách học tập và đào tạo hằng năm.
jobDescription:
1. THÔNG TIN CHUNG / GENERAL INFORMATION

- Tên vị trí / Position: Tech Lead
- Phòng ban / Department: Kỹ thuật (Engineering)
- Báo cáo cho / Report to: Engineering Manager / CTO
- Số lượng / Headcount: 1-2
- Cấp bậc / Level: Tech Lead

2. MỤC TIÊU CÔNG VIỆC / JOB PURPOSE

Dẫn dắt đội ngũ kỹ thuật phát triển sản phẩm MDM, định hướng kiến trúc hệ thống và lựa chọn công nghệ. Chịu trách nhiệm về chất lượng, hiệu năng, bảo mật của toàn bộ sản phẩm; hướng dẫn, đào tạo đội ngũ và đảm bảo tiến độ giao hàng. Đóng vai trò chủ chốt trong việc xây dựng sản phẩm MDM cạnh tranh tại thị trường Việt Nam và khu vực.Lead the engineering team in developing MDM products, drive architectural decisions and technology choices. Own the quality, performance, and security of the entire product; mentor team members and ensure on-time delivery. Play a key role in building a competitive MDM product for the Vietnamese and regional markets.

3. TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH / KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Thiết kế kiến trúc tổng thể (high-level & low-level design) cho hệ thống MDM: backend services, admin console, mobile agent.Design high-level and low-level architecture for the entire MDM system: backend services, admin console, and mobile agent.
- Định hướng lựa chọn công nghệ, framework, thư viện cho từng module; ra quyết định build vs buy.Drive technology, framework, and library selection across modules; make build-vs-buy decisions.
- Dẫn dắt đội 4-8 developer: phân chia công việc, mentor, code review, đánh giá hiệu suất.Lead a team of 4–8 developers: task allocation, mentoring, code review, and performance evaluation.
- Chịu trách nhiệm cuối cùng về chất lượng code, kiến trúc bảo mật và hiệu năng hệ thống.Ultimately responsible for code quality, security architecture, and overall system performance.\
- Thiết kế và rà soát các luồng bảo mật cốt lõi: enrollment, attestation, key provisioning, certificate lifecycle, secure OTA.Design and review core security flows: enrollment, attestation, key provisioning, certificate lifecycle, and secure OTA.\
- Làm việc trực tiếp với Product Manager, Security Team, DevOps để phân tích yêu cầu, ước lượng và lập kế hoạch sprint/release.Collaborate directly with Product Managers, Security Team, and DevOps on requirement analysis, estimation, and sprint/release planning.
- Xây dựng và duy trì coding standards, branching strategy, CI/CD pipeline, quy trình release.Establish and maintain coding standards, branching strategy, CI/CD pipelines, and release processes.
- Phân tích sự cố production nghiêm trọng, dẫn dắt root cause analysis và đề xuất giải pháp dài hạn.Triage major production incidents, lead root cause analysis, and propose long-term fixes.
- Đại diện kỹ thuật làm việc với khách hàng lớn, đối tác, nhà cung cấp HSM/PKI khi cần.Act as the technical representative with key clients, partners, and HSM/PKI vendors when needed.
- Theo dõi xu hướng công nghệ (Android Enterprise, Apple Business Manager, Zero Trust, PQC) và đưa ra lộ trình áp dụng.Track technology trends (Android Enterprise, Apple Business Manager, Zero Trust, PQC) and propose adoption roadmaps.
- Đào tạo nội bộ, nâng cấp kiến thức bảo mật và kỹ năng cho team.Conduct internal training to upskill the team in security and engineering best practices.
requirements:
4. YÊU CẦU / REQUIREMENTS

4.1. Học vấn / Education

Cử nhân/Thạc sĩ CNTT, Khoa học máy tính, An toàn thông tin hoặc tương đương. Các chứng chỉ liên quan (CISSP, CEH, AWS, GCP) là một lợi thế.Bachelor's or Master's degree in IT, Computer Science, Information Security, or equivalent. Relevant certifications (CISSP, CEH, AWS, GCP) are a plus.

4.2. Kinh nghiệm / Experience

Tối thiểu 6-8 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, trong đó có ít nhất 2 năm ở vai trò Tech Lead hoặc tương đương. Có kinh nghiệm dẫn dắt team ≥ 4 người và đã đưa ít nhất một sản phẩm bảo mật/mobile/MDM ra production.At least 6–8 years of software development experience, including 2+ years as a Tech Lead or equivalent. Proven experience leading a team of 4+ engineers and shipping at least one security/mobile/MDM product to production.

4.3. Kỹ năng kỹ thuật / Technical Skills

a) Phát triển phần mềm / Software Development

- Backend: Chuyên sâu Golang/Java, microservices, message queue (Kafka/RabbitMQ/NATS), gRPC, RESTful API, SQL/NoSQL, caching, distributed systems.
- Frontend: Hiểu sâu React.js/Vue.js, TypeScript, state management, performance optimization; có khả năng review code và định hướng kiến trúc UI.
- Mobile: Thành thạo Android (Kotlin) và/hoặc iOS (Swift); hiểu rõ Android Enterprise (Device Owner, Profile Owner, Work Profile) và Apple MDM protocol (DEP, VPP, ABM, ASM).
- Cloud & Infra: AWS/GCP/Azure ở mức kiến trúc; Kubernetes, Terraform, observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, OpenTelemetry).
- DevSecOps: CI/CD nâng cao, SAST/DAST/SCA, secret management, supply chain security (SLSA, SBOM).
- Phương pháp: Agile/Scrum, system design, architectural decision records (ADR), threat modeling (STRIDE, PASTA).

b) Bảo mật phần cứng & Trusted Execution / Hardware Security & Trusted Execution

Hiểu sâu và có khả năng thiết kế giải pháp khai thác các chip/môi trường bảo mật trên thiết bị; có thể đánh giá rủi ro và đưa ra lựa chọn kiến trúc phù hợp:Deep expertise in on-device security chips/environments with the ability to architect, evaluate trade-offs, and make sound design choices:

- Apple Secure Enclave (SEP): kiến trúc SEP, lifecycle khóa qua kSecAttrTokenIDSecureEnclave, biometric-bound keys, DataProtection classes, Keychain ACL; thiết kế các tính năng MDM khai thác SEP cho Apple devices.Architect SEP-based features: key lifecycle, biometric-bound keys, DataProtection classes, and Keychain ACLs across the MDM stack on Apple devices.
- Android StrongBox & TEE: Android Keystore với StrongBox, phân biệt software/TEE/StrongBox-backed keys, ID/Key Attestation, Verified Boot state; đánh giá tương thích trên dải thiết bị OEM khác nhau.Design StrongBox/TEE-based features, perform key/ID attestation, and assess compatibility across OEM device fleets.
- TPM 2.0: PCR, sealed storage, remote attestation, EK/AIK certificates; thiết kế desktop MDM agent và mô hình device identity dựa trên TPM.Architect desktop MDM agents and TPM-based device identity using PCRs, sealed storage, and EK/AIK certificates.
- HSM & Cloud KMS: thiết kế và vận hành hệ thống quản lý khóa với HSM on-prem (Thales, Utimaco) hoặc cloud KMS (AWS KMS/CloudHSM, GCP KMS, Azure Key Vault) qua PKCS#11/KMIP; lập kế hoạch high availability, disaster recovery cho key material.Architect key management with on-prem HSMs or cloud KMS via PKCS#11/KMIP; plan HA/DR for cryptographic key material.
- Mô hình tin cậy phân tầng: Root of Trust → Secure Boot → Verified Boot → Attestation; thiết kế cơ chế kiểm tra tính toàn vẹn của fleet thiết bị, xử lý tampered/rooted/jailbroken devices.Design integrity verification across the device fleet and handle tampered/rooted/jailbroken endpoints.

c) Mã hoá & Mật mã học ứng dụng / Cryptography & Applied Cryptography

Có khả năng đưa ra quyết định mật mã ở cấp độ kiến trúc, lựa chọn nguyên hàm phù hợp và rà soát code/cấu hình của team:Able to make cryptographic decisions at the architectural level, select appropriate primitives, and review the team's implementations and configurations:

- Mã hoá đối xứng: AES-GCM/GCM-SIV/CBC/CTR, ChaCha20-Poly1305; nắm chắc nonce management, AEAD design, padding oracle, timing attacks.AES-GCM/GCM-SIV/CBC/CTR, ChaCha20-Poly1305; mastery of nonce management, AEAD design, padding oracle, and timing attacks.
- Mã hoá bất đối xứng: RSA (PKCS#1 v1.5, OAEP, PSS) ≥ 2048-bit, hiểu rõ pitfalls; có thể tư vấn migration plan từ RSA sang ECC.RSA (PKCS#1 v1.5, OAEP, PSS) ≥ 2048 bits with deep understanding of pitfalls; able to advise on migration from RSA to ECC.
- Elliptic Curve: ECDSA, EdDSA (Ed25519), ECDH/X25519, NIST P-256/P-384, Curve25519; chọn đúng curve theo ngữ cảnh mobile, IoT, server.ECDSA, EdDSA (Ed25519), ECDH/X25519 across NIST and Curve25519 families; pick curves appropriate to mobile, IoT, or server contexts.
- Hash, MAC, KDF: SHA-2/3, BLAKE2/3, HMAC, HKDF, PBKDF2, Argon2, scrypt; thiết kế đúng KDF cho từng use case (password, key derivation, session keys).SHA-2/3, BLAKE2/3, HMAC, and KDFs (HKDF, PBKDF2, Argon2, scrypt) with correct selection per use case.
- Mật mã hậu lượng tử (PQC): hiểu ML-KEM (Kyber), ML-DSA (Dilithium), hybrid schemes; có thể xây dựng PQC roadmap cho sản phẩm MDM.Understand ML-KEM (Kyber), ML-DSA (Dilithium), hybrid schemes, and build a PQC roadmap for the MDM product.
- Thư viện chuẩn: Tink, libsodium, BoringSSL, BouncyCastle, JCA/JCE, CryptoKit; nghiêm cấm và rà soát các trường hợp tự cài đặt thuật toán trong team.Mandate well-vetted libraries (Tink, libsodium, BoringSSL, BouncyCastle, JCA/JCE, CryptoKit) and audit against custom cryptography.

d) Mã hoá dữ liệu & Chữ ký số / Data Encryption & Digital Signatures

Thiết kế và sở hữu kiến trúc bảo vệ dữ liệu end-to-end trong toàn bộ hệ thống MDM:Own the end-to-end data protection architecture across the entire MDM system:

- Encryption at rest: FDE, FBE (Android), FileVault/APFS, envelope encryption (DEK/KEK), AES-KW (RFC 5649); thiết kế chiến lược lưu trữ và xoay vòng khóa.FDE, FBE (Android), FileVault/APFS, envelope encryption (DEK/KEK), AES-KW; design key storage and rotation strategy.
- Encryption in transit: TLS 1.2/1.3, mTLS server↔agent, certificate pinning, OCSP stapling, HSTS; thiết kế phòng thủ trước downgrade, MITM, BEAST, CRIME.TLS 1.2/1.3, mTLS server↔agent, certificate pinning, OCSP stapling, HSTS; design defenses against downgrade, MITM, BEAST, and CRIME.
- PKI & quản lý chứng thư số: X.509, CSR, chain validation, OCSP/CRL, SCEP, EST, ACME; thiết kế và vận hành internal CA cho MDM enrollment ở quy mô fleet lớn.Design and operate an internal CA for MDM enrollment at fleet scale.
- Chữ ký số: ký command/policy server→agent, firmware/OTA, APK/IPA signing & verification, timestamping (RFC 3161), JWT/JWS/JWE/COSE.Sign commands/policies, firmware/OTA, APK/IPA, with timestamping and JWT/JWS/JWE/COSE for API authentication.
- Key management lifecycle: generation, distribution, rotation, revocation, escrow, destruction; tách bạch signing/encryption keys; tuân thủ NIST SP 800-57.Full key lifecycle with separation of signing and encryption keys, in line with NIST SP 800-57.
- Secure channels & protocols: Noise, Signal Protocol, Double Ratchet cho secure messaging server↔agent khi cần.Noise, Signal Protocol, Double Ratchet for secure server↔agent messaging when required.
- Threat modeling & secure SDLC: STRIDE, LINDDUN, abuse cases; xây dựng quy trình review bảo mật cho từng tính năng.Embed STRIDE/LINDDUN/abuse-case threat modeling into the SDLC for every feature.

Hiểu sâu các tiêu chuẩn & chứng nhận: FIPS 140-2/140-3, Common Criteria, NIST SP 800-series, ISO 27001, SOC 2, và quy định mật mã Việt Nam (Nghị định 53/2022/NĐ-CP, tiêu chuẩn của Ban Cơ yếu Chính phủ). Có khả năng dẫn dắt team đạt các chứng nhận này.In-depth knowledge of FIPS 140-2/140-3, Common Criteria, NIST SP 800-series, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and Vietnamese cryptographic regulations; able to lead the team toward these certifications.

4.4. Kỹ năng mềm / Soft Skills

- Lãnh đạo và truyền cảm hứng cho team kỹ thuật.Leadership and ability to inspire an engineering team.
- Tư duy hệ thống, ra quyết định dựa trên dữ liệu và rủi ro.Systems thinking with data- and risk-driven decision making.
- Giao tiếp tốt với cả stakeholder kỹ thuật và phi kỹ thuật.Effective communication with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
- Tư duy bảo mật (security mindset) ở mức kiến trúc; luôn đặt câu hỏi "kẻ tấn công sẽ làm gì?".Architectural-level security mindset — always asking "what would an attacker do?"
- Kỹ năng mentor, đào tạo và phát triển đội ngũ.Strong mentoring, training, and team development skills.
- Tiếng Anh đọc/viết tốt; giao tiếp với đối tác nước ngoài là một lợi thế.Strong written English; spoken English with foreign partners is a plus.

5. KPI ĐO LƯỜNG HIỆU QUẢ / KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS

- KPI 1: Đảm bảo ≥ 90% sprint goals của team đạt được theo cam kết.Ensure ≥ 90% of team sprint goals are met as committed.
- KPI 2: Code coverage trung bình của team ≥ 80%; không có vùng critical < 70%.Team-wide code coverage ≥ 80%; no critical module below 70%.
- KPI 3: Số production incident nghiêm trọng (Sev-1/Sev-2) ≤ 2/quý.≤ 2 Sev-1/Sev-2 production incidents per quarter.
- KPI 4: Không có lỗ hổng Critical/High trên sản phẩm MDM khi pentest định kỳ.Zero Critical/High vulnerabilities in MDM products during periodic pentests.
- KPI 5: ≥ 2 thành viên trong team được promote hoặc đạt mục tiêu phát triển nghề nghiệp/năm.≥ 2 team members promoted or hitting career goals per year.
- KPI 6: Hoàn thành đúng hạn các milestone kiến trúc, security audit, certification theo roadmap.Deliver architecture milestones, security audits, and certifications on the roadmap.

6. CÔNG CỤ SỬ DỤNG / TOOLSTACK

- Cursor Pro + GitHub Copilot, Claude Pro, GitHub Team, Jira, Postman, Docker, BrowserStack, Figma.

title: Business Analyst (Agile, Proficient in English)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Young and dynamic team
- Mentorship and guidance
- Career advancement and overseas work opportunities
jobDescription:
The Company

Real Estate Doc (REDOC) is a B2B software platform that breaks the norm by converting traditional real estate and banking documentation and workflow transactions digital!

We are looking for young and motivated technically-skilled individuals to join us and be part of the change in digitising the real estate and banking industry!

The Career Opportunity

- Want to work for a Singapore-based Tech Company? We are looking for skilled Business Analysts to work with us and drive the change in the industry.
- The Business Analyst (BA) plays a key role in bridging business objectives with technical execution. You will work closely with stakeholders across departments to gather and analyze requirements, design workflows, and support development teams to deliver scalable ERP and SaaS-based web applications. You’ll act as the translator between business needs and engineering realities, with a strong focus on digitization, automation, and user-centric design.

Your responsibilities:

1. Requirement Management

- Elicit and document business and user requirements through interviews, workshops, surveys, and on-site observation.
- Distinguish clearly between business needs, user expectations, and system constraints.
- Write and maintain BRD, FSD, SRS, user stories, and use cases.
- Prioritize requirements using MoSCoW, Value vs Effort Matrix.

2. Process Modeling & Documentation

- Design wireframes, user flows, process diagrams, and mockups (via Figma, Lucidchart).
- Maintain requirement traceability in tools like Jira and Confluence.
- Clearly log change requests and impact assessments with proper stakeholder sign-off.

3. SDLC Engagement

- Support all SDLC phases: Discovery, Development, UAT, and Deployment.
- Work within Agile frameworks based on project context

4. Technical & System Understanding

- Understand modern web application architecture, including Frontend, Backend, APIs and databases.
- Actively participate in technical discussions with client-side engineers and solution architects to understand implementation feasibility and constraints.
- Collaborate with internal technical teams to translate business requirements into clear data models, and system behavior.
- Provide rough effort estimates and assist in timeline negotiation based on technical complexity, dependencies, and constraints.
- Proactively identify and explain potential technical blockers, security concerns, or architectural limitations when clients raise feature requests or change requirements.
- Understand and interpret common system error codes or integration failures to guide clients and internal teams toward quick resolution.

5. Stakeholder & Communication Management

- Facilitate alignment between business and tech teams via meetings, reports, and status updates.
- Communicate findings, issues, and proposals effectively in both verbal and written forms.
- Produce clear documentation: meeting minutes, training guides, user manuals.

6. Product & Project Contribution

Support QA team in preparing test scenarios and validating acceptance criteria.

Participate in sprint reviews and release planning sessions.
requirements:
- At least 2 years of experience as a Business Analyst in large scale ERP System and Banking domain
- Knowledge of RESTful APIs, web architecture, databases.
- Strong Ability to translate business requirements into functional, non-functional, and technical requirements
- Strong spoken and written English skills
- Understanding of Agile and experience working in Agile driven environments with working knowledge of Agile tools (JIRA/Confluence)
- Ability in using suitable tools for business modeling, drawing business flows/diagrams, wireframing such as Balsamiq, Figma…
- Strong presentation skills; able to translate technical detail into business context.
- Experienced with UI/UX, and with a user centric mindset or understanding
- Experience with financial and document management technology is a plus
benefits:
- Competitive salary package
- Full salary for probation
- 13th-month salary
- Mentoring and coaching from Seniors in the Organisation
- Career path to becoming a Leader or Specialist along with a fast-growing startup
- Overseas work opportunities in Singapore and the S.E. Asia region
- Be part of a young, dynamic team, which are pushing the applications of technology to change the real estate industry
- 14 day Annual leave + Sick leaves + Vietnamese holidays
- Comfortable work environment, no dress code

title: Technical Lead (.NET & AI Solutions)
label: HOT
reasons:
- People build people
- Latest technologies & international certificates
- Pay people to their true value
jobDescription:
- Lead and manage AI/digital transformation projects, focusing on AI/ML solutions, data-driven systems and modern web technologies (.NET, Angular, ReactJS).
- Define technical direction for AI initiatives, including model selection, system architecture, data pipelines, and deployment strategies.
- Participate in the full project lifecycle: requirements analysis, solution design, model development coordination, integration, testing, and deployment.
- Ensure source code quality, AI model performance, and adherence to coding standards, MLOps practices, and best practices.
- Provide technical guidance and mentorship to team members in AI, data engineering, and software development.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Developers, Data Scientists, BA, QA/QC, DevOps) to ensure project progress, quality, and alignment with business goals.
- Monitor, evaluate, and optimize AI models and system performance, including scalability, reliability, and security.
- Research and apply new AI technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance products and processes.

label: SUPER HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
ABOUT ONE MOUNT

One Mount is Vietnam's largest technological ecosystem that creates solutions along the entire value chain, starting with retail, distribution, real estate, and financial services. Our mission is to build Vietnam's most trusted ecosystem, empowering all people and businesses to realize their full potential at the intersection of technology and humanity.

The Senior Scrum Master/Scrum Coach operates as a delivery enabler and transformation partner, supporting multiple teams and complex product environments.

Beyond facilitating Agile practices, this role is responsible for:

- Optimizing end-to-end workflow and delivery predictability
- Removing systemic bottlenecks across teams and departments
- Enabling teams to operate effectively in a technology- and AI-enabled environment
- Contributing to the evolution of Ways of Working across the organization

This role requires a shift from team-level facilitation to system-level impact.

1. Delivery Flow & Product Execution:

- Guide Product Owners and teams in managing Product Backlogs in complex, multi-product environments
- Support definition and alignment of Product Vision and Product Goals
- Improve flow of work across teams (planning, execution, delivery)
- Support roadmap clarity and delivery predictability
- Actively monitor and improve: lead time, throughput, delivery reliability

2. Cross-Team Coordination & System Optimization:

- Facilitate alignment across teams and departments
- Identify and resolve inter-team dependencies and bottlenecks
- Support coordination of large releases spanning multiple teams
- Ensure transparency of risks, assumptions, and constraints
- Shift focus from local optimization to system-wide performance

3. Agile Coaching & Team Enablement

- Coach teams to become self-organized, outcome-driven, and continuously improving
- Support adoption of Agile mindset and practices in a pragmatic way
- Enable teams to:Slice work effectivelyManage commitments realisticallyImprove collaboration and feedback loops
- Slice work effectively
- Manage commitments realistically
- Improve collaboration and feedback loops
- Reduce reliance on manual facilitation by promoting team ownership

4. Evolving Ways of Working:

- Contribute to the continuous improvement of Ways of Working at team, program, and organizational levels
- Support adoption of:Modern delivery practicesAutomation and AI-enabled workflows where relevant
- Modern delivery practices
- Automation and AI-enabled workflows where relevant
- Ensure that increased speed does not compromise: Engineering quality, Risk management, Sustainability

5. Coaching & Capability Development:

- Mentor and support Junior Scrum Masters/Agile practitioners
- Provide coaching beyond teams, including: Product Owners, Delivery leaders
- Share best practices and contribute to internal capability buildingn.
requirements:
- Minimum 4-5 years of experience working as a Scrum Master, with at least 2 years working with multi-teams or large programs/products.
- Advanced Scrum Master Certification (e.g., PSM II, A-CSM) or specialized Scaling Agile certifications (e.g., SAFe SM, LeSS, Nexus) are required.
- Experience in participating in creating documentation and organizing internal training programs on Agile/Scrum.
- Jira Proficiency: Expert in managing backlogs, sprints, velocity, and progress reports (including Burndown, Control Chart, and CFD).
- Jira Customization: Capable of customizing workflows, setting up automation rules, and building filters/dashboards for risk detection and tracking.
- Confluence Expertise: Skilled in using Confluence for team documentation, recording decisions, and capturing process improvements (e.g., retrospectives).
- In-depth Coaching and Mentoring skills for individuals and other Scrum Masters.
- Servant Leadership and Change Management skills.
- Excellent communication and negotiation skills at the departmental/organizational level.
benefits:
Salary & Allowances

- Access special loan offers with competitive interest rates and flexible grace period options tailored to your financial needs.

Working Environment

- Young, dynamic, and collaborative working atmosphere

- Quarterly/yearly teambuilding & engaged internal events.

- Có khả năng làm việc độc lập hoặc theo nhóm.
- Sử dụng tiếng Anh đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật (tương đương TOEIC 450+ hoặc trình độ tương đương).
- Yêu thích công việc, ham học hỏi, tinh thần trách nhiệm cao, tỉ mỉ, cẩn thận.

Là lợi thế (không bắt buộc):

- Kinh nghiệm sử dụng công cụ test tự động (automation testing) hoặc công cụ kiểm tra hiệu năng hệ thống (workload & performance testing).
- Kinh nghiệm sử dụng công cụ quản lý lỗi (bug tracking) như JIRA.
- Kinh nghiệm test mobile (iOS, Android).
- Chứng chỉ ISTQB Foundation.

Mức lương: 8 – 12 triệu (thoả thuận theo năng lực khi phỏng vấn)

Tester nâng cao: 03 người

- Đáp ứng toàn bộ yêu cầu của Tester cơ bản.
- Có kinh nghiệm từ 02 năm trở lên ở vị trí tương đương.

- Có kinh nghiệm test API, sử dụng thành thạo Postman.

Ứng dụng AI trong kiểm thử phần mềm (Là lợi thế, không bắt buộc)

- Có kinh nghiệm hoặc hiểu biết về ứng dụng AI để hỗ trợ sinh test case, test script, phân tích yêu cầu (ví dụ: ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Postbot trong Postman...) nhằm rút ngắn thời gian chuẩn bị kiểm thử.
- Có kinh nghiệm hoặc mong muốn tìm hiểu các công cụ automation testing tích hợp AI/self-healing (như Testim, Mabl, Applitools, testRigor, Functionize) giúp tự động phát hiện và cập nhật locator khi giao diện thay đổi, giảm chi phí bảo trì test script.
- Hiểu biết về visual AI testing (so sánh giao diện tự động, ví dụ Applitools Eyes) là một lợi thế.
- Có tư duy phản biện, biết đánh giá và kiểm soát chất lượng kết quả do AI sinh ra — không phụ thuộc hoàn toàn vào AI, luôn review và điều chỉnh trước khi áp dụng.

Mức lương: 18- 25 triệu (thoả thuận theo năng lực khi phỏng vấn)
benefits:
- Thời gian làm việc: thứ 2 – thứ 6 (nghỉ thứ 7, chủ nhật).
- Tham gia bảo hiểm theo quy định của Luật Lao động.
- Xét tăng lương hàng năm.
- Thưởng dự án, thưởng Tết.
- Được đào tạo và tiếp cận các công cụ, kỹ thuật kiểm thử mới (bao gồm AI trong testing).
- Tham gia các hoạt động ngoại khoá: picnic, du lịch hàng năm cùng công ty; hoạt động thể thao (bơi, yoga).
- Cơ hội làm việc với đối tác nước ngoài, nâng cao kỹ năng làm việc và giao tiếp tiếng Anh.
- Cơ hội thăng tiến, nâng cao thu nhập và trở thành đội ngũ cốt lõi của công ty.

title: Senior QA Engineer (Software Tester)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
The Tester is responsible for ensuring software quality through both manual and automated testing, verifying that each product, feature, and system enhancement meets business requirements, technical standards, and user expectations.

The role actively participates throughout the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) from requirement analysis, test design, and execution, to UAT support and post-go-live validation.

1. Test Planning & Preparation

- Review and analyze business requirement documents (BRD, BS, User Stories, Acceptance Criteria).
- Collaborate with Business Analysts to define the test scope and ensure all requirements are testable.
- Design test scenarios and test cases based on business logic and workflow specifications.
- Prepare test data and environment, including sample datasets and simulated user accounts.

2. Test Execution

- Conduct manual testing across different levels (Integration, System, Regression, UAT support).
- Develop and execute automated test scripts for regression and smoke testing (using tools such as Selenium, Appium, or Postman).
- Log and track defects using Azure DevOps or Jira, ensuring clear documentation of reproduction steps and impact.
- Collaborate closely with Developers to verify fixes and perform re-testing.

3. Reporting & Continuous Improvement

- Provide regular reports on test progress, coverage, and defect metrics to the Team Leader.
- Participate in all Agile ceremonies (Sprint Planning, Daily Stand-up, Sprint Review, Retrospective).
- Propose improvements to testing processes, templates, and automation practices.
- Support UAT activities by preparing data, environment setup, and assisting end-users during testing.
requirements:
Education, Certification and Year of Experience

- Bachelor’s degree or master’s degree in information technology
- Minimum 3–5 years of experience as a senior Software Tester/QA (Manual, Automation) in Insurance, Banking, or Digital Solutions
- Certification ISTQB Foundation or equivalent certification is a plus

Core Skills:

- Functional Testing, Non-Function Testing
- Ability to interpret business requirements and convert them into testable artifacts Hands-on experience designing test cases, test scenarios
- Experience in Insurance, Financial Services systems testing
- Solid understanding of SDLC and Agile/Scrum methodologies
- Systems integration (Especial API Integration) and System Build

Business Skills:

- Strong analytical and logical thinking
- Stakeholder relationship management
- Good communication and teamwork skills (collaborating with BA, DEV, and PM).
- Proactive attitude, accountability, and ability to work under tight deadlines.

Knowledge about Tools and Methods

- Knowledge of different test types: Functional, Integration, Regression, UAT, Smoke, and Exploratory testing
- Hands-on experience with testing tools (Postman, Selenium, JMeter, etc.)
- Hands-on experience with test automation frameworks (Selenium, Appium, Cypress, etc.)
- Experience with bug tracking systems (Azure DevOps, Jira, or similar).
- English proficiency (reading technical documentation)

Personality and culture Fit

- Proactive, detail-oriented, and result-driven.
- Comfortable working in cross-functional, agile, and fast-changing environments.
- Passionate about digital transformation and customer experience.
benefits:
- Salary for 13th month, Bonus & Special Bonus
- Full of social welfare under Vietnamese Labor Law (Insurance, annual leave, ...)
- Healthcare for yourself & Your Family
- Annual travel and team building activities
- 15-16 annual leave days
- Company will buy Life Insurance Contract for yourself after 1 year working
- Training: Trained in soft and technical skills
- International, challenging, and friendly working environment

- Am hiểu hoặc có định hướng tìm hiểu về Harness Engineering trong hệ thống AI/AI Agent: Có tư duy hoặc kinh nghiệm xây dựng các bộ khung đánh giá chất lượng mô hình (Evaluation Harness), tự động hóa quy trình đánh giá kết quả từ LLM.

title: Senior Embedded Software (C/C++, AUTOSAR, firmware)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
label: HOT
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
We are seeking a Senior Embedded Software Developer to build and integrate Software Components (SWCs) and Basic Software (BSW) stacks on production ECUs. You will design high-quality embedded software in C/C++, configure AUTOSAR platforms (RTE/BSW), and ensure reliable, performant delivery aligned with MISRA, ASPICE, and OEM standards.

Responsibilities

- Design, implement, and maintain AUTOSAR SWCs (ports/interfaces, runnable, events, …), author and manage ARXML.
- Configure and generate RTE, integrate SWCs with BSW modules (e.g., DCM/DEM, NvM, SecOC, CSM, …).
- Perform ECU integration: configure BSW stacks, communication, and diagnostics.
- Write, debug, and optimize embedded C/C++ for constrained, real-time ECUs, conduct static analysis and code reviews.
- Plan and execute unit, integration, and system tests.
- Establish CI/CD pipelines for build, analysis, and automated testing; manage configuration baselines and releases.
- Collaborate with cross-development teams and test teams, drive requirements analysis, traceability, and quality gates.
- Ensure compliance with AUTOSAR, MISRA C, ASPICE, and applicable safety/security standards.
requirements:
Qualifications

- Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Electrical/Computer Engineering, or related field.
- Minimum 3 years of experience in a relevant field
- Proven experience with Classic AUTOSAR SWC development and ECU integration.
- Strong proficiency in embedded C/C++ programming.
- Hands-on with AUTOSAR tools (Vector DaVinci, ETAS ISOLAR) and RTE/BSW configuration.
- Practical knowledge of CAN, LIN, FlexRay, Ethernet (SOME/IP, DoIP); diagnostics (UDS), DCM/DEM, NvM.
- Experience with testing levels and hardware debugging; familiarity with Git and CI tools (Jenkins/GitLab).
- Excellent communication and documentation skills.

Nice to have

- Familiarity with Agile/Scrum and DevOps practices in embedded software
- Exposure to service-oriented architectures and SOME/IP service design.
- Knowledge of ISO 26262 (functional safety), ASPICE implementation, and ISO/SAE 21434 (cybersecurity)
benefits:
Why BOSCH?

Because we do not just follow trends, we create them. Together we turn ideas into reality, working every day to make the world of tomorrow a better place. Do you have high standards when it comes to your job? So do we. At Bosch, you will discover more than just work.

Benefits and Career Opportunities

- Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam and Top 30 of the Most Innovative Companies all over the world
- English-speaking environment, with opportunity to be part of innovation team and work in global projects
- Onsite opportunities
- Engage in our diverse training programs which surely help strengthen both your personal and professionalism
- Flexible working time
- 13th-month salary bonus + attractive performance bonus (you'll love it!) + annual performance appraisal
- 100% offered salary and mandatory social insurances in 2-month probation
- 15++ days of annual leave + 1-day of birthday leave
- Premium health insurance for employee and 02 family members
- Lunch and parking allowance
- Good benefits of company activities such as: football, badminton, yoga, Aerobic, team building…

- Luôn tuân thủ đầy đủ các chính sách và quy định nội bộ Công ty.

4. Các công việc khác theo phân công
requirements:

- ≥3 năm kinh nghiệm liên tiếp trong vị trí liên quan đến xây dựng báo cáo phân tích, báo cáo điều hành, các hệ thống “dashboard” hoặc vị trí kỹ sư dữ liệu trong các doanh nghiệp bảo hiểm nhân thọ.
- Hiểu biết tốt về các dữ liệu nghiệp vụ trong ngành bảo hiểm nhân thọ.Có kinh nghiệm thực tế và sử dụng thành thạo ngôn ngữ truy vấn dữ liệu (SQL), có kinh nghiệm tối ưu truy vấn, thiết kế bảng “fact/dimension”, “data mart”, “star schema”, “slowly changing dimensions”, “partitioning”, “indexing”.
- Sử dụng thành thạo ít nhất một ngôn ngữ lập trình xử lý dữ liệu.
- Có kiến thức và kinh nghiệm với các ngôn ngữ truy vấn đồ thị (“Graph Query Language”) sẽ là một lợi thế.
- Hiểu biết và thành thạo các cơ chế đồng bộ dữ liệu, các kỹ thuật hoặc mô hình tích hợp dữ liệu (ví dụ: ETL, Streaming ETL, CDC, v.v.)
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế trong phối hợp và điều phối thuê ngoài dịch vụ phát triển, triển khai hệ thống với các nhà thầu trong và ngoài nước.
- Có kiến thức và kinh nghiệm về kiến trúc đám mây là một lợi thế.
- Lập & thực thi kế hoạch: có khả năng ước tính, lập kế hoạch triển khai các dịch vụ, chức năng trên hạ tầng dữ liệu từ những thông tin, kỳ vọng, ý tưởng khái quát hoặc từ chiến lược chung của Công ty.
- Quản lý đối tác & các bên liên quan: có kỹ năng trong việc quản lý kỳ vọng, đàm phán với đối tác, nhà cung cấp và các bên liên quan nội bộ trên tinh thần “cân bằng lợi ích”.
- Lắng nghe & thuyết phục: có kỹ năng lắng nghe, kiên nhẫn và kỹ năng khơi gợi, gợi mở những thông tin cần thiết hoặc ý tưởng, kỹ năng đàm phán để đạt được đồng thuận trong việc thiết kế và triển khai kiến trúc, nền tảng và giải pháp dữ liệu.

jobDescription:
Unity Sport is a High-Performance Sports Tech Hub. We don't just build apps; we architect the backbone of real-time sports intelligence.

While our name suggests harmony, our tech stack deals with the intensity of millions of concurrent connections and sub-second data delivery. We specialize in processing massive streams of global sports data where every millisecond counts.

Our mission is to solve the ultimate engineering challenge: delivering "The Moment" to millions of fans worldwide, exactly when it happens—whether it is a match-winning goal in Football or a decisive spike in Volleyball.

II. JOB DESCRIPTION

1. Dashboard Development & Management

- Build and maintain automated, interactive dashboards in Looker Studio.

- Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and processing performance.Conduct regular data reconciliation across sources.

2. Deep-Dive Analysis

- Perform insight-driven analysis with actionable recommendations.
- Partner with Product Team on metric definitions and A/B testing.
- Conduct funnel analysis to identify drop-offs and propose UI/UX optimizations.
- Handle ad-hoc reports for cross-functional teams.

- Write and optimize complex SQL queries (CTEs, Window Functions, complex JOINs).
- Collaborate with Backend to design analytical data models.
- Perform data cleaning, validation, and transformation for reporting.

jobDescription:
Global Fashion Group is the leading fashion and lifestyle destination in growth markets across LATAM, SEA and ANZ, listed in the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. From our people to our customers and partners, we exist to empower everyone to express their true selves through fashion. Our three e-commerce platforms: Dafiti, ZALORA and THE ICONIC connect an assortment of international, local and own brands to over 800 million consumers from diverse cultures and lifestyles. GFG’s platforms provide seamless and inspiring customer experiences from discovery to delivery, powered by art & science that is infused with unparalleled local knowledge. As part of the Group’s vision is to be the #1 online destination for fashion & lifestyle in growth markets, we are committed to doing this responsibly by being people and planet positive across everything we do.

ABOUT THE TEAM

The Marketing by GFG, was launched in 2020 to accelerate brands’ growth and exposure efficiently. Our vision is to be the most efficient media solution for brands to invest and grow their business across our regions. The product helped the brands to drive more sales faster with a reduced cost. MbG is not aimed to support the brands only, it's also a great tool for marketplace Sellers to improve the listings visibility and afford an important margin.

WHAT WILL YOU DO

- Work in an agile environment to develop a best-in-market experience.
- Write and maintain clean and well-tested code
- Work on distributed systems at scale with high traffic workloads
- Collaborate with other software engineers and stakeholders in your team to build and maintain APIs in our microservices architecture (Kubernetes)
requirements:
- BS/MS in Computer Science or related technical discipline.
- 4+ years of experience with high-traffic distributed systems and client-server architectures.
- A solid foundation in computer science, with strong competency in datastructures, and algorithms
- Proficiency in one high-level programming language such as Java, Python, Golang, PHP,...
- Familiarity with a testing framework
- Experience designing and building APIs.
- Experience with distributed systems and client-server architectures.
benefits:
- #1 IT company to work for in Vietnam in 2021
- Best practice scaled agile engineering
- Amazing office and great culture! Massage chairs, table tennis, video game room, quarterly team events, yearly company trip, end of the year party
- Hybrid working environment and work from home set up allowance
- Clear career progression plan and support
- Macbook or laptop when you start
- Social insurance, medical insurance & AON insurance
- 13th month salary
- 15 days of annual leave, 30 days of sick leave/mental health, 1 day of occasion leave

Apply today and join GFG in this exciting role shaping the face of fashion e-commerce!

Global Fashion Group embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. We comply with all applicable laws and regulations on non-discrimination in employment (and recruitment), as well as work authorization and employment eligibility verification requirements.

- Mentor and provide material feedback to junior team members

- Experience designing and building APIs.
- Experience with distributed systems and client-server architectures.
- A solid foundation in computer science, with strong competency in datastructures, algorithms, software design and deep understanding of softwaredesign patterns.

title: QA Engineer (Python, Automation, AI, ML)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
We are seeking a diligent and detail-oriented QA Engineer to join our R&D team. The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of our model and core engines. You will play a key role in building testing infrastructure, benchmarking models, and defining complex data scenarios to predict how model performance impacts the final product.

Key Responsibilities:

- Test Automation Architecture: Design, develop, and optimize scalable automated testing frameworks for core engines. Focus on streamlining model benchmarking, regression suites, and performance profiling.
- Data Engineering for QA: Architect comprehensive data strategies. Define and synthesize complex data contexts and edge-case scenarios required to stress-test ML model robustness.
- End-to-End Risk Analysis: Evaluate model outputs through a product lens. Predict systemic risks and quantify how model variance impacts the final user experience post-integration.
- CI/CD Integration: Seamlessly integrate automated validation gates into the CI/CD pipeline to ensure continuous quality delivery for cloud-connected and embedded components.
- Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with Data and Dev teams to triage defects, analyze root causes, and refine model training requirements based on QA insights.
requirements:
Technical Requirements:

- Experience: Minimum 3 years in Software Quality Engineering or Backend Development, with a focus on automation.
- Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Machine Engineering, or a related technical field.
- Programming Mastery: Proficient in Python (for automation & ML scripting) and C++ or JavaScript (for engine-level or web-integrated testing).
- Domain Expertise: Solid understanding of AI/ML lifecycles and Computer Vision fundamentals.
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and IoT/Robotics environments.

Preferred Qualifications:

- Proactive Problem Solving: Proven track record of architecting test frameworks from scratch.
- Agile Proficiency: Experience in Scrum/Agile environments with a focus on rapid iteration.
- AI-Driven Productivity: Experience leveraging LLMs or AI-based coding assistants to accelerate test script generation and data synthesis.
- Communication: Ability to translate complex technical risks into actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.
- ML Analytics: Ability to calculate and interpret core metrics (mAP, Precision/Recall, F1-score, etc.) to assess model performance beyond simple "pass/fail" results.
- Toolchain: Proficiency with Git, Jira, TestRail, and modern CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, or GitHub Actions).
- Ability to communicate verbally and written in English language.

jobDescription:
Global Fashion Group is the leading fashion and lifestyle destination in growth markets across LATAM, SEA and ANZ. From our people to our customers and partners, we exist to empower everyone to express their true selves through fashion. Our three e-commerce platforms: Dafiti, ZALORA and THE ICONIC connect an assortment of international, local and own brands to over 800 million consumers from diverse cultures and lifestyles. GFG’s platforms provide seamless and inspiring customer experiences from discovery to delivery, powered by art & science that is infused with unparalleled local knowledge. As part of the Group’s vision is to be the #1 online destination for fashion & lifestyle in growth markets, we are committed to doing this responsibly by being people and planet-positive across everything we do.

Since launching in 2011, THE ICONIC has redefined the future of retail in Australia and New Zealand. As the leading fashion, sports and lifestyle e-commerce destination in the region, our e-commerce platforms (Retail, Marketplace and Services) provide a seamless and  inspiring end-to-end customer experience through our own technology innovations. We stand for benchmark-setting customer service, delivery options, returns policies, and curation of brands.

We are a diverse and dynamic community of over 1,000 people working towards our purpose “To bring on the future of shopping”. THE ICONIC is people and planet-positive, and we strive towards creating a positive impact in the world by driving genuine and meaningful change for the better of all communities involved.

THE TEAM

At GFG, Technology is core to long-term success and is a crucial enabler of a great Customer Experience. We are a mix of experts in fashion, logistics, data analytics, marketing, and design, guided by business consultants and tech geniuses – everyone contributes to the success of GFG.

Our Engineering Department plans, builds and maintains the technology that drives high traffic ecommerce platforms. Our ability to deliver fast, safe and scalable solutions is critical in delivering first-class experiences to our customers. Our teams are organized by business domain and take ownership of everything they do in a you built it, you own it, model.

SCOPE OF ROLE

- Write and maintain clean and well-tested code
- Deploy micro-services using infrastructure as code technologies, CI/CD, Terraform
- Work on distributed systems at scale with high-traffic workloads
- Collaborate with other software engineers and stakeholders in your team to build and maintain APIs in our microservices architecture (Kubernetes)
requirements:
WHAT IT TAKES

- Fluent English (written and verbal) — you'll present solutions and collaborate across timezones
- Proficiency in backend development (NodeJS and Typescript are preferable). Having experience with PHP or willing to work with PHP is a plus.
- Experience in designing and building highly scalable applications and microservices.
- Understanding of unit testing and related testing frameworks
- Familiarity with agile and lean software engineering
- Understanding of fundamental engineering concepts - SOLID principles, clean code, design patterns, testing
- Awareness of major cloud provider (AWS, GCP or Azure)
- Familiarity with RDBMS and NoSQL databases

Ways to stand out from the crowd

- Exposure to building high traffic and scalable solutions
- Exposure to modern DevOps practices - QA Automation, Monitoring, Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform), CI/CD…
benefits:
At GFG, you will be part of an international tech environment where your work has real impact across multiple markets and millions of customers.

title: Test Coordinator/ QA QC Coordinator (Tester & BA)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Role Summary

We're looking for a detail-oriented QA & Business Test Analyst who makes sure ShipCheck produces the right results, not just that the system runs. You'll add much-needed testing capacity alongside our QA engineer and take ownership of business-facing validation across our core modules - starting with freight audit and extending to shipment import, tendering, and benchmarking. Your job is to test the platform the way a business user would: knowing which data to check and confirming that what ShipCheck produces matches what the business actually expects.

What you'll do

- Test from a business perspective: validate core modules (freight audit first, then shipment import, tendering, and benchmarking) against real business scenarios - confirming results match expected outcomes, not only that the system produced output.
- Own business-result validation: know which customers, providers, shipments, and contracts to test, and reconcile ShipCheck's output against the expected reference results.
- Design and run functional tests: turn business requirements into test cases, execute manual and exploratory testing, and cover cross-feature and regression scenarios.
- Manage defects: log, prioritize, and track issues to resolution, and verify fixes before release.
- Grow test automation: help build and maintain an automated regression suite so repeated checks scale as we ship faster.
- Work closely with QA and engineering: partner with our QA engineer to cross-check scenarios and provide a second, business-focused view on quality.
- Partner with Product, Customer Success, and business experts: run sessions to learn how to read results (freight audit, tenders, benchmarks) from a business angle, and document expected behavior.
- Enable confident releases: provide business sign-off on critical flows so we can deploy new versions with confidence.
requirements:
Must-have experience

- 2+ years in software QA / testing (functional and manual testing, test-case design, defect management).
- Strong analytical and data skills - comfortable working in spreadsheets, reconciling numbers, and spotting discrepancies (a freight audit is, at its core, "does the calculated amount match what was expected?").
- Ability to learn a business domain quickly and test from the user's and business perspective, not just technical acceptance.
- Structured, detail-oriented, and proactive in surfacing issues early.
- Good communication in English (B2+); comfortable working in a distributed team across time zones.

Nice to have

- Test automation experience (e.g., Playwright, Cypress, or Selenium; API testing with Postman; pytest).
- Basic SQL or the ability to query data for validation.
- Logistics / supply chain domain exposure: freight audit, rating, tendering, or EDI/e-invoicing.
- Experience testing B2B SaaS or data-heavy analytics products.
- Familiarity with Jira and test-management tools.
- German language a plus, given our European customer base.
benefits:

title: Senior Business Analyst (Digital Banking)
company: Ngân hàng TMCP Phương Đông | OCB
label: HOT
reasons:
- Large-scale technology projects
- Bonus and benefits - Bank’s policies
- Loan programs for employees
jobDescription:
We are on a journey to modernize our digital banking platform. We aren't just documenting requirements; we are bridging the gap between complex financial operations and high-performance technical architecture. We are looking for a Business Analyst who understands the mechanics of banking, thinks in terms of system flows, and wants to have a direct influence on the design of a real-world, high-traffic digital banking ecosystem.

- Analyze & Define: Lead the discovery and documentation of business requirements. Transform complex banking processes into clear Use Cases, User Stories, and BPMN 2.0 flows.
- Design Solutions: Define business-logic solutions for integrated services, including domestic/international payments, money transfers, and Open Banking interfaces.
- Architectural Collaboration: Partner closely with Architects and Engineers to map business logic to technical solutions (API contracts, data flows and sequence diagrams).
- Quality & Deployment: Own the requirement lifecycle. Support UAT execution, review test cases, and ensure the final delivery aligns with both business needs and legal/regulatory standards.
- Bridge the Gap: Act as the primary translator between business stakeholders and technical squads, ensuring clarity, consistency, and alignment across all project phases.
requirements:
Different projects and squads may focus on different technical domains. Candidates with strengths in relevant areas will be considered for suitable engineering teams across our banking technology ecosystem.

1. Analytical Rigor & Process Design

- Process Mastery: Deep experience in mapping complex banking workflows. You are proficient in visualizing processes using BPMN and sequence diagrams.
- Documentation Excellence: Proven ability to produce clear, structured documentation (Solution Specs, User Stories, API Contracts). You prioritize clarity and "testability" in your requirements.
- Problem Decomposition: Ability to break down complex financial problems (e.g., cross-border settlement, payment orchestration) into manageable, technically feasible requirements.

2. Banking & Integration Domain

- Payment Domain Knowledge: Deep understanding of domestic payment schemes (Napas 247, QR Code, ECOM) and international payment standards.
- API Fluency: Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, OpenAPI 3.0 specifications, and API-Led connectivity. You can read technical API documentation and participate in designing API contracts.
- Integration Mindset: Experience navigating the complexities of Core Banking systems, Payment Hubs, and third-party payment gateways.

3. Workflow & Collaboration

- Lifecycle Management: Proficiency with Jira/Redmine to track requirements, manage Change Requests (CR), and coordinate with development/QA teams throughout the SDLC.
- Communication: Exceptional ability to present complex technical concepts to non-technical business users, and conversely, represent business needs to engineering teams.

4. Strategic & "Plus" Skills

- Technical Leadership: Ability to drive architectural discussions, challenge legacy assumptions, and mentor junior team members.
- Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to keep pace with evolving fintech trends (e.g., Open Banking, AI-driven financial services).
- AI-SDLC: Experience leveraging AI tools (e.g., for automated documentation, test case generation, or requirement analysis) in daily workflows.

5. Core Competencies & Professional Background

- Experience: 5+ years of professional experience as a Business Analyst in the Finance/Banking sector.
- Educational Foundation: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, Computer Science, or Finance/Banking. Technical Literacy: Understanding of Microservices architecture and how business requirements impact system design and performance.
- Regulatory Compliance: Ability to ensure that all proposed technical solutions remain strictly within the bounds of legal and banking regulations.
- Bonus points for:Direct experience in Open Banking, API Gateway, or Payment Hub project implementations.Experience in designing systems for high-traffic, real-time transaction environments.Practical knowledge of software testing methodologies and UAT management tools.
- Direct experience in Open Banking, API Gateway, or Payment Hub project implementations.
- Experience in designing systems for high-traffic, real-time transaction environments.
- Practical knowledge of software testing methodologies and UAT management tools.
benefits: •    Real Impact: You won't be just a "cog in the machine." You will have a voice in shaping our technical roadmap and solving real-world banking challenges.•    Modern Tech Stack: We are moving away from outdated patterns and embracing modern Android standards (Jetpack Compose, Clean Architecture, modularization).•    Technical Growth: You will work on high-traffic, secure banking systems—the kind of experience that significantly boosts your career value.•    Flexibility & Culture: We value results over bureaucracy. You will work with a team that respects deep work and engineering excellence.

companyInfo.name: CÔNG TY TNHH GIẢI PHÁP BRAIN TECH

title: Senior Full-stack Developer (Javascript)
location: Ho Chi Minh - Da Nang - Ha Noi
label: HOT
reasons:
- Global product & excellent team
- Focus on quality & personal growth
- 3 remote days per week
jobDescription: We are looking for a Senior Full-stack web developer with NodeJS/ Python and ReactJS with a strong background in API design, databases, performance, scalability, security, etc to join our team. You will be working across a range of projects and industries, building scalable and high-performance web solutions.
requirements:
Requirements

Must have

- 7+ years of experience in backend development using Python/NodeJS
- 3+ years of experience in frontend development using ReactJS or similar frameworks (Vue, Svelte, Angular)
- Proven expertise in designing and implementing RESTful APIs, scalable web architecture, and deploying to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Experience integrating AI/ML solutions into web applications
- Strong working knowledge of relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server)
- Familiarity with Extreme Programming (XP) practices such as Test-Driven Development (TDD), Continuous Integration (CI), and code refactoring
- Experience working within Agile/Scrum teams
- Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal
- Experience leading project teams through the full life cycle of software development
- Experience supporting other team tasks such as mentoring, creating proposals, designing architecture for a project, etc.

Nice to have

- Experience designing and building AI architecture for production-grade applications
- Experience with serverless architecture, e.g., AWS Lambda, GCP Cloud Function, etc.
- Experience with security, performance, and scalability.
- Experience with NoSQL and Message Queue.
benefits:
Who We Are

CodeLink is an innovative and design-focused development agency. We focus on user-centric design and agile development to bring the product vision of our clients to life. We handle the end-to-end development of products, developing the product vision through product understanding, designing experiences through UX design, refining these flows with modern UI design, and developing products through iterative agile development.

We work with both early-stage product teams and teams with existing products from a wide range of countries and industries. We focus on modern technologies and work directly with our clients. We design using design-thinking principles on tools such as Sketch, Figma, Zeplin, and more, and develop products leveraging our tech stack of React, React Native, Rails, Python, and Node.JS.

Our Core Values

1. Take full ownership of deliveryWe take ownership of our client projects and ensure that we deliver what we are in charge of to the best possible outcome.

2. Deliver our highest level of qualityWe take pride in the high quality that we deliver and work at a sustainable pace to ensure we can always deliver on that quality.

3. Stay consistent in plans and processesWe keep open and transparent communication with our teammates and our client whilst following agile development practices.

4. Have empathy for all those we work withWe show empathy and respect to all those we work with to gain a deeper understanding without any judgment or assumption.

5. Continuously improve and growWe aim high with a growth mindset and see every day as an opportunity to develop ourselves, our processes, and our products.

Top 3 Reasons To Join Us

- Use cutting-edge & proven technologies
- Work directly with international clients
- Open environment with a focus on learning

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

We work hand-in-hand with our clients to fully invest in their product development and build solutions together for their target market.

- We fully invest in our team, we will help you build yourself up in any area you feel you need development, be it in English, learning a new design tool, developing your design thinking, and more. We want to make sure that you’re always learning and developing yourself whilst a part of our team.
- We respect both Product and Technology equally, ensuring all of the Products we work on have features with true market potential and ensuring all of the team contribute to, understand, and believe in what they are developing.
- We are very selective with our clients, we only work on awesome products we believe in and that show strong market potential.
- We respect you and your personal hours, we keep a sustainable pace by working standard 8 hour days from Monday to Friday, ensuring we only plan for what we can achieve.
- We are fully agile and only work with Clients who work the same, working with set sprint goals and working at our rate of velocity.
- You will have ownership over your role, giving you the opportunity to experiment and try new processes to better improve your day-to-day responsibilities. We are always open to improving our processes.

Company Benefits

- An open and dynamic working environment with no dress code and the freedom to be yourself.
- Modern open-space office with comfortable workspace, a PS5 games room, and chill-out areas.
- Salary review twice a year with opportunities for promotions and spot awards.
- Yearly Training Budget up to 5 million VND per staff.
- Culture of recognition with monthly rewards for those with the most kudos.
- All office benefits and full salary during probation.
- Flexible starting time up to 10 AM working Monday - Friday with no overtime and a long lunch break.
- Two days remote every week taken on any days you choose so you can work from wherever you like.
- Full Vietnamese holidays off with 12 annual leave days per year with all days not taken paid out in cash.
- Yearly company trip, monthly team all-hands activities, welcome lunches for new members, the monthly budget for team celebrations.
- Celebrations for special days in the year, such as Women’s Day, YEP, Christmas.
- Gold level Health Insurance coverage from Bao Viet Insurance and a yearly complete Health Check.
- Employee-led clubs within the company; games teams, sports teams, etc.
- Buddy system, tech, and product talks, mentoring, and paid-for training for any skills you’d like to develop.
- Weekly agile sessions and professional coaching.
- Meal allowance, parking allowance, petrol allowance, and unlimited snacks and coffee every day.
- Options for a full MAC or PC set-up are completely provided.

Where We Work

HCMC Head Office: Level 8, Vina Building, 131 Xo Viet Nghe Tinh, Ward 17, Binh Thanh District, HCMC

Hanoi Office: Ba Dinh District, Ha Noi City

Da Nang Office: Level 8, Bach Dang Complex, 50 Bach Dang, Hai Chau Ward, Da Nang City

title: Middle DevOps Engineer (Microservices, CI/CD, Docker)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Performance & salary review yearly
- Competitive Package
- Full salary-based social insurance
jobDescription:
We are seeking a Middle DevOps Engineer with 3–5 years of experience to join our engineering team. You will be responsible for designing, implementing, and optimizing infrastructure, automating software delivery through CI/CD pipelines, and ensuring the scalability, reliability, and high availability of our platform. This role requires a proactive mindset, strong system design thinking, and hands-on experience with modern cloud-native technologies.

Key Responsibilities

- Design, implement, and maintain infrastructure based on Microservices architecture and distributed systems, ensuring high scalability and fault tolerance.
- Build and optimize end-to-end CI/CD pipelines using GitLab CI, Jenkins, and ArgoCD to shorten software release cycles.
- Develop automation scripts for operational tasks, deployment, and monitoring using Bash, Python, or equivalent programming languages.
- Manage and operate containerized environments with Docker and orchestrate containers on Kubernetes platforms (EKS, GKE, or on-premises environments).
- Implement and manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform, Ansible, or similar tools.
- Set up, monitor, back up, and upgrade MongoDB and PostgreSQL databases, ensuring performance, availability, and data integrity.

requirements:
Work Experience

- Solid understanding of Microservices architecture and Distributed Systems.
- Hands-on experience building and optimizing CI/CD pipelines with GitLab CI, Jenkins, and ArgoCD.
- Strong scripting skills using Bash, Python, or similar programming languages.
- Practical experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and container orchestration platforms.
- Experience implementing Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, Ansible, or similar tools.
- Hands-on experience deploying, monitoring, and upgrading MongoDB and PostgreSQL databases.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience working with Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
- Knowledge of infrastructure and cloud security, including secrets management and network policies.
- Experience with messaging platforms such as Kafka, RabbitMQ, or NATS.
- Familiarity with GitOps workflows and Service Mesh technologies (Istio, Linkerd).
- Experience operating high-traffic, high-availability production systems.

Nice-To-Have Qualifications:

- Experience supporting large-scale systems serving thousands of users.
- Continuous improvement mindset with the ability to proactively identify and implement infrastructure and process optimizations.
