- Xây dựng và phát triển engineering team: Trực tiếp tuyển dụng, onboard và phát triển đội ngũ kỹ sư phù hợp với quy mô và nhu cầu từng giai đoạn phát triển của công ty — xây dựng career ladder, văn hóa ownership và môi trường học hỏi liên tục.
- Kiến trúc hệ thống data hiện đại: Dẫn dắt thiết kế và triển khai data platform theo mô hình Medallion (Bronze → Silver → Gold), đảm bảo data đáp ứng yêu cầu nghiệp vụ, có khả năng scale và sẵn sàng cho AI/ML workload.
- Định hướng AI cho doanh nghiệp: Xác định và triển khai các use case AI có giá trị thực tế — từ automation nội bộ đến tính năng AI trong sản phẩm — đảm bảo áp dụng có chọn lọc, đo lường được và phù hợp chiến lược tăng trưởng.
- Đảm bảo chất lượng hệ thống ở quy mô lớn: Kiến trúc đảm bảo uptime, khả năng mở rộng và bảo mật — bao gồm giám sát, incident response và CI/CD pipeline.
- Là cầu nối giữa Engineering và Business: Phối hợp chặt với Product và các phòng ban để translate business goal thành technical execution — push back khi cần, commit khi đã quyết.
- Quản lý ngân sách và vendor: Lập kế hoạch và kiểm soát ngân sách công nghệ, đánh giá và đàm phán với nhà cung cấp cloud và công cụ phát triển.
requirements:
- Tối thiểu 5 năm ở vị trí Engineering Manager hoặc tương đương, với track record trực tiếp quản lý và phát triển team từ 8 người trở lên — bao gồm hiring, mentoring và khi cần thiết, offboarding.
- Nền tảng kỹ thuật đủ vững để review architecture, phát hiện blind spot trong thiết kế hệ thống và đưa ra quyết định trade-off có cơ sở. Hiểu sâu system design, distributed systems và database — không cần code hằng ngày nhưng phải đủ depth để dẫn dắt technical discussion.
- Có tư duy ra quyết định dựa trên data, không phải cảm tính. Có kinh nghiệm thực tế xây dựng data warehouse / data lakehouse theo kiến trúc Medallion (Bronze / Silver / Gold) — quen thuộc với Apache Spark, Apache Flink hoặc tương đương. Đảm bảo hệ thống data phục vụ được cả yêu cầu nghiệp vụ lẫn khả năng scale dài hạn.
- Có quan điểm rõ ràng về cách ứng dụng AI tạo ra giá trị kinh doanh thực tế — không chỉ theo trend. Có khả năng xác định use case phù hợp, đánh giá trade-off giữa build vs buy, và dẫn dắt team triển khai AI có trách nhiệm, đo lường được hiệu quả.
- Đã từng làm việc tại startup hoặc công ty đang scale — quen với môi trường ambiguous, thiếu resource và cần ra quyết định nhanh với thông tin không đầy đủ.
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế xây dựng hệ thống trong ít nhất một lĩnh vực: SaaS B2B, Logistics/Fulfillment, E-commerce, hoặc nền tảng phục vụ nhiều merchant/seller đồng thời.
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu business metric, đề xuất technical initiative xuất phát từ business problem — không chỉ từ technical excellence.
- Đã xử lý thực tế: high-concurrency, race condition, distributed transaction, real-time data pipeline hoặc multi-tenant architecture
- Đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật, tham gia thảo luận với đối tác hoặc investor nước ngoài khi cần

jobDescription:
Xây dựng và phát triển hệ thống BI (Business Intelligence)

- Thiết kế, kiến trúc và tối ưu hóa hệ thống báo cáo quản trị, phục vụ định hướng chiến lược của Ban Giám đốc và hoạt động của các khối phòng ban.
- Xây dựng hệ thống Dashboard KPI theo thời gian thực (Real-time) cho các mắt xích trọng yếu: Kho vận (Fulfillment), Vận tải (Logistics), Dịch vụ Khách hàng (CS), Kinh doanh và Tài chính.
- Chủ động đề xuất và triển khai các giải pháp tự tự động hóa báo cáo, hỗ trợ bộ máy ra quyết định hoàn toàn dựa trên dữ liệu (Data-driven).

Phân tích dữ liệu vận hành chuyên sâu

- Khai thác, chuẩn hóa và phân tích dữ liệu đa nguồn từ các hệ thống lõi: WMS, OMS, ERP, TMS, CRM.
- Bóc tách và phân tích các chỉ số vận hành cốt lõi: Năng suất lao động (UPH), Tỷ lệ giao hàng đúng hạn (SLA), Lead time, Tỷ lệ lệch tồn kho và Chi phí logistics trên mỗi đơn hàng (CPU).
- Thiết kế các mô hình phân tích, dự báo xu hướng (Forecasting) để nhận diện rủi ro, điểm nghẽn (bottlenecks) và cơ hội tối ưu hóa chuỗi cung ứng.
- Chuyển hóa dữ liệu phức tạp thành các khuyến nghị chiến lược thực chiến cho Ban Giám đốc.

Quản trị chất lượng dữ liệu (Data Governance)

- Quy hoạch và chuẩn hóa cấu trúc Data Model phục vụ phân tích.
- Xây dựng các chốt chặn kiểm soát chất lượng dữ liệu (Data Quality Checks), đảm bảo tính chính xác và đồng nhất tuyệt đối giữa các hệ thống chéo.
- Phối hợp chặt chẽ với khối IT/Data Engineer để cải thiện luồng dữ liệu (Data Pipeline).

Dẫn dắt dự án & Nâng cao năng lực tổ chức

- Trực tiếp tham gia thiết kế kiến trúc Data Warehouse, Data Mart và nền tảng dữ liệu doanh nghiệp.
- Ứng dụng công nghệ xử lý dữ liệu hiện đại và AI vào việc dự báo sản lượng, quản trị vận hành kho bãi.
- Đào tạo, dẫn dắt (coach) và phát triển tư duy dữ liệu cho các chuyên viên phân tích cấp dưới (Junior/Mid-level) và người dùng khối nghiệp vụ.
requirements:
Học vấn & Kinh nghiệm

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên các chuyên ngành: Khoa học Dữ liệu (Data Science), Hệ thống Thông tin Quản lý (MIS), Công nghệ Thông tin, Toán Thống kê hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan.
- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm thực chiến tại vị trí Senior BI Analyst, Senior Data Analyst hoặc tương đương.
- Từng có kinh nghiệm dẫn dắt team nhỏ 2 bạn, định hướng phát triển ở các vị trí cao hơn
- Lợi thế cực lớn: Ứng viên có background làm việc trực tiếp tại các công ty E-commerce, Logistics, Chuỗi cung ứng (Supply Chain) hoặc Hệ thống Fulfillment phức tạp.
- Từng có kinh nghiệm làm chủ (own) hệ thống Dashboard và các chỉ số quản trị cấp công ty.

Năng lực Chuyên môn (Tech Stack & Domain Knowledge)

- Kỹ thuật: Thành thạo SQL nâng cao. Trải nghiệm sâu sắc với Power BI và Excel nâng cao (Power Query, Power Pivot).
- Kiến trúc: Có tư duy và kinh nghiệm tự thiết kế Data Model, luồng ETL và Data Warehouse. Quen thuộc với các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu (SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL). Biết sử dụng Python để xử lý dữ liệu là một điểm cộng.
- Nghiệp vụ (Domain): Hiểu rõ bản chất các chỉ số đo lường hiệu suất kho bãi và giao nhận (SLA, Productivity, Inventory Accuracy, Return Rate).

Kỹ năng bổ trợ

- Tư duy giải quyết vấn đề (Problem-solving) nhạy bén, khả năng bóc tách nguyên nhân gốc rễ (Root Cause Analysis).
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp xuất sắc: Biết kể chuyện bằng dữ liệu (Data Storytelling) để thuyết phục các phòng ban không chuyên về kỹ thuật (Non-tech stakeholders).
- Khả năng làm việc độc lập tốt và kỹ năng quản trị nhiều dự án (Multitasking) cùng lúc.
benefits:
- Đãi ngộ: Mức lương thỏa thuận không giới hạn dựa trên năng lực thực tế. Thưởng hiệu suất công việc và kết quả kinh doanh định kỳ.
- Bảo đảm: Hưởng đầy đủ các chế độ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo luật định.
- Dấu ấn nghề nghiệp: Được trao quyền trực tiếp kiến tạo và xây dựng hệ thống nền tảng dữ liệu chuyển đổi số cho một tổ chức Fulfillment năng động.
- Phát triển: Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng lên các vị trí quản lý cấp cao như BI Manager hoặc Data Manager.

title: Technical Scrum Master
label: HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
Are you a Technical Scrum Master that can still code and test when your team requires it? Do you have an experience in product development and a desire to build high-performing teams? If so read on.

About our Team

Our team is responsible for creating a brand of new digital financial platforms and apps that are highly reliable and scalable using modern engineering practices. You will be joining a project which talented software engineers in our Digital Bank Build team who is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining the new digital banking platform and the customer channels. As part of the team, you will be responsible for implementing software features, involve in technical designs, and writing tests to ensure the high-quality delivery of the product. The teams operate in Scrum and DevOps models.

We’re looking for top engineers out there! During the interview process, we will test your coding and design skills to assess your experience and depth of knowledge. Don’t worry our interview process will be fun!

What is the role?

We are looking for an experienced and versatile Technical Scrum Master who will be responsible for building a new scrum team for the delivery of one of our new fintech products.

Technical Scrum Master’s critical responsibility is for the team and for optimal flow of work to DONE. Scrum Masters are expected to do this by setting the pace for delivery and being proactive in planning and forecasting upcoming deliverables. To be successful in the role you should demonstrate pragmatism in your approach and be sensitive to the environment that we operate in, using your skills and knowledge to appropriately influence the delivery approach.

We are seeking a motivated individual with:

- Excellent English speaking and writing skills. (Mandatory)
- Foster an open, honest and transparent relationship with key stakeholders
- Excellent presentation and facilitation, coaching, and mentorship skills
- Strong stakeholder management and communications experience
- Strong ability to influence cross-functional teams and leadership
- Demonstrate assertiveness, being the voice of reason and authority
- Must be enthusiastic and bring high energy to the delivery team
- Responsible for continuous delivery and management of technical debt
- Previous experience leading small teams while still being hands-on
requirements:
Requirements:

- At least 2+ years of recent experience as a Scrum Master.
- Accountable for the quality of agile ceremonies including daily scrums, sprint planning, showcases, and retrospectives
- Ability to provide constructive and timely feedback to delivery team members and stakeholders
- Conflict resolution within/between the delivery team and stakeholders
- Ability to negotiate priorities and timelines with stakeholders
- Setting the pace/cadence for delivery and motivating teams to succeed
- Ensuring the delivery team commits to their definition of done
- Visual representation and management of work in the sprint e.g. card walls and burn-up charts
- Management of Master Story List (MSL), ensuring it is adequately maintained, stories are up to date and ready to play into a sprint

Knowledge of at least 3 of the following areas:

- Mobile: iOS or Android
- Web: HTML5, CSS3, Angular JS, Javascript
- Microsoft .Net (C#, ASP, Framework), SQL Server
- Quality Assurance, Automation Testing
- Web Security, OWASP
- Java, Oracle
- DevOps, Continuous Delivery
benefits:
You’ll love working with us if you are:

- Passionate about technology.
- Independent but also a good team player.
- Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity.
- Focused on usability and speed.
- Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management.

At GOTYME, opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership.

Some of our benefits:

- Meal and parking allowances are covered by the company.
- Full benefits and salary rank during probation.
- Insurances such as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family.
- SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development.
- Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture.
- Overseas travel opportunities for training and work-related.
- Internal Hackathons and company events (team building, coffee run, etc.).
- Pro-Rate and performance bonus.
- 15-day annual + 3-day sick leave per year from the company.
- Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri.

- Experience in software development with Java/Java EE (Fresh Graduates to Senior Developers are welcome to apply).
- Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts.
- Knowledge of Java/Java EE and related technologies. Experience with C#, C++, C, XML/XHTML, SQL, or other programming languages is a plus.
- Good English communication skills.
- Proficiency in Mandarin (spoken and written) to collaborate effectively with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders and teams.
- Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
- Ability to learn quickly, work independently, and thrive in a collaborative environment.
- Experience working on international software development projects is an advantage.
benefits:
Why We Are Different?

DXC is where brilliant people embrace change and seize opportunities to advance their career and amplify customer success.

- A Great Place to Work: We provide our associates a range of programs in the workplace to help maintain healthy and work life balance (Sport/Tournaments/Yoga, Music Band, etc.).
- Various Recreation Activities: We offer our associates a great number of recreation activities through-out the year include sports, yoga practices, internal contest, etc. which greatly promote the unity and team spirit (DXC Amazing Race, DXC Got Talent, etc.)
- Extra Healthcare & Insurance Programs: We wish to bring our associates the best for their health by offering superior benefits that support health and wellness.
- Incentive for Learning Achievement: We encourage our associates to strive for more learning achievements with the attractive incentive programs (Technical/ English Incentive Awards, etc.)
- Recognition Award Programs: We always acknowledge the significant contributions of our associates who constantly deliver greater value to our clients and contribute significantly to the growth of the company by the attractive recognition awards (Quarterly Recognition Awards, Global Recognition Program etc.)
- TechUP Program: A frame work to foster digital technology engagements through 6 key activities that inspire, connect, educate, build, give and inform.
- Training & Development: Our global environment promotes lifelong learning. We invest in both infrastructure and content to ensure that employees all over the world have access to high-quality learning opportunities through DXC University & extensive Training Workshops which are regularly organized weekly.
- Overseas Transfer Program: A great number of our associates have been selected to work with our clients in the United States, Australia, UK, Dubai, Japan, Singapore, etc. This is really a great opportunity for our associates to fully improve their understanding and outlook of other cultures, global life style, and enabling them to develop a truly global vision and gain a rich perspective of experience life-changing insights.
- Corporate Responsibility: We have demonstrated our full commitment to sharing and building the local community by organizing a wide range of charity activities in Vietnam throughout the year (Charity visits, Fun Run, Blood Donation, Disaster relief efforts, House Donation, etc.)

title: Fullstack Developer (NodeJS, Python, AI, SQL)
company: CÔNG TY TNHH CÔNG NGHỆ HAIPER-X
label: HOT
reasons:
- Các lợi ích dành cho thành viên gia nhập startup
- Trải nghiệm trực tiếp launching nhiều service
- Hợp tác với CTO Hàn - mở rộng tầm nhìn kỹ thuật
requirements:
Yêu cầu cơ bản:

- Kinh nghiệm: Có 3~5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, tư duy full-stack nhưng có chuyên môn sâu về Backend (Node.js, Python, hoặc các ngôn ngữ server-side mạnh mẽ).
- Năng lực Machine Learning: Có kinh nghiệm thực chiến trong việc thiết kế, xây dựng và tối ưu các pipeline ML. Thành thạo xử lý dữ liệu (data wrangling/feature engineering) cho các bài toán phân loại (classification), dự báo (forecasting) và phát hiện bất thường (anomaly detection).
- Năng lực Computer Vision: Am hiểu về xử lý hình ảnh/video, nhận diện vật thể, trích xuất dữ liệu từ hình ảnh (OCR/Metadata extraction) và các kỹ thuật liên quan đến phân tích hành vi.
- Kinh nghiệm LLM & NLP: Có khả năng ứng dụng các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLM) vào sản phẩm thực tế. Thành thạo Prompt Engineering, fine-tuning cơ bản, kỹ thuật RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) và xử lý đầu ra có cấu trúc (Structured Output/JSON) để tích hợp vào hệ thống backend.
- Cơ sở dữ liệu: Nắm vững tư duy thiết kế Database (Relational DB như PostgreSQL/MySQL), tối ưu hóa truy vấn, cấu trúc index và quản lý dữ liệu hiệu quả.
- Tiếng Anh: Trình độ Business (đọc hiểu tài liệu chuyên môn, làm việc và giao tiếp được bằng tiếng Anh).

Ưu tiên:

- AI-Native: Đã từng phát triển sản phẩm end-to-end bằng các AI coding agent (như Claude Code / Codex / Cursor).
- Kinh nghiệm triển khai: Đã từng đưa các hệ thống AI/ML/Agent lên môi trường production thực tế và tối ưu hiệu năng.
- Tư duy hệ thống: Có khả năng thiết kế hệ thống backend có khả năng mở rộng (scalability) cao, giải quyết các bài toán về latency và data throughput.
- Portfolio: Cung cấp được một dự án AI/ML/CV bạn đã tự mình launching từ 0→1.
- Có khả năng giao tiếp tốt với PM và design về business.
- Càng có nhiều kinh nghiệm thực hiện các dự án về ứng dụng AI thì càng được ưu tiên.

- Available to support production incidents outside business hours when required

- Enjoy technical challenges and are eager to explore new technologies

benefits:

title: Middle QA/QC Engineer (Automation)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Compensation, Benefits & Well-being
- Growth, Learning & Personal Development
- Flexible Work, Culture & Everyday Experience
jobDescription:
Role Summary

We are looking for a Middle QA/QC Engineer to own the quality of applications and technical solutions built in-house. Beyond functional testing, you will design test strategy, build and maintain automation frameworks (API & Web & App), and work closely with developers to ship reliable, well-tested products. This role requires a development background — you should be comfortable reading code, understanding system architecture, and writing test scripts.

Key Responsibilities

- Analyze specs, requirements, and system architecture to design comprehensive test plans and test cases.
- Perform testing across multiple layers: functional, integration, API, regression, e2e and basic performance/load.
- Design, build, and maintain automation test frameworks for API (Postman/REST) and Web (Playwright/Cypress).
- Integrate automated tests into the CI/CD pipeline and maintain them as the product evolves.
- Read application code to understand logic, reproduce and diagnose defects, and verify fixes together with developers.
- Track and report quality metrics (defect density, test coverage, pass rate, escape rate).
- Contribute to QA process, standards, and test documentation
requirements:
Requirements

- [1+] years of QA/QC experience, with [2+] years in working as Developer.
- Development background: able to read code, understand application logic, and write test scripts.
- Proficient in at least one programming language ([JavaScript/TypeScript, Golang]).
- Strong hands-on experience with API testing (Postman / REST) — request design, assertions, environments, collections.
- Hands-on experience building Web automation with Playwright and/or Cypress.
- Solid understanding of system architecture, HTTP/APIs, and how distributed/backend services work.
- Experience integrating tests into CI/CD (e.g. GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins).
- Good analytical, debugging, and communication skills.
benefits: We offer a competitive compensation structure, including annual salary reviews, performance bonuses, and a profit-sharing bonus tied to both individual contributions and company growth. Our benefits package covers national insurance, communication and transportation allowances, as well as generous subsidies for annual professional health checkups —so you can focus on your work with peace of mind.

title: Mid-Senior Java Backend Developer (Spring, English)
label: HOT
reasons:
- 13th - Month, 14th - Month Salary and KPIs Bonus
- 100% Salary Insurance Contribution
- Team Building Budget for each Quater
jobDescription:
We're looking for an experienced Mid-Senior Backend Java Engineer to join our team. In this role, you'll be a key player in designing, implementing, and optimizing our backend systems and services. You'll work on complex distributed systems, contribute to architectural decisions, and help mentor junior team members, all while driving high-quality code and project outcomes.

What You'll Be Doing

- System Design & Development: Lead the analysis and design of complex systems and API services. You'll be responsible for the full development lifecycle, from concept to deployment.
- Code Quality & Maintenance: Write robust unit and integration tests to ensure the accuracy and reliability of our services. You'll also participate in code reviews to maintain high standards and help colleagues grow.
- Architectural Leadership: Design and implement distributed computing services and propose improvements to existing system architecture. Your insights will be crucial in areas like index strategies, query optimization, and Redis data structures.
- Project Ownership: Take full ownership of project requirements, from clarifying ambiguities with stakeholders to decomposing projects into actionable tasks and coordinating with other teams.
- Team & Process Improvement: Actively identify opportunities for system optimization and process improvements. You will contribute to refining team culture, development workflows, and engineering best practices.
- Mentorship & Collaboration: Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Product, Frontend, QA, IT) and provide mentorship and technical guidance to more junior team members.
requirements:
Required Skills & Experience

- Experience: A minimum of 3 years of professional experience in software development.
- Proficiency: Deep expertise in Java, including the Spring Framework, and proficiency in Shell scripting.
- System Design: Proven experience in designing and implementing distributed services and applying design patterns.
- Database Skills: Strong command of SQL syntax and an understanding of database normalization.
- Tools & Technologies: Hands-on experience with Redis and familiarity with the ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana).
- Testing: Experience in writing effective unit tests is essential.
- Soft Skills: You should be a proactive problem-solver with a tenacious attitude, excellent communication skills (English or Chinese) for both written and speaking, and the ability to articulate technical decisions clearly. Willingness to engage in pair programming is also required.

What We Offer

This role offers a clear path for growth and increasing impact within our team.

- First 3-6 Months: You will onboard, get familiar with our tech stack and workflows, and begin taking responsibility for product optimization and routine maintenance. You'll start tackling more complex technical requirements.
- Beyond 6 Months: You'll transition into leading core development tasks, contributing significantly to system architecture, and mentoring newer team members. You'll have the opportunity to influence engineering best practices and play a key role in technical decision-making.

The Details

- Work Type: On-Site
- Work Hours: Day shift, 09:00–18:00 (1-hour lunch break), Monday to Friday.
- Management: This is an individual contributor role with no direct management responsibilities.
- Leave: 12 days annual leaves + 15 hours of personal leave per year.
- Education: Bachelor’s degree or above (no specific major required).
benefits:
- Full Salary Insurance Contribution: Social, Health, and Unemployment Insurance paid on 100% of your official gross salary.
- Annual Bonuses: 13th-Month, 14th-Month Salary and KPIs Bonus
- Healthcare: Comprehensive Annual Health Check-up package provided by the company.
- Work Equipment: Provision of necessary computers, and modern office equipment required for your role.
- Team Building Budget: A dedicated quarterly budget for team meals or staff gatherings.
- Company Trip: An annual company vacation (local and/or international destinations).
- Special Occasion Gifts: Thoughtful gifts provided for major holidays (e.g., Tet, Mid-Autumn Festival, Christmas, etc.).

title: Senior Project Manager/Program Manager (RTE)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Job Description

About the Role/position

This position is responsible for coordinating and managing the release trains in an agile environment. They will act as a Project Manager, coaching and supporting the implementation of more effective ways of working and using Agile methodology. Overall, the Release Train Engineer plays a crucial role in ensuring the successful delivery of software releases and driving business outcomes in an Agile environment.

Role Overview

- End-to-end program / project coordination with strong delivery discipline
- Focus on transitioning legacy onboarding to an enhanced customer onboarding experience
- Final phase: onboarding all “new-to-bank” customer journeys onto the new flow

Program Characteristics

- EU regulatory program with non-negotiable timelines
- High visibility with frequent touchpoints with Executives and Heads of (HO’s)
- Significant stakeholder scrutiny and focus across business and technology
requirements:
High-impact coordinator and stakeholder manager over a pure delivery lead—someone who can operate confidently in a complex, regulatory, and executive-facing program while effectively enabling Agile execution on the ground.

1. Stakeholder & Communication

- Exceptional stakeholder engagement is critical
- Comfortable interfacing with senior leadership (Execs / HO’s)
- Strong communication and influence skills across business and tech teams

2. Delivery Orientation

- Solid understanding of delivery lifecycle; hands-on delivery experience is beneficial but not mandatory
- Ability to manage dependencies, risks, and timelines in a structured manner

3. Agile / RTE Fit

- Comfortable operating as an RTE in an Agile setup
- Focus on coordination, facilitation, and flow—not on executive reporting (for example: not owning steering committees or executive packs)
- Will align closely with an onshore RTE, with opportunity to ramp up

4. Technical Appreciation

- Ability to read and interpret architecture diagrams and tech stacks
- Sufficient technical context to engage meaningfully with engineering teams

5. Soft Skills

- Strong interpersonal skills and team facilitation
- Ability to navigate ambiguity and operate in a high-pressure, high-visibility environment

Nice to Have

- Prior banking domain exposure (preferred, not mandatory)
- Experience with Australian banks is advantageous
- Operating Model
- Mapped to an onshore RTE for guidance and alignment
- Cadence-driven environment with monthly releases
- Initial focus on learning the program landscape, stakeholders, and delivery rhythms
benefits:
Life at Capgemini is dynamic and fun, a place where people love to work. A career with freedom, full of learning and development opportunities and the support to help you achieve your best.

A career at Capgemini is rewarding and constantly transforming. Here are the top ten reasons why people love working at Capgemini.

1. Your values are our values:

We’re guided by seven core values: honesty, boldness, trust, freedom, team spirit, modesty, and fun. If you share those values, then you’ll find your place with us.

2. People come first

Through our People Charter, we encourage free exchange of ideas, respect for differences, and wellbeing in the workplace for everyone.

3. Never stop learning

At the Capgemini Group University, you’ll learn via classroom-based and virtual courses, e-learning modules and rich-media online resources.

4. Feel free to grow

Over the course of your career, your goals may shift. Want to change your focus? Switch tracks? We’re here to help.

5. Get inspired by your colleagues

Our cultural diversity means you’ll always have something to learn from those around you.

6. Forget the notion of the “typical day”

Challenge and variety are constants here. From the work you do to the people you meet to the places you travel, we’ll keep you on your toes.

7. Strike a balance that works for you

You’re human—and so are we! We strive to make sure our employees achieve a healthy, happy work-life balance.

8.Count on us for career growth

We’re always growing and so should you. We prioritize the personal development of our team members with our Capgemini Group University.

9.Your Love for Travel

We have 300 offices in 40 countries around the world. You’ll have opportunities to travel or work in different locations.

10.Dig in your first day

Whether you join us as a recent graduate or a seasoned professional, you’ll start to work directly on challenging projects from day one.

title: Senior Golang Developer
label: HOT
jobDescription:
The Operation Platform team is responsible for centralizing and scaling all operational aspects of Zalopay, one of Vietnam’s leading financial platforms. Our mission is to build a unified, reliable, and extensible operation ecosystem that empowers operations teams to efficiently support millions of users, merchants and partners.

Within this platform, the Merchant Operation domain focuses on everything that happens after an online payment succeeds. This includes clearing and settlement, payouts, merchant wallets, payment request approvals, and operational tools that ensure funds move accurately, transparently, and on time.

We design systems that sit at the intersection of technology, finance, and operations, where correctness, traceability, and scalability are equally critical. By reusing common components and standardizing operational logic, we aim to make daily operational work simpler, safer, and more efficient.

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer (Golang) who enjoys building reliable backend systems in financial domains and understands the challenges of operating large-scale, data-heavy platforms.

ResponsibilitiesYou will:

- Design, build, and maintain backend systems for merchant operation domains, including:Clearing, settlement, and payout flowsMerchant wallet and balance managementPayment request approval and operational workflows
- Clearing, settlement, and payout flows
- Merchant wallet and balance management
- Payment request approval and operational workflows
- Build and evolve data-intensive services that handle large volumes of operational and financial data.
- Design reusable components and shared services to support multiple operational use cases across Zalopay.
- Ensure data correctness, idempotency, auditability, and consistency in post-payment workflows.
- Work with multiple storage and data systems, such as:Relational databases for transactional dataTiKV or similar distributed KV stores for high-throughput, low-latency use casesElasticsearch for search, investigation, and operational dashboards
- Relational databases for transactional data
- TiKV or similar distributed KV stores for high-throughput, low-latency use cases
- Elasticsearch for search, investigation, and operational dashboards
- Design batch and file-based integration flows using HDFS, FTP/SFTP, and scheduled jobs for reconciliation, settlement, and partner integrations.
- Improve system observability and traceability to support operations, reconciliation, and issue investigation.
- Collaborate closely with Product, Operations, Finance, and other Engineering teams to deliver end-to-end solutions.
- Debug and resolve complex production issues related to merchant operations and fund movement.
- Contribute to technical standards, code quality, and best practices within the Operation Platform team.
requirements:
You may be a good fit for this role if you:

- Hold a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
- Have at least 3 years of experience in backend software development.
- Have strong proficiency in Golang.
- Have solid experience in backend system design, including API design, data modeling, and service decomposition.
- Have strong knowledge of relational databases and SQL, including transactions, indexing, and performance tuning.
- Have hands-on experience with NoSQL or distributed data systems such as MongoDB or TiKV.
- Understand distributed system concepts such as idempotency, concurrency control, eventual consistency, and failure handling.
- Have experience using Redis or similar caching systems.
- Are comfortable working with large datasets, batch jobs, and file-based data exchanges (e.g. HDFS, FTP/SFTP).
- Have experience diagnosing and tracing production issues in large-scale systems.
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code.

Nice to have:

- Experience in FinTech, payments, merchant platforms, or accounting-related systems.
- Hands-on experience with clearing, settlement, payout, reconciliation, or wallet systems.
- Experience building or maintaining operational tools, approval workflows, or investigation dashboards.
- Experience with Elasticsearch for searching, reporting, and operational analysis.
- Familiarity with event-driven architectures (Kafka or similar).
- Experience running systems in Kubernetes or cloud-native environments.
- Ability to work closely with non-technical stakeholders (Operations, Finance) and translate business workflows into technical solutions.
benefits: Established in 2017, Zalopay is a key member of VNG Corporation - Vietnam's technology champion. Driven by a mission to elevating all things money, we’ve become one of Vietnam’s leading payment platforms, making transactions seamless for everyone - every need, every time, everywhere, and everything. By the end of 2024, over 16 million users have trusted Zalopay, benefiting from a diverse ecosystem of 100+ services. We are also the only Vietnamese fintech recognized on CNBC’s Top 200 Global Fintech Companies. At Zalopay, we foster a dynamic workplace where talent drives impactful fintech innovations, empowering you to push limits and elevate your career. Join us and be part of something bigger!

title: [Internship] Mobile Security Engineer Intern-Forensics
label: NEW
reasons:

jobDescription:
The Role

This is a pivotal role that places you on the front lines of protecting millions of users and our systems from sophisticated mobile fraud and adversarial attacks. As a Mobile Security Engineer Intern (Forensics) you will design, build, and operate systems that investigate, analyze, and attribute fraudulent and malicious activity across mobile platforms. This role focuses on forensic signal collection, signal integrity, attacker behavior reconstruction, and incident response on both Android and iOS environments.

You will work across the full forensic lifecycle—from secure on-device signal collection to evidence preservation, large-scale data analysis, and investigative tooling—to uncover sophisticated fraud, spoofing, and abuse. Sitting at the intersection of mobile engineering, security, data analysis, and incident response, you will help identify adversarial techniques, strengthen detection systems, and protect users at scale.Our program is designed to help you discover your potential in one of the world’s fastest-growing industries.

Key Responsibilities

- Analyze large-scale datasets and fraud incidents to uncover attack patterns, fraud clusters, and evolving adversarial behavior, including reconstructing attacker techniques and execution paths.
- Design and implement mobile SDK components to securely collect forensic-grade signals, enabling attribution of location spoofing, emulator abuse, rooted/jailbroken environments, and other environment manipulation.
- Research emerging mobile fraud and evasion techniques, translating findings into actionable forensic indicators.
- Build end-to-end incident response capabilities across the stack, partnering with Data Science and ML teams to translate forensic insights into technical features, rules, and detection logic.
requirements:
- Deep passion for investigating security incidents, hunting attackers, and uncovering sophisticated fraud, spoofing, and abuse patterns, with a strong curiosity for understanding how adversaries operate and evade defenses.
- Pursuing or recently graduated with a bachelor’s degree in Security Engineering and Computer Science or Computer Engineering or a similar field of study, with a strong academic foundation (e.g., solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and fundamental security principles)
- Experience with data analysis (SQL, data modeling, feature extraction).
- Familiarity with data science concepts and the role of ML in detection systems
- Strong English communication skills, with the ability to clearly document findings and explain technical investigations.

Bonus Points

- Experience with mobile development (Android, iOS, or cross-platform).
- Familiarity with mobile security and forensics, including: Root / jailbreak detection and evasion techniques
- Emulator and virtualized environment detection
- Location spoofing and geolocation integrity validation
- Device attestation, TEE, Secure Enclave, and hardware-backed security
- Interest in incident response, threat research, or adversarial analysis.

Apply Now!

We’re GeoComply! We are at the forefront of geolocation, cybersecurity, and anti-fraud innovation, developing and delivering cutting-edge technologies to help ensure regulatory compliance, combat bad online actors, alleviate user friction, and protect businesses from fraud.

Achieving significant business and revenue growth over the past three years and dubbed a tech “Unicorn,” GeoComply has been trusted by leading global brands and regulators for over ten years. At the heart of it all is the people, united by a deep commitment to problem-solving and revolutionizing how people and businesses use the internet to instill confidence in every online interaction. title: Junior Software Test Engineer
label: NEW
jobDescription:
Position Overview

We seek a motivated and detail-oriented Junior Software Test Engineer to join our QA team. In this role, you will ensure the quality and reliability of our software products through manual and automated testing, increasingly augmented by AI-powered QA tools. You will work closely with developers and other stakeholders to identify issues, report defects, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our development processes. This is an excellent opportunity to build a solid foundation in modern, AI-assisted software quality assurance and grow your technical skills.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop, execute, and maintain manual and automated test cases based on software requirements and design specifications, leveraging AI-assisted tools such as OpenClaw and GitHub Copilot to accelerate test creation and coverage.
- Perform various types of testing, including functional, regression, integration, and API testing, using AI-driven tools to identify high-risk areas and optimize test prioritization.
- Identify and document software defects, using AI tools to help generate clear, detailed bug reports that are then imported into Azure DevOps for tracking.
- Collaborate with the development team to reproduce issues and verify fixes.
- Contribute to building and maintaining automated test scripts, using OpenClaw, GitHub Copilot, and AI-powered self-healing automation to improve efficiency and reduce maintenance overhead.
- Explore and adopt emerging AI QA tools (e.g., test generation, visual regression, intelligent test analytics) and share findings with the team.
- Contribute to the continuous improvement of QA processes and methodologies.
requirements:
Qualifications and Requirements

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
- Approximately 1 year of experience in Software Quality Assurance and/or software development. (Fresh graduates with relevant project experience or a strong passion for QA are also encouraged to apply.)
- Foundational understanding of software testing life cycles (STLC), testing methodologies, and best practices.
- Hands-on experience with both black-box and white-box testing techniques.
- Experience with API testing using tools like Postman or similar.
- Familiarity with defect and test management tools such as Azure DevOps, Jira, QC, or MTM.
- Openness to learning and applying AI-powered QA tools such as OpenClaw and GitHub Copilot in daily testing work.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with keen attention to detail.
- Good oral and written English communication skills.

Preferred Qualifications (Nice-to-Have)

- Exposure to or academic project experience with test automation frameworks such as Selenium, Playwright, etc.
- Hands-on or learning experience with AI-assisted testing tools, particularly OpenClaw and GitHub Copilot.
- Basic knowledge of a programming or scripting language (e.g., Java, C#, Python, JavaScript) is a plus.

Personal Attributes

- Self-motivated and a proactive fast learner, with the ability to quickly grasp new technologies and AI tools.
- A collaborative team player with excellent interpersonal skills.
- A positive thinker with a strong sense of ownership and responsibility.
benefits:
- Working Hours: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday
- Salary: 12.000.000 - 20.000.000 (based on skills and experience)
- Coffee and tea available in the office
- The company will provide a desktop computer and other necessary work equipment
- Career development opportunities in line with the advancement of smart technology
- An open work environment with challenging projects
- Ample learning and growth opportunities, with an emphasis on technological innovation
- A company culture that values teamwork and individual development

title: Senior Data Engineer (SQL, Python, Kafka, Kubernetes)
label: NEW
jobDescription:
We operate a production data lakehouse built on Apache Iceberg, Trino, dbt, and Dagster. The core architecture is established and governed through a documented review process; we are hiring a Senior Data Engineer to build, operate, and optimize the platform — and to help evolve it through well-argued design contributions. You will design data models and pipeline architectures within the platform, own production reliability, and deliver trustworthy datasets for AI, analytics, and backend applications.

Technology Stack

- Storage & table format: S3-compatible object storage, Apache Iceberg
- Catalog: Lakekeeper (Iceberg REST catalog)
- Query engine: Trino
- Transformation: dbt
- Orchestration: Dagster
- Batch ingestion: Airbyte
- CDC / streaming: Debezium, Apache Kafka
- Metadata, lineage & governance: OpenMetadata
- BI & visualization: Superset
- Vector storage (AI workloads): pgvector, Qdrant
- Identity & access control: Keycloak, OPA
- Primary source systems: PostgreSQL (NestJS backend services), Redis, Elasticsearch
- Runtime: Kubernetes

Key Responsibilities

- Design data models, dataset layouts, and pipeline architectures for new data domains within the established platform architecture.
- Build and maintain ELT pipelines (Airbyte ingestion → dbt transformations → curated marts) orchestrated in Dagster.
- Operate Apache Iceberg tables in production: partitioning strategy, file compaction, snapshot expiration and retention, schema evolution, and time-travel-based reprocessing.
- Operate and extend CDC ingestion with Debezium and Kafka: connector configuration, PostgreSQL logical replication (WAL / replication slots), schema registry, idempotent sinks, backfill and replay procedures.
- Tune Trino performance: storage layout, table statistics, query plans, resource groups.
- Engineer data quality: dbt tests, data contracts, freshness / volume / schema-drift monitoring, duplicate detection, missing-value handling; maintain lineage and metadata in OpenMetadata.
- Ensure reproducibility and traceability through Iceberg snapshots and versioned dbt models.
- Build feature and embedding pipelines serving AI services (entity resolution, deduplication, vector stores).
- Implement governed pipelines: multi-tenant isolation, data classification, access-control integration (Keycloak / OPA), audit logging, and compliance with Vietnamese data-residency requirements.
- Contribute to architectural evolution: evaluate alternatives, write ADRs, participate in design reviews (e.g., streaming expansion, catalog or vector-store migration).
- Own production reliability: SLOs, monitoring, runbooks, incident triage, and root-cause analysis for data pipelines.
- Collaborate with Backend, AI, and Analytics teams to deliver reliable data products.
requirements:
Requirements

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field — or equivalent practical experience.
- 5+ years as a Data Engineer with end-to-end production ownership.
- Strong SQL and Python.
- Hands-on experience designing Data Lake / Lakehouse and Data Warehouse architectures and data models — and the judgment to work effectively within an established architecture.
- Proven ELT/ETL pipelines across heterogeneous sources (databases, APIs, files, event streams).
- Production experience with at least one open table format — Apache Iceberg strongly preferred; Delta Lake or Hudi acceptable with commitment to transition.
- Hands-on experience with a distributed SQL engine (Trino / Presto or comparable) and dbt or an equivalent transformation framework.
- Production orchestration experience — Dagster preferred; Airflow / Prefect acceptable with commitment to transition.
- CDC experience (Debezium or equivalent) and working knowledge of PostgreSQL logical replication.
- Experience building feature pipelines, embedding pipelines, or ML-serving datasets.
- Data quality engineering: validation, duplicate detection, missing-value handling.
- English reading proficiency for technical documentation.

Preferred Skills (strong plus)

- Iceberg REST catalogs (Lakekeeper, Polaris, or Nessie); OpenMetadata; Superset.
- Kafka operations and schema registry management.
- Running data workloads on Kubernetes.
- Formal feature stores (e.g., Feast) or NLP data preparation for AI/ML.
- Spark for batch processing.
- Experience in regulated or data-residency-constrained environments (e.g., Vietnam PDPL 91/2025, Decree 53/2022).
benefits:

Open-mindedness

Tư duy cởi mở ở nhân viên của chúng tôi là quan trọng để giúp tạo điều kiện cho những thay đổi lớn và nhanh luôn xảy ra trong ngành công nghiệp công nghệ. jobDescription:
• Thiết kế, xây dựng và triển khai các dịch vụ backend hiệu năng cao phục vụ core features của nền tảng.

• Phát triển API RESTful và các module backend phục vụ hệ thống workflow builder, automation engine, user management, và business logic engine.

• Thiết kế kiến trúc dữ liệu, tối ưu truy vấn và quản lý cơ sở dữ liệu lớn (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis…).

• Tối ưu hiệu năng, đảm bảo khả năng chịu tải lớn và độ ổn định của hệ thống. • Tích hợp message queue (RabbitMQ/Kafka) khi cần mở rộng xử lý bất đồng bộ.

• Tham gia thiết kế – xây dựng – vận hành Microservices trên Kubernetes/Swarm.

• Nghiên cứu và đề xuất công nghệ mới nhằm tăng hiệu quả phát triển và hiệu suất hệ thống.

• Review code, cải tiến coding standard, hỗ trợ team trong việc giải quyết lỗi hoặc bài toán phức tạp.
requirements:
• Từ 5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển backend (biết Golang, Java là lợi thế lớn).

• Thành thạo OOP và nắm chắc tư duy thiết kế hệ thống.

• Kinh nghiệm với MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis; nắm vững indexing, query optimization, transaction.

• Hiểu sâu RESTful API, Webhook, OAuth2.

• Am hiểu kiến trúc Microservices, design patterns, clean architecture.

• Sử dụng thành thạo Git và CI/CD cơ bản.

• Kinh nghiệm với RabbitMQ/Kafka, distributed systems là lợi thế mạnh.

• Tư duy logic tốt, tự chủ, có trách nhiệm và khả năng phân tích vấn đề ở quy mô lớn.

• Có kinh nghiệm làm sản phẩm hoặc hệ thống lớn là một điểm cộng rất mạnh.
benefits:

• Môi trường làm việc hiện đại, văn hóa trẻ trung – năng động, đồng nghiệp hỗ trợ nhiệt tình.

• Tham gia bảo hiểm sức khỏe riêng dành cho nhân sự chính thức.

• Xét tăng lương định kỳ hằng năm dựa trên kết quả công việc và mức độ đóng góp.

• Thưởng đa dạng: thưởng lễ – Tết, thưởng cuối năm theo hiệu quả kinh doanh.

• Đầy đủ chế độ BHXH – BHYT – BHTN, nghỉ phép theo luật và theo chính sách nội bộ.

• Tham gia các hoạt động nội bộ: Team Building, Gala cuối năm, sinh nhật, chương trình văn hóa sự kiện.

• Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, có cơ hội phát triển nghề nghiệp lâu dài.

title: QA Engineer (Automation, Mobile App, pytest)
label: NEW
reasons:
- International Exposure, AI-native product building
- Full Ownership & Career Rewards
- Accelerated Growth & Meaningful Impact-SaaS nature
jobDescription:
What We Offer You

- Ownership of quality for a real revenue product used by carriers and brokers.
- A team that treats automation and AI-assisted testing as the standard, not an experiment, and gives you room to shape how AI is used in QA.
- Growth into test architecture and AI-assisted testing practices.

About the Role

We are looking for a QA / Test Engineer to own quality for Truckloads (TL), our logistics SaaS platform

for carriers and brokers. You will design and automate tests across mobile and API layers, and, just as

importantly, help us push testing into an AI-assisted model, where AI generates test cases and scripts

from PRDs, Figma, and our knowledge base, and the engineer focuses on judgment, calibration, and

coverage decisions.

This is a hands-on role for someone who is excited about automation-first QA and about using AI as a

serious part of the testing workflow, not just a novelty

Responsibilities

- Design test cases from business rules and requirements, covering happy paths, edge cases, and error paths, not just the obvious scenarios.
- Build and maintain Truckloads automation suites: Mobile UI: Maestro (Android + iOS) AND API: Python / pytest
- Use AI to accelerate testing: generate and refine test cases and automation scripts from PRDs,
- Figma designs, and the knowledge base; review and calibrate AI output for correctness and coverage.
- Keep the knowledge base structured and “AI-consumable” (clear naming, machine-readable structure) so that AI-generated tests stay reliable.
- Own the bug lifecycle: reproduce, triage, file well-documented tickets, and verify fixes through regression scripts.
- Run and analyze test results, classify failures (environment / script / product bug), and drive them to resolution, with no unexplained skips or failures.
requirements:
Requirements

Must-have

- 3+ years of experience in QA / test automation.
- Solid programming ability in Python.
- Hands-on experience with test automation frameworks (mobile UI and/or API).
- Experience with API testing and understanding of REST/HTTP .
- Comfortable using AI / LLM tools (e.g. Claude, Copilot) in daily engineering work, and able to critically review AI-generated output rather than trust it blindly.
- Familiarity with Git-based workflows and CI/CD pipelines.
- Strong analytical mindset, able to root-cause failures from logs and evidence, not guess.
- Working proficiency in English (written and spoken) for cross-region collaboration.
- 

Nice-to-Have

- Experience with Maestro (mobile automation).
- Mobile app testing experience (Android / iOS).
- Experience designing prompts or workflows for AI-assisted test generation.
- Background in SaaS, logistics, or transportation products.
benefits:
- At Moatable, we prioritize talent development. You’ll receive comprehensive support at every stage of your career journey, right from the start.
- You’ll be involved in the entire product design and delivery process, where a strong sense of achievement and fulfillment awaits.
- Immerse yourself in a global atmosphere—Moatable boasts multiple offices worldwide. Join us to collaborate with teams from diverse cultural and professional backgrounds.

Moatable offer an exciting blend of challenge, growth, and purpose. As a fast-paced SaaS AI company operating at the forefront of technical innovation, our teams tackle complex problems daily, giving engineers and product minds alike the opportunity to grow fast, think boldly, and lead with impact.

Our largest business market is in the U.S., where we build software to high standards and face little direct competition, giving our teams the unique advantage of solving real, large-scale problems with global reach. If you're driven by growth, energized by challenge, and ready to lead, Moatable is where your next chapter begins.

What We Offer

- 12 annual leaves + 3 annual sick leaves
- Fixed 13th-month salary
- Attractive Base Salary, Full Social Insurance contributions from you Day 1
- Quarter Performance Review and Bonuses
- Monthly Onsite Allowance of500.000 VND during probation, 1.000.000 VND after probation and 1.500.000 VND after your one year
- 500.000 VND during probation,
- 1.000.000 VND after probation and
- 1.500.000 VND after your one year
- Monthly Snacks and Drinks
- Annual Health Check-up
- Premium Health Insurance Package

title: Backend Engineer (Java, Golang, Cloud, AWS, PostgreSQL)
label: NEW
jobDescription:
About AIRR Labs

AIRR Labs is a fast-growing E-commerce and Social Commerce company helping brands build meaningful connections with consumers across Southeast Asia.

Our Technology team develops AI-powered platforms and internal products that enable business teams to operate at scale, automate complex workflows, and drive measurable business outcomes. We are building the operational backbone of modern commerce — combining intelligent automation, scalable infrastructure, and data-driven decision-making.

As a Backend Engineer, you will play a key role in designing and building the systems that power our next generation of commerce solutions.

What You'll Do

- Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services using Go (Golang) or Java.
- Build high-performance, event-driven microservices that support critical business workflows and large-scale transaction processing.
- Design and implement distributed systems for order management, fulfillment, and commerce operations.
- Develop and optimize cloud-native applications on AWS, ensuring reliability, scalability, and performance.
- Design and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines to support rapid and reliable software delivery.
- Collaborate on database architecture and data modeling using PostgreSQL, ensuring data integrity and system efficiency.
- Integrate with third-party platforms, APIs, and external services.
- Work closely with Product, Business, and Engineering teams to transform business requirements into scalable technical solutions.
- Continuously improve system architecture, code quality, observability, and engineering best practices.
requirements:
What We're Looking For

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
- 2+ years of backend development experience. We are also open to exceptional early-career engineers with strong technical foundations.
- Strong proficiency in Go (Golang) or Java.
- Experience building and operating cloud-native applications on AWS.
- Solid understanding of relational databases, particularly PostgreSQL.
- Experience working with containerized environments using Docker and Kubernetes.
- Familiarity with modern observability and monitoring tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki.
- Experience working with search technologies such as OpenSearch or Elasticsearch.
- Understanding of distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and high-concurrency applications.
- Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for building scalable products.
- Good English communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively within regional teams.

Nice to Have

- Experience working with workflow orchestration platforms such as Temporal.
- Experience building high-traffic, large-scale systems.
- Exposure to AI-powered development tools, AI agents, or AI-driven automation solutions.
- Experience leveraging AI technologies to improve engineering productivity, software quality, or operational efficiency.
benefits:
Why Join AIRR Labs?

- Build products that directly impact thousands of brands and consumers across Southeast Asia.
- Work on modern cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, and AI-powered solutions.
- Join a fast-growing technology team with significant ownership and autonomy.
- Collaborate with talented regional teams in a dynamic and entrepreneurial environment.

title: Junior Microsoft Business Central Consultant (ERP)
jobDescription:
About the Role

We are looking for a Junior Functional Consultant (Microsoft Business Central)to join our Finance Transformation team. Reporting to the Finance Transformation Director, this role will be responsible for supporting internal users, ensuring consistency across entities, and proactively driving system improvements.

Key Responsibilities

User Support & Incident Management

- Provide first- and second-level support to internal users on Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central
- Analyze, troubleshoot, and resolve functional issues in a timely manner
- Manage and prioritize user requests through a ticketing system
- Ensure clear communication and follow-up with stakeholders

System Standardization

- Ensure harmonization of Business Central configurations across multiple companies/entities
- Define and promote best practices and standard processes
- Support governance of master data and system usage

Continuous Improvement

- Act as a key contributor to system optimization initiatives
- Identify opportunities to improve efficiency, automation, and reporting
- Propose and document enhancements aligned with business needs
- Collaborate with IT and external partners when required

Documentation & Training

- Create and maintain user guides, procedures, and knowledge base documentation
- Support onboarding and training of new users
- Promote adoption of standard processes and tools
requirements:
Requirements & Qualifications

Mandatory

- Strong experience with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central
- Fluent English (written and spoken)
- Proven experience in user support or functional consulting

Preferred

- Good understanding of accounting and finance processes
- Knowledge of accounting and invoicing modules in Business Central would be a strong plus
- Experience in multi-entity/international environments
- Familiarity with process standardization and change management

Skills & Competencies

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Customer-oriented mindset with excellent communication abilities
- Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks
- Proactive attitude with a continuous improvement mindset
- Team player capable of working across functions and locations
benefits:
What We Offer

title: (Mid/Senior) Business Analyst (ERP/ Odoo)
company: Công ty cổ phần giải pháp chuyển đổi số THG
jobDescription:
Business Analyst là cầu nối giữa khách hàng và đội kỹ thuật (Dev, Test, Designer), giữ vai trò trung tâm trong quy trình triển khai ERP của THG. Vị trí này chịu trách nhiệm làm rõ yêu cầu, thiết kế giải pháp nghiệp vụ trên nền tảng Odoo và các ứng dụng quản trị doanh nghiệp (HRM, MES/sản xuất, Kho/WMS, Kế toán – Tài chính, Mua hàng, Bán hàng/CRM…), đồng thời chủ trì nghiệm thu (UAT) cùng khách hàng.

- Khảo sát, tiếp nhận và làm rõ yêu cầu của khách hàng cho các dự án ERP/Odoo và ứng dụng quản trị doanh nghiệp.
- Phân tích, mô hình hóa quy trình nghiệp vụ hiện tại (As-is) và thiết kế quy trình mục tiêu (To-be); đề xuất giải pháp tối ưu trên Odoo.
- Biên soạn tài liệu phân tích: đặc tả yêu cầu (SRS/FRS), user story, use case, sơ đồ quy trình (BPMN/UML), prototype/wireframe.
- Làm đầu mối trao đổi giữa khách hàng và đội Dev/Test/Designer; làm rõ yêu cầu, kiểm soát và xử lý thay đổi (change request) trong suốt vòng đời dự án.
- Chủ trì nghiệm thu (UAT): xây dựng kịch bản nghiệm thu, hướng dẫn khách hàng kiểm thử trên môi trường staging và lấy xác nhận (sign-off) bàn giao.
- Tư vấn nghiệp vụ trên góc độ giải pháp ERP; đề xuất cải tiến quy trình và khai thác tính năng sẵn có của Odoo trước khi customize.
- Hỗ trợ pre-sales: khảo sát nhu cầu, demo sản phẩm, xây dựng đề xuất giải pháp và ước lượng phạm vi (scope/estimate).
- Viết tài liệu hướng dẫn sử dụng (user manual), đào tạo người dùng cuối và hỗ trợ go-live.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành: Công nghệ thông tin, Hệ thống thông tin quản lý, Kinh tế, Quản trị kinh doanh hoặc các ngành liên quan.
- Tối thiểu 3 - 5 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí Business Analyst, trong đó có kinh nghiệm BA cho ERP hoặc ứng dụng quản trị doanh nghiệp.
- Hiểu sâu nghiệp vụ ít nhất một vài phân hệ: HRM, MES/Sản xuất, Kho/WMS, Kế toán – Tài chính, Mua hàng, Bán hàng/CRM.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên đã từng làm BA cho Odoo (hoặc ERP tương đương: SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, Bravo, MISA AMIS…).
- Thành thạo công cụ mô hình hóa và quản lý tài liệu: BPMN/UML, Figma/draw.io, Jira/Confluence hoặc tương đương.
- Biết viết user story và tiêu chí nghiệm thu (acceptance criteria); quen làm việc theo Agile/Scrum là lợi thế.
- Kỹ năng phân tích, giao tiếp, thuyết trình và quản lý yêu cầu (requirement management) tốt; chủ động, cẩn thận, định hướng khách hàng.
- Đọc hiểu tốt tài liệu kỹ thuật tiếng Anh.
- Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ liên quan: IIBA (ECBA/CCBA/CBAP), Odoo Functional Certification hoặc tương đương.
benefits:
- Mức lương 15 – 35 triệu, thỏa thuận theo năng lực và kinh nghiệm; xét tăng lương định kỳ.
- Thưởng lễ Tết, lương tháng 13.
- Thưởng theo hiệu quả dự án và mức độ đóng góp.
- Đóng BHXH, BHYT, BHTN đầy đủ theo quy định.
- Tham gia xây dựng quy trình phát triển phần mềm ERP ứng dụng AI – môi trường công nghệ hiện đại, làm việc trực tiếp với khách hàng doanh nghiệp.
- Lộ trình phát triển rõ ràng: Senior BA / BA Lead / Solution Consultant; được đào tạo chuyên môn và nghiệp vụ ERP.
- Các chế độ phúc lợi khác theo quy định công ty (du lịch, team building, nghỉ phép…).

title: AI Engineer – Generative AI & Data Processing
jobDescription:
Job Summary

We are seeking an enthusiastic AI Engineer to join our team, focusing on innovative Generative AI and Data Processing solutions. In this role, you will design, develop, and deploy advanced generative models and data-driven applications, significantly enhancing user experiences across various industries.

Key Responsibilities

- Research, develop, and deploy scalable Generative AI models and data processing solutions.
- Integrate advanced Large Language Models (LLMs), diffusion models, and multimodal generative AI techniques into practical applications.
- Collaborate with software engineering teams to convert AI prototypes into robust, production-ready systems.
- Optimize and fine-tune AI models for improved performance, accuracy, and efficiency.
- Perform comprehensive evaluations and benchmarking of AI agents to ensure high-quality, reliable results.
- Continuously research emerging trends and technologies in AI, machine learning, and generative methods.
requirements:
Qualifications

- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related fields.
- +2 years of experience in developing and deploying generative AI models (e.g., GPT, Stable Diffusion, Transformer architectures).
- Practical knowledge of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) methods and Vector Databases.
- Familiarity with Python and popular deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Hugging Face.
- Experience with cloud services (AWS, GCP) and modern MLOps practices.
- Hands-on experience with embedding technologies and LLM like OpenAI API, Gemini API, and Anthropic API.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a passion for innovation.

Preferred Skills

- Experience with AI model optimization techniques, including quantization, pruning, and fine-tuning.
- Familiarity with deploying AI models using Kubernetes or similar container orchestration platforms.
- Excellent communication skills and the ability to effectively collaborate within interdisciplinary teams.
benefits:
- Working time: 8:30AM - 5:30PM, Monday to Friday (flexible hours as long as productivity is ensured).
- Remote work policy allows up to 2 days per week.
- Review salary every 6 months, 13th-month salary and receive a benefit bonus twice a year.
- Good career development opportunities with interesting and challenging projects.
- Entitled to social insurance, health insurance, and unemployment insurance as regulated by the government.

Về vị trí nàyMPNX là công ty chuyên về thương mại hóa và khai thác giá trị tài sản trí tuệ, tập trung vào hoạt động cấp phép công nghệ, phân tích bằng sáng chế, tư vấn IP và các dự án licensing trên thị trường quốc tế.

Công ty tham gia toàn bộ quá trình thương mại hóa IP, từ tìm kiếm và đánh giá bằng sáng chế, phân tích kỹ thuật, xây dựng chiến lược cấp phép đến triển khai các dự án licensing và giải quyết tranh chấp bằng sáng chế tại các thị trường lớn như Hoa Kỳ và châu Âu.

Trách nhiệm- Tham gia toàn bộ quy trình cấp phép công nghệ và tài sản trí tuệ, từ phân tích ban đầu đến hỗ trợ xây dựng chiến lược licensing.- Nghiên cứu chuyên sâu các sản phẩm, dịch vụ và hệ thống công nghệ tiên tiến trên thị trường.- Phân tích kiến trúc hệ thống, phần cứng, phần mềm, nền tảng cloud và cách thức vận hành của sản phẩm công nghệ.- Đọc, phân tích và diễn giải nội dung kỹ thuật trong tài liệu bằng sáng chế.- So sánh các yêu cầu bảo hộ của bằng sáng chế với tính năng, cấu trúc hoặc phương thức hoạt động của sản phẩm và dịch vụ trên thị trường.- Xây dựng bảng đối chiếu kỹ thuật và **Patent Claim Chart** phục vụ phân tích khả năng xâm phạm bằng sáng chế.- Xác định các sản phẩm, dịch vụ hoặc doanh nghiệp có khả năng liên quan đến danh mục bằng sáng chế của công ty.- Đánh giá tiềm năng thương mại hóa, cấp phép hoặc tạo doanh thu từ các bằng sáng chế.- Chuẩn bị báo cáo phân tích kỹ thuật, tài liệu nghiên cứu và hồ sơ phục vụ hoạt động IP licensing.- Phối hợp với các chuyên gia IP, luật sư sáng chế và đội ngũ kinh doanh trong quá trình đánh giá và triển khai dự án.- Theo dõi xu hướng công nghệ, sản phẩm mới và hoạt động của các doanh nghiệp công nghệ toàn cầu.
requirements:
Yêu cầu bắt buộc

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành:- Công nghệ thông tin;- Khoa học máy tính;- Kỹ thuật phần mềm;- Điện – Điện tử;- Kỹ thuật máy tính;- Viễn thông;- hoặc các ngành kỹ thuật liên quan.- Có kinh nghiệm chuyên môn ở cấp Senior trong lĩnh vực phát triển phần mềm, kiến trúc hệ thống, cloud computing hoặc phân tích hệ thống công nghệ.- Có kiến thức chuyên sâu về ít nhất một trong các lĩnh vực:- System Architecture;- Cloud Computing;- Software Engineering;- Computer Hardware;- Network hoặc Cybersecurity.- Có khả năng nghiên cứu và phân tích cách thức hoạt động của các sản phẩm, dịch vụ và hệ thống công nghệ.- Có khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật phức tạp và chuyển hóa thành báo cáo phân tích rõ ràng.- Sử dụng tiếng Anh tốt trong cả văn viết và giao tiếp, đặc biệt là khả năng đọc tài liệu kỹ thuật và viết báo cáo chuyên môn.- Có tư duy logic, khả năng điều tra, nghiên cứu và chú ý đến chi tiết.- Có tính chính trực, tinh thần trách nhiệm và khả năng bảo mật thông tin cao.- Có kỹ năng giao tiếp và phối hợp công việc tốt.

Không bắt buộc kinh nghiệm IP trước đó

Ứng viên không nhất thiết phải từng làm việc trong lĩnh vực bằng sáng chế. Tuy nhiên, cần có:

- Kiến thức cơ bản hoặc sự quan tâm đến bằng sáng chế và sở hữu trí tuệ.- Khả năng học hỏi nhanh các khái niệm như Patent Claim, Prior Art, Infringement Analysis và Technology Licensing.- Mong muốn phát triển chuyên môn tại giao điểm giữa công nghệ, pháp lý và chiến lược kinh doanh.

ƯU TIÊN

- Đã từng tham gia thiết kế, phát triển hoặc đánh giá kiến trúc hệ thống.- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với cloud, SaaS, nền tảng phần mềm, hệ thống phân tán hoặc hạ tầng mạng.- Có kinh nghiệm nghiên cứu sản phẩm của các doanh nghiệp công nghệ quốc tế.- Đã từng viết tài liệu kỹ thuật, báo cáo phân tích hoặc tài liệu thiết kế hệ thống.- Có kiến thức hoặc kinh nghiệm liên quan đến bằng sáng chế, sở hữu trí tuệ, licensing hoặc patent analysis.- Có kinh nghiệm trong các lĩnh vực viễn thông, AI, cloud, cybersecurity, bán dẫn hoặc phần mềm hệ thống.

Ứng viên vui lòng gửi:

- CV bằng tiếng Anh- Thông tin về các dự án hoặc hệ thống công nghệ đã từng tham gia- Tài liệu kỹ thuật, báo cáo hoặc portfolio liên quan nếu có.
benefits: Quyền lợi- Cơ chế đánh giá và đãi ngộ dựa trên kết quả công việc, với tiềm năng tăng trưởng thu nhập theo đóng góp và thành tích.- Cơ hội được công ty tài trợ chi phí công tác tại Hàn Quốc khoảng 1–2 lần/năm, phục vụ hoạt động phối hợp đội ngũ và trao đổi chuyên môn.- Được cung cấp đầy đủ thiết bị phần cứng, phần mềm và công cụ CNTT cần thiết cho công việc.- Cơ hội làm việc trực tiếp với các chuyên gia giàu kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực bằng sáng chế và IP licensing quốc tế.- Được đào tạo về phân tích bằng sáng chế, claim mapping, licensing và chiến lược thương mại hóa IP.- Môi trường làm việc chuyên sâu, quốc tế và có cơ hội tiếp cận nhiều công nghệ tiên tiến.

Điểm cộng

title: [Danang] Project Leader/ PMO/ BrSE (Japanese N2+)
reasons:
- 13th Salary + Excellent Bonus
- Foreign Language Allowance (Up to 500USD/month)
- 19 days of paid leave + Premium Health Insurance
jobDescription:
We are looking for an experienced Project Leader (PMO) to support project governance, delivery monitoring, and quality assessment for software development projects serving Japanese customers.

The role focuses on reviewing project information, analyzing delivery status and quality indicators, identifying potential risks and areas for improvement, and providing objective observations and recommendations to both customers and offshore teams. The position supports project transparency, quality improvement, and delivery governance through continuous monitoring and data-driven analysis.

Project Monitoring & Analysis

- Review project progress, delivery status, quality metrics, and project documentation to obtain an objective view of project health.
- Analyze project data, reports, schedules, defect trends, issue logs, and other project indicators to identify potential risks, quality concerns, or process gaps.
- Monitor compliance with agreed project processes, quality standards, and customer requirements.
- Evaluate project execution from governance and quality perspectives and provide independent observations to stakeholders.

Quality & Governance Support

- Identify delivery risks, quality issues, process weaknesses, and operational challenges that may impact project outcomes.
- Raise observations, concerns, and improvement recommendations based on project data and evidence.
- Provide insights and suggestions to offshore teams and customers on improving project quality, risk management, development processes, and delivery transparency.
- Support continuous improvement initiatives by identifying recurring issues, lessons learned, and best practices across projects.

Reporting & Stakeholder Communication

- Consolidate and analyze information from multiple project sources to prepare project monitoring reports and governance summaries.
- Provide objective updates regarding project status, quality trends, risk indicators, and areas requiring management attention.
- Present findings, observations, and recommendations to project stakeholders in a clear and professional manner.
- Maintain project governance records, assessments, monitoring reports, and related documentation.

Other Responsibilities

- Support Manager / Senior Manager in governance, quality assurance, and project monitoring activities.
- Perform other tasks assigned by Manager / Senior Manager.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field.
- 5+ years of experience in software development, including at least 3 years as a PMO/ Team Leader / Project Leader / Project Manager for Japanese projects.
- Good understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC), project governance, software quality management, and delivery processes.
- Experience analyzing project status, delivery quality, project risks, and development metrics.
- Familiarity with Waterfall and Agile/Scrum methodologies.
- Experience working with Japanese customers in offshore development environments.
- Proficiency in Japanese (JLPT N2 or above).
- Experience in web-based systems using Java (Spring), Angular.
- Banking domain knowledge is a plus.
- PMP, ACP, ISTQB, or equivalent certifications are advantageous.
- Strong leadership, client-facing, presentation, and negotiation skills.
- Willingness to travel or work overseas when required.
benefits:
- Working time: Monday - Friday
- 13th Month Salary + Year-End Reward (a half month) + Excellent Bonus
- Special allowance for foreign language certificate (up to 500USD/month)
- Full social package (SI, HI, UI) & Premium healthcare insurance (Bao Viet)
- Annual Health Check at top-tier healthcare centers
- Up to 19 days of paid leave
- Free Japanese Classes, 1:1 sessions with native teachers
- Udemy account provided & Sponsorship for technical certificates (AWS, Azure, PMP, etc.)
- Exciting activities: Company Trip, Xmas & Year-End Party, Sports Day, Outing Trip, etc.
- Reward Most Valuable Player (MVP) for individual & team: twice a year
- Sports clubs provided (100% sponsored by the company): Football, Badminton
- Professional environment with clear procedures and well-working facilities
- Onsite opportunities: short-term and long-term assignments in Japan, and APAC.

benefits:
8seneca is committed to building a workplace where employees can grow, contribute, and thrive.

1. Engaging perks and benefits for your well-being

We offer a competitive package including 13th-month salary, on-time salary payments, and project bonuses based on revenue. Employees are fully covered with 100% salary-based insurance, advanced healthcare insurance, annual health check-ups, and Tet/holiday gifts.

Work-life balance is supported with 14 days annual leave plus 3 Christmas days, flexible working arrangements (3 days WFH for senior lever up), modern office facilities, team-building trips (4D3N at 5-star resorts), and wellness support such as vitamins in the office. In addition, the office provides coffee machines, snacks, and fresh fruits to support daily comfort and energy.

2. World-class technology and impactful projects

You will work with modern technologies in AI, Data, Cloud, and Software Engineering on large-scale international projects for European clients, including strategic initiatives for our company—one of the top IT companies in Europe. We also provide access to modern AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude Code to support productivity and engineering excellence.

3. A culture of growth, collaboration, and learning

We foster continuous learning through mentorship programs, 1-1 feedback, and performance reviews. Employees are empowered to take ownership, make decisions, and learn from mistakes in a safe, supportive environment. A shared company library also promotes continuous self-development.

At 8seneca, you will work with talented people from diverse backgrounds, united by a passion for technology and innovation.
