title: Technical Leader / Technical Product Manager
reasons:
- Make a global impact on merchants’ success
- Deepen your skills in a competitive SaaS market
- Grow with passionate talents for quality products
jobDescription:
Job Overview:

We are looking for a product-minded Technical Lead who possesses a strong engineering foundation and the leadership capability to drive our backend and AI initiatives. You will not only architect scalable Python systems but also align technical decisions with business goals.

In this role, you are expected to own the product lifecycle end-to-end—from design to operation—while building a high-trust, high-performance engineering culture. You must be adaptable, ready to lead the team through technology shifts (specifically in AI integration), and capable of balancing speed, quality, and cost based on the product phase.A. Key Responsibilities:

1. Product-Centric Engineering & Strategy

- Product Mindset: Work closely with Product Managers to understand user pain points and value features. Make technical trade-offs based on the current product phase (e.g., MVP vs. scaling).
- Ownership: Take end-to-end responsibility for features: Design → Development → Release → Operation. Proactively propose solutions and identify risks before they become issues.
- Adaptability: Lead the team in adapting to new technology directions, particularly integrating AI/ML workflows into the backend. Be willing to pivot technical approaches when product direction changes.

2. Architecture & Technical Foundation

- System Design: Architect robust systems with a clear understanding of when to use Monolith vs. Microservices. Design efficient data models, data flows, and versioned APIs.
- Cloud & Infrastructure: Leverage AWS services effectively. Assess the risks and benefits of integrating external services versus building in-house.
- Performance & Security: Ensure systems are designed for scalability, high performance, and security while keeping infrastructure costs optimized.

3. Delivery & Execution

- Execution: Ensure on-time releases with the required quality standards. Manage scope creep and handle cross-team/external dependencies effectively.
- Risk Management: Provide honest reporting to management. Do not hide risks; instead, communicate them early with mitigation plans.
- Operational Excellence: Maintain system stability and reliability in production.

4. Leadership & Mentorship

- Team Building: Build a strong engineering culture and standardize coding practices. protect the team from distractions while ensuring members trust and follow your technical direction.
- Mentorship: Conduct code reviews to mentor the team on mindset and standards (SOLID, DRY). Delegate tasks effectively—assigning the right people to the right jobs.
- Communication: Act as a bridge between technical and non-technical stakeholders. Explain technical decisions to the CEO and Product teams using business language (Cost, Risk, Impact). Align expectations on scope and delivery explicitly from the start.
requirements:
1. Mindset & Soft Skills (Must Have):

- Product-Oriented: Ability to balance technical perfection with business value and speed-to-market.
- Accountability: High sense of ownership; you care about the outcome, not just the effort.
- Adaptability: A continuous learner willing to embrace and lead AI adoption and new workflows.
- Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills; able to negotiate scope and explain complex tech concepts to non-tech stakeholders.

2. Technical Requirements:

- Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
- 5+ years in Backend Development (Python focus).
- 2+ years in a Leadership role (Lead/Senior with mentoring duties).
- Experience integrating AI/ML models into production systems.
- Core Stack: Strong expertise in Python (Django, Flask, or FastAPI).
- Database: Deep knowledge of SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB/Redis) data modeling.
- Infrastructure: Proficiency with AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.
- Architecture: Proven experience in System Design (API design, Data flow, Event-driven architecture).

Why Join Us?

- Opportunity to lead a team dealing with real-world AI challenges.
- A culture that values transparency, ownership, and technical excellence.
- Autonomy to make architectural decisions that impact the business.
benefits:
At the core of FireGroup is a deep desire to grow. We’re a passionate team with growth mindsets, turning what we do into a purpose. We’re always exploring how to apply world-class innovations and creative ideas to our work - so we can push further, conquer challenges, and go beyond limits.

In the face of a rapidly evolving e-commerce landscape, we embrace an AI-first approach. Advanced AI tools are embedded in our workflow - not just to boost productivity, but to power smarter decision-making and unlock solutions that serve merchants more effectively. With AI as our co-pilot and a native mindset for technology, we turn complexity into simplicity for those who count on us.

Our ultimate mission is to develop innovative products that comprehensively and effectively solve problems in e-commerce, making online business easy and sustainable for everyone. We believe that the spirit of daring to step up and our distinctive values are the greatest driving forces behind FireGroup's journey from a five-member startup to a team of over 200 colleagues, leading us to greater challenges and successes:

- Courage - Dare to step up
- Growth - Grow beyond yesterday
- Creativity - Think differently
- Ownership - Own your work
- Teamwork - Get Stronger together
- Trust - Give trust, gain trust
- Empathy - Walk in other's shoes

At FireGroup, our values don’t just live in documents - they live in us. They show up in every decision we make, every product we build, and every story our Firers share. Dive into real stories and everyday actions that bring our culture to life: firegroup.io/culture

And that’s not all - we’ve got some great perks waiting for you, including:

Rewarding Compensation & Benefits

- Competitive salary tailored to your skills and experience
- 13th-month salary & seniority bonus
- Annual salary reviews for outstanding contributions
- 16 days of annual leave, with an extra day for 3+ years of service
- Work-from-home policy for pregnant employees
- Premium healthcare and annual health check
- Special occasion support: marriage, maternity bonuses, and birthday vouchers
- Festive gifts for holidays like Mid-Autumn and Lunar New Year
- Free coffee, tea, juice, and a wide range of snacks
- Well-equipped devices provided based on your role (MacBook/iMac/Macmini/Windows Laptop/Monitor)
- Employee Stock Option Program offer for key contributors

Fast-track Growth:

- Gain exceptional experience by building world-class products used by hundreds of thousands of merchants globally
- Buddy Program to guide and support you throughout your onboarding journey
- Regular seminars and workshops to sharpen both technical and soft skills
- Access to Udemy, internal e-learning platform tailored to your growth
- Recognition programs that celebrate your outstanding contributions

Engagement Activities:

- Sports Club: Football, Badminton, Yoga
- Gym area available onsite
- Monthly/Quarterly team bonding events across business units
- Signature company events: Company Trip, Year-End Party, New Year Kick-off, Women’s Day, Christmas, and Quarterly Town Halls - all designed to celebrate and connect our people.

title: Product Manager (Product Owner)
reasons:
- Competitive salary based on ability.
- SHUI & PIT based on full paid salary.
- Mid-autumn gift, wedding & maternity bonus.
jobDescription:
About Hotel Link

Hotel Link builds cloud-based technology that helps independent hotels and accommodation providers manage and grow their business online. Our platform spans a Channel Manager (CM), Property Management System (PMS), Booking Engine, and integrated Payment capabilities, connecting properties to OTAs, distribution channels, and payment processing in a single ecosystem.

About the Role

We're hiring a Product Manager to own the discovery, definition, and delivery of features across one of our core product lines: Channel Manager, PMS, and Payments. You'll translate the operational realities of hoteliers into shipped product, working at the intersection of engineering, design, integrations partners (OTAs, payment gateways), and go-to-market teams. This is a hands-on execution role: you'll manage a backlog, write requirements, coordinate releases across a connected product suite, and measure outcomes.

Responsibilities

- Own and prioritize the backlog for your product area (CM, PMS, or Payments), balancing hotelier needs, partner/channel requirements, and technical constraints.
- Write clear PRDs, user stories, and acceptance criteria, particularly for integration-heavy work where third-party API behavior (OTAs, payment processors) defines what's possible.
- Coordinate delivery across the product and engineering teams: tracking progress against the roadmap, surfacing risks early, and removing blockers to keep releases on schedule. (PM owns priorities and scope; engineering owns estimates and technical execution.)
- Drive alignment within the product team on your area: facilitating planning, keeping stakeholders in sync, and ensuring everyone is working from a single, current source of truth.
- Manage the full lifecycle of OTA and channel integrations (e.g., Booking.com, Expedia, Agoda) and payment gateway connections, working closely with partner technical contacts.
- Run agile ceremonies with engineering and triage bugs, sync issues, and partner-reported defects, which are frequent in distribution and payments.
- Conduct customer research with hoteliers and property managers; synthesize operational pain points (overbookings, rate parity, reconciliation, settlement) into product requirements.
- Define and track success metrics: channel connection health, booking sync reliability, payment authorization/settlement rates, PMS adoption, using analytics and direct data queries.
- Leverage AI tools throughout the product workflow — for research synthesis, PRD drafting, competitive analysis, data querying, prototyping, and accelerating routine product work.

Coordinate cross-functional launches across support, onboarding, and regional sales teams, accounting for a geographically distributed, often non-technical customer base.
requirements:
- At least 2–3 years of product management experience.
- Demonstrated ownership of at least one feature or integration from definition through launch.
- Fluent English (written and spoken) is mandatory. You will work daily with international partners, OTA technical contacts, and a global customer base; precise communication is non-negotiable.
- Proven, hands-on proficiency with AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or equivalents) applied to real product work: research, writing, analysis, and prototyping. This is a hard requirement, not a nice-to-have.
- Comfort with data: defining metrics, basic analysis, and reading API logs/responses. SQL is a plus.
- Working knowledge of agile/scrum and tools such as Jira or Linear.
- Customer-centric mindset with evidence of conducting or contributing to user research.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in hospitality technology, travel tech, OTA distribution, or payments.
- Familiarity with hotel distribution concepts: ARI (Availability, Rates, Inventory), rate plans, channel mapping, two-way sync, OTA messaging/booking APIs.
- Exposure to payment flows: tokenization, authorization, capture, refunds, settlement, chargebacks, and PCI considerations.
- Experience integrating AI into product features themselves (not just personal workflow) e.g., AI-assisted support, automation, or recommendations.

Bachelor's degree in a technical, business, or hospitality field or equivalent practical experience.
benefits:
Why You'll Love Working Here

- Competitive salary based on ability.
- 14 annual leaves in a year: 12 annual leaves + 1 day for birthday + 1 day on Christmas.
- Happy Hour every 4 weeks.
- Many parties: Badminton team, Mid-Autumn festival, Christmas Day, New Year….
- SHUI & PIT based on full paid salary.
- Not OT, have time for yourself.
- Multi-national colleagues.
- Company trip every year.
- Many benefits: mid-autumn gift, wedding & maternity bonus.
- A laptop for work.

title: Generative Game Artist (Intern)
reasons:
- MacBook Pro/Extra screens & Remote Work policy
- Premium health insurance package for you, relative
- Company Trip 4-5*, Yoga, Gym/Fitness/English club
jobDescription:
Position Summary

- Are you passionate about video games, art, and the incredible new world of AI technology? We are looking for a highly motivated and creative individual to join our team as a Junior Generative Game Artist. This is a fantastic entry-level opportunity to begin your career at the intersection of art and artificial intelligence.
- In this role, you will learn from our senior artists and assist in creating game assets using cutting-edge generative AI tools like Midjourney, ChatGPT, Gemini Nano Banana, Layer.ai, and OpenArt.ai. Your primary tool for refining and finishing these assets will be Adobe Photoshop. If you have a good artistic eye, a love for learning, and a foundational knowledge of Photoshop, we want to help you grow into a key member of our creative team.

Key Responsibilities

- Assist in Asset Creation: Support the art team by using AI tools to generate initial concepts for characters, environments, and props based on guidance from senior artists.
- Learn Prompt Engineering: Under mentorship, you will learn and apply basic-to-intermediate prompt engineering techniques to generate images that align with the project's art style.
- Image Refinement and Cleanup: Use your Adobe Photoshop skills to perform essential post-production tasks, including cleaning up artifacts, making color corrections, compositing elements, and preparing AI-generated images for in-game use.
- Asset Management: Help organize, name, and maintain the growing library of AI-generated assets to ensure the team can access them easily.
- Experiment and Learn: Actively participate in training sessions and spend time experimenting with our suite of AI tools to develop your skills.
- Support the Team: Provide general support to the art department as needed, contributing to a positive and collaborative studio culture.
requirements:
- Passion for Art & AI: You must have a genuine interest in both digital art and the possibilities of generative AI.
- Photoshop Proficiency: Basic to intermediate proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, with a minimum of 6 to 12 months of consistent use for personal or academic projects.
- A Creative Portfolio: A portfolio is required, but professional experience is not. We want to see your potential! Please include any digital art, drawings, or personal projects made with AI tools (Midjourney, etc.) that showcase your creativity and artistic eye.
- Good Artistic Foundation: A basic understanding of composition, color, and lighting.
- Eagerness to Learn: A strong desire to be trained, listen to feedback, and rapidly develop new skills in a fast-paced environment.
- Good Communication Skills: Ability to communicate in English and/or Vietnamese within a team setting.

Preferred Qualifications (Bonus Points)

- Experience with other digital art software like Clip Studio Paint, Procreate, etc.
- Personal experience creating a small game or mod.
- Familiarity with the basic concepts of 3D modeling (e.g., playing with Blender).
- Active participation in online art or AI art communities.
benefits:
- Gain hands-on experience with state-of-the-art automation and AI tools.
- Receive mentorship from industry-leading experts.
- Enjoy flexible working hours tailored to your schedule.
- Opportunity for a full-time role based on performance.

title: Network Engineer (System Admin, Cisco, Firewall)
reasons:
- Chế độ lương thưởng, phúc lợi hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, năng động
- Đào tạo chuyên sâu nghiệp vụ Cảng, Kho, Logistic
jobDescription:
Quản lý hệ thống CNTT

- Quản lý hệ thống mạng (LAN, WAN, không dây, có dây…), hệ thống camera.
- Đảm bảo hệ thống mạng, camera hoạt động ổn định.
- Lên kế hoạch bảo dưỡng và nâng cấp hệ thống mạng, Camera.
- Quản trị thiết bị mạng, Camera.

Công tác triển khai hệ thống CNTT

- Triển khai hoặc phối hợp với đối tác trong việc cung cấp triển khai các hạng mục hạ tầng CNTT bao gồm: Cabling, Networking, Camera, AccessPoint, hệ thống phụ trợ trung tâm dữ liệu, Hội nghị truyền hình…
- Chịu trách nhiệm đảm bảo tiến độ triển khai các dự án cung cấp hạ tầng CNTT

Công tác vận hành hệ thống CNTT

- Trực vận hành hệ thống họp trực tuyến: Hỗ trợ công tác vận hành, xử lý lỗi Hội nghị truyền hình trực tuyến. Các cuộc họp quan trọng phải có mặt Onstite tại phòng họp.
- Thực hiện cấu hình các thiết bị network bao gồm: Router, Switch, Firewall, Wireless, Virtualization, Hệ thống Hội nghị truyền trình trực tuyến…
- Xử lý lỗi khi có sự cố.
- Sao lưu cấu hình thiết bị, quản lý thông tin các bản sao lưu và thực hiện phục hồi sao lưu khi cần thiết.
- Triển khai các bản vá lỗi, cập nhật.
- Đề xuất các kế hoạch để nâng cấp hệ thống CNTT khi cần thiết và thực hiện thay đổi cấu hình để nâng cấp hệ thống tương ứng.
- Tư vấn kịp thời cho cấp trên đối với các vấn đề, sự cố phát sinh để đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động ổn định.

Đào tạo, hỗ trợ người sử dụng

- Hỗ trợ người dùng trong việc xử lý lỗi, phối hợp với phòng ban nhóm nghiệp vụ khác trong việc tạo ra tài liệu liệu hướng dẫn cho người dùng cuối.
- Triển khai chính sách, quy trình hoạt động của Bộ phận CNTT đến cho tất cả các phòng ban

Xây dựng tài liệu quản trị hệ thống

- Tham gia xây dựng các chính sách và quy trình hoạt động tiêu chuẩn của Bộ phận CNTT.
- Thực hiện tài liệu hóa các thay đổi cấu hình giải pháp và được cập nhật thường xuyên.
- Đảm bảo các thay đổi liên quan đến hạ tầng CNTT được tài liệu hóa và cập nhật thường xuyên.
- Thực hiện các công việc khác do cấp trên giao.
requirements:
Trình độ học vấn/chuyên môn:

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ Thông tin, Điện tử Viễn thông, Quản trị mạng hoặc các chuyên ngành tương đương
- Kinh nghiệm từ 2 năm trở lên ở vị trí tương đương.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có các chứng chỉ CCNA/CCNP, JNCIA/JNCIS hoặc tương đương.
- Nắm vững kiến thức về các mô hình kết nối mạng, quản trị Network, Secuirity…
- Nắm vững kiến thức về triển khai, quản trị, giải pháp High Availability/DR cho các hệ thống Network.
- Kỹ năng cấu hình nhiều loại thiết bị (Router/Switch/Firewall/Loadbalance/Controller/AccessPoint/…)
- Kiến thức chuyên sâu về Routing/Switching
- Kỹ năng tốt về TroubleShooting.
- Kỹ năng lập trình cơ bản Automation Network
- Kỹ năng tốt trong xử lý công việc/xử lý sự cố từ xa.
- Kỹ năng tốt về nghiên cứu kiến thức mới, dòng thiết bị mới…
- Kỹ năng phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề
- Kỹ năng viết tài liệu, báo cáo
- Khả năng làm việc theo nhóm
- Kỹ năng tốt trong giao tiếp, đàm phán, thuyết trình
- Tinh thần trách nhiệm cao với công việc, tính trung thực, thái độ rõ ràng trong giải quyết công việc
- Sức khỏe tốt
- Khả năng tự tìm tòi học hỏi, yêu thích và đam mê ứng dụng các công nghệ mới.
- Khả năng giao tiếp tiếng Anh: Khá.

Khả năng đạt được sau thời gian làm việc tại Công ty:

- Hiểu biết sâu rộng về hệ thống CNTT
- Được tiếp cận nhiều công nghệ mới.
- Tăng khả năng làm việc nhóm, phối hợp giữa các bộ phận phòng ban.
- Tăng Khả năng giao tiếp với khách hàng.
- Tăng khả năng phân tích, xử lý tình huống.

Thông tin khác:

- Giới tính: Nam, tuổi dưới 35
- Từng làm thực tập hoặc dự án hoặc tham gia các dự án: cá nhân liên quan đến triển khai hệ thống mạng trung tâm.
benefits:
- Cấp đầy đủ phương tiện, công cụ để thực hiện công việc: máy tính/ Laptop, đồng phục (quần áo, giày, thắt lưng)
- Phụ cấp: 50k/ngày (cơm trưa),.
- Lương cạnh tranh, thưởng tháng 13, lễ Tết và các khoản thưởng khác trong năm.
- Ðược hưởng đầy đủ các chế độ phúc lợi xã hội như: BHXH, BHYT, Lễ tết, Team buiding, nghỉ mát hàng năm, khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm, các hoạt động tri ân, chăm lo đời sống tinh thần cho nhân viên và gia đình...
- Được sử dụng thư viện đọc sách và tham gia các hoạt động thể dục thể thao (theo đoàn thể tại công ty): cầu lông, đá banh, GYM,...
- Được làm việc với các công nghệ, kỹ thuật hiện đại, có cơ hội hiểu biết về nghiệp vụ Cảng biển, Kho bãi và Logistic.
- Đưa ra ý kiến định hướng và các phương án... để hệ thống hoạt động ổn định.
- Tham gia các khóa học đào tạo của công ty.

- Hiểu sâu về OOP, nguyên tắc SOLID và ứng dụng các mẫu thiết kế trong thiết kế giải pháp, thiết kế phần mềm.
- Có kinh nghiệm với ít nhất một framework front-end hiện đại (React, Angular hoặc Vue.js).
- Khả năng viết mã sạch, dễ bảo trì và hiệu quả.

Kỹ năng chuyên môn:

- Back-end: C#, .NET Core/.NET Framework, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework
- Cơ sở dữ liệu: Cơ sở dữ liệu quan hệ, stored procedures, tối ưu hóa cơ sở dữ liệu; các CSDL NoSQL.

- API: Thiết kế API RESTful, Swagger/OpenAPI
- DevOps: Đã triển khai Docker, CI/CD và Kubernetes
- Kiểm thử: Kiểm thử đơn vị (unittest), kiểm thử tích hợp (integration test)

Kỹ Năng Mềm:

Ưu tiên:

- Kinh nghiệm với Entity Framework, Dapper hoặc các framework ORM khác.
- Kiến thức về dịch vụ đám mây (Azure, AWS, GCP) và phát triển ứng dụng native đám mây.

- Hiểu biết về các giải pháp quản lý trạng thái (Redux, MobX, Vuex).
- Kiến thức về GraphQL hoặc gRPC.
- Kinh nghiệm với TypeScript và các tiêu chuẩn JavaScript/ECMAScript hiện đại.
- Quen thuộc với các framework kiểm thử Unit (NUnit, xUnit, Jest).
- Hiểu biết về kiến trúc microservices và thiết kế hướng sự kiện.
- Kiến thức cơ bản về môi trường Linux và shell scripting.

title: System Manager (DevOps, leader, CI/CD,SRE)
jobDescription:
As a System Development Manager, you are the strategic catalyst at the intersection of Software Engineering leadership and Systems Architecture. You will lead a high-performing team of engineers dedicated to building the sophisticated tooling and frameworks that underpin our global security ecosystem. Your mission is to transform operational complexity into streamlined, automated excellence.

You will define the vision for our Continuous Integration and Deployment frameworks, treating internal infrastructure as a premier product. You aren't just managing tasks; you are fostering a culture of Radical Automation and Infrastructure as Code (IaC). By mentoring your team to build self-healing systems and robust internal platforms, you ensure that security, scalability, and reliability are baked into the DNA of everything we ship.

Key Responsibilities

- Strategic Leadership & Vision: Define the roadmap for CI/CD and internal platform engineering. You align technical initiatives with business goals to ensure our infrastructure scales ahead of our customer base.
- Team Empowerment & Mentorship: Lead, coach, and grow a world-class team of System Development Engineers. You remove blockers, foster a culture of "everything as code," and champion the professional growth of your direct reports.
- Platform Management: Drive the strategy for internal tools, APIs, and dashboards. You ensure these tools provide a frictionless "self-service" experience for our global software teams.
- Operational Excellence & Reliability: Oversee the stability of distributed systems. You lead the response to complex escalations and ensure that Root Cause Analysis (RCA) leads to permanent systemic improvements, not just quick fixes.
- Ecosystem Governance: Direct the implementation of advanced telemetry and observability. You ensure the "eyes and ears" of our systems provide the data-driven insights necessary for high-stakes decision-making.
- Security & Compliance Stewardship: Accountable for ensuring all systems meet or exceed strict global cybersecurity standards, maintaining the trust of our international customers.
- Resource & Stakeholder Management: Collaborate with Hardware, Firmware, and Cloud leadership to synchronize development efforts and ensure seamless integration across the Avigilon/Unity, Pelco, and Alta portfolios.
requirements:
Education & Experience

- 8+ years of experience in system development, SRE, or DevOps, with at least 3+ years in a formal leadership or management role.
- Proven track record of delivering large-scale automation projects or internal developer platforms.
- Bachelor Degree or Master Degree in technical or any relevant field.

Technical & Leadership Competencies

- Architectural Fluency: Strong understanding of Linux, networking protocols (TCP/IP, HTTP/3), and cloud-native architectures.
- Development Mindset: Ability to review and guide development in object-oriented and scripting languages (e.g., Python, Go, C++).
- Operational Maturity: Strong experience with IaC (e.g., Terraform, Ansible) and modern CI/CD orchestration.

​

Language & Soft Skills

- English Mastery: Advanced verbal and written communication skills for collaborating with global stakeholders.
- Strategic Problem Solver: Ability to navigate high-pressure situations with a calm, analytical approach.
- People-First Mentality: A passion for building diverse, inclusive teams and fostering a high-trust R&D culture.

​

What We Offer

The unique opportunity to lead and pioneer global security products directly out of Vietnam's thriving innovation center.

An international, diverse, and multicultural R&D culture guided by world-class data scientists and chief engineers.

Competitive salary and bonuses.
benefits:
- Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service …

- You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active

jobDescription:
Job DescriptionYour role and responsibilities:

- Participate in data science projects from problem definition through solution delivery.

- Collect, clean, validate, and prepare structured and unstructured datasets for analysis.

- Develop, evaluate, and optimize statistical and machine learning models for prediction, classification, clustering, and other analytical tasks.
- Design and conduct experiments to evaluate hypotheses and measure model performance.
- Communicate findings and recommendations to stakeholders through reports, visualizations, and presentations.
- Collaborate with Product Owners, business stakeholders, and engineering teams to define project goals and data requirements.
- Monitor model performance, analyze results, and recommend improvements based on new data and business needs.
- Stay up to date with advances in data science, machine learning, and analytics methodologies.

Preferred qualifications:

- Passion for applying data science to solve real-world problems, particularly in the education domain.
- Experience developing predictive models or conducting research in education, learning analytics, or related fields.
- Experience analyzing and modeling learning behavior, educational, or user interaction data.
- Strong knowledge of statistics, probability, experimental design, and machine learning algorithms.
- Experience with the end-to-end data science lifecycle, including data collection, preprocessing, feature engineering, model development, evaluation, and deployment.
- Proficiency in Python and common data science libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or PyTorch).
- Experience working with SQL and relational or NoSQL databases.
- Experience with data visualization tools and libraries (e.g., Matplotlib, Plotly, Tableau, or Power BI) is a plus.
- Familiarity with MLOps, model deployment, or cloud platforms is an advantage but not required.
- MS or PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field.
requirements:

- Experience with the end-to-end data science lifecycle, including data collection, preprocessing, feature engineering, model development, evaluation, and interpretation.
- Experience working with SQL and relational or NoSQL databases.
- Experience working with cloud computing platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud) is preferred.
- Experience using large language models (LLMs) and generative AI for analytical or business applications is a plus.
- Familiarity with data visualization tools and libraries (e.g., Matplotlib, Plotly, Tableau, or Power BI) is an advantage.
- Excellent communication skills in English; proficiency in Japanese is a plus.
- Strong background in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, or a related quantitative discipline.
- Passion for continuous learning and staying current with advances in data science, machine learning, and AI.
- Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills, with the ability to translate business requirements into data-driven insights and predictive models.
- Ability to communicate complex analytical findings effectively to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

title: Technical Scrum Master
reasons:
- Full probation pay + up to 2-month bonus
- Premium healthcare for your whole family
- Flexible Hybrid work & 20 days off
jobDescription:
Role Summary

Itviec’s client is seeking an adaptable, high-energy, and technically grounded Technical Scrum Master to lead, guide, and build a high-performing scrum team dedicated to launching a disruptive financial technology product.

Your main mission is to ensure an optimal, frictionless flow of engineering deliverables straight to "DONE". You will establish a sustainable delivery cadence, manage cross-functional expectations, and clear delivery roadblocks proactively before they impact the sprint.

Responsibilities

- Technical Workflow Management: Oversee continuous product delivery, manage and reduce technical debt, and coach small engineering teams while maintaining a hands-on technical understanding of the ecosystem.
- Ceremony Excellence: Maintain absolute quality and engagement across all agile ceremonies, including Daily Scrums, Sprint Planning, Product Showcases, and Retrospectives.
- Backlog & Visual Tracking: Own and maintain the Master Story List (MSL) to ensure user stories are constantly refined and sprint-ready; maintain transparent visual metrics via card walls and burn-up charts.
- Conflict Resolution & Negotiation: Act as the voice of reason and delivery authority within the team, resolve internal/external friction points, and negotiate scope or timelines with stakeholders pragmatically.
- Team Empowerment: Foster an open, honest, and transparent relationship with key leadership, drive high team morale, and implement constructive feedback loops.
requirements:
Core Requirements:

- Minimum 2+ years of recent, dedicated experience operating as an active Scrum Master in fast-paced software engineering environments.
- Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills are mandatory for daily collaboration in an international setup.
- Strong stakeholder management skills with a proven ability to influence cross-functional teams and leadership without direct formal authority.
- Expert competency in driving team commitment to the Definition of Done (DoD), prioritizing backlogs, and resolving systemic team dependencies.
- Demonstrate assertiveness, pragmatism, and a strong capability to coach or mentor engineering teams while remaining hands-on when necessary.

Technical Breadth (You must demonstrate a solid understanding in at least 3 of the following 5 areas):

- Java Backend: Comprehensive knowledge of microservices-based architectures.
- AWS Cloud Infrastructure: Essential cloud concepts (Holding an AWS Certified Practitioner title is highly advantageous).
- Mobile/Web Development: Practical familiarity with iOS, Android, or standard Web engineering cycles.
- Quality Assurance: Solid foundations in test management and Test Automation frameworks.
- DevOps: Practical understanding of continuous delivery pipelines and CI/CD concepts.
benefits:
About our client

Our client is a rapidly expanding multi-country Digital Banking group headquartered in Singapore, with its core Technology & Product Hub located in Ho Chi Minh City. Operating as a pure product company in the Fintech sector, they build high-scale, secure financial ecosystems that currently empower over 22 million customers across multiple international markets. Driven by a global mission to shape the future of banking through tech innovation, they offer a world-class, agile environment where engineers truly "build and own" their products.

Why You’ll Love Working Here

- Financial Package: 13th-month salary pro-rata, attractive performance bonuses of up to 2 months, 100% salary during probation, and fully covered meal and parking allowances.
- Work-Life Balance: Strictly 40-hour workweek (Monday to Friday) in a Hybrid setup, plus a generous leave package of 20 days
- Health Care: Premium health care package provided for both you and your family right from the start (no seniority required)
- Career Growth: Clear career acceleration through SMART goals, supported by technical seminars, conferences, career talks, and exclusive overseas travel opportunities for training and work.
- Engagement: A vibrant, values-driven international culture featuring internal Hackathons, dynamic company events (team building, coffee runs, blue card), and a highly agile working environment.

title: Software  Engineer - C#/.NET, Azure, DevOps

jobDescription:
An Internal Developer Platform (IDP) Engineer designs, builds, and maintains an Internal Developer Platform (IDP) to provide developers with a self-service environment that abstracts technical complexity and streamlines software delivery. They implement tools and automated workflows for tasks like infrastructure management, CI/CD pipelines, and environment provisioning, enabling development teams to focus on innovation by reducing their cognitive load and providing access to necessary resources.

Roles, Responsibilities & Typical Activities

- Build and maintain the IDP: Design, implement, and manage the set of curated tools, services, and infrastructure that make up the IDP.
- Automate workflows: Develop automated processes for common development and operational tasks, such as provisioning cloud resources, deploying code, and managing environments.
- Enhance developer experience: Focus on user-friendliness and efficiency to reduce the cognitive load on developers, allowing them to self-service their needs without deep infrastructure knowledge.
- Ensure scalability and reliability: Create a platform that is reliable, scalable, and capable of handling evolving application needs over time.
- Promote self-service: Provide a centralized and unified interface, often through an internal developer portal, where developers can access the platform's capabilities and resources.
- Uphold security and compliance: Integrate robust security measures and governance to protect data and meet regulatory requirements.
- Monitor and support the platform: Provide updates, monitor the platform's infrastructure, and offer support to development teams using the IDP.
requirements:
Qualifications & Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field
- Middle: 3+ years | Senior: 5–6+ years of software development experience
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in an agile environment
- Good communication and teamwork skills
- English: Ability to communicate in a working environment (B2+ preferred)

Must-have

- Strong experience with C# and .NET for backend development
- Hands-on experience with Azure Cloud (App Services, Functions, or similar)
- Experience working with DevOps practices (CI/CD, pipelines, automation)
- Solid understanding of SQL databases and backend system design
- Experience building and integrating RESTful APIs

Nice to Have

- Familiar with Microservices architecture
- Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, containerization
- Experience with Infrastructure as Code (e.g., Terraform)
- Knowledge of Platform Engineering or shared libraries
- Experience with Angular / TypeScript

title: DevOps Engineer
company: The Rep. Office of STYL Solutions Pte. Ltd. In HCMC
reasons:
- 100% salary & social insurance during probation

jobDescription:
We are looking for a DevSecOps Engineer to help design, automate, and secure our cloud-based delivery platform.

In this role, you will work on cloud infrastructure, CI/CD automation, secure deployment practices, and developer enablement. You will collaborate closely with development, SRE, and cross-functional teams to improve deployment reliability, platform consistency, security, and engineering productivity.

This role is suitable for someone who enjoys building practical automation, improving delivery workflows, and helping teams release software faster and more safely.

Responsibilities

Your key responsibilities will include, but are not limited to:

Cloud Platform & Infrastructure

Design, build, and manage cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure-as-Code, reusable modules, and environment templates.

Ensure consistent, scalable, secure, and cost-efficient across environments.

Automation & Release Engineering

Design, implement, and maintain CI/CD pipelines for automated build, test, deployment, and artifact promotion.

Standardize release workflows and improve deployment reliability.

Build automation scripts and self-service capabilities to improve productivity and deployment efficiency.

DevSecOps & Compliance

Integrate security controls into CI/CD pipelines, including SAST, DAST, and dependency scanning.

Manage secrets, access control, secure configuration, and compliance with internal/customer security policies.

Support continuous improvement of secure software delivery practices.

Collaboration & Continuous Improvement

Work with development, SRE, and cross-functional teams to improve operational readiness, scalability, observability, and maintainability.

Provide practical recommendations and promote good DevOps and DevSecOps practices across teams.
requirements:
We are looking for candidates who demonstrate:

Education & Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field; or equivalent practical experience.
- At least 3 years of experience in DevOps, DevSecOps, platform engineering, cloud infrastructure, or related roles.

Required Technical Skills

- Hands-on experience with AWS, Azure, or other cloud services, including compute, networking, storage, and security fundamentals.
- Experience with Infrastructure-as-Code tools such as Terraform, CloudFormation, or similar.
- Experience with CI/CD tools such as GitLab CI, or similar.
- Good scripting or programming skills using Python, Bash, PowerShell, or similar.
- Experience automating build, test, deployment, and operational workflows.
- Familiarity with artifact repositories, deployment promotion, and release traceability.
- Experience with Docker and understanding of Kubernetes or container orchestration.
- Understanding of microservices and cloud-native deployment patterns.
- Strong Linux system administration and networking knowledge, including VPC, NAT, VPN, routing, DNS, firewall rules, and security groups.
- Understanding of DevSecOps practices, secure CI/CD, secrets management, access control, vulnerability scanning, and secure configuration.
- Exposure to AI-assisted DevOps, AIOps, log analysis, automation assistants, or AI-based developer productivity tools.
- Good in English communication skills and ability to work with development, operations, security, and project teams.

Nice-to-have

- Experience with observability tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, CloudWatch, or similar.
- Familiarity with SRE practices, high-availability systems, incident response, and post-incident review.
- Experience with cloud cost optimization, cloud governance, or regulated environments.

Success in this role looks like

- CI/CD pipelines are stable, reliable, and adopted by development teams.
- Infrastructure is standardized, reproducible, and easier to manage.
- Deployments are automated with minimal manual intervention.
- Development teams can build, test, and release applications with higher confidence.
- Platform security, scalability, compliance, and operational readiness are continuously improved.

title: AI Automation Engineer (JavaScript, Python, LLM)
jobDescription:
We're building an internal AI platform that empowers every department—from Product and Marketing to Operations, Customer Service and HR—to eliminate repetitive work, improve decision-making and accelerate execution through automation and AI.

We're looking for an AI Automation Engineer to help build that future.

What you’ll build:

- AI tools that help Product, Marketing, Design, Operations and other teams work faster and smarter.
- Intelligent workflows that automate complex business processes across the organization.
- Internal AI systems built from real business knowledge, data and operational workflows.
- End-to-end automations that connect AI with Shopify, ERP, CRM and other business platforms.
- Scalable AI solutions that continuously improve through experimentation and business feedback.

What you’ll do:

- Design and build end-to-end workflow automations using n8n, Make, Zapier or similar platforms.
- Develop AI-powered internal tools for Product, Marketing, Operations, HR and Customer Service teams.
- Integrate internal systems including Shopify, Meta, Google Workspace, ERP, CRM, databases and third-party services through APIs and webhooks.
- Build AI workflows using OpenAI, Claude and other LLMs for content generation, document processing, customer support, product management and internal knowledge retrieval.
- Develop agentic workflows that automate multi-step business processes.
- Build internal dashboards and monitoring systems to measure automation performance and business impact.
- Optimize and maintain production AI workflows as business needs evolve.
- Document automation architecture and technical implementation clearly for long-term scalability.
- Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to identify automation opportunities and deliver practical AI solutions.
requirements:
Must-Have:

- 3+ years of experience building automation workflows, integrations or software applications.
- Strong hands-on experience with at least one automation platform such as n8n, Make or Zapier.
- Experience integrating REST APIs, webhooks, OAuth and third-party services.
- Proficiency in JavaScript or Python.
- Experience integrating LLM APIs such as OpenAI or Anthropic into production workflows.
- Strong problem-solving skills with attention to reliability, monitoring and error handling.
- Ability to translate business problems into scalable AI solutions.
- Strong communication and collaboration skills with cross-functional teams.

Nice to Have

- Experience in Ecommerce, DTC or Marketplace businesses.
- Experience with Shopify ecosystem.
- Experience with Meta Ads API, Google Ads API or ecommerce marketing automation.
- Knowledge of SQL, databases and data pipelines.
- Experience with RAG, vector databases and AI agents.
- Experience building internal AI tools or productivity platforms.
benefits:
- Competitive salary with no upper limit — compensation is based on your skills, experience, and impact.
- 100% salary during the 2-month probation period.
- Full social insurance coverage upon official employment.
- 13th-month salary, Tet bonus, and performance-based bonuses.
- Full access to the latest AI tools and technologies, including premium accounts and licenses (OpenAI, Claude, Cursor, n8n, and other AI/automation platforms).
- Work on high-impact AI initiatives that drive real business outcomes across a global DTC ecommerce company.
- End-to-end ownership of AI automation projects, from idea to production.
- Collaborate directly with leadership to shape Bloomentum's AI roadmap and transformation strategy.
- Explore and implement cutting-edge technologies, including LLMs, AI Agents, RAG, and workflow automation.
- A fast-paced, transparent, and ownership-driven environment with significant opportunities for growth.

title: Senior/Lead Fullstack Engineer
reasons:
- Flexible working time
- Hybrid working
- Global environment
jobDescription:
Itviec’s client is seeking a highly skilled Senior Fullstack Engineer to drive the development of their cutting-edge SaaS Platform. The Senior Fullstack Engineer will work closely with cross-functional teams to build and scale a high-performance web application that handles complex business logic and user interactions. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background across the full stack—from database design using domain-driven design principles to optimizing frontend performance—coupled with the ability to leverage modern web technologies and architectural patterns.

Key Responsibilities:

- Lead the end-to-end design, development, and maintenance of our core SaaS platform, guaranteeing top-tier availability and low latency.
- Build, scale, and maintain clean GraphQL APIs following a schema-first approach and domain-driven design principles.
- Work daily across a modern TypeScript ecosystem (Next.js, NestJS, React) to handle intricate enterprise workflows and user interactions.
- Collaborate seamlessly with cross-functional, multi-national teams to validate, implement, and deliver impact-driven features.
- Participate actively in rigorous code reviews to safeguard high-quality coding standards and write detailed technical documentation (ADRs, Design Docs, Runbooks).
- Participate hands-on in daily product operations, including on-call support, incident responses, troubleshooting, and strategic architectural decisions.
requirements:
Core Requirements (Must Have):

- Minimum 7 years of professional, hands-on experience in full lifecycle web application development.
- High proficiency in statically typed languages like TypeScript or Rust, with verified full-stack experience (both frontend and backend).
- Solid frontend development expertise, specifically leveraging React (Hooks, Context, State Management) and Next.js (SSR/SSG).
- Deep backend engineering experience with Node.js and GraphQL, including schema design, resolvers, and resolving N+1 query optimization problems.
- Hands-on database design and performance optimization experience utilizing PostgreSQL and modern ORMs like Prisma.
- Strong experience building, testing, and maintaining secure RESTful and GraphQL APIs using modular architecture and domain-driven design.
- Solid English communication skills (~B1 level or higher), enabling smooth reading, writing, and verbal technical discussions with a global team.

Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have):

- Familiarity with advanced patterns and architectures such as BFF (Backend for Frontend), clean architecture, microservices, and DDD.
- Hands-on exposure to cloud infrastructure platforms (GCP, Kubernetes) and CI/CD automated pipelines (GitHub Actions).
- Prior experience developing complex B2B SaaS products, enterprise-grade business logic, or large-scale distributed systems across multiple engineering teams.
- Experience working within Agile/Scrum frameworks and building security-conscious web applications.
benefits: ITviec's client – a leading Japanese B2B technology platform in the manufacturing and supply chain optimization domain – is seeking Senior Fullstack Engineers to join a digital transformation revolution for a trillion-dollar industry. Here, we do not just hire “code worker”, we look for true Product Engineers.

jobDescription:

Parcel Perform is looking for an amazing team member to support us on project management!

You have project management skills, 3 years of experience in Agile, Scrum, Kanban environments, you’re technically savvy and have a good grasp on critical thinking and design thinking? WHAT YOU SHOULD BRING ALONG!

We at Parcel Perform believe in innovation, energy, and resourcefulness for everything we do. We will not stop delivering an outstanding product that we can be proud of and need you to help us to inform the world. You need to feel the same way about our offering and bring along the following things:

benefits:
WHAT YOU WILL RECEIVE IN RETURN!

We at Parcel Perform are dedicated to being a platform for growth for all our team members, regardless of function and location.

- The opportunity to work in a fast-growing, super exciting and innovative business that will revolutionize the e-commerce logistics industry. You will be the needle of success on the growth of a global product that will become a key platform behind successful e-commerce logistics worldwide.
- Fully sponsored Claude usage — As part of our commitment to AI-first ways of working, we provide sponsored access to Claude (Desktop, CoWork, and Code) to support smarter, more efficient workflows across the team.
- Submerge in the bleeding-edge of Agentic Development — We don’t simply supplement an existing process with AI tools, we rework every aspect of the software development life cycle, from requirement gathering, implementation, to testing. We believe the productivity multiplication of AI doesn’t just come from individual applications but also from an entire system that embraces it into every fabric.
- An environment where everybody never stops growing and focuses on succeeding – we continuously work with you on your strengths and weaknesses across many important dimensions and look at ways for you to address them and further your development.
- Join a passionate, global team at Parcel Perform where you can continuously develop your skills and actively drive our missions and international success.

OUR BENEFITS!

Parcel Perform is committed to providing a comprehensive and competitive benefits package that supports the wellbeing, growth, and performance of our employees.

- Competitive compensation package
- 13th month salary and ESOP
- Health insurance and annual health check-up
- Hybrid working, flexible hours, and unlimited leave
- Learning support fund for professional development
- Access to AI tools and innovation initiatives
- Company-provided laptop & monitor
- Complimentary lunch and daily snacks
- Employee care programs and engagement activities

WHO ARE WE AT PARCEL PERFORM!

Parcel Perform is built on one of the largest logistics data infrastructures in delivery experience, processing billions of shipment events across 1,100+ carriers.

We help customers optimize every stage—from EDD at checkout through post-purchase, returns, and logistics operations. Now the benchmark in delivery experience, Parcel Perform is the strategic partner that enables global e-commerce businesses to thrive in the age of AI Commerce.

As AI shopping assistants reshape how consumers discover and buy, brands face a new imperative: get found by AI, then consistently deliver on promises. Parcel Perform helps e-commerce brands achieve AI visibility, then provide the cost-efficient delivery experience that turns every successful shipment into proof of reliability—building the trust that earns repeat AI recommendations.

The platform handles enterprise complexity with the agility to go live in weeks—built for the speed of AI without sacrificing customization.

title: IT Technical Project Manager (Agile/ Scrum)
reasons:
- Hi-tech working environment
- Young and dynamic colleagues
- International experience
jobDescription:
ABOUT THE ROLE

Coordinate delivery across CoSAP, an AI-powered FinTech/ERP intelligence platform for SMEs, and Fusionflow, a GPU infrastructure orchestration platform for AI workloads.

You are the delivery backbone across engineering, product, infrastructure, business, and customer-facing teams in Vietnam, Singapore, and regional markets. You turn ambiguous goals into executable plans, surface risks early, and help teams ship reliably.

We need an AI-native delivery practitioner: someone who uses AI daily to improve planning, communication, documentation, analysis, automation, and decision quality - while keeping human accountability for the final result.

AI-NATIVE MINDSET & PRACTICE

- Use ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, Notion AI, MCP servers, or custom agents for backlog shaping, meeting synthesis, risk analysis, docs, release checklists, and retrospectives.
- Apply vibe-coding-style workflows for non-production scripts, dashboards, reporting helpers, templates, workflow automations, and prototypes.
- Build reusable prompts, templates, project artifacts, and AI-assisted workflows that make delivery faster and clearer.
- Verify AI-generated plans, summaries, estimates, acceptance criteria, and documents before sharing or relying on them.
- Protect FinTech/customer data: do not expose sensitive financial, customer, or infrastructure information to unmanaged tools.
- Coach the team toward practical AI habits: better questions, faster drafts, stronger verification, and less manual coordination waste.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Run pragmatic Agile/Scrum: planning, refinement, async updates, reviews, retrospectives, and release planning.
- Convert business priorities into plans with owners, milestones, dependencies, risks, acceptance criteria, and timelines.
- Manage dependencies across CoSAP, Fusionflow, infrastructure, product, customer success, and leadership.
- Coordinate FinTech work involving ERP integrations, financial data, reporting, reconciliation, access control, auditability, and customer trust.
- Support release readiness: QA, validation, rollback planning, monitoring, documentation, and support handoff.
- Improve project boards, sprint cadence, templates, dashboards, checklists, and postmortem follow-up.
requirements:
WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Value-driven - focused on customer impact, business outcomes, engineering quality, and risk reduction.
- AI-native practitioner - uses AI as a default working partner for thinking, drafting, analyzing, documenting, and automating.
- Adaptive - applies Agile/Scrum pragmatically across product, infrastructure, FinTech, and operations work.
- Willing to learn - builds working knowledge of AI, ERP, SME finance workflows, Kubernetes, GPU infrastructure, and FinTech.
- Technically fluent - comfortable discussing APIs, databases, data pipelines, cloud, CI/CD, observability, release risk, and dependencies.
- Verification-minded - checks AI outputs, assumptions, data risks, edge cases, and stakeholder impact before treating anything as true.
- Clear and accountable - writes concise English updates, clarifies ownership, follows up on blockers, and escalates risks early.
- Servant leader - reduces noise, improves clarity, and removes blockers without micromanaging.

REQUIREMENTS

- 3+ years in TPM, Agile delivery, Scrum Master, technical program, or delivery management roles.
- Experience managing software engineering projects from planning through release.
- Strong Agile/Scrum practice: planning, refinement, retrospectives, estimation, release planning.
- Technical fluency with APIs, databases, cloud/infrastructure, CI/CD, observability, and production operations.
- Hands-on daily AI-tool usage for planning, documentation, analysis, summarization, stakeholder communication, and workflow acceleration.
- Comfortable with financial data, ERP, reporting workflows, data quality, or compliance-sensitive requirements.
- Strong written and spoken English.

NICE TO HAVE

- FinTech, banking, payments, accounting software, ERP, BI, AI products, data platforms, infrastructure, or Kubernetes.
- Distributed teams across countries or international stakeholder/customer environments.
- Jira, Linear, GitHub Projects, Notion, Confluence, Slack, Miro, or similar tools.
- Prompt libraries, AI-assisted dashboards, project agents, documentation workflows, or lightweight internal automations.
- Scrum Master, PMI-ACP, PMP, SAFe, or similar certification.
benefits:

- Professional working environment
- Opportunities to challenge and develop your career
- Social insurance, health insurance, unemployment insurance as labor law stipulated
- Premium Healthcare
- Opportunity to participate in stock option program.
- Public holiday and Annual leave in accordance with the Vietnamese labour law

- Well-equipped & modern Agile office with fully-stocked pantry
- Annual company trip and events

A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE WORKPLACE WORKS BETTER FOR EVERYONE

NAB is a place where colleagues of all genders, sexualities and ages, carers and colleagues with disability, and colleagues from all cultures, races and religions have the opportunity to thrive, connect and grow.

If this excites you, let's have a chat over a cup of coffee!

title: Fresher Mobile Developer (Java / Kotlin)
company: Suntech Vina (Hợp tác cùng tập đoàn CNTT hàng đầu Ấn độ)
jobDescription:
About KPIT:

KPIT is a global technology company specializing in providing software solutions and services to the automotive, manufacturing, life sciences, and financial services industries. We are passionate about innovation and creating impactful solutions that drive the future of mobility. At KPIT, you’ll be part of a collaborative and dynamic environment, working on cutting-edge technologies with a team of talented engineers and designers. Job Summary: We are looking for young, passionate, and talented individuals with excellent logical thinking to join our mobile development team. This is a fantastic opportunity for Freshers to step into realworld projects, work with core technologies, and build a solid career path in Mobile Development. Key Responsibilities:

− Participate in the entire mobile application development lifecycle (from requirements analysis, UI/UX implementation to coding and deployment).

− Write clean, optimized, and maintainable code using Java or Kotlin.

− Collaborate with team members to optimize application performance, identify bottlenecks, and fix bugs (debugging).

− Research and apply new technologies and frameworks related to the Android operating system to enhance product quality
requirements:
Must-Have:

− 0 - 1 year of experience. Preference will be given to candidates who are immediate joiners.

− Strong proficiency in Java and Kotlin. Clear understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts.

− Must have completed final-year (major) projects or graduation theses using Java/ Kotlin. Preferred project areas include:

− Android application development. Mobile gaming application development.

− Real-time or high-performance driven applications.

− Strong analytical and logical thinking. Good understanding of data structures, algorithms, and basic system design concep

Good-to-Have:

− Practical exposure to Android SDK, standard APIs, and application lifecycle. Hands-on experience with UI/UX implementation in mobile applications. Proficiency in version control systems, preferably Git.

− Exposure to Android Framework or Middleware layers

− Active participation in coding competitions, hackathons, or open-source contributions Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related fields from Tier-1 institutes.
benefits:
Quyền lợi khi tham gia dự án

- Học hỏi công nghệ tiên tiến: Làm việc trực tiếp với các công nghệ mới nhất trong Android Automotive, Linux BSP, ADAS – những lĩnh vực định hình tương lai của phương tiện điều khiển bằng phần mềm.
- Hợp tác với các tập đoàn toàn cầu: Tham gia cùng một trong những công ty kỹ thuật CNTT hàng đầu Ấn Độ, được tin cậy bởi nhiều OEM và Tier-1, và một tập đoàn công nghệ ô tô toàn cầu đang cung cấp digital cockpit & giải pháp xe thông minh cho hàng triệu phương tiện.
- Phát triển sự nghiệp quốc tế: Cơ hội làm việc tại các trung tâm phát triển toàn cầu của công ty tại Châu Âu, Nhật Bản và Ấn Độ.
- Tác động quy mô lớn: Công việc của bạn sẽ ảnh hưởng trực tiếp đến thế hệ xe thông minh tiếp theo, phục vụ hàng triệu tài xế toàn cầu.

Đây là cơ hội hiếm có để tăng tốc sự nghiệp trong lĩnh vực kỹ thuật phần mềm ô tô, trở thành một phần của một chương trình mang tầm toàn cầu.

title: Software Developer (JavaScript, Python)
jobDescription:
Chúng tôi tìm kiếm một Python/Javascript Developer có khả năng làm việc hiệu quả trong môi trường đổi mới liên tục, và sẵn sàng thay đổi và tối ưu công việc khi nhận feedback từ team. Cụ thể có kinh nghiệm trong các công việc sau:

- Web Scraping: Phát triển và duy trì các công cụ thu thập dữ liệu từ Website và API.
- ETL Pipeline: Xây dựng và tối ưu hóa các quy trình xử lý dữ liệu.
- AI Agent: Tích hợp và phát triển các agent tự động hóa công việc sử dụng AI (OpenAI, Langchain, Cursor AI…).
- Workflow Automation: Xử lý các tác vụ tự động hóa và quản lý job queue bằng Python hoặc Javascript (trên trình duyệt).
- Triển khai các hệ thống lên server Linux sử dụng Docker và Git.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, Khoa học máy tính hoặc có kinh nghiệm liên quan.
- Python: Thành thạo các thư viện như Requests, BeautifulSoup, Pandas, Asyncio, và Selenium, Playwright.
- Kinh nghiệm làm ETL pipeline và xử lý dữ liệu trên cơ sở dữ liệu SQL/NoSQL.
- Kinh nghiệm với AI Agents, API, hoặc tự động hóa quy trình bằng AI.
- Windows, Linux, Docker, Git: Có thể triển khai và duy trì hệ thống.
- Có tư duy chủ động, khả năng làm việc độc lập.
- Đam mê phát triển cá nhân và có thể thay đổi để cải thiện chất lượng công việc.

Ưu tiên thêm nếu có:

- Kinh nghiệm thực tế với các dự án Web Scraping và Data Automation.
- Biết về Cursor AI, MCP Server, hoặc các công cụ tương tự.
- Đã từng có repo GitHub hoặc sản phẩm Demo.
benefits:
- Mức lương thỏa thuận theo năng lực.
- Thưởng cuối tháng theo năng lực, thưởng lễ, Tết, sinh nhật.
- Thưởng lương tháng 13, xét tăng lương định kỳ hàng năm, tăng lương đột xuất theo năng lực.
- Được đào tạo để phục vụ công việc, tham gia khóa học tiếng anh giao tiếp
- Cung cấp đầy đủ trang thiết bị làm việc tại Văn phòng.
- Được hưởng đầy đủ các chính sách BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo Luật lao động của Nhà nước.
- Cơ hội làm việc với các công nghệ hiện đại: AI, Automation, Scalable Systems..

Thời gian: Từ 7:00 - 16:00, nghỉ cuối tuần (04 ngày Chủ nhật và 02 ngày thứ Bảy).

Địa điểm: Lựa chọn 1 trong các địa điểm làm việc phù hợp sau:

- Cơ sở 1: 22 Thành Công, Phường Giảng Võ, Hà Nội

title: Software Engineer (Python, Golang, TypeScript)
reasons:
- Salary negotiable based on performance bonus ++
- Full insurances according to the Labor Law
- An ambitious and humane startup team
jobDescription:
Về chúng tôi & Tuyến báo cáo

Tuyến báo cáo: Bạn sẽ báo cáo trực tiếp cho Project Manager (PM) và Technical Lead giàu kinh nghiệm, đảm bảo được định hướng rõ ràng và hỗ trợ kịp thời trong công việc.

Môi trường làm việc: Gia nhập một đội ngũ kỹ thuật có team size nhỏ, trẻ trung và năng động. Chúng tôi tập trung xây dựng các kiến trúc API đa tầng và hệ thống có tính mở rộng cao. Làm việc tại đây, bạn sẽ có cơ hội cọ xát thực tế, giải quyết các bài toán công nghệ tối ưu hiệu suất và tích hợp các giải pháp hiện đại vào sản phẩm.Trách nhiệm công việc

- Tham gia thiết kế, phát triển và bảo trì các dịch vụ backend/API sử dụng Python, Go, và TypeScript.
- Làm việc trực tiếp với hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu PostgreSQL: thiết kế schema, viết query và tối ưu hóa hiệu suất truy xuất dữ liệu.
- Phối hợp chặt chẽ cùng các kỹ sư trong team để triển khai tính năng từ Frontend đến Backend, đảm bảo tính đồng bộ và chất lượng hệ thống.
- Viết code sạch, dễ bảo trì, có tính tái sử dụng cao và tham gia vào quá trình code review nhằm nâng cao chất lượng sản phẩm.
- Nghiên cứu, cập nhật các công nghệ mới và đề xuất giải pháp kỹ thuật để cải thiện hệ thống.
requirements:
Kinh nghiệm: Từ 1 đến 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc thực tế ở vị trí Lập trình viên (Software Engineer / Backend Developer).

Kỹ năng lập trình:

- Thành thạo hoặc có kinh nghiệm thực tế tốt với ít nhất một trong các ngôn ngữ: Python, Go, hoặc TypeScript.
- Sẵn sàng học hỏi, tiếp cận nhanh và làm việc chéo (cross-train) giữa các ngôn ngữ trong tech stack của dự án.
- Cơ sở dữ liệu: Nắm vững kiến thức về cơ sở dữ liệu quan hệ, có kinh nghiệm thực tế thiết kế và tối ưu hóa hệ thống với PostgreSQL.

Kỹ năng khác:

- Nắm vững kiến thức nền tảng về cấu trúc dữ liệu, giải thuật, tư duy logic và lập trình hướng đối tượng/hướng chức năng.
- Thành thạo Git và hiểu rõ quy trình phát triển phần mềm (Agile/Scrum).
- Khả năng chủ động giải quyết vấn đề, tinh thần trách nhiệm cao và kỹ năng làm việc nhóm tốt tại văn phòng.

Điểm cộng:

- Có kỹ năng viết tài liệu kỹ thuật tốt (Technical Documentation, API Specs như Swagger/OpenAPI).
- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với Docker, CI/CD hoặc môi trường cloud (AWS, GCP).
- Có kiến thức về gRPC, RESTful API hoặc WebSockets.
- Từng làm việc với hoặc có hứng thú với các hệ thống AI/ML, xử lý dữ liệu thời gian thực.
benefits:
- Làm việc trực tiếp với các nhà sáng lập, CEO và đội ngũ lãnh đạo
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, có thể thương lượng dựa trên năng lực, kèm theo thưởng hiệu suất
- Lộ trình tăng lương và thăng cấp minh bạch — đánh giá hiệu suất 3 tháng một lần
- Đầy đủ bảo hiểm xã hội, bảo hiểm y tế và các phúc lợi của công ty theo luật lao động: 12 ngày nghỉ phép có lương/năm, 90 phút nghỉ phép trong kỳ kinh nguyệt/tháng
- Văn hóa học tập mạnh mẽ: hội nhập nhân viên mới, các buổi học tập và chia sẻ hàng tháng, Diễn đàn Xây dựng và Trung tâm Học tập cá nhân
- Gắn kết nội bộ: tiệc liên hoan hàng tuần, hoạt động xây dựng đội nhóm hàng quý, tiệc cuối năm và thực đơn bữa ăn chung luân phiên
- Một đội ngũ trẻ, đầy tham vọng và giàu tính nhân văn, đoàn kết bởi sứ mệnh tạo ra giá trị thực sự cho trẻ em và gia đình

title: Senior/Principal Java Engineer (Spring) From 5 Years
reasons:
- No English/Japanese Required
- 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm
- Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x AI Tech
jobDescription:
🚀 3 Lý do bạn không thể bỏ lỡ Rakus Vietnam

1. Không rào cản ngôn ngữ (No English/Japanese Required)

Tại Rakus, "Code" là ngôn ngữ duy nhất. Chúng tôi không yêu cầu kỹ năng tiếng Anh hay tiếng Nhật. Bạn chỉ cần tập trung vào chuyên môn kỹ thuật. Mọi rào cản ngôn ngữ đã có đội ngũ Comtor hỗ trợ.

2. 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm

Chúng tôi trân trọng thời gian bạn dành cho gia đình. Ngoài kỳ nghỉ Tết Âm lịch, công ty chủ động thiết lập các kỳ nghỉ đặc biệt vào dịp Golden Week (tháng 4-5) và Năm mới Dương lịch (tháng 12-1). Mỗi dịp này bạn sẽ được nghỉ liên tục 9 ngày.

Bạn có thể thoải mái du lịch hay về quê mà không cần dùng đến phép năm!

Tổng số ngày nghỉ lễ trong năm lên đến hơn 30 ngày.

3. Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x Công nghệ AI (Github Copilot, v.v.)

Chúng tôi phát triển sản phẩm SaaS ổn định được hơn 10.000 doanh nghiệp Nhật Bản tin dùng, nhưng quy trình làm việc luôn được cập nhật mới nhất.

- Cấp tài khoản GitHub Copilot bản quyền cho toàn bộ kỹ sư.
- Cấp tài khoản Devin, Claude Code cho những ai có nhu cầu.Bạn sẽ phát triển thành một "Hybrid Engineer" – vừa có nền tảng Backend vững chắc, vừa thành thạo các công cụ AI hiện đại.

** Rakus Việt Nam là công ty 100% vốn đầu tư từ RAKUS Co., Ltd. - công ty nổi tiếng hàng đầu tại Nhật Bản cung cấp các dịch vụ đám mây (SaaS), giúp các doanh nghiệp điều hành hoạt động của mình một cách nhanh chóng, tiện dụng nhất.

**Chúng tôi đang tuyển dụng 2 Java Senior/Principal Software Engineer:

LÀM VIỆC OFFLINE FULLTIME TẠI VĂN PHÒNG HEADOFFICE QUẬN 12: Hệ thống phần mềm quản lý chi phí và chi phí đi lại trong nội bộ Doanh nghiệp; đang được sử dụng bởi hơn 10,000 Doanh nghiệp khách hàng tại Nhật Bản với hơn 1.7 triệu end-users.

Nếu: ・Bạn muốn học hỏi, thử thách với phát triển thượng nguồn (upstream).

・Bạn mong muốn phát triển Career path theo hướng Techlead/Solution Architect trong tương lai

・Bạn mong muốn môi trường làm việc lâu dài (ít nhất 3 năm trở lên)

・Bạn có năng lực tập trung và thích tìm hiểu sâu về 1 hệ thống.

Hãy gia nhập đội ngũ phát triển series sản phẩm "Rakuraku" – SaaS chiếm thị phần số 1 tại Nhật Bản.

- Phát triển: Thiết kế, triển khai và kiểm thử các tính năng mới sử dụng Java (Spring, Springboot).
- Quy trình AI: Tận dụng các công cụ AI mới nhất để tăng tốc độ coding, refactoring và tự động hóa kiểm thử (test automation).
- Tư duy sản phẩm: Tập trung vào chất lượng code (Quality) và khả năng bảo trì dài hạn (Maintainability).
requirements:
Yêu cầu cơ bản:

- Có ít nhất 5 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên về kiến thức và đam mê lập trình ứng dụng web với: - Ngôn ngữ: Java- JavaScript, jQuery. - PostgreSQL, MySQL ... - các Frameworks như Spring, Springboot hay Struts, Seasar2, Hibernate ...
- Có kinh nghiệm Automation test: Jmeter, JUnit, Selenium
- Có kinh nghiệm DevOps: Git, GitHub, Jenkins, Docker
- Có khả năng tạo/trình bày các loại tài liệu kĩ thuật ở giai đoạn upstream một cách dễ hiểu.

benefits:
Tại sao Rakus được yêu thích?

Không chỉ là lương thưởng, chúng tôi chăm sóc cuộc sống và gia đình bạn theo phong cách Nhật Bản: "Tận tâm và An tâm".

💰 Tài chính vững mạnh (Solid Finance)

- Chắc chắn "14 tháng lương": Bao gồm lương tháng 13 + 1 tháng thưởng cố định (được nhận bất kể KPI). Tài chính gia đình bạn luôn được đảm bảo.
- Xét tăng lương: 2 lần/năm. Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, cấp trên sẽ hỗ trợ bạn thăng cấp để đạt mức lương cao hơn.
- Công ty đóng BHXH ở mức 100% lương gross.
- 100 % lương trong thời gian thử việc.

🛡️ Sức khỏe & Gia đình (Health & Family Care)

- Bảo hiểm đặc biệt: Chi phí y tế của bạn được chi trả phần lớn bởi gói bảo hiểm cao cấp do công ty đài thọ.
- Hỗ trợ người thân: Hỗ trợ thủ tục để vợ/chồng và con cái tham gia gói bảo hiểm nhóm của công ty (tự nguyện).
- Nghỉ phép siêu linh hoạt: 12 ngày phép năm có thể chia nhỏ để nghỉ theo "đơn vị 30 phút"."Sáng đưa con đi học", "Chiều về sớm đón con", "Đưa người nhà đi khám bệnh"... Tất cả đều OK! Chúng tôi ủng hộ tuyệt đối việc bạn chăm sóc gia đình.
- "Sáng đưa con đi học", "Chiều về sớm đón con", "Đưa người nhà đi khám bệnh"... Tất cả đều OK! Chúng tôi ủng hộ tuyệt đối việc bạn chăm sóc gia đình.
- Khám sức khỏe định kỳ.

🎉 Niềm vui & Kết nối (Community)

- Du lịch 5 sao: Company Trip hàng năm (3 ngày 2 đêm) tại các resort cao cấp. Tài trợ 50% chi phí tour cho gia đình nhân viên.
- Sự kiện liên tục: Tiệc sinh nhật hàng tháng, Year End Party hoành tráng, Lì xì Tết, quà tặng Trung thu, ngày phụ nữ, ngày nam nhân, Giáng sinh, ...
- Ngân sách team: Cấp 170.000 VND/người/tháng cho team building (ăn uống, cafe, picnic cùng đồng nghiệp).
- Tham gia các CLB thể thao (Futsal, cầu lông)

⏰ Thời giờ làm việc, nghỉ ngơi

- Thứ 2~ thứ 6, linh hoạt đăng ký khung giờ làm việc theo Quý.
- 12 ngày phép năm + 12 ngày nghỉ lễ lịch VN + 7 ngày nghỉ lễ lịch Nhật = 31 ngày
- Hầu như Không làm thêm giờ (No Overtime)

📝 Đào tạo

- Cơ hội được cử đi Nhật đào tạo. Các kỹ sư người Nhật hỗ trợ OJT (on the job training)
- Training kỹ năng mềm theo level
- Seminar kỹ thuật hàng tháng

🏆 Giải thưởng

- MVP of the Year – Nhân viên xuất sắc mỗi năm được trải nghiệm và làm việc tại Nhật 1 tuần.
- Quarterly MVP – Giải thưởng Nhân viên xuất sắc của Quý
- Giải thưởng nhân viên 5 năm, …

title: Blue Team Engineer (Security/Python/SIEM/EDR/IDS/IPS)
jobDescription:
Introduction

Con Cung is the biggest omni-channel company for mom & baby with 600 retail stores in Vietnam in 2021 and plan to have 1,000 stores by 2023 with 1 billion USD revenue. Con Cung's annual growth rate is more than 70%. With the vision of providing good quality products for children, Con Cung is strongly investing into Product Research and Development in order to manufacture and provide products that are suitable to the local market in terms of pricing and quality. We also invest into technology in order to manage the network and online channel efficiently.

Con Cung Corporation also develops in-house cutting-edge automation and intelligence technologies. We are seeking for young, smart & dynamic talents to grow your career together with us.

Job Description

The company is seeking its first Blue Team Engineer to design, build, and operate its Security Operations capability. This role will be responsible for implementing monitoring, detection, and response processes while laying the foundation for a future SOC team and for enhancing the security capability of the platform. The engineer will be both hands-on and strategic, combining deep technical expertise with the ability to shape security operations and guide future hires.

Key Responsibilities1. SOC Development & Operations

- Support the design, implementation, and day-to-day operation of the company’s SOC capabilities (SIEM, EDR, log management, network security (IDS/IPS), monitoring pipelines, SOAR).
- Develop and maintain detection rules, alert logic, and security monitoring use cases.
- Integration of AI solutions into the SOC system.

2. Threat Detection, Response & DFIR

- Monitor and investigate security events, conduct root cause analysis, and participate in containment and remediation activities.
- Contribute to the development of DFIR processes, playbooks, escalation paths, and evidence-handling procedures.
- Engage in proactive threat hunting aligned with MITRE ATT&CK and threat intelligence feeds.

3. Security Operations Support

- Contribute to vulnerability management, patch management, and secure configuration management initiatives.
- Support privileged access management (PAM) implementation and monitoring.
- Participate in business continuity and disaster recovery planning, including testing and improvement of response processes.
- Provide input into threat intelligence collection, analysis, and operational integration.

4. Continuous Improvement & Collaboration

- Assist in tabletop exercises, simulations, and training activities to validate incident response readiness.
- Collaborate with IT, AppSec, and Red Team functions to improve defenses and close security gaps.
- Document findings, lessons learned, and recommendations for enhancing overall security posture.
- Partially contribute to security policies, standards, and compliance initiatives (ISO 27001, SOC2, etc.) and collaborate with the GRC team.
- Integrating AI solutions into the proactive defense system.
requirements:
We are looking for a highly motivated person with:

- 2-3+ years of experience in security operations, blue team engineering, or incident response.
- Strong experience with SIEM platforms (e.g., ELK Stack, Wazuh, Splunk, Graylog), EDR tools, IDS/IPS, and network security.
- Hands-on expertise in log analysis, network traffic analysis, memory and application forensics, and endpoint forensics.
- Foundation skills in malware analysis.
- Experience with scripting/automation (Python, PowerShell, Bash, etc.).
- A proactive attitude & the ability to think outside of the box
- Works in an organised, structured manner
- Can do attitude, gets things done
- Excellent communication skills with diverse audiences
- Strong critical thinking and analytical skills

Nice-to-have:

- Solid understanding of security frameworks and methodologies (MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF).
- Foundation knowledge in Ai integration to Blue team system.
- English communication.
- Experience leading or mentoring SOC analysts or security engineers.
- Relevant certifications: CompTIA Security+, GCIA, GCIH, GCFA, CHFI, CCD, BTL1 or equivalent.
benefits:
- Annual bonus: 2 - 3 months under minimum KPI requirement
- Fast promotion opportunities based on personal ability
- Work in a dynamic, open, creative environment
- Regular training, company team building, birthday bonus

About Concung.com

- Working time: 8:30 - 17:30 Monday - Friday
- Working place: 5th Floor, Con Cưng Super Center, 09 Nguyen Trai Street, Ben Thanh Ward, Dist. 1, HCMC

jobDescription:
Job Summary: In this role, you will bridge IT support and office operations for our Hanoi office, ensuring employees have reliable infrastructure, smooth workplace support, and a well-run physical workspace.

IT Technical Support:

- User Support: Act as the primary on-site contact for Tier 1–2 IT support in Hanoi, with support for users in HCMC and Europe when needed. Troubleshoot issues in person or remotely using tools such as RDP, VNC, or TeamViewer, and escalate unresolved issues to the broader IT team.
- System Maintenance: Install, configure, and troubleshoot Windows, macOS, and Linux workstations, hardware, software, peripherals, and basic network issues.
- Infrastructure & Security: Support centralized directory-based infrastructure such as JumpCloud, standardized computer images, endpoint configurations, and security requirements.
- Server Management: Support a cluster of 30x nodes to aid in Development unit testing, builds, and evaluation.
- Asset & Documentation Management: Maintain accurate IT asset inventory and technical documentation for device setup, software installation, hardware configurations, and recurring issues.
- Testing & Improvement: Assist in testing new software, updates, and workplace technologies for compatibility and performance. Identify recurring issues and recommend process improvements.

Office Operations & Facilities Management

- Employee Lifecycle Support: Partner with HR on onboarding, offboarding, account coordination, equipment preparation, access changes, and supporting employee logistics in Hanoi.
- Facilities & Building Coordination: Serve as the local contact for building management, facility requests, deliveries/removals, parking registration, air-conditioning, utilities, and other office matters.
- Office Supplies & Purchasing Support: Coordinate regular orders for office supplies, drinking water bottles, pantry items, and IT equipment or accessories when needed.
- Operational Support: : Coordination with the HR Admin team to provide hands-on support for team and company events in Hanoi, travel arrangements, and other office needs to keep the Hanoi office running smoothly.
requirements:
The most successful candidates for this role will have:

- Willingness to support both IT responsibilities and office operations/administrative tasks as part of the Hanoi office support role.
- Committed to support employees directly in a professional, responsive, and service-minded manner.
- Hands-on experience in IT support, helpdesk, office IT operations, or a similar technical support role.
- Working knowledge of Windows, macOS, and Linux environments, including workstation setup, software installation, hardware troubleshooting, and basic network issue resolution.
- Strong communication skills in both Vietnamese and English, written and spoken.
- A technical, systematic, and logical approach to problem-solving.
- Strong sense of ownership, follow-through, and accountability for assigned tasks.
- Good prioritization skills, detail-oriented and well-organized, especially when handling multiple requests, interruptions, and concurrent projects while adhering to strict deadlines.
- Comfortable coordinating with vendors, building management, and external service providers.

Nice to have:

Experience in:

- Google Workspace administration or user support.
- MDM/UEM systems such as JumpCloud, Intune, or Jamf.
- Endpoint security and management tools such as CrowdStrike, Automox, Rapid7, or BeyondTrust.
- Basic Linux troubleshooting, such as Ubuntu or Debian.
- SSO and identity concepts such as SAML, OIDC, or SCIM.
- Apple Configurator, Munki, or other automated software deployment tools.
benefits:

- Meritocracy: Employee's recognition and advancement is based purely on their individual and collective achievements.

- Basic understanding of Linux systems and networking.
- God communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.
