Preferred Skills

- Experience with GitOps practices and tools.
- Knowledge of security best practices in CI/CD pipelines and container environments (DevSecOps).
- Familiarity with distributed systems and microservices architectures.
- Experience with alerting tools and incident management workflows.
- Exposure to cloud-native environments and multi-cloud deployments.
- Ability to define and track Service Level Objectives (SLOs) and error budgets

jobDescription:

Main Responsibilities

title: Technical Support Engineer (strong-English-required)
jobDescription:
About Laidon

Laidon, a Certified SAP Partner, operates globally with offices in the US, Japan, and Vietnam, and sales presence in Australia, Germany, England, and Singapore.

Laidon developed SimpleMDG (simplemdg.com), a powerful master data governance solution on SAP BTP that fortifies master data foundations, enhances operational excellence, ensures compliance, and drives innovation at scale.

With over 100 out-of-the-box S/4HANA data objects and workflows, SimpleMDG supports powerful governance while eliminating the need for slow, complex, and expensive customizations. SimpleMDG is the master data governance and management platform for enterprises running SAP.

About the role

We seek a qualified Technical Support Engineer to ensure our customers have exceptional experience with SimpleMDG. You will provide top-notch technical support, assist in troubleshooting several types of technical issues, and offer professional guidance to help customers make the most of our product. Your dedication to customer happiness is crucial to our mission of delivering high-quality service and cultivating long-term customer relationships. Standout candidates will be excellent problem-solvers with outstanding communication and customer service skills.

Customer Support & Ticket Management

- Receive, analyze, prioritize, and triage customer inquiries, incidents, bugs, and service requests.
- Communicate with customers via email, support portal, chat, and calls in a professional, clear, and empathetic manner.
- Own support cases end-to-end, from initial response through resolution and closure.
- Strive to achieve First Contact Resolution (FCR) whenever possible.
- Manage ticket queues effectively while adhering to established Service Level Agreements (SLAs) and support processes.
- Provide regular and proactive updates to customers throughout the ticket lifecycle.

Technical Troubleshooting & Resolution

- Investigate, troubleshoot, and resolve application and system issues independently whenever possible.
- Collect logs, reproduce issues, identify root causes, and document findings before escalating.
- Escalate complex incidents, defects, and system issues to the Tech SWAT team with complete diagnostic information and business impact assessment.
- Validate fixes and coordinate customer confirmation before closing tickets.

Incident & Escalation Management

- Participate in incident management activities for production issues and service disruptions.
- Coordinate cross-functional with Engineering, Product, and other stakeholders during major incidents.
- Follow internal Operational Level Agreements (OLAs) and escalation procedures to ensure customer SLAs are met.
- Contribute to post-incident reviews and Root Cause Analysis (RCA) activities.

Continuous Improvement & Knowledge Management

- Proactively identify recurring issues and recommend improvements to products, processes, and support operations.
- Create, maintain, and improve internal documentation and customer-facing Knowledge Base (KB) articles.
- Contribute to automation opportunities and self-service initiatives to improve customer experience and reduce support effort.
- Assist in defining and refining support processes, runbooks, and troubleshooting guides.

Operational Support

- Participate in shift rotations and on-call support when required to support international customers.
requirements:
- 2–3 years of experience in Software, Application, or Technical Support roles.
- Fluent in English, both written and verbal.
- Strong communication skills, customer empathy, and ownership mindset.
- Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills with the ability to diagnose and resolve complex issues systematically.
- Proactive attitude and a genuine willingness to learn complex systems and business processes quickly.
- Ability to influence stakeholders through persuasion, negotiation, and consensus-building.
- Analytical, process-oriented, and able to learn new systems rapidly.
- Experience with ticketing systems such as Jira, Jira Service Management, Zendesk, Freshdesk, or ServiceNow is a plus.
- Familiarity with APIs, log analysis, browser developer tools, and system integrations is highly desirable.
- Experience supporting B2B SaaS products and familiarity with SAP-related systems are preferred.
- Experience participating in incident management or on-call rotations is a plus.
benefits:
- 15 days of annual leaves
- Competitive salary (+13-month salary include)
- Health insurance, social insurance according to the government regulations
- Bao Viet Healthcare Insurance
- Have a chance to work in an international, friendly, open environment
- Annual Travel opportunity

title: Full-stack Developer (shift-rotation)
jobDescription:
About Laidon

Laidon, a Certified SAP Partner, operates globally with offices in the US, Japan, and Vietnam, and a sales presence in Australia, Germany, England, and Singapore.

Laidon developed SimpleMDG (www.simplemdg.com), a powerful master data governance solution on SAP BTP that fortifies master data foundations, enhances operational excellence, ensures compliance, and drives innovation at scale.

With over 100 out-of-the-box S/4HANA data objects and workflows, SimpleMDG supports powerful governance while eliminating the need for slow, complex, and expensive customizations. SimpleMDG is the master data governance and management platform for enterprises running SAP.

Role Description

We are looking for a talented and experienced Full-stack developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of SAP CAP, as well as experience working on SAP BTP Platforms. The developer will be responsible for developing, maintaining, and deploying high-quality web applications. As this role involves working directly with our global clients, the successful candidate must have strong English communication skills and be able to participate in a rotating shift schedule that includes US timezones.

Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain full stack web applications using SAP CAP on the SAP BTP Platform, with React-based frontends.
- Build modern, responsive UIs in React, including component design, state management, and API integration.
- Leverage AI-powered coding agents (e.g., Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to accelerate development workflows and code quality.
- Provide direct technical support and communicate effectively with global clients in English.
- Participate in a rotating shift schedule (including US-timezone night shifts) to ensure uninterrupted service for our clients.
- Work with a team of developers to deliver high-quality software on time.
- Troubleshoot and resolve application issues across the full stack.
- Work with other teams to ensure that applications meet business requirements.
- Stay up-to-date on the latest technologies, AI tooling, and industry trends.
requirements:
- Willingness and flexibility to work rotating shifts, including night shifts.
- Good English proficiency (written and verbal) to effectively support and collaborate with international clients.
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
- 3+ years of experience in full stack web development.
- Strong understanding of JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js.
- Proficiency in React - including hooks, component architecture, and state management (e.g., Redux, Zustand, or React Query).
- Hands-on experience using AI coding agents (e.g., Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, or similar tools) in day-to-day development.
- Experience with SAP CAP (or other Node.js frameworks like Nest.js).
- Experience working on SAP BTP Platforms or other Cloud Platforms like AWS, GCP, Microsoft Azure, etc.
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
- Strong communication and teamwork skills.
benefits:
- 15 days of annual leaves
- Competitive salary (+13-month salary include)
- Health insurance, social insurance according to the government regulations
- Bao Viet Healthcare Insurance
- Have a chance to work in an international, friendly, open environment
- Annual Travel opportunity

title: Technical Lead (Payment/Marketplace/AI)
reasons:
- AI-first company shaping the future of fitness
- Join a passionate global team across VN, US, & UK
- Collaborative team valuing joy & creativity
jobDescription:
About Everfit

Everfit is one of the fastest growing fitness coaching platforms in the world. We power more than 300,000 coaches across the globe with an all-in-one AI-powered platform to run and grow their businesses. In 5 years, we have become one of the leaders of the health and wellness B2B SaaS category in the US and around the world! We are at an inflection point. Having achieved an eight figure ARR business, we are focusing our efforts to capture more of the $4-5 trillion health and fitness market by going direct to consumers. Our vision is to become the operating system for personal health, where anyone can plug in a coach, or multiple coaches, to reach their wellness goals faster, optimize their human potential, and extend their longevity.

Our team spans from San Francisco to Vietnam, with senior leaders who have built and scaled products at Netflix, Apple, Meta, Nike, Hulu, Uber, Amazon, Hypebeast, and Quibi. We are building the next unicorn to come out of Vietnam, and we are looking for a confident leader who can help us get there.

Position Overview:

Location: Hanoi or Da Nang office. If you are based in Ho Chi Minh City, 2-3 weeks per month in Da Nang or Hanoi office (Open for discussion)Our Vietnam team is the engine of Everfit. Currently around 170 people, roughly 150 in Da Nang and 20 in Hanoi, who built the product that’s made us a category leader in 5 years since launch .

The next chapter is about unlocking what this team is capable of — moving faster but with extreme precision, building with AI in every workflow, and operating at the level of the best companies in the world.We’re looking for a Tech Lead who can elevate our engineering team from strong to exceptional. You will drive technical excellence, lead the adoption of AI across engineering workflows and products, mentor and grow our developers, and help build a high-performance engineering culture. Working closely with product, design, and leadership teams across Vietnam and the US, you will align technical execution with business goals and ensure the team delivers impactful solutions with speed, quality, and scalability.WHAT YOU'LL LEAD

You will set technical direction across 2 of Everfit's highest-priority initiatives.

- Payments: Own the technical direction for billing infrastructure: subscription lifecycle, payment gateways (Stripe and beyond), webhook reliability, and financial reconciliation at scale. Guide the squad through multi-currency, cross-border flows, and marketplace payout systems while maintaining financial data integrity.
- Marketplace: Drive backend architecture for discovery, listing management, search/ranking, and transactional flows. Design two-sided systems that scale from thousands to millions of users, covering matching, availability, dynamic pricing, and booking state, with seamless Payments integration.

Your impact

Technical Direction & Architecture

- Own the architectural patterns and technical standards for Marketplace and Payment's backend systems — workout programming engines, scheduling logic, nutrition tracking, multi-tenant platform infrastructure, notification pipelines, and third-party integrations.
- Drive solution design for complex features: new product areas, cross-squad integrations, platform-level changes, and performance-critical systems.
- Make architectural decisions that balance delivery velocity with long-term maintainability.
- Define and uphold engineering standards across squads: API design, data modeling, testing practices, code review culture, and documentation.
- Proactively identify and lead reduction of technical debt in coordination with Engineering Management and Product.

Hands-on Engineering

- Stay in the code on the most critical work — Marketplace and Payment platform infrastructure, high-risk migrations, cross-squad technical foundations, and architectural proof-of-concepts.
- Review pull requests across sub-squads with depth and speed, giving feedback that helps engineers grow — not just ships.
- Set the standard for what good code looks like across squads: observable, testable, maintainable, and scalable.

AI-First Engineering

- Champion AI-assisted development across squads — from code generation and test writing to automated documentation and PR reviews.
- Collaborate with the AI squad on integrating AI features directly into workflows: smart programming suggestions, automated progress summaries, AI-powered onboarding.
- Help engineers build practical AI fluency through pairing, demos, and shared tooling workflows.

Mentorship & Team Growth

- Mentor and coach engineers across squads — raising the technical bar through code reviews, architectural guidance, and technical pairing.
- Run regular technical discussions and design reviews that help engineers grow as system thinkers, not just feature builders.
- Contribute to hiring across Payment and Marketplace: design technical assessments and conduct engineering interviews calibrated to the Marketplace and Payment domain.

Cross-functional Collaboration

- Be the primary technical voice in product discovery across Marketplace and Payment — shaping what's feasible, what's scalable, and what will cause pain six months from now.
- Partner closely with PMs, BAs, QA Lead, and Design to ensure technical decisions translate cleanly into user-facing product quality.
- Align with Tech Leads in other squads (Marketplace, Payment, AI) on shared infrastructure, platform standards, and cross-squad integrations.
- Represent Payment and Marketplace Engineering in cross-functional leadership discussions, communicating system decisions with clarity to non-technical stakeholders.
requirements:
Ideal Candidate Background

- US/UK education or international experience is highly preferred. We value leaders who bring a global perspective, have been exposed to high-performing organizations, and can combine international best practices with a deep understanding of Vietnam's talent and culture. This unique blend of experience will help us continue building a world-class company and team.
- You have a real engineering and product background. You understand how software gets built and you can earn the respect of builders

Must-Have

- 5+ years of backend engineering experience, with 2+ years in a Tech Lead or equivalent role. Former startup founders, or engineers from highly entrepreneurial environments.
- Deep backend fundamentals: distributed systems, data modeling, event-driven architectures, API design, scalability, and reliability.
- Hands-on experience in at least two of the four initiative domains: payments/fintech, marketplace/platform, B2B SaaS, or AI/LLM engineering.
- A track record of designing maintainable systems and raising the technical bar across teams.
- Strong English communication skills and an AI-first engineering mindset.

Nice to have:

- Familiarity with: Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, or equivalent.
- Experience in high-growth startups or distributed teams across time zones (Vietnam and US).
benefits:
Compensation & Benefits:

- Full social insurance coverage and premium healthcare benefits.
- Competitive salary with 13th-month pay and performance bonus.
- Paid leave: vacation, sick leave, and maternity leave

Build Your Career with Impact:

- Be part of a mission-driven company that’s transforming human potential.
- Empower over 300,000+ coaches in more than 200 countries - including Olympic athletes, military trainers, rehab specialists, and celebrity coaches.
- Make a global impact while building a meaningful, purpose-driven career.
- Continuous training, mentoring.
- 1-2 performance reviews annually.

Work Environment:

- English-speaking, international environment promoting open communication and collaboration.
- Work alongside world-class talent from companies like Apple, Meta, Uber, Patreon, and Nike, united by a shared passion for impact and excellence.
- International team for global career growth.
- State-of-the-art equipment provided.
- Beautiful working environment near Danang's city center (Dragon Bridge) and Hanoi office.

Health & Wellness:

- PVI health insurance program and annual health check-ups.
- Active sports clubs (football, badminton, pickleball) and company retreats.
- A modern pantry designed for relaxation and social connection.
- Monthly wellness and learning workshops to recharge and grow.

title: Product Engineer (Intern/Fresher/Junior)
reasons:
- Own critical product surfaces end‑to‑end
- Build real revenue engines with AI and data
- Hybrid, async work that respects working style
requirements:
Must-have

- Vietnamese, based in Ho Chi Minh City. Hired on a Vietnamese employment contract. No visa sponsorship or relocation funding.
- Solid CS fundamentals. You understand how data is structured, how APIs work, and how to troubleshoot methodically—and you can name what you're doing and why.
- Comfortable with the basics that make a good teammate. Git, reading existing code, writing tests, and jumping into unfamiliar parts of a codebase.
- Some Ruby, TypeScript, or Python. You'll spend most of your time in Ruby and TypeScript. We don't expect all three—we expect you to learn fast.
- A project we can look at. At least one thing you built that works—side project, open source, internship, hackathon, or coursework—with a link and a clear story of how and why you built it.
- AI-native. You use Claude and Cursor daily and know where they shine and where they break down.
- Writing and reading English for async work. Speaking can be conversational—we coach.
- Agency. You spot things, fix things, ship things—you don't wait to be told.

Self-taught software engineers are welcome. You don't have to study IT or computer majors to become a good software product builders. What matters is the drive, agency, attention to detail, willingness to ship, and how fast you learn. If you read this and thought "I could do that with some support," don't self-select out—apply.
benefits:
This role suits future founders. Direct cofounder access, real ownership of decisions and outcomes, scope across an entire product surface, an inside look at how a small team turns AI into shipped product. If you aspire to build your own startup product one day, this is the seat that builds the muscles.

Compensation & growth

- Salary: up to 27M VND/month GROSS. Calibrated on portfolio strength, interview sharpness, and demonstrated speed of learning, not years on a resume. Exceptional candidates can be discussed above this band.
- Comp reviews on request — if you've grown the role, raise it.
- Probation: 2 months at full salary. Passes on shipping consistently — no surprise gates.
- Stock options eligibility and a company laptop after probation. Bring your own laptop during probation.

Tools

- Company-paid Claude

Workspace & culture

- Covered desk at Workflow Thao Dien (HCMC). Hybrid at least 2 days/week in-person. Flexible hours.
- Vietnam time (ICT). Occasional pre-scheduled evening calls overseas, rare in practice.
- English-first, American startup culture: direct feedback, written-first, low-meeting. We measure shipped work, not hours.

Benefits

- BHXH / BHYT / BHTN contributions per Vietnamese labor law.
- Vietnamese public holidays off (incl. Tết).
- Unlimited personal time off. Coordinate with the team based on urgency and your ownership.

Hiring process

Three real-time conversations with humans. No automated screening, no pre-recorded video tasks, no take-home gauntlet.

- Intro call — short conversation to get a sense of your English and how clearly you articulate your thinking.
- Team conversation — in person at Workflow Thao Dien. Walk us through your portfolio, talk shop, hang out, code together, grab lunch (we pay).
- Conversation with the CTO — remote (or in-person if on business trip). Product, technical fluency, working style.

title: ERP Application Lead (SQL, PowerBI, WebAPI)
jobDescription:
Giai đoạn triển khai dự án

- Đại diện IT phối hợp với đối tác triển khai (partner) và các phòng ban nghiệp vụ (Mua hàng, Kho, Kế toán, Vận hành cửa hàng) trong suốt dự án.
- Đóng vai trò chủ động của IT trong việc rà soát, phản biện và chốt đúng giải pháp trên BC, đảm bảo giải pháp phù hợp nghiệp vụ và góp phần vào thành công chung của dự án.
- Phối hợp lấy yêu cầu, cấu hình BC, kiểm thử UAT, chuyển đổi dữ liệu và đào tạo người dùng.
- Phối hợp với các bộ phận/hệ thống liên quan như POS, WMS, Marketplace (sàn TMĐT) để cùng triển khai và phát triển tích hợp giữa các hệ thống với BC.

Giai đoạn vận hành (IT internal làm chủ hệ thống)

- Tiếp quản và nắm chuẩn toàn bộ hệ thống BC sau bàn giao; trở thành đầu mối làm chủ (application owner) các phân hệ chính: Finance, Purchasing, Inventory/Warehouse, Sales.
- Vận hành và hỗ trợ hệ thống hằng ngày: xử lý sự cố và yêu cầu người dùng, đảm bảo các nghiệp vụ bán lẻ trọng yếu chạy ổn định (tồn kho, nhập hàng, giá/khuyến mãi, POS).
- Phân tích yêu cầu phát sinh từ business, tự cấu hình và phát triển tùy chỉnh trên BC; quản lý đối tác thực hiện.
- Duy trì và phát triển các tích hợp giữa BC với POS, WMS, Marketplace và các hệ thống khác.
- Quản lý phân quyền, master data; xây dựng báo cáo, dashboard phục vụ điều hành (Power BI / báo cáo sẵn có của BC).
requirements:
Kinh nghiệm & nghiệp vụ

- Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm với Dynamics 365 Business Central, từng tham gia ít nhất 1 dự án triển khai full-cycle.
- Nắm vững nghiệp vụ và cấu hình các phân hệ trong phạm vi BC: Finance, SCM (Inventory/Warehouse), Purchasing, Sales.
- Ưu tiên kinh nghiệm ngành bán lẻ / chuỗi cửa hàng / siêu thị; hiểu nghiệp vụ POS và quản lý nhiều chi nhánh.

Kỹ năng kỹ thuật

- Lập trình AL — ngôn ngữ phát triển chính thức của Business Central, sử dụng Visual Studio Code với AL extension.
- Hiểu nền tảng dữ liệu của BC: Microsoft SQL Server / Azure SQL Database, và khả năng truy vấn, xử lý dữ liệu phục vụ báo cáo và tích hợp.
- Biết xây dựng tích hợp qua API/web service của BC.

Kỹ năng & tố chất

- Chủ động, tự xử lý vấn đề độc lập, giao tiếp tốt với người dùng nghiệp vụ và đối tác kỹ thuật.
- Chứng chỉ MB-800 (Functional Consultant) / MB-820 (Developer) là lợi thế.

Điểm cộng

- Tư duy cải tiến: luôn chủ động đề xuất sáng kiến tối ưu hệ thống và quy trình vận hành, đồng hành cùng sự phát triển của chuỗi siêu thị.
- Ứng dụng AI vào công việc: biết tận dụng AI để hỗ trợ lập trình AL, tạo và phân tích báo cáo nhanh hơn, và nâng cao hiệu suất công việc.
benefits:

title: POS Application Lead  (Dynamics 365 Business Central)
jobDescription:
Giai đoạn triển khai dự án

- Phối hợp chặt với đối tác triển khai và các phòng ban (Vận hành cửa hàng, Mua hàng, Kho, Kế toán), nắm vững toàn bộ giải pháp POS và đảm bảo dự án được triển khai đúng phạm vi, đúng nghiệp vụ và sẵn sàng (ready) cho go-live
- Đóng vai trò chủ động của IT trong rà soát, phản biện và chốt đúng giải pháp POS (cấu hình cửa hàng, POS terminal, giá, khuyến mãi, loyalty…), đảm bảo phù hợp nghiệp vụ bán lẻ.
- Phối hợp thiết lập chương trình giá, khuyến mãi (promotion/offers) và loyalty/thẻ thành viên ngay trong quá trình triển khai, đảm bảo các kịch bản bán hàng được cấu hình và kiểm thử đầy đủ.
- Tham gia cấu hình store, POS profile, quy trình end-of-day, posting/statement, kiểm thử UAT và đào tạo nhân viên cửa hàng.
- Thiết lập và xử lý kết nối phần cứng POS: máy in bill, máy quét mã vạch, cân điện tử, ngăn kéo tiền, màn hình khách, tích hợp thanh toán (EFT/payment).
- Phối hợp với các hệ thống liên quan như BC (ERP), WMS, Marketplace (sàn TMĐT) để cùng triển khai và phát triển tích hợp dữ liệu (hàng hóa, giá, tồn kho, đơn hàng) với POS.

Giai đoạn vận hành (làm chủ hệ thống POS)

- Tiếp quản và nắm chuẩn toàn bộ hệ thống POS sau bàn giao; trở thành đầu mối làm chủ (application owner) cho LS Retail/LS Central và các cửa hàng.
- Vận hành và hỗ trợ POS ở tầng hệ thống/ứng dụng: xử lý lỗi cấu hình, lỗi đồng bộ, lỗi nghiệp vụ trên POS, đảm bảo cửa hàng bán hàng không gián đoạn.
- Hướng dẫn, đào tạo và chuyển giao quy trình xử lý cho đội IT Store Helpdesk trực tiếp xử lý sự cố phần cứng POS và sự cố tại cửa hàng (máy in, máy quét, ngăn kéo tiền, kết nối mạng…); tiếp nhận và xử lý các ca phức tạp được helpdesk escalate lên.
- Xây dựng tài liệu hướng dẫn, checklist xử lý sự cố cho IT Store Helpdesk và nhân viên cửa hàng.
- Setup, vận hành và điều chỉnh các chương trình khuyến mãi (promotion/offers) và loyalty/thẻ thành viên theo yêu cầu kinh doanh; đảm bảo áp dụng đúng giá, đúng chương trình tại tất cả điểm bán.
- Quản lý đồng bộ dữ liệu giữa cửa hàng và back office (data director/scheduler/replication), xử lý lỗi đồng bộ và đối soát doanh thu cuối ngày.
- Phân tích yêu cầu phát sinh từ vận hành, tự cấu hình và phát triển tùy chỉnh trên nền tảng; phần vượt phạm vi thì viết spec và quản lý đối tác.
- Hỗ trợ mở mới cửa hàng: cài đặt, cấu hình POS terminal và phần cứng cho điểm bán mới.
- Xây dựng báo cáo bán hàng phục vụ điều hành (Power BI / báo cáo sẵn có).
requirements:
Kinh nghiệm & nghiệp vụ

- Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm với LS Retail / LS Central (hoặc giải pháp POS bán lẻ tương đương), từng tham gia ít nhất 1 dự án triển khai POS full-cycle.
- Nắm vững nghiệp vụ bán lẻ và cấu hình POS: store management, POS profile, item/price/offers, promotion & loyalty, replenishment, end-of-day, statement/posting.
- Hiểu cách POS kết nối và đồng bộ với back office BC; nắm dòng dữ liệu hàng hóa – giá – tồn – doanh thu.
- Có kinh nghiệm vận hành chuỗi cửa hàng / siêu thị nhiều chi nhánh là lợi thế lớn.

Kỹ năng kỹ thuật

- Lập trình AL — ngôn ngữ phát triển chính thức của Business Central / LS Central, dùng Visual Studio Code với AL extension.
- Hiểu nền tảng dữ liệu: Microsoft SQL Server / Azure SQL Database, truy vấn và xử lý dữ liệu phục vụ báo cáo, đối soát, tích hợp.
- Hiểu cấu hình và cách xử lý sự cố phần cứng POS, tích hợp thanh toán để hướng dẫn IT Store Helpdesk; làm việc với API/web service để tích hợp.

Kỹ năng & tố chất

- Chịu được áp lực vận hành, xử lý sự cố nhanh và độc lập.
- Sẵn sàng hỗ trợ ngoài giờ/cuối tuần khi cửa hàng cần (đặc thù bán lẻ).
- Giao tiếp tốt với nhân viên cửa hàng và đối tác kỹ thuật.
- Chứng chỉ MB-800 / MB-820 hoặc chứng nhận LS Retail là lợi thế.

Điểm cộng

- Tư duy cải tiến: chủ động đề xuất sáng kiến tối ưu quy trình bán hàng tại cửa hàng và vận hành POS, đồng hành cùng sự phát triển của chuỗi siêu thị.
- Ứng dụng AI vào công việc: biết tận dụng AI để hỗ trợ lập trình AL, tạo và phân tích báo cáo bán hàng nhanh hơn, và nâng cao hiệu suất công việc.
benefits:
- Lương thỏa thuận theo năng lực · [bảo hiểm, thưởng, phúc lợi…]
- Làm chủ toàn bộ hệ thống POS từ ngày đầu; lộ trình phát triển lên ERP/IT ApplicationManager.

title: IT Project Manager / Technical PM (Agile/ Scrum)
jobDescription:
Quản lý vòng đời dự án (End-to-End): Chịu trách nhiệm lập kế hoạch, định nghĩa phạm vi dự án (Scope), quản lý tiến độ, ngân sách và nguồn lực để triển khai các dự án phần mềm, hệ thống tích hợp AI từ giai đoạn khởi tạo đến khi bàn giao (Go-live).

Điều phối và kết nối đội ngũ:

- Là cầu nối truyền đạt yêu cầu nghiệp vụ từ phía Ban giám đốc/Khách hàng thành các task kỹ thuật cụ thể cho team Product và Tech (LLM Engineers, DevOps, Front-end, Backend).
- Tổ chức và điều phối các buổi họp hàng ngày/hàng tuần (Daily Stand-up, Sprint Planning) theo mô hình Agile/Scrum.

Quản trị rủi ro & Chất lượng:

- Chủ động nhận diện các rủi ro kỹ thuật, thắt nút cổ chai (Bottlenecks) hoặc nguy cơ chậm tiến độ để đưa ra giải pháp xử lý kịp thời.
- Đảm bảo chất lượng sản phẩm đầu ra đáp ứng đúng các tiêu chuẩn kỹ thuật và trải nghiệm người dùng (QA/QC).
- Báo cáo & Tài liệu hóa: Theo dõi hiệu suất dự án qua các chỉ số kỹ thuật, lập tài liệu quản lý dự án đầy đủ và báo cáo tiến độ định kỳ cho các Quản lý cấp cao (Sếp nước ngoài).
requirements:
- Kinh nghiệm: Tối thiểu 3 năm làm việc ở vị trí IT Project Manager, Technical PM hoặc Scrum Master trong các công ty phát triển phần mềm (Software Development/Outsourcing) hoặc công ty sản xuất sản phẩm công nghệ (Product).
- Chuyên môn kỹ thuật:Có nền tảng kỹ thuật tốt (Ưu tiên ứng viên từng là Developer/Tester đi lên).Thành thạo quy trình phát triển phần mềm (SDLC) và các phương pháp luận Agile/Scrum.Sử dụng thành thạo các công cụ quản lý dự án công nghệ: Jira, Confluence, Trello, Asana...
- Có nền tảng kỹ thuật tốt (Ưu tiên ứng viên từng là Developer/Tester đi lên).
- Thành thạo quy trình phát triển phần mềm (SDLC) và các phương pháp luận Agile/Scrum.
- Sử dụng thành thạo các công cụ quản lý dự án công nghệ: Jira, Confluence, Trello, Asana...
- Ngoại ngữ: Tiếng Anh giao tiếp tốt (Nghe, nói, đọc, viết thành thạo để làm việc trong môi trường quốc tế, báo cáo trực tiếp với sếp nước ngoài). Biết tiếng Trung là điểm cộng lớn.
- Kỹ năng mềm: Kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề xuất sắc, tư duy logic, khả năng đàm phán và kết nối con người tốt dưới áp lực cao.
benefits:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, tương xứng tối đa với năng lực và kinh nghiệm thực chiến.
- Cơ hội dẫn dắt các siêu dự án công nghệ cao, đón đầu làn sóng Generative AI toàn cầu.
- Môi trường làm việc quốc tế chuyên nghiệp, đa văn hóa.
- Đầy đủ các chế độ phúc lợi: BHXH, BHYT, lương tháng 13, thưởng hiệu suất năm.

title: Business Analyst (Accounting Domain)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN CÔNG NGHỆ DỮ LIỆU GENTECH
jobDescription:
- Collaborate with Product Owner and stakeholders to collect, analyze, and clarify business needs.
- Translate requirements into BRDs, FRDs, process flows, and user stories with clear acceptance criteria.
- Conduct gap analysis between user needs, product capabilities, and accounting standards.
- Work closely with Engineering, QA, and UI/UX to ensure requirement alignment across all stages of development.
- Support UAT planning and execution: test cases creation, validation, and feedback tracking.
- Perform data analysis to improve product decision-making and problem-solving.
- Maintain documentation of product features, business processes, and change logs.
- Work with end-users to identify improvement opportunities and optimize accounting workflows.
requirements:
Must-have

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Business, Information Systems, or related areas.
- 1–3+ years of experience as BA/SA in software development or accounting system implementation.
- Understanding of key accounting concepts such as financial reports, AP/AR, tax calculation, reconciliation.
- Strong skills in requirements documentation, process mapping, data validation, and problem analysis.
- Excellent communication skills and ability to work with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Nice-to-have

- Knowledge and/or hands-on experience with Agile methodology.
- Experience working with ERP/Accounting Software, e-commerce settlement rules, or digital finance systems.
- Familiarity with SQL, BI tools, and data analysis workflows.
- Professional certifications (e.g., CBAP, CFA foundation, CPA) are strong pluses.

Personal Attributes

- Analytical mindset with strong business logic.
- Attention to detail and a focus on quality.
- Proactiveness and strong ownership to drive tasks to completion.
- Willingness to learn and collaborate in a high-paced environment.
benefits:
- Competitive salary 20-30M and a performance-based bonus.
- Start-up environment: flexible, innovative, and open to new ideas.
- Clear growth path to advanced BA or Product Owner roles.
- Training & certification sponsorship opportunities.

title: AI Engineer (ML, LLM)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN CHỨNG KHOÁN KAFI
reasons:
- Go build a great FinTech product
- Go build it on top of the state-of-the-art tech
- Go together with top-of-mind people and team.
jobDescription:
We are an emerging securities firm in Vietnam, growing rapidly with a strong focus on technology, professional trading, and innovation. Our mission is to deliver data-driven and intelligent investment solutions that empower retail, professional, and institutional clients.

We are looking for an AI Engineer (Applied AI) to join our technology team and drive the adoption of AI across software development, data & analytics, and operational workflows.

In this role, you will focus on building and experimenting with AI-driven solutions, rapidly developing proof-of-concepts (POCs), and turning them into practical, production-ready tools and automations. You will work closely with engineering, product, data, and business teams to identify opportunities where AI can create real impact.

This role reports to the Project Manager / Head of Business Technology and is well-suited for candidates with a strong logical mindset, an interest in data, models, and technology, and a desire to grow in AI-driven investment products.
requirements:
Must-Have:

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, or a related field.
- 2–5+ years of experience in applied AI, ML engineering, or building AI-powered applications.
- Strong understanding of prompt engineering techniques, including prompt design, chaining, context management, and evaluation for building reliable LLM-based applications.
- Strong hands-on experience with Python (or similar), and familiarity with modern AI/ML ecosystems.
- Experience working with LLMs and AI tools, such as: OpenAI / Claude / similar APIs; LangChain or equivalent frameworks; Vector databases / embeddings.
- Strong problem-solving and logical thinking, with the ability to quickly turn ideas into working prototypes.
- Experience building end-to-end solutions (not just models), including integration into real systems.
- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, experimental environment with evolving requirements.
- Strong ownership mindset and ability to drive initiatives independently.

Nice-to-Have:

- Experience applying AI in financial services, trading, or investment-related use cases.
- Experience working with or delivering solutions for fintech partners or external clients.
- Experience in taking over, operating, and improving AI systems from external vendors.
- Familiarity with data pipelines, analytics systems, or BI tools.
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure).
benefits:
- Attractive salary
- Government Social Insurance is based on full of gross salary
- Full salary during probation
- Working Monday – Friday, 8am:5pm
- For every 5 work-years, +2 day to annual leave​​
- Diverse company culture activities: Annual Year End Party, Quarterly party, Company outings, Team building, Coffee and Snack, etc

title: IT Support Administrator
reasons:
- Competitive salary
- Full statutory insurance
- Professional, international working environment
jobDescription:
Role OverviewThe IT Support Administrator supports the day-to-day IT operations of Safetrust'sVietnam office and production environments. This entry-level role provides an excellentopportunity for recent graduates and early-career professionals to gain hands-onexperience supporting enterprise systems, networking, endpoint devices, and accesstechnologies.The role has a strong focus on Cisco networking fundamentals, endpoint support, and IToperations. The ideal candidate is technically curious, dependable, customer-focused,and eager to grow into a broader systems, networking, or cybersecurity career.Structured training and mentorship will be provided by the IT Operations team to supportsuccessful development in the role.

Key ResponsibilitiesEnd User Support● Provide first-line support for hardware, software, accounts, printers, andperipherals.● Configure and deploy laptops, desktops, and related devices.● Support meeting room technology and day-to-day office IT needs.● Troubleshoot and resolve user issues or escalate when appropriate.

Network & Infrastructure Support● Assist with monitoring and troubleshooting Cisco switches, routers, firewalls, andwireless infrastructure.● Support VLANs, IP addressing, and structured cabling.● Participate in network maintenance and equipment deployment activities.

User Access and Identity Management● Support onboarding and offboarding activities.● Provision and de-provision user accounts.● Assist with Google Workspace administration.● Follow access control and least-privilege standards.

Asset and Endpoint Management● Maintain IT asset inventories and configuration records.● Prepare and recover devices.● Support mobile devices and endpoint management activities.● Maintain CMDB and equipment documentation.

Security & Compliance● Follow IT security and data protection policies.● Recognize and report suspicious activity and phishing attempts.● Escalate incidents appropriately.● Support adherence to established IT procedures and standards.

Documentation and Process Improvement● Record incidents and requests within ticketing systems.● Maintain technical documentation and SOPs.● Participate in continuous improvement initiatives.● Assist with project activities as assigned.

Vendor and Global Team Collaboration● Coordinate with vendors and service providers under guidance from the IT team.● Communicate effectively with colleagues in Vietnam, Australia, and the UnitedStates.● Occasionally provide support outside normal business hours to support globaloperations.
requirements:
QualificationsRequired:● Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science,Networking, or a related field.● Recent graduates are encouraged to apply.● Understanding of networking fundamentals including:○ TCP/IP○ Routing and switching○ VLANs○ DNS and DHCP○ Basic firewall concepts● Basic knowledge of computer hardware, peripherals, and structured cabling.● Ability to troubleshoot technical issues methodically.● Strong written and verbal English communication skills.● Strong customer-service orientation.● Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.● Ability to prioritize tasks and work collaboratively in a team environment.

● Commitment to continuous learning and professional growth.

Preferred:● Cisco CCNA certification or currently pursuing certification.● CompTIA A+, Network+, or equivalent certifications.● Familiarity with Google Workspace administration.● Exposure to Windows and macOS environments.● Experience with Jira Service Management or other ticketing platforms.● Knowledge of endpoint management tools such as Intune, Jamf, or MDMplatforms.● Basic scripting experience using PowerShell, Bash, or Python.● Understanding of Wi-Fi networking and VPN technologies.● Familiarity with physical access control systems is an advantage.

Physical Requirements● Ability to lift and move IT equipment weighing up to 20 kilograms.● Ability to work at desks, network racks, and production areas.● Ability to travel between Safetrust office and production locations when required.

Success MeasuresSuccessful performance in this role will be demonstrated through:● Timely and professional support of end users.● Accurate maintenance of IT assets and documentation.● Compliance with IT security and operational procedures.● Continuous growth in technical knowledge and capabilities.● Reliable support of Safetrust's network and endpoint infrastructure.● Effective collaboration with global teams and stakeholders.
benefits:
- Competitive salary based on experience and performance
- Daily lunch provided at the office
- Free coffee, tea, and refreshments
- Full statutory insurance (social, health, unemployment)
- Annual health check-up and paid annual leave
- Professional, international working environment

title: Fullstack Java Developer (Good At English)
reasons:
- Salary and bonus based on ability
- Young and fun working environment
- Opportunities to study and work abroad.
jobDescription:
Role Overview

You will be responsible for the enhancement and development of an insurance company’s Digital Distribution Channels (online and mobile insurance sales platforms).Working closely with business stakeholders, UX designers, and architecture teams, you will help build a stable, scalable, and customer-centric digital insurance platform.This role also involves collaboration with global stakeholders to support digital channel development tailored to international markets.

Key Responsibilities

- Design and develop Digital Distribution Channels (Web / Mobile) for insurance services
- Implement end-to-end digital channel functionalities, including online insurance enrollment, quotation, policy application, payment, and customer management
- Perform Java-based full-stack development, covering both back-end and front-end components
- Integrate with internal and external systems (Core Insurance, Payment, CRM, APIs, etc.)
- Collaborate and communicate with global development and operations teams
- Enhance system performance, ensure platform stability, and respond to operational issues
- Adhere to development standards, security policies, and financial industry regulatory requirements
requirements:
- 5+ years of experience in Java Full Stack development
- Strong experience with Java, Spring, and Spring Boot for back-end development
- Experience with front-end technologies such as JavaScript, HTML5, CSS, and at least one modern framework (React, Vue, or Angular)
- Hands-on experience in RESTful API design and integration
- Experience in RDBMS-based system design and development
- Business-level English communication skills (mandatory)
- Proficiency in English (Toeic 700+, business communication), sufficient for business discussions, technical meetings, and documentation
- Experience working in global or multicultural collaboration environments

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in financial services (insurance or banking) digital channel development
- Domain knowledge of insurance digital channels, such as online policy enrollment, application, and customer portals
- Experience handling high-traffic systems or global service platforms
- Experience with Microservices Architecture and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and DevOps environments
benefits: - Best remuneration: Periodically review and adjust salary once a year, PI bonus twice a. Allowances for lunch, transportation, and phone charges. Party with the team once a. Workshop travel for the whole company once a year. Bonuses/Gifts for holidays, International Labor Day, International Women's Day, etc.- High-class, modern office: 5-star standard office with modern equipment, large rest and entertainment areas (game area, karaoke room, reading room, cafe counter, snack bar, etc.) Meet all members' needs, especially the office has an airy and beautiful view that is among the most beautiful in Hanoi.- Top equipment: Each employee is equipped with the latest generation LG Gram laptop and modern large LG screen.- Best working time: Work 8 hours/day (8:00 ~ 17:00), from Monday to Friday. No pressure to work overtime/weekends!- Flexible, youthful working style: LG CNS Vietnam members are mostly from the 9-10x generation, with a youthful, modern, and fair working style!- Creative environment, valuing individual opinions: With a young and talented team, we always appreciate the creativity and suggestions that members make.- Opportunities to work/study in Korea and abroad: With customers and projects mostly from abroad, your opportunities for training and onsite abroad will always be open!- Other: Happy hours every Friday, Team outing monthly, join clubs like football, badminton, etc...

title: Senior/Lead - QA QC Engineer (Agile/Scrum)
reasons:
- 100% of salary during the 2-month probation period
- Attractive compensation package & allowance
- 12 days annual leave+01 paidoff on your birthday
jobDescription:
JOB DESCRIPTIONS

We are looking for a Senior/Lead QA QC Engineer with strong expertise in software testing and quality assurance for web and mobile applications. This position requires a strong commitment to maintaining product quality throughout the software development lifecycle.

The QC/QA Manager will be responsible for contributing to manual test case management, communicating with related stakeholders and developing the application in cooperation with the product manager, working in the form of Squad, a small team can quickly and consistently engage in everything from designing to development, testing and operation.

- Develop and lead the overall QC/QA strategy, including test analysis, design, and execution for web and mobile applications.
- Manage and mentor a team of QC/QA engineers, ensuring high performance and professional development.
- Oversee the performance of test analysis, design, and execution, ensuring comprehensive coverage and high-quality outcomes.
- Foster a strong quality-driven culture within the team by improving system requirement definition accuracy and enhancing the UAT process.
- Engage in projects at early stages to identify and address risk factors such as bugs and scheduling issues promptly.
- Implement measures to prevent problem recurrence, promoting continuous improvement within the QA team.
- Work closely with development and product management teams to ensure seamless integration of QA processes.
- Communicate effectively with stakeholders, providing updates on QA activities, risks, and product quality status.
requirements:
Must-have

- Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
- 3+ years of experience in testing Web Services and Mobile Applications.
- Experience in developing test cases, executing tests, and reporting results.
- Hands-on experience with Shift-Left Testing practices, including early involvement in requirement analysis, design reviews, and test planning.
- Solid experience in System Integration Testing (SIT) to validate end-to-end business flows and integration points between services, APIs, and third-party systems.
- Familiarity with Agile/SCRUM environments.
- Strong communication skills in development projects.
- Proven experience as a QA/QC Manager or in a similar leadership role.
- Extensive knowledge of QA/QC methodologies, tools, and processes for web and mobile applications.

title: Senior Flutter Developer (Dart, iOS, Android)
reasons:
- Competitive salary: Negotiable based on experience
- 13th-month salary.
- 12 days of annual leave plus public holidays.
jobDescription:
🧾 POSITION SUMMARYThe Senior Flutter Developer will be responsible for designing and developing complex frontend services, ensuring high performance and scalability, and mentoring junior team members. You will work closely with cross-functional teams and lead initiatives that shape our technical strategy and product infrastructure.🛠 KEY ResponsibilitiesMobile Architecture & Ownership

- Design and own the Flutter app architecture: Clean Architecture, layered separation (Domain / Data / Presentation), and scalable folder structure.
- Define and enforce state management patterns using BLoC — including event/state modeling, error handling flows, and loading states.
- Lead code reviews, establish coding standards, and mentor mid/junior Flutter developers on the team.
- Make platform-level decisions: routing strategy (GoRouter), DI approach (get_it), environment config, flavor setup (dev/staging/prod).

Native Platform Integration

- Write and maintain native code in Swift (iOS) and Kotlin (Android) via Flutter Platform Channels — for features that cannot be handled in Dart alone.
- Integrate biometric authentication (Face ID, Touch ID, Android Biometric API) directly at the native layer.
- Handle native camera pipeline: TrueDepth camera data for liveness detection (iOS), CameraX (Android) for document capture.
- Debug native-side crashes using Xcode Instruments (iOS) and Android Studio Profiler — not just crash reports.
- Manage native module dependencies: CocoaPods (iOS Podfile), Gradle (Android build.gradle), and resolve conflicts when Flutter plugin versions clash.

Banking & Fintech Features

- Build and maintain complex financial UI: transaction histories with pagination, transfer flows with step-by-step validation, OTP screens, PIN entry.
- Implement deep linking and universal links for cross-app payment flows (e.g., redirect from browser back into the app after 3DS verification).
- Handle sensitive data correctly on mobile: Keychain (iOS) / Keystore (Android) for token storage, certificate pinning, jailbreak/root detection.
- Support offline-first patterns where required: local caching strategy, sync queue, conflict resolution.

Performance & Quality

- Profile and optimize app performance: frame drops, rebuild storms, widget tree depth, unnecessary repaints (use Flutter DevTools / Observatory).
- Write unit tests, widget tests, and integration tests. Set and maintain coverage targets per layer.
- Own CI/CD pipeline configuration for mobile: Fastlane, GitHub Actions, or equivalent — covering build signing, test gates, and App Store / Google Play delivery.
requirements:
📌 Requirements

- 5+ years of professional mobile development experience, with at least 3 years focused on Flutter / Dart in production apps.
- Native (required) Hands-on native development experience: iOS: Swift, UIKit/SwiftUI, CocoaPods, Xcode build system, signing & provisioning
- Android: Kotlin, Jetpack basics, Gradle, Android Studio, ProGuard/R8
- Has written actual Platform Channel code — not just used existing plugins
- Deep understanding of Flutter state management — must be able to explain tradeoffs between BLoC, Riverpod, GetX, and choose appropriately.
- Solid grasp of async Dart: Future, Stream, Isolate — and knows when to use each.
- Experience publishing apps to both App Store (App Store Connect, TestFlight) and Google Play (internal/closed/open tracks).
- English proficiency sufficient for written technical communication and basic client calls.

➕ STRONG ADVANTAGE

- Experience in banking, fintech, or any regulated financial application.
- Familiarity with EKYC flows: liveness detection, document OCR, face matching integrated into mobile onboarding.
- Experience with Flutter flavors and multi-environment config (dev / staging / prod with separate Firebase projects, API endpoints, signing certs).
- Has led or technically mentored a mobile team of 3+ developers.
- Knowledge of OWASP Mobile Top 10 and how to apply mitigations in a Flutter context.
- Actively uses AI tools in daily development workflow (GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, or equivalent) — for code generation, debugging, writing tests, or documentation. Comfortable evaluating and integrating AI-generated code critically, not just accepting output blindly.
benefits:

- Location: B20 Bach Dang Street, Tan Son Hoa Ward, Ho Chi Minh City
- Working hours: Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM (including 1.5-hour lunch break from 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM)

title: Senior Business Analyst (Biz focus)
reasons:

jobDescription:
By applying for the above position, you accept and agree that your personal data and any information stated in the attached curriculum vitae (CV) will be used and processed by ITViec and NAB Vietnam for recruitment purposes. The storage and processing of such information will comply with the applicable laws of Vietnam, and the policies and procedures of ITViec and NAB Vietnam regarding personal data, as amended from time to time.

ABOUT THE JOB

As a Senior Business Analyst within NAB, you’ll assists with the decomposition of work, writing Business Outcomes, Epics, Features, and User Stories so that their squad clearly articulates value, acceptance criteria, and estimates to get their work done. They support decision making with clear, insightful analysis, which allows the Product Owner to make decisions on ideation viability, sequencing, and shaping business context.

MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES

- The Agile Business Analyst is a senior business analyst who can apply sound business analysis methodology combined with industry expertise to execute business analysis tasks on an assigned project/business outcome.
- The Agile Business Analyst performs the role of a business analyst on assigned business outcomes, including:
- Assisting with the decomposition of work, scoping business outcomes, epics, and features
- Defining clear, actionable and testable acceptance criteria for functional requirements
- Defining non-functional requirements
- Providing business analysis services as defined in business analysis service catalogue with the aim to enable business change through technology and organisational changes
- The Agile Business Analyst is focused on supporting delivery of business outcomes through methodical, detail-orientated analysis and problem solving. They contribute to risk management and governance by identifying, articulating and documenting risks and dependencies and collaborating with others in their squad to help mitigate them.
- The Agile Business Analyst is proficient at creating high-quality artefacts which document processes, decisions and work in progress - assisting with the creation of internal change collateral, training collateral, process mapping, testing activities and release documentation. They provide ongoing management of documentation to maintain currency of the information, taking guidance and direction from others in their squad to perform edits and updates as required.
- Fulfil other tasks as assigned by your People Leader and/or authorized representative of NAB Vietnam from time to time.
requirements:
YOUR SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

Must have

- 5+years experience completing business analyst activities
- Experience in the Banking or Financial Services , especially payment
- Excellent English communication skills (both verbal & written) and strong Presentation capabilities
- Ability to work closely with key stakeholders and build collaborative partnerships
- Experience contributing to high-quality artefacts including business cases, process maps, customer journey maps, functional and non-functional reqs, technical specifications, governance definitions, testing, risk and control flows
- Contributions to regulatory environment management, including compliance, risk, obligations & scheme management
- Previous experience working in a cross-functional, agile environment and contributing to key agile ceremonies/practices
- Problem solving —ability to respond to issues in a timely and effective manner, propose solutions based on evidence, insight and viability
- Process architecture & design — familiarity with process improvement frameworks, methods and techniques (e.g. Six Sigma, ISO 9000, BPMN)
- Planning and alignment — Ability to prioritise activities and meet obligations
- Tools & methodology — Foundational understanding of change management, product management and risk tools, techniques, frameworks and methods

- Experience or knowledge of BABOK® Knowledge Areas
- Bachelor’s Degree, preferably in IT, Business, Computer Science, or related area
- Any additional certification or training in BA, PO, UX or related area e.g. PSPO, CSPO, CBAP

- Có từ 02 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình Backend (Java/Odoo). Ưu tiên ứng viên đã từng tham gia triển khai hệ thống ERP hoặc các dự án chuyển đổi số cho doanh nghiệp.

benefits:
Đãi ngộ

# Dẫn đầu thị trường

- Cơ hội được làm việc tại Tập đoàn tiên phong mở đường , kiến tạo tương lai thông minh, gắn kết của Việt Nam.
- Cơ hội được thử sức trong những lĩnh vực công nghệ tiên tiến, hiện đại nhất.

# Môi trường năng động sáng tạo

- Môi trường làm việc cởi mở và năng động, khuyến khích trao đổi ý tưởng ở mọi cấp, cho phép bạn làm việc, sáng tạo theo cách riêng.
- Được khơi gợi cảm hứng làm việc với văn phòng xanh, không gian mở, hiện đại tiêu chuẩn quốc tế.

# Cơ hội thử thách và phát triển

- Áp dụng kiến thức, kĩ năng, kinh nghiệm chuyên môn giải quyết các bài toán hấp dẫn, thử thách tại Viettel.
- Cơ hội thử sức ở nhiều lĩnh vực, sản phẩm và quốc gia khác nhau góp phần thay đổi xã hội .
- Viettel cam kết cho bạn nền tảng vững chắc để học hỏi và phát triển.
- Sẵn sàng trao quyền, cơ hội đột phá cho những người trẻ tuổi.
- Cơ hội học hỏi từ các chuyên gia hàng đầu, lãnh đạo và đồng nghiệp ưu tú

# Chế ngộ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh

- Thu nhập cạnh tranh theo thị trường, phù hợp với phạm vi công việc và năng lực cá nhân.
- Quà tặng, thưởng các dịp lễ Tết, nghỉ mát, hỗ trợ ăn trưa, hỗ trợ điện thoại; tổng giá trị phúc lợi bổ sung tối thiểu 1.500 USD mỗi năm.
- Tham gia đầy đủ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN và bảo hiểm sức khỏe riêng của Tập đoàn, khám sức khỏe định kỳ và ưu đãi mua bảo hiểm cho người thân.
- 12 ngày phép và 15 ngày nghỉ hưởng nguyên lương gồm 11 ngày lễ Tết, 3 ngày nghỉ mát và 1 ngày sáng tạo.
- Được tham gia đào tạo nâng cao chuyên môn theo nhu cầu công việc.
- Có cơ hội phát triển theo hướng Quân nhân chuyên nghiệp hoặc Sĩ quan.

Khác

Viettel tuyệt đối không thu bất cứ khoản tiền nào của ứng viên khi nộp hồ sơ tham gia dự tuyển và khi vào làm việc tại Viettel nếu trúng tuyển

title: TMO - Data Engineer Manager (SQL, Python, Spark, Kafka)
reasons:
- 13 Monthly Base Salary
- Training
- Recorgnition
jobDescription:
Design, build, and maintain scalable data infrastructure and pipelines that support banking operations, analytics, and regulatory compliance. This role bridges technical leadership with strategic business needs, ensuring data is accurate, secure, and accessible.

Key Responsibilities:

Data Architecture & Pipeline Development

- Design and implement robust, scalable data pipelines for structured and unstructured data.
- Oversee ETL/ELT processes to ingest data from core banking systems, CRM, and external sources.
- Ensure data models support real-time analytics, reporting, and machine learning.
- Collaborate with data scientists and analysts to provide usable, cleaned and aggregated data to end users

Governance, Security & Compliance

- Ensure data practices comply with banking regulations (e.g., Basel III, GDPR, local laws).
- Implement data governance frameworks, including metadata management and lineage tracking.
- Collaborate with cybersecurity teams to safeguard sensitive financial data.

Performance Optimization

- Monitor and optimize data infrastructure for performance, reliability, and cost-efficiency.
- Troubleshoot data issues and ensure high availability of data services.

Innovation & Tooling

- Evaluate and adopt modern data technologies (e.g., cloud platforms, data lakes, streaming tools).
- Promote automation and DevOps practices in data engineering workflows.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or related field.
- At least 7 years in data engineering, with 2+ years in a leadership role.
- Strong experience with SQL, Python/Scala, Spark, Kafka, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).
- Familiarity with banking systems, financial data structures, and regulatory requirements.
- Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
benefits:
• Average 15 Monthly Base salary per year

• ACB Health Care.

• Meal Allowance.

• Preferential loan as regulated by ACB

• Yearly Medical Checkup & Team building activities.

• Professional and Transparent Working Environment

title: Mobile Software Engineer - Attractive Salary
reasons:
- Performance & salary review yearly
- Competitive Package
- Full salary-based social insurance
jobDescription:
About Buymed

Buymed is the leading B2B healthcare platform in Southeast Asia, operating across Vietnam, Cambodia, and Thailand. We serve over 35,000 pharmacies, clinics, and hospitals with a mission to make healthcare more accessible and efficient. As we scale rapidly, recruitment must evolve from manual and reactive to systemized and data-driven, and that’s where this role comes in.

*** Note: Our recruitment team will contact you via the email listed in your CV. Please ensure it is up to date and check it regularly.

About the Role

A Mobile Software Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining high-performance mobile applications across iOS and Android platforms. This role works closely with Product Managers, Designers, Backend Engineers, and Business stakeholders to deliver scalable, reliable, and user-friendly mobile solutions. The engineer will contribute to technical architecture, performance optimization, and continuous improvement of mobile development practices.

Key Responsibilities

1. Mobile Application Development

- Design, develop, test, and maintain mobile applications using modern technologies and best practices.
- Build scalable, high-performance, and maintainable solutions.
- Ensure code quality through testing, debugging, code reviews, and performance optimization.
- Manage app releases and maintenance on App Store and Google Play.

2. Technical Design & Architecture

- Contribute to mobile architecture decisions and technical roadmap.
- Act as technical owner for assigned projects, providing guidance on solution design and feasibility.
- Apply modern architecture patterns (MVVM, Clean Architecture, Redux, etc.) and recommend best practices to improve scalability and performance.

3. Cross-functional Collaboration

- Partner with PM/PO, Business, and Operations teams to define requirements, estimate tasks, and support sprint planning.
- Collaborate with Backend Engineers and QA teams throughout development, testing, release, and post-launch support.
- Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues across environments.

4. Improvement

- Monitor application performance and user experience, identifying opportunities for optimization.
- Improve engineering processes through CI/CD, automation, and development best practices.
- Stay updated on emerging mobile technologies and contribute to technical documentation and knowledge sharing.
requirements:
Must-Have Qualifications:

- 3+ years of experience in mobile application development.
- Strong proficiency in React Native (JavaScript/TypeScript), Android (Kotlin/Java), or iOS (Swift/Objective-C).
- Solid understanding of mobile architecture patterns (MVVM, Clean Architecture, Redux, etc.).
- Experience working with RESTful APIs, WebSockets, MongoDB, and modern state management tools (Redux, MobX, Zustand, TanStack React Query).
- Knowledge of offline-first architecture, caching, local persistence, and background synchronization.
- Hands-on experience with Firebase services, including Analytics, Crashlytics, Remote Config, Cloud Messaging, and Performance Monitoring.
- Experience publishing and maintaining applications on App Store and/or Google Play.
- Strong debugging, performance optimization, and troubleshooting skills.
- Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing frameworks.
- Strong problem-solving ability, ownership mindset, and attention to detail.

Nice-To-Have Qualifications:

- Experience with microservices, backend APIs, or full-stack development.
- Knowledge of mobile security best practices.
- Experience with multi-country apps, localization, or large user bases.
- Experience integrating AI, chat features, real-time updates, or e-commerce flows.
- Contributions to open-source projects or personal app portfolio.
benefits:
- Performance & salary review yearly
- Paid social insurance based on full salary
- Bao Viet Insurance
- Medical Checkup
- 15 days of annual leave
- Parking allowance

Mindset

At Buymed, we value outcomes over intentions, and we expect our leaders to be practical, decisive, and grounded in execution.

Feel free to review our approach to work and expectations at:

2/ Yêu cầu ưu tiên:

- Có khả năng giao tiếp bằng tiếng Nhật ở trình độ N3 trở lên.
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với khách hàng Nhật Bản.
benefits:
- Thu nhập cạnh tranh: Lương thưởng hấp dẫn, review định kỳ theo năng lực và hiệu quả công việc.

title: Site Reliability Engineer (Junior - Mid-level)
reasons:
- Competitive salary packages.
- Dynamic and open-sharing working environment.
- Hybrid and flexible working mode.
jobDescription:
Build like a founder. Ship like Spartan.

Our customers are scaling fast - and so are we. That’s why we’re looking for a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) to join our world-class team.

At Spartan, we don’t act like vendors. We embed with startups backed by YC, Pear VC, a16z, Techstars, and more — partnering with founders and engineers from Stanford, MIT, Yale, Google, Amazon, Uber, and beyond. Together, we help launch MVPs in 30 days and scale systems that power millions of users.

This isn’t “just another DevOps role.” It’s a chance to architect Kubernetes infrastructure that’s scalable, secure, and self-healing — ensuring that startups we work with can scale like unicorns from day one.

You’ll also be working at the frontier of AI: 70% of our portfolio today is LLM-powered. Our SREs design the container orchestration, observability, and cost-efficient infra that makes it all possible.

What You’ll Do

- Design and manage multi-cluster, multi-cloud Kubernetes environments (AWS EKS, GCP GKE, Azure AKS, on-prem).
- Build high-availability, disaster-resilient, auto-scalable K8s infrastructure for production workloads.
- Implement GitOps-driven CI/CD pipelines with tools like ArgoCD or FluxCD.
- Lead the deployment, scaling, and lifecycle management of Kubernetes workloads.
- Optimize performance, reliability, and cost efficiency across clusters and regions.
- Secure workloads with RBAC, Network Policies, OPA/Gatekeeper, and vulnerability scanning.
- Collaborate with development teams to containerize and modernize applications.
- Mentor engineers on Kubernetes best practices and SRE workflows.
requirements:
- 1-6 years in DevOps, SRE, or cloud infra roles, and Kubernetes production environments
- Strong skills in Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Helm, Ansible, CloudFormation.
- Fluent in English - you’ll work directly with US startup founders.
- Open mindset and willingness to work in fast-paced startup environments.
- Proven experience running enterprise-scale clusters in multi-region or hybrid setups.
- Deep knowledge of Docker/OCI runtimes, Linux systems, networking, and troubleshooting.
- Proficient with monitoring/observability stacks: DataDog, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK, Jaeger.
- Solid understanding of Kubernetes internals (API server, scheduler, kubelet, controller manager).

Nice-to-Have

- Backend engineering experience is a strong plus.
- Certifications: CKA, CKAD, CKS.
- Experience with service mesh (Istio, Linkerd, Consul).
- Contributions to open-source K8s or CNCF ecosystem.
- Proficiency in cloud cost optimization for Kubernetes.
- Experience applying SRE best practices and advanced automation tooling.
- Flexible to start part-time before transitioning to full-time.

Tech We Use

- Kubernetes • Docker • Terraform • Helm • Ansible
- AWS • GCP • Azure • Cloudflare
- DataDog • Prometheus • Grafana • ELK • Jaeger
- GitHub Actions • ArgoCD • FluxCD
- AI-native tooling: Cursor • Claude • Codex
benefits:
- Work directly with US startup founders and engineers from Google, Amazon, Uber, and more.
- Exposure to cutting-edge infra + AI stacks.
- Transparent career path with mentorship from senior Spartan engineers.
- Build infrastructure that scales startups from zero → IPO.
- Benefits:
- 100% salary during probation
- Competitive compensation packages
- Unlimited PTO + public holidays
- Hybrid working model
- Flexible working hours
- Macbook provided
- Premium healthcare insurance & annual health-check
- Social insurance in accordance with Labor Law
- Training and career development opportunities
- An open and transparent culture where people are valued, treated fairly, trusted, and empowered
- Sponsoring sports participation costs - We have play hours where our team meets up for PS5 Gaming and Football sessions, also with a Strava Yearly Subscription
- Challenging yourself with high and difficult goals by participating in unprecedented business models in the market.
- Working in an environment that is highly flexible and open, eager to incubate any valuable idea.

title: Senior AI Native Engineer
jobDescription:
• Lead the end-to-end design and development of AI-native products, including agents, workflows,

and intelligent systems built on modern cloud architectures

• Own and implement AI-driven pipelines and workflows, ensuring reliability, scalability, reusability,

and production readiness

• Design system architectures for AI applications, including agent frameworks, RAG pipelines, and

multi-step reasoning workflows

• Collaborate closely with engineers, data scientists, and stakeholders to deliver AI-powered

features, decision systems, and automation solutions.

• Oversee integration of structured and unstructured data sources, ensuring strong governance,

reliability, and system integrity

• Establish best practices around code quality, testing, documentation, and CI/CD for AI systems and

workflows

• Contribute to development of AI agents and intelligent services leveraging real-time data, APIs, and

vector-based retrieval systems

• Optimize system performance, latency, cost, and scalability across AI pipelines and infrastructure

layers

• Work directly with global stakeholders, gathering requirements and translating them into scalable

AI product solutions

• Mentor junior builders and contribute to a strong engineering and AI product culture
requirements:
• 5+ years of experience in software engineering, AI product development, or data-driven system

engineering

• Demonstrated experience designing and delivering production AI systems, including agents,

automation pipelines, or intelligent workflows

• Strong foundation in AI system architecture, including LLM integration, retrieval-augmented

generation (RAG), and workflow orchestration

• Advanced proficiency in Python and SQL for developing reliable, scalable AI-enabled systems

• Hands-on experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) in production environments

• Experience integrating APIs and building service-oriented or event-driven architectures

• Strong knowledge of data engineering concepts, including handling structured and unstructured

data at scale

• Excellent communication skills in English, capable of working with different teams and senior

stakeholders

• Proven leadership ability with strong problem-solving skills and full lifecycle ownership of technical

initiatives
benefits:
This role spans multiple domains depending on product needs:

• AI agents and multi-step autonomous workflows

• RAG systems over messy, real-world data (e.g., planning documents, regulations, reports)

• Decision intelligence systems and spatial AI applications for real estate and operational use cases

• Full-stack product development with engineering and delivery team (frontend interaction design,

backend systems, and API integration)

• Rapid prototyping of new ideas, tools, and internal systems

• Any component required to move the product forward in each given cycle.

There is no existing product function to inherit and no backlog to pick up from. We are looking for someone who wants to build something from scratch - and who understands that in this team, building means actually building.

- Tinh thần: Năng động, sẵn sàng học hỏi, dám đương đầu thử thách và luôn hỗ trợ đồng đội.
benefits:
Đãi ngộ

# Dẫn đầu thị trường

- Cơ hội được làm việc tại Tập đoàn tiên phong mở đường , kiến tạo tương lai thông minh, gắn kết của Việt Nam.
- Cơ hội được thử sức trong những lĩnh vực công nghệ tiên tiến, hiện đại nhất.

# Môi trường năng động sáng tạo

- Môi trường làm việc cởi mở và năng động, khuyến khích trao đổi ý tưởng ở mọi cấp, cho phép bạn làm việc, sáng tạo theo cách riêng.
- Được khơi gợi cảm hứng làm việc với văn phòng xanh, không gian mở, hiện đại tiêu chuẩn quốc tế.

# Cơ hội thử thách và phát triển

- Áp dụng kiến thức, kĩ năng, kinh nghiệm chuyên môn giải quyết các bài toán hấp dẫn, thử thách tại Viettel.
- Cơ hội thử sức ở nhiều lĩnh vực, sản phẩm và quốc gia khác nhau góp phần thay đổi xã hội .
- Viettel cam kết cho bạn nền tảng vững chắc để học hỏi và phát triển.
- Sẵn sàng trao quyền, cơ hội đột phá cho những người trẻ tuổi.
- Cơ hội học hỏi từ các chuyên gia hàng đầu, lãnh đạo và đồng nghiệp ưu tú.
- Cơ hội được đào tạo, trao dồi kĩ năng định kì và nhu cầu thực tế.

# Chế ngộ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn, cạnh tranh

- Lương thưởng cạnh tranh trên thị trường, phản ánh đúng năng lực thực tế.
- Được thư giãn, khơi nguồn sáng tạo với Happy Time mỗi ngày .
- Thưởng thức bữa trưa thơm ngon tại Tập đoàn, được chọn lọc bởi các chuyên gia dinh dưỡng.
- Cơ hội tham gia gắn kết với tập thể, tổ chức với các hoạt động team building thú vị
- Chế độ chăm sóc y tế đặc biệt cho CBNV và người thân với trang thiết bị hiện đại.

Khác

Viettel tuyệt đối không thu bất cứ khoản tiền nào của ứng viên khi nộp hồ sơ tham gia dự tuyển và khi vào làm việc tại Viettel nếu trúng tuyển

title: Senior Backend Engineer (Java/Go) - Product Discovery
reasons:

jobDescription:
We are seeking Senior Backend Engineers to scale our online hypermarket platform. You will work across the entire system—from product and seller operations to product discovery (search, recommendation, browsing) and checkout—while contributing to a data platform handling hundreds of millions of records.

What you’ll do

- Work on core domains: eCommerce, Online-hypermarket Platform, Seller Center, Product Discovery (Search & Recommendation), and Data Platform
- Design and build backend services using Java or Golang, focusing on performance, scalability, and reliability
- Contribute to microservices architecture and distributed system design
- Develop systems for product management, inventory, orders, and checkout flows
- Collaborate with product and data teams to build features from idea to production
- Work with data at scale (hundreds of millions of records) to power business and user experiences
- Build and apply AI-powered tools to support system development, operations, and continuous improvement. Contribute to a domain knowledge base for the team.
requirements:
What we’re looking for

- 4+ years of backend experience with Java (Spring Boot, WebFlux, Reactor) or Golang stack.
- Strong fundamentals in data structures, algorithms, and system design
- Solid understanding of OOP, design patterns, and backend architecture
- Familiarity with distributed systems concepts (concurrency, transactions, scalability)
- Experience with common backend technologies:Databases: MySQL / PostgreSQLMessaging & caching: Kafka, RedisSearch: Elasticsearch
- Databases: MySQL / PostgreSQL
- Messaging & caching: Kafka, Redis
- Search: Elasticsearch
- Exposure to microservices and CI/CD practices
- Fast learner, adaptable in a dynamic environment

Nice to have

- Experience with high-scale systems or real-time data processing
- Familiarity with non-blocking I/O, event-driven architecture, or distributed transactions
- Experience using AI tools in development workflows
benefits:
Inside our lean engineering team:

- We work on large and complex systems, with a focus on ownership and continuous learning.
- We work within existing constraints and improve systems incrementally.
- We value strong fundamentals and the ability to reason through unfamiliar or complex systems.
- Collaboration is direct, and discussions focus on solving problems and delivering results.

Our offers include:

- MacBook provided

- 19 leave days

title: iOS Developer (Swift/ Objective-C)
jobDescription:
Job description

Autani develops intelligent building automation and energy management systems that help commercial facilities reduce energy consumption and environmental impact. Our technology controls lighting, monitors energy usage, and integrates with building management systems across thousands of facilities in North America. We operate under the LiteTrace Brands umbrella, which includes a portfolio of lighting control and building automation brands serving the commercial and industrial markets.

Job Responsibilities:

- Responsible for the development, daily maintenance, and launch of the company's iOS apps.
- Responsible for iOS app code refactoring.
- Responsible for new app development.
- Write development documentation and draw basic flowcharts.

Nhiệm vụ công việc:

- Chịu trách nhiệm phát triển, bảo trì hàng ngày và ra mắt các ứng dụng iOS của công ty.
- Chịu trách nhiệm tái cấu trúc mã ứng dụng iOS.
- Chịu trách nhiệm phát triển ứng dụng mới.
- Viết tài liệu phát triển và vẽ sơ đồ khối cơ bản.
requirements:
How well do you fit this job and rank among other candidates?

Job Requirement:

- Bachelor’s degree is required with at least 2+ years of experience in iOS development (Swift/Objective-C)
- Hands-on experience in real projects with the ability to work independently and deliver development tasks
- Strong communication skills with the ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment
- Bachelor's degree or higher in a computer science-related field, with 2+ years of relevant work experience.
- Familiarity with common data structures and algorithms, good programming habits and software design skills, and experience in code refactoring.
- Familiarity with various iOS data storage methods, including SQLite.
- In-depth understanding of multithreading, runtime, and memory management.
- Experience in iOS performance optimization.
- Basic English reading and writing skills, such as reading English documents and communicating via email in English.
- Experience with iOS Bluetooth development is preferred, proficiency in Chinese is a plus.

Yêu cầu:

- Bắt buộc tốt nghiệp đại học và Kinh nghiệm từ 2 năm trở lên về phát triển ứng dụng iOS (Swift/Objective-C)
- Kinh nghiệm thực tế về dự án, có khả năng hoàn thành các nhiệm vụ phát triển một cách độc lập
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp xuất sắc, có khả năng làm việc hiệu quả với nhóm
- Bằng cử nhân trở lên chuyên ngành khoa học máy tính, có kinh nghiệm làm việc liên quan từ 2 năm trở lên.
- Nắm vững các cấu trúc dữ liệu và thuật toán phổ biến, thói quen lập trình tốt và kỹ năng thiết kế phần mềm, cũng như kinh nghiệm tái cấu trúc mã.
- Nắm vững các phương pháp lưu trữ dữ liệu iOS khác nhau, bao gồm SQLite.
- Hiểu biết sâu sắc về đa luồng, thời gian chạy và quản lý bộ nhớ.
- Kinh nghiệm tối ưu hóa hiệu suất iOS.
- Kỹ năng đọc và viết tiếng Anh cơ bản, chẳng hạn như đọc tài liệu tiếng Anh và giao tiếp qua email bằng tiếng Anh.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm phát triển iOS Bluetooth
