title: AI Engineer
jobDescription:
About Trustify Technology

Trustify Technology is a fast-growing software engineering and digital transformation company providing AI-driven software development, verification & validation, and automation solutions for global clients across the US, UK/EU, Japan, and Singapore.

Trustify aims to be the top-tier technology outsourcing partner from Vietnam, combining human expertise with AI power to deliver high-quality, cost-effective solutions.

About AI Engineer Position

We are looking for a highly skilled AI Engineer with expertise in Gen AI, Agentic AI, LLMs and NLP to join our innovative team. The ideal candidate will have experience in data science, machine learning and system engineering. You will work closely with engineers and stakeholders to develop demo for POC, state-of-the-art AI solutions

Responsibilities

- Provide solutions and implement AI projects using LLMs, GenAI services (like Google Gemini, Open AI, Doc AI....) or opensource projectss
- Optimize and fine-tune AI current light-weight models for efficiency and accuracy.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI models into production systems.
- Drives product and business impact through data analysis, algorithm development, and applied machine learning.
- Works on a range of problems including personalisation, search, and recommendation, using techniques such as LLMs, RAG, and statistical modelling.
- Collaborates closely with engineering and product teams to develop, train, and deploy models that enhance user experience and decision-making.
- Brings strong analytical and programming skills, with a focus on turning data into actionable insights and scalable systems.
- Stay up to date with the latest trends in AI, computer vision, and speech processing.
- Work with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) to manage and deploy models.
requirements:
Must have

- BS/MS/PhD in Computer Science or related technical discipline
- 3+ years of experience in data science, machine learning, or AI development.
- Proficiency in Python and popular ML libraries (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn)
- Hands-on experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and fine-tuning LLMs
- Proficiency in working with large datasets and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).
- Familiarity with MLOps tools and practicies for deploying AI models in production.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Good communication in English

Nice to have

- Experience with computer vision tools (OpenCV, scikit-image, YOLO, Detectron, etc.).
- Experienced using Google Document AI and labelling data
benefits:
- Be part of a dynamic, international team
- Sponsorship for professional certification exams
- Flexible working hours (core time: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Monday to Friday) and work from home policy
- Healthcare: Annual health check-up, Premium Health Insurance.
- 12 annual leaves + holidays.
- 13th-month salary.
- Bonus for excellent project performance
- Year End Party (YEP), company trip, team building activities., happy hour
- Snacks, coffee, tea and soft drinks available in the office
- Marriage gift, sick leave support, funeral/maternity support.
- Lunar New Year gifts.
- Free parking, provided devices.

title: Product Owner cum Project Manager
reasons:
- Work closely with international team members
- Your work will be critical to shaping the solution
- Challenging projects with flexible working hours
jobDescription:
About the Role:

The scale and scope of our projects are expanding rapidly as we grow alongside our clients. One of the cornerstones of good software comes down to being able to clearly understand the needs of our clients, think critically and ask good questions, document requirements to ensure understanding, and ensure clear and concise communication.

As a Product Owner cum Project Manager you will stand center stage interacting with stakeholders, teams in Vietnam, US, Europe and clients around the world. Leading project execution ensures the project is delivered on time and within budget.

Responsibilities:

- Act as the primary point of contact for clients, stakeholders, and development team, clearly communicating gathering requirements, technical concepts and project updates.
- To identify and prioritize user needs, understanding business goals of clients and translating them into feasible solutions.
- Actively participate in technical discussions and brainstorming sessions with the Director of Engineering/Technical Manager/Team Lead to define technical vision and architecture for projects, contributing your expertise and insights.
- Lead project planning, estimation, execution and support team ensuring project is delivered on time and within budget.
- Organize projects, coordinate production releases and roll-outs, lead and inspire our dynamic development team, delegate tasks to the necessary resources and present on projects’ progress and results.
- Identify and propose improvements to development processes, tools, and infrastructure; mitigate potential risks and dependencies throughout the development process.
- Stay up-to-date with the latest technologies and trends in AI, full-stack development, advocating for and implementing relevant advancements.
requirements:
- 5+ years of experience as a Product Owner / Project Manager with a proven track record of success in leading and delivering complex projects.
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering with PMP Certificate or a related field (or equivalent experience).
- Extensive knowledge and experience in designing and building user interfaces with modern front-end technologies (Ex: ReactJS, JavaScript, HTML, CSS,… UI/UX skills, can draw wireframes,…).
- Extensive knowledge and experience with backend development concepts and proven ability to architect, scalable solutions using programming languages (Ex: Java, .Net, NodeJS,…).
- Comprehensive knowledge of relational databases and PostgreSQL.
- Proven ability to accurately estimate project timelines, resources, and potential risks.

You will be successful if you have:

- Native English speaker - Strong written and verbal communication
- Strong analytical mindset
- Highly organized allow you to manage a wide range of tasks
- Exceptional attention to detail
- Excellent interpersonal skills to work with a wide range of people
- Excellent time management drives to deadlines/timelines
- Strong leadership and mentoring skills, with a passion for helping others grow and succeed
- Able to work independently and follow processes/procedures
- Proactively seeks out ways to constantly improve and drive customer satisfaction
- Passionate, energetic, and enthusiastic
benefits:
There are a lot of reasons why you will want to work here:

- Work from home
- Competitive salaries
- An international work experience
- Team building activities
- Special 5 year / 10 year Anniversary Award
- But the most important one: You will be critical to not just developing the solutions, but helping to shape and define them as well. Your Input Matters! That and you will be working side by side with International team members. Want to fast track your career and show what you can do? We want to see that as well.
- And much more!

jobDescription:
We’re looking for an experienced BackEnd Developer to be responsible for designing system architecture, setting codebase standards, and optimizing performance for real-time features. Your main responsibilities will include:

Functional:

- Establish codebase standards: folder structure, naming conventions, and processing flows.

- Build and implement Unit Tests, validate business logic, and standardize event flows (results, player states, system interactions).
- Optimize performance for critical operations such as matchmaking, ranking & rating systems, and reward logic.
- Ensure game backend security: anti-cheat, session validation, and prevention of fake requests/spam.

Organizational strategy:

- Abide by and uphold all Company core values, policies and procedures. Help make sure that the Organization’s philosophy, mission and vision are pertinent and practiced throughout the organization.
- Design, support and oversee cross-functional teams throughout the Organization.

- Actively handle production incidents, trace logs, identify root causes, and deploy quick solutions.

requirements:

- Proficient in Kafka, RabbitMQ.
- Experience in building real-time systems with Socket.io, WebSocket, Redis pub/sub, event-driven architecture.

- Experience with Spring Boot, Lavarel is a plus.

- Experience with large-scale real-time game systems is an advantage.
- Familiar with project management methodologies (Agile, Scrum, Waterfall, etc.).
- Proficient in project management tools (Jira, Trello, Asana, etc.).
- Strong leadership, organizational, and problem-solving skills.

At Reliccell, you’ll find a modern, comfortable, and healthy working environment where every idea is heard and respected. We believe that when people feel happy and inspired, that’s when the best things happen.

jobDescription:
This position will be contracted through Bosch’s external vendor under a one-year agreement.

MS/ESC XC Horizontal ENE

Horizontal NE is a cross‑domain engineering organization within XC, responsible for developing and scaling reusable software and platform assets across ADAS, Radar, Video, and integrated vehicle computing platforms. The organization owns horizontal topics such as base software, middleware, safety, security, compute, and engineering methods, supporting XC‑CP, XC‑CE, XC‑AC, and XC‑AS products. Horizontal NE works closely with product teams to enable standardization, reuse, and technical alignment across projects. It plays a key role in building future‑ready platforms for software‑defined vehicles, ensuring high quality, efficiency, and scalability across XC portfolios.

Main Roles and Responsibilities

Work as part of Bosch’s global ADAS teams to develop and integrate AUTOSAR Classic BSW and diagnostics software for next‑generation driver assistance ECUs (radar, camera, sensor fusion, domain controllers).

Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain embedded AUTOSAR Classic software (BSW and low‑level SW) for ADAS ECUs using C/C++.
- Configure, integrate, and debug AUTOSAR BSW modules, with focus on: Diagnostics, CAN Communication, Failure management and PDM.
- Collaborate closely with global system, hardware, and application teams to ensure end‑to‑end integration of BSW with ADAS applications (e.g., radar, camera, sensor fusion).
- Participate in the complete software development lifecycle: requirements analysis, architecture & design, implementation, unit/integration testing, debug, and maintenance.
- Optimize software performance and memory usage for resource-constrained embedded systems.
- Conduct code reviews, ensure adherence to Bosch coding guidelines, MISRA rules (if applicable), and best practices.
- Develop and execute unit tests and integration tests; support SIL/HIL testing and vehicle testing as needed.
- Ensure compliance with ISO 26262 (functional safety) and Automotive SPICE processes contribute to work products and assessments.
- Create and maintain software architecture, design, and interface documentation for global stakeholders.
- Use tools such as CANoe, CANalyzer, debuggers, emulators, and simulators for development, analysis, and issue resolution.
- Stay updated with the latest AUTOSAR specifications and implement compliant software solutions.
- Contribute to the development of software architecture and design documents.
- Collaborate with hardware engineers to ensure optimal software-hardware integration.
- Participate in technical discussions in an international, distributed team; and actively provide innovative solutions to complex engineering challenges.
- Work, design reviews, and continuous improvement initiatives.
requirements:
Mandatory Qualifications

- Bachelor’s / Master’s degree in Electronics, Electrical, Mechatronics, Computer Science, or related field.
- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English; comfortable collaborating in global teams.

Technical Skills

- 1-5 years of experience in embedded software development
- Strong Technical skills preferably in automotive domain & Good experience in programming in C, C++ for embedded systems.
- Experience with AUTOSAR Classic architecture and BSW and ASPICE know-how.
- Good understanding of microcontrollers, low‑level drivers, and embedded RTOS concepts.
- Experience / Familiarity in:Vehicle diagnostics and fault management SWAUTOSAR modules: Diagnostic Error Management (DEM), Diagnostic Communication Management (DCM), Communication Stack (CAN\Ethernet\LIN protocol)Automotive protocols and standards: ISO 14229, ISO 15765, ISO 14230, ISO 26262.
- Vehicle diagnostics and fault management SW
- AUTOSAR modules: Diagnostic Error Management (DEM), Diagnostic Communication Management (DCM), Communication Stack (CAN\Ethernet\LIN protocol)
- Automotive protocols and standards: ISO 14229, ISO 15765, ISO 14230, ISO 26262.
- Familiarity with CANoe, CANalyzer, and issue/requirement tracking tools (e.g., Jira, DOORS/ or similar).
- Prior Experience with ADAS‑related ECUs (radar, camera, sensor fusion, braking/steering controllers) is a strong plus.

Soft Skills

- Self‑driven, proactive, and able to take ownership of modules/features end‑to‑end.
- Strong teamwork, interpersonal skills, and problem‑solving ability.
- High degree of self-discipline, quality focus, and willingness to learn new technologies in ADAS and autonomous driving.

title: Senior Embedded Security Engineer – Linux / Android
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members

jobDescription:
We are looking for 6 Senior Embedded Security Engineers to design, implement, and validate end-to-end security solutions on modern embedded platforms.

This role is open to candidates from multiple domains, including Automotive, IoT, Mobile Devices, and Embedded Systems.

If you have hands-on experience securing Linux / Android-based systems, SoCs, or connected devices, and are interested in working on automotive-grade platforms such as Infotainment (IVI) and ADAS, we strongly encourage you to apply.

You will work on modern SoC platforms (e.g. Qualcomm, Renesas, TI, Marvell) running Android Automotive, Linux, QNX, or AUTOSAR-based systems, contributing to secure, scalable, and production-ready embedded solutions.

Main Responsibilities

1. Security Architecture & Engineering

- Design and implement end-to-end security features for embedded platforms, including: Secure Boot, Trusted Execution Environments (TEE), Secure storage, Secure update mechanisms, Secure communication, etc...

Contribute to security architecture definition for embedded and connected systems.

2. Threat Modeling & Reviews

Perform security architecture reviews and threat modeling for infotainment, ADAS, IoT, or connected device platforms.

Identify risks, define mitigation strategies, and drive security improvements early in the development lifecycle.

3. Security Implementation & Hardening

Implement security hardening for Linux / Android / QNX systems.

Conduct secure code reviews and collaborate with development teams to address vulnerabilities.

Support integration of access control and system hardening mechanisms (e.g. SELinux, AppArmor).

4. Testing & Validation

Perform security testing and validation, including: Static and dynamic analysis, Fuzzing, Penetration testing

Validate security features on real hardware and production-like environments.

5. Process & Compliance

Develop and maintain security requirements and security engineering processes (SEP).

Support compliance with relevant security standards and best practices.
requirements:
Mandatory Qualifications

Educational background: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Cryptography, or a related technical field

7-15 years of overall experience, with at least 2-5 years of experience in embedded software development, system software, or security engineering (backgrounds from Automotive, IoT, Mobile Devices, Consumer Electronics are all welcome)

Practical experience with Linux and/or Android platforms, particularly in BSP, middleware, system services, or other low-level system components.

Solid understanding of cybersecurity fundamentals, including cryptography, secure communication protocols, secure coding practices, and security testing principles.

Hands-on experience implementing or supporting embedded system security features, such as secure boot, system trust mechanisms, secure storage, secure update/OTA, and secure communication between components or devices.

Nice-to-Have (Any of the following will be a strong advantage, but are not mandatory)

- Good knowledge or hands-on experience in development with modern SoC architectures, such as: Qualcomm, Renesas (RCAR), TI, etc.
- Experience in QNX development
- Relevant certifications (CEH, CISSP, OSCP, SANS GIAC, etc.)
- Good knowledge or hands-on experience in following areas:Secure Boot.Hardware-back security such as Trustzone (Arm TrustZone, OP-TEE, etc.), HSM, etc.Storage security (disk encryption, dm-verity, etc.).Secure communication protocols (TLS/DTLS, SSH, IPsec, MACsec, etc.).Access control & hardening (SELinux, AppArmor, etc.).Signing tools (Android signing, secure boot signing, etc.).Linux / Android / QNX security development/hardening.Network security, firewall.Security testing & validation (fuzzing, static/dynamic analysis, penetration testing, etc.).
- Secure Boot.
- Hardware-back security such as Trustzone (Arm TrustZone, OP-TEE, etc.), HSM, etc.
- Storage security (disk encryption, dm-verity, etc.).
- Secure communication protocols (TLS/DTLS, SSH, IPsec, MACsec, etc.).
- Access control & hardening (SELinux, AppArmor, etc.).
- Signing tools (Android signing, secure boot signing, etc.).
- Linux / Android / QNX security development/hardening.
- Network security, firewall.
- Security testing & validation (fuzzing, static/dynamic analysis, penetration testing, etc.).

Because we do not just follow trends, we create them. Together we turn ideas into reality, working every day to make the world of tomorrow a better place. Do you have high standards when it comes to your job? So do we. At Bosch, you will discover more than just work.

title: Senior Technical Support Specialist (L3 Support)
reasons:
- Competitive salary
- Full statutory insurance
- Professional, international working environment
jobDescription:
About Safetrust

Safetrust is building the future of identity.

Imagine walking into a building where your phone, watch, or face becomes your secure credential. No badges. No friction. Just seamless, secure access across physical and digital environments.

That’s what we do.

Our platform combines mobile credentials, IoT devices, cloud-native architecture, and secure authentication to power access across offices, data centers, and enterprise systems—used by Fortune 200 companies and global partners.

We operate across the United States, Vietnam, and Australia, solving one of the most complex challenges in modern security: how identity works across devices, systems, and the real world.

Why This Role Matters

This is not a traditional support role.

This is where the hardest problems go.

As a Senior Technical Support Engineer (L3), you will diagnose and resolve complex, system-level issues across hardware, mobile, cloud, and identity infrastructure—issues that directly impact customers and product reliability.

Your work will not only resolve incidents—you will help identify patterns, prevent failures, and improve how our products are built and deployed.

Role Overview

Safetrust is seeking a Senior Technical Support Engineer (L3) to serve as the highest level of technical escalation across our platform.

You will work across embedded devices, mobile applications, APIs, and cloud services to troubleshoot deeply complex issues, perform root cause analysis, and drive resolution in partnership with Engineering and Product teams.

This role is highly cross-functional and requires strong technical depth, ownership, and the ability to operate under pressure during critical incidents.

What You’ll Do

Deep Technical Troubleshooting

- Own and resolve Tier 3 escalations across hardware, firmware, mobile (iOS/Android), APIs, and cloud platforms
- Perform system-level debugging across device, network, and backend layers
- Analyze logs, packet captures, and system behavior to isolate root causes
- Troubleshoot interactions between IoT devices, mobile credentials, and cloud services

Root Cause Analysis & Reliability

- Conduct detailed root cause analysis for complex and recurring issues
- Identify systemic problems and recommend long-term solutions
- Drive reduction of recurring defects and support escalations
- Contribute to improving system reliability and product stability

Incident Management & Resolution

- Lead technical coordination during high-priority incidents
- Work cross-functionally with Engineering, QA, and Product to resolve issues
- Provide clear, structured communication during critical situations

Release & Hotfix Support

- Partner with Engineering and QA to validate fixes and hotfixes
- Support release readiness and deployment validation
- Monitor post-release behavior and identify emerging risks

Documentation & Knowledge Sharing

- Create and maintain technical documentation, troubleshooting guides, and known issue records
- Improve knowledge base structure to support scalable support operations
- Ensure complex solutions are documented for reuse

Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Act as a technical bridge between Support, Engineering, Product, and Customer Success
- Provide detailed technical feedback to influence product improvements
- Support new feature rollouts and ensure support readiness

Mentorship & Enablement

- Train and mentor L1 and L2 support engineers
- Lead knowledge transfer sessions for new systems and features
- Help elevate technical capability across the support organization
requirements:
What You Bring

Technical Expertise

- Strong experience troubleshooting IoT systems, embedded devices, or connected platforms
- Experience with Bluetooth, NFC, and RF technologies (BLE, NFC, etc.)
- Knowledge of secure credential technologies (e.g., DESFire or similar)
- Understanding of access control systems and integrations
- Strong knowledge of networking protocols (TCP/IP, HTTP, TLS)
- Experience with packet analysis tools (e.g., Wireshark)
- Experience troubleshooting APIs, distributed systems, and integrations

Development & Tools

- Proficiency in at least one scripting or programming language (Python, JavaScript, Java, Kotlin, Bash, etc.)
- Experience working with REST APIs and API debugging tools
- Experience with Jira, Confluence, and log analysis tools

Core Skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset
- Ability to debug complex, multi-layer systems
- Clear communication of technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences
- Ability to perform under pressure during critical incidents
- Strong ownership and follow-through

Nice to Have

- Experience with iOS and Android debugging or development
- Experience with cloud platforms and microservices architectures
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and release processes
- Experience in SaaS, IoT, or platform-based environments
- Experience in identity, security, or access control systems

What Sets You Apart

- Ability to troubleshoot across hardware, mobile, and cloud systems end-to-end
- Strong ownership of issues from detection through resolution
- Ability to identify patterns and prevent future failures
- Strong documentation and knowledge-sharing mindset
- Ability to operate effectively in complex, high-pressure environments

Success in This Role

- Resolution speed and quality of complex escalations
- Reduction in recurring issues and systemic defects
- Improved product reliability and stability
- Increased effectiveness of L1/L2 support teams
- Strong customer outcomes during critical incidents
benefits:
- Competitive salary based on experience and performance
- Daily lunch provided at the office
- Free coffee, tea, and refreshments
- Full statutory insurance (social, health, unemployment)
- Annual health check-up and paid annual leave
- Professional, international working environment

title: Senior Data Engineer (AI, English)
reasons:

requirements:
Technical Requirements:

- Data Warehouse & Lakehouse Design: AWS Redshift, Onelake, Azure Synapse, Expert in dimensional modelling, Star schemas, and data vault design for insurance data domains.
- Data Pipeline Engineering: Azure Data Factory, AWS Glue . Experience building production-grade ELT/ETL and CDC pipelines from complex, heterogeneous source systems.
- Cloud Data Platforms: Deep hands-on expertise across Azure (ADLS Gen2, Synapse, ADF, Purview) and AWS (S3, Glue, Redshift, SageMaker). Infrastructure-as-Code via Terraform or Bicep.
- ML & Predictive Modelling: Feature engineering, Feature Stores, MLflow, scikit-learn, XGBoost. Experience deploying predictive models to production with monitoring, drift detection, and retraining pipelines.
- Streaming & Real-Time Data: Apache Kafka, Azure Event Hubs, Spark Structured Streaming, Flink. Building low-latency pipelines for real-time claims event processing and accommodation availability feeds.
- AI Enabled Workflows & RAG Infrastructures: Vector databases (Pinecone, pgvector), RAG pipeline architecture, LangChain/LlamaIndex, prompt engineering, and embedding pipelines over structured and unstructured data. AI enabled workflows & Agentic Workflow Automations.
- Data Governance & Quality: Data cataloguing, lineage tracking (Purview / OpenLineage), PII masking, RBAC, Great Expectations / dbt tests. Compliance-aware design for insurance regulatory requirements.
- Languages & Tooling: Python (primary), SQL (advanced), Scala or Java (preferred), Git, Docker, Kubernetes. CI/CD for data pipelines via GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps.

Preferred Background:

- Insurtech, Fintech, or Financial Services — handling policy, claims, underwriting, and compliance data with strict lineage and auditability requirements
- Experience with accommodation, travel, or claims management platform data — understanding supplier networks, booking APIs, cost structures, and SLA frameworks
- Familiarity with regulatory data requirements in insurance (e.g. APRA, Lloyd's, FCA) and data sovereignty considerations across geographies
- Prior greenfield data platform builds — architecting from scratch with an ownership and delivery mindset
- Fluency in English
benefits:
- Competitive Pay: Attractive salary package with a 13th-month bonus and Reward bonus
- Hybrid Working Model: Embrace flexibility of working from both home and office that supports better work-life balance and boosts productivity
- Recognition That Matters: We celebrate your milestones with meaningful rewards and long-term commitment opportunities (after 2 years, 5 years, 10 years, etc. Of service)
- Comprehensive Benefits: Private health insurance for you and family member, plus full statutory coverage (social, health, unemployment)
- Time to Recharge: 18 days of paid leave per year, including sick days
- Continuous Growth: Dedicated learning budget, access to Udemy, English classes, mentoring, and global workshop/business forum opportunities
- Support for Your Day-to-Day: Meal and parking allowances to keep life simple
- Culture That Empowers: Company trips, year-end celebrations, structured quarterly team bonding, culture activities for x-team collaboration — because strong teams drive meaningful outcomes
- Refer and Earn: Generous referral bonus for every successful hire you bring in

title: Fullstack Dev (.NET, Angular) – Phát Triển Hệ Thống ERP
jobDescription:
- Tham gia phát triển các dự án ERP Web Application (ngành giáo dục) dựa trên nền tảng .NET Core/Framework và Angular (2+).
- Thiết kế và xây dựng các API (RESTful Services) phía Backend đảm bảo tính mở rộng, bảo mật và hiệu suất cao cho dữ liệu lớn.
- Xây dựng giao diện ứng dụng (Frontend) hiện đại, tập trung vào trải nghiệm người dùng (UX) và tối ưu hóa hiệu năng render cho các màn hình quản lý dữ liệu lớn.
- Tham gia vào toàn bộ vòng đời phát triển phần mềm: Phân tích yêu cầu, thiết kế hệ thống, lập trình, kiểm thử (Unit Test) và triển khai.
- Ứng dụng kỹ năng Prompt Engineering trên các công cụ AI để hỗ trợ Refactor code, phát hiện lỗi logic và nâng cao chất lượng mã nguồn .NET/Angular.
- Sử dụng AI như một trợ lý phân tích dữ liệu để xử lý các bài toán tối ưu hiệu năng vận hành cho hệ thống ERP quy mô lớn.
- Phối hợp với Team Leader và các bộ phận vận hành để chuyển đổi yêu cầu kinh doanh thành giải pháp kỹ thuật tối ưu.
requirements:
- Có từ 2 – 4 năm kinh nghiệm lập trình C#, .NET Core/ Web API.
- Nắm vững OOP, SOLID và các Design Patterns cơ bản.
- Thành thạo SQL Server/PostgreSQL (viết Stored Procedure, tối ưu truy vấn).
- Có kinh nghiệm với Angular (2+), TypeScript, RxJS; xây dựng UI theo kiến trúc component.
- Sử dụng tốt các thư viện UI (Angular Material, DevExtreme hoặc tương đương).
- Hiểu về State Management, có kinh nghiệm xây dựng Dynamic Forms và xử lý validation phức tạp.
- Nắm vững HTML5, CSS3 (SCSS/SASS).
- Có tư duy hệ thống, hiểu luồng nghiệp vụ và liên kết dữ liệu trong hệ thống ERP (ưu tiên).
- Kỹ năng phân tích, giải quyết vấn đề và troubleshooting tốt.
- Thành thạo Excel (VLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH, Pivot); biết VBA là điểm cộng.
- Biết ứng dụng AI hỗ trợ lập trình, tối ưu hiệu suất và phân tích nghiệp vụ.
- Chủ động, học hỏi nhanh, có trách nhiệm và đảm bảo deadline công việc.
benefits:
- Mức lương: thỏa thuận.
- Tham gia BHXH, BHYT, BHTN đầy đủ theo quy định của Pháp luật.
- Đi du lịch hàng năm theo chế độ của Công ty.
- Chế độ thưởng hàng năm theo chính sách đãi ngộ của Công ty.
- Xét tăng lương định kỳ theo năng lực làm việc.
- Hỗ trợ chăm sóc sức khỏe nhân viên và người thân gia đình.

title: Tester
jobDescription:
- Tổ chức thực hiện xây dựng kế hoạch, kịch bản, kiểm thử hệ thống trước khi đưa vào vận hành

- Nghiên cứu, cập nhật các công cụ và kiến thức mới hỗ trợ cho công việc

- Viết tài liệu đào tạo hướng dẫn người dùng cuối các dịch vụ CNTT cơ bản

- Thực hiện tổng hợp và báo cáo định kỳ/đột xuất theo quy định và các nhiệm vụ khác theo phân công
requirements: Tối nghiệp cao đẳng CNTT
benefits:
Với phương châm coi nguồn nhân lực là yếu tố quyết định sự thành công của Công ty, MBAMC luôn chú trọng đến việc phát triển năng lực, chăm lo cho đời sống vật chất, tinh thần của CBNV. Chúng tôi hướng đến chính sách đãi ngộ cạnh tranh: “Nhân sự tốt nhất, trả lương cao nhất”, tạo mọi điều kiện thuận lợi để CBNV yên tâm công tác, cống hiến. Bên cạnh đó, MBAMC cam kết đảm bảo các chế độ của người lao động theo quy định của pháp luật, tuân thủ các chính sách của nhà nước.

Cùng với lộ trình thăng tiến và định hướng công việc rõ ràng, MBAMC cũng thường xuyên triển khai các chương trình đào tạo nhằm nâng cao kiến thức chuyên môn, kỹ năng làm việc. Nằm trong định hướng phát triển bền vững, lâu dài, liên tục tạo ra nguồn sinh khí mới cho mọi lĩnh vực hoạt động, MBAMC không ngừng tìm kiếm và thu hút nhân tài có mong muốn gắn bó với Công ty.

Các đãi ngộ tại MBAMC:

- Lương Chức danh;- Lương hiệu quả công việc;- Lương tháng 13;- Phụ cấp;- Chế độ xem xét tăng lương gắn liền với hiệu quả công việc.- Thưởng nhân các ngày lễ tết và các sự kiện MBAMC;- Thưởng thành tích định kỳ và đột xuất cho cá nhân hoặc tập thể;- Thưởng sáng kiến cải tiến kỹ thuật, nâng cao hiệu quả hoạt động kinh doanh.- Bảo hiểm Xã hội, Y tế, Thất nghiệp theo quy định của nhà nước;- Gói bảo hiểm sức khoẻ của MIC dành riêng cho CBNV Công ty;- Bảo hiểm tai nạn lao động.- Trợ cấp nhân các sự kiện đặc biệt của CBNV;- Trợ cấp trang phục;- Chương trình du lịch trong và ngoài nước hàng năm;- Khám sức khỏe định kỳ;- Các hoạt động văn hóa, văn nghệ, thể thao dành cho CBNV;- Các chương trình chăm lo đời sống và gia đình CBNV: ngày hội gia đình, hỗ trợ đào tạo, khen thưởng con CBNV có thành tích học tập tốt; Thăm hỏi tứ thân phụ mẫu, ốm đau, hiếu hỷ ....- Làm việc từ thứ 2 và thứ 6, 08h00 đến 17h30 (nghỉ trưa 90 phút, Có nhà ăn phục vụ CBNV);- Thời gian nghỉ chế độ và nghỉ lễ theo quy định Công ty và quy định Pháp luật.

title: Senior Product Designer (UX/UI + AI)
jobDescription:
About Huenx AS

Huenx AS is an AI-first consultancy and product company based in Norway. We deliver software and AI consulting services to clients across Norway and Europe, and we build our own AI-driven products. Our model brings together Norwegian business insight and senior Vietnamese engineering talent — small, highly skilled teams that work effectively with AI to deliver faster than larger organizations.

As we expand in Vietnam, we are building a senior engineering team to work on both our internal products and international client projects. We are hiring several positions, on both full-time and hourly engagements.

About the Role

This is an end-to-end ownership role, not a UI-execution role. You will independently take features from an ambiguous business problem through UX, polished UI, and developer-ready frontend — with minimal hand-holding. You are not a pixel executor; you are a product thinker who also ships high-craft UI, and who uses AI across almost every step of your work to move faster and raise quality.

What You'll Own

- Take features from problem framing → research → UX flows → high-fidelity UI → developer handoff, independently.
- Use AI tools across the full design process — research synthesis, ideation, UI generation, copy, and turning designs into frontend code.
- Build and govern a token-based design system and reusable component library so UI work scales without manual rework.
- Map and visualize customer journeys and apply design thinking to frame the right problems before solving them.
- Identify and improve weak product and workflow processes — not just the screens, but how the workflows.
requirements:
Requirements — Must Have (in priority order)

- 7+ years in UX / Product Design with demonstrated end-to-end ownership — show features you took from ambiguous problem to shipped UI on your own.
- AI-augmented designer — you use AI across almost every step of your role (research, ideation, UI, copy, prototyping) and can show how it changed your output and speed.
- Both UX and high-craft UI — you do the thinking and the pixels. This role does not assume a separate UI resource.
- Generate frontend code from a UI design — you can turn a design into clean, usable frontend code (HTML/CSS, React/Tailwind, or via AI codegen).
- Design systems & component libraries — you have built or governed a token-based system and know how to design with and extend component libraries.
- Experienced with Claude / AI design tooling — hands-on with Claude-based design and generation workflows (or equivalent), not just casual use.
- Design thinking & customer journey visualization — you frame problems before solving them and can map journeys that align teams.
- Strong communication & professional written English — you write UX copy and align clients, engineers, and leadership.

Requirements — Nice to Have

- Process-improvement experience — spotting and fixing inefficient product or operational workflows.
- Enterprise / B2B SaaS experience — complex, data-dense, role-based software (dashboards, admin tooling, multi-step workflows).
- Data visualization — dashboards, charts, and matrices that stay legible under heavy information density.
- Startup / small-team experience — high ownership, broad range, ship-it mindset.
benefits:
- AI-first environment — you'll work with modern AI tooling every day, across both client projects and our own products, with access to the latest tools to work faster and sharpen your craft.
- Remote and flexible — Norwegian business hours (12:00 – 21:00 Vietnam time) mean your mornings are free.
- Salary: 1,500 – 2,500 USD/month (full-time equivalent), depending on experience and engagement type.
- Full-time benefits: 13th-month salary, social insurance, company trips, and learning & training, in line with company policies.
- Real product ownership — solve ambiguous, end-to-end problems, not just execute screens.
- Travel to Norway for onsite collaboration, with potential to relocate based on performance and project needs.

title: Senior Solution Architect - ERP / Odoo (Up to 80M VND+)
reasons:
- Làm với khách quốc tế, chốt kiến trúc ERP/ Odoo
- Lương T13 +thưởng năm + thưởng theo dự án.
- BH sức khỏe, 12 ngày phép, co. trip & teambuilding
jobDescription:
Về vị trí này

Chúng tôi tìm một Solution Architect mà thế mạnh lớn nhất là hiểu sâu nghiệp vụ, tư duy phản biện và giao tiếp. Kỹ thuật là điều kiện cần — nhưng điều tạo ra khác biệt là khả năng gỡ rối yêu cầu mơ hồ của khách và dẫn họ đi từ "điều họ muốn" sang "điều họ thực sự cần".

Bạn sẽ là cầu nối giữa đội nghiệp vụ của khách và đội developer: làm rõ yêu cầu, ra các quyết định kiến trúc then chốt, và dẫn dắt team hiện thực hóa giải pháp.

Bạn sẽ làm gì

- Hiểu nghiệp vụ và phản biện yêu cầu của khách. Khi khách nói "tôi muốn X", đặt câu hỏi sâu hơn để tìm vấn đề gốc và đề xuất giải pháp tốt hơn, bền hơn.
- Giao tiếp xuyên suốt giữa hai bên. Giải thích giải pháp kỹ thuật cho người ngoài ngành bằng ngôn ngữ đơn giản; viết solution blueprint và technical spec rõ ràng cho đội dev.
- Thiết kế kiến trúc ERP/Odoo: module, data model, integration (API, middleware, microservices), scalability, hiệu năng.
- Dẫn dắt fit-gap analysis; cân nhắc giữa customize và dùng cấu hình chuẩn.
- Review thiết kế và code, đặt chuẩn kỹ thuật, hướng dẫn các thành viên trong đội.
- Tham gia daily meeting với khách qua Zoom/Google Meet.
requirements:
Bắt buộc:

- 5+ năm phát triển phần mềm, tối thiểu 2 năm ở vai trò Architect hoặc Tech Lead.
- Thành thạo Python và PostgreSQL; đã thiết kế hệ thống, API và data model ở quy mô production.
- Hiểu sâu quy trình nghiệp vụ ERP của ít nhất 2–3 mảng (Supply Chain, Manufacturing/MRP, Inventory,
- Procurement, HR & Payroll, CRM, Accounting, eCommerce/POS…).
- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc trực tiếp với đội nghiệp vụ của khách — kể được câu chuyện cụ thể về việc thay đổi quyết định của khách dựa trên tư vấn của mình.
- Tư duy phản biện và giải quyết vấn đề tốt — thoải mái với bài toán mơ hồ.
- Tiếng Anh giao tiếp tốt, tự tin trao đổi trực tiếp với khách quốc tế.
- Hiểu OOP, design pattern và software architecture; viết được code sạch, dễ bảo trì.

Điểm cộng lớn:

- Kinh nghiệm customize/tích hợp Odoo (Python, ORM, XML).
- Nền tảng Odoo thực chiến trong các dự án ERP enterprise.
benefits:
Quyền lợi:

- Range lương up to 80M VND (thoả thuận trong buổi phỏng vấn).
- Lương tháng 13, thưởng sinh nhật và các ngày lễ.
- Thưởng theo dự án và theo năng lực.
- Bảo hiểm xã hội đóng full lương.
- Cơ hội onsite, giao tiếp trực tiếp với khách hàng nước ngoài.

title: Data Scientist (Machine Learning Ops Track - Virtual)

Detailed benefits will be discussed during the interview.

title: Intern DevOps Engineer (Agile, AWS)
jobDescription:
- The DevOps Engineer role at Mercatus includes (but is not limited to):
- Collaborate with developers to support deployment and automation needs.
- Support and enhance CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and ArgoCD to automate deployment to Kubernetes.
- Handle lifecycle management and upgrades for Kubernetes clusters (EKS) and associated resources.
- Enhancing infrastructure and application monitoring and alerting using the Grafana LGTM stack.
- Maintain and improve Kubernetes observability and alerting systems.
- Apply security best practices in Kubernetes, including RBAC, network isolation, and secret management.
- Implemented advanced Kubernetes features such as HPA, PDBs, advanced scheduling.
- Configure and manage Ingress Controllers, network policies, custom Helm charts, and resource limits/requests for fine-grained control
- Participate in off-hours/on-call support rotation and be willing to handle urgent production issues during mid-night or non-working hours when required.
requirements:
- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
- 6 month of experience with automated provisioning, Cloud Infrastructure, Continuous Integration, Deployment Pipelines.
- Understanding of a relevant scripting language (eg: python. bash).
- Solid understanding of AWS core services, including S3 bucket, EC2, EKS, VPC, Load Balancers, and NAT Gateway,...
- Hands-on experience with:
- Jenkins and ArgoCD for CI/CD.
- Terraform.
- Helm.
- Kubernetes operations and application deployment.
- Infrastructure and application monitoring and alerting using the Grafana LGTM stack.
- Cloudflare operations include DNS Management, Proxy, SSL/TLS, WAF basics, and Analytics and Logs.
- Familiar with databases: Microsoft SQL Server, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, PostgreSQL, Kafka.
- Willingness to participate in on-call rotation and respond to mid-night or after-hours incidents when required.
- Ability to communicate effectively in English.

Nice to Have

- A security-first mindset and awareness of cloud security practices, Kubernetes hardening practices (Pod Security Policies, image scanning, audit logs).
- Exposure to Azure Cloud environments.
- Scripting knowledge in Bash, Python, or similar.

Soft Skills

- Passionate individual who values team culture and collaboration.
- Demonstrates a willingness to learn and grow with new technologies.
- Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting abilities.
- Understands best practices in building highly available and resilient systems.
- Communicates clearly and works effectively in a cross-functional team.
benefits:
Salary & Allowances

- Competitive income with 13th month salary
- Annual leave: 12 days/year and other leaves/public holidays in accordance with the Labor Law of Vietnam
- Periodic medical checkup, Health/Social Insurance. (PIJCO Insurance after 10 months of employment)
- Be provided with high-performance laptop and screen

Career Growth

- Opportunity to experience a great workplace where young & world-class talents work together passionately
- Very diverse offline and online seminars & workshops provided by company, supervisors, mentors and buddies
- Clear and flexible career path

Working Environment

- Working in a progressive and international environment.
- Complimentary snacks, fruits, drinks everyday.
- Team building, company trip and monthly internal events.

title: Senior IT infrastructure & Security Specialist
jobDescription:
Server, Virtualization & Cloud Management:

- Administer enterprise servers (Windows, Linux), virtualization platforms (VMWare, Hyper-V), and cloud resources (AWS, Azure, CMC).

- Monitor performance, apply patches/updates, and ensure high availability.

- Implement backup and disaster recovery solutions to guarantee business continuity.

- Support cloud migration projects and drive cost optimization initiatives

Network & Security Administration:

- Design, configure, and manage LAN, WAN, Wi-Fi, VPN, firewalls, IDS/IPS, and switching infrastructure.

- Perform advanced troubleshooting and optimize network performance and uptime.

- Deploy and enforce advanced security measures, including segmentation and intrusion prevention.

Identity & Access Management:

- Administer Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policies.

- Manage user accounts, access rights, and authentication services.

- Ensure domain controller health, redundancy, and secure integration with enterprise systems.

IT Security & Compliance

- Develop, implement, and enforce IT security policies and standards.

- Conduct vulnerability assessments, patching, penetration testing, and regular security audits.

- Ensure compliance with industry regulations (ISO, NIST, internal security frameworks).

IT Infrastructure Projects & Leadership

- Plan, coordinate, and execute IT infrastructure projects, including migrations and upgrades.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and external vendors to ensure project success.

- Provide technical leadership and mentorship to junior IT staff.

- Establish best practices, system documentation, and operational standards.

Monitoring & Technical Support:

- Use monitoring tools (e.g., Zabbix, PRTG, SolarWinds) to proactively detect and resolve infrastructure issues.

- Analyze logs and alerts to ensure timely response to incidents.

requirements:

Cloud, Platform & Integration Architecture

AI & Data Architecture Enablement

Standards, Policies & Controls

- Cloud governance

Tools & Architecture Repository

System Quality, Security & Compliance

Stakeholder Management & Leadership

Strong knowledge of architecture frameworks: TOGAF, Zachman (or equivalent).Deep expertise in:Cloud architecture (AWS, Azure, GCP)Microservices, API design, and integration patternsFull SDLC (design, deployment, monitoring, lifecycle management) AI & Modern Technology Capability

jobDescription:
Get to Know the Team

The communication platform team builds highly scalable, high-throughput solutions that power all communications sent from Grab to our users (including push notifications, Inbox messages, emails, SMS, Whatsapp and more) to millions of Grab users. We operate at the scale of Billions of messages each month. Our communication platform powers communications across all business verticals at Grab - including marketing and non-marketing messages. This team is also at the forefront of adopting AI innovations, mobile innovations and ways of working. We take pride in building distributed systems that have a real impact on the lives of millions of users in our endeavour to out-serve the underserved population.

Get to Know the Role

You will be responsible for building, growing, and leading a team of engineers focused on delivering high quality deliverables. You will have opportunities to develop backend and mobile components. Not only will you get to collaborate with the engineers, product, business, and program management teams to be on top of your deliverables, but you will also serve as a mentor to your teammates to help them grow. You will work onsite at CMC Creative Space, district 7, HCMC and report to the Manager, who is based in Singapore.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

- Lead a team of engineers across different tech stacks. You'll participate in code and design reviews to maintain our high development standards.
- Partner with cross functional leaders across product, design, analytics to build the product roadmap, set customer-focused metrics and experiment designs.
- Lead the quarterly planning and build a smooth execution plan with the team for securing the delivery of product and engineering roadmap.
- Set the engineering strategy and engineering key result targets for the team, consistently improve across testability, availability, security and code quality for your systems and modules.
- Attract and retain senior engineering talent, actively mentor and develop engineering talent in the team and across Grab.
- Keep your team staffing aligned with business needs and quickly pivot to changing needs.
requirements:
What Essential Skills You Will Need

- Experience: 8+ years of engineering experience on backend technologies and at least 2+ years as a successful software engineering manager
- Leadership & Talent Development: Demonstrated experience attracting and retaining top talent with a proven track record of mentoring engineers to achieve their full potential
- Technical Proficiency:Proficiency in CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab, or similar platforms)Experience with database architecture, including MySQL and PostgreSQLHands-on experience deploying code in AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud environments
- Proficiency in CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab, or similar platforms)
- Experience with database architecture, including MySQL and PostgreSQL
- Hands-on experience deploying code in AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud environments
- Cultural Fit: A cultural role model with a strong sense of humility and empathy, ready to roll up your sleeves and work alongside your team to drive engineering excellence
benefits:
Life at Grab

We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:

- We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
- With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
- Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
- We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.

What we stand for at Grab

We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that enables diverse Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. As an equal opportunity employer, we consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, religion, age, gender identity, sexual orientation, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

title: Middle AI Engineer (Inference Engineering)
reasons:

- Talented team and leaders from Silicon Valley
- Cool products for global market
jobDescription:
AI Engineer

Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam

Type: Full-time

Team: AI / Engineering

About Autonomous

Autonomous is an AI-native company founded in 2015, transforming from smart office products into a global AI hardware and

product company.

We are building intelligent products that combine hardware, software, and AI to enhance how people work, create, and interact

with technology in real life.

Our mission is to build AI-powered systems and products that enhance human productivity and creativity at scale.

About the Role

We are looking for an AI Engineer to help build, optimize, and deploy AI systems for real-world products. This role is ideal for

someone strong in model development, inference optimization, and production deployment, with the ability to work across

research, engineering, and product teams.

What You’ll Work On

You will work across Autonomous’ key AI product ecosystem, with a focus on:

1. Workspace AI: AI features for Autonomous’ workspace products, including desks, chairs, and WorkPods, making them more intelligent, adaptive, and personalized.

2. Lamp: A physical AI companion for your desk that sees, hears, remembers, and proactively checks in before you ask, powered by expressive motion and local AI for private, personal interactions.

3. Intern: The world’s first personal AI device, powered by OpenClaw, designed to handle tasks through simple.

You will help build AI capabilities that turn user requests into real actions across work, research, and productivity workflows.

Responsibilities

- Develop, train, evaluate, and optimize AI/ML models for production use cases.
- Build and improve inference pipelines for computer vision, LLM, and multimodal AI systems.
- Optimize model performance, latency, and cost using techniques such as quantization, pruning, ONNX, TensorRT, or Triton Inference Server.
- Deploy AI models into production environments and monitor performance over time.
- Work with engineering teams to integrate AI models into applications, services, or device-side systems.
- Conduct experiments, benchmark models, and document technical findings clearly.
- Review code, improve model-serving workflows, and contribute to engineering best practices.
- Stay updated with new AI models, frameworks, and optimization techniques.
requirements:
Requirements

- 1+ years of hands-on experience in AI/ML engineering, deep learning, or applied AI.
- Strong programming skills in Python.
- Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow.
- Solid understanding of machine learning, deep learning, model evaluation, and data preprocessing.
- Experience building or deploying AI models in real-world projects.
- Familiarity with model optimization or inference deployment.
- Ability to read technical papers, experiment with new models, and turn research into working systems.
- Good problem-solving skills and willingness to work in a fast-paced product environment.

Nice to Have

- Experience with ONNX, TensorRT, Triton Inference Server, vLLM, llama.cpp, or similar inference tools.
- Experience with edge deployment, Jetson, embedded systems, or device-side AI.
- Experience with computer vision, LLMs, RAG, multimodal systems, or AI agents.
- Experience with Docker, cloud deployment, CI/CD, or production ML pipelines.
- C/C++ experience.
- Strong math foundation or research background.

What We Look For

- Strong technical foundation and curiosity.
- Hands-on builder mindset.
- Ability to learn fast and ship practical AI systems.
- Clear communication and ownership.
- Interest in building AI products from Vietnam for the global market.
benefits:
Why you’ll love working here

- You be you. We deeply care about helping everyone at Autonomous work on what they love, freely express their ideas within the organization, and grow to to their true potential.
- You be a better you. Most of the time, you’ll be working on cutting edge technologies. You’ll be constantly learning and improving your knowledge as an engineer, researcher or scientist.
- You are your own boss. There is very little hierarchy at Autonomous. Decision making processes are transparent and open to vote. We welcome all different ways of thinking and trust the people we work with to do what they do best. There is no micromanagement here.
- You the inventor. Most of the time, you’ll find yourself working on a problem that doesn’t have a solution - yet. That’s where you come in.
- Solve problems for the world, not just Vietnam. Most of the problems we’re solving are for the global audience of today, and of tomorrow.

Strong Plus

- Experience in sales ops, customer support automation, education, healthcare, coaching, or service businesses.

Success Looks Like

In your first 90 days, you will have built live AI workflows used by real teams, reduced manual work, improved operating speed or quality, and created the foundation for TeenCare’s agent-based operating system.

Compensation

Competitive salary based on experience. Performance bonus and long-term incentives may be available for exceptional candidates.

In addition, TeenUp also helps each individual satisfy and maximize their self-study needs through Learning Hub on Base Square technology application.
- A young, enthusiastic, ambitious and humane startup team. All unite to create real value for children, families, schools and society.

title: Senior Expo / React Native Developer
reasons:
- Multiple platforms - Techologies - More Challenges
- Work with large CMR Software and 500+ Customers
- Opportunities to travel/work to the U.S, EU
jobDescription:
Omnicasa is a B2B CRM platform built specifically for the real estate industry. We're a small, tight team spread across Belgium, Vietnam, and Morocco — and we move fast. Our mobile app runs on Expo and is a core part of what we sell. It needs to feel like a native iOS/Android app, not a web app wrapped in a shell.

We've already done the hard work of migrating away from a legacy .NET MAUI app to a fully Expo-based stack. We use native UI components throughout, and the app reflects that. We take design seriously — liquid glass effects, native navigation patterns, platform-appropriate animations. If you look at our app and think "that's clearly React Native," something has gone wrong.
requirements:
Must-haves:

- 4+ years working with Expo and React Native — not as a side project, as your primary stack
- You've shipped real apps to the App Store and Google Play, and you know what "production-ready" actually means
- Strong TypeScript fundamentals
- You understand the difference between Expo Go, development builds, and managed vs bare workflow — and when to use which
- Experience with Expo Router, EAS Build, and OTA updates
- You care about the details: gesture responsiveness, scroll physics, transition timing, platform conventions
- Experience with native UI paradigms (blur effects, vibrancy, Dynamic Island, haptics, etc.)

Strong plus:

- Expo DOM Components or brownfield integration experience
- Eye for design — you can look at a screen and know when something is off, even if you can't always explain why immediately
- Animation experience with Reanimated 3 and Gesture Handler

Not a fit if:

- Your React Native experience is mostly web-to-mobile ports that "kind of work on mobile too"
- You've only worked in Expo Go and never shipped a production build
- You think platform differences are an edge case
benefits:
What we give back

- Very competitive salary
- 13th-month salary
- Premium insurance
- Powerful Macbook
- Flexible time
- Flat company culture
- Clear career road-map

title: Software Engineer, UI (Angular/ RxJS/ ReactJS)
reasons:
- Empowered Employees
- Freedom and Flexibility
- Unlimited Growth
jobDescription:
Our UI is the mission-critical window into Grasshopper’s high frequency trading and risk management engines. As a UI Software Engineer, you will be responsible for building and scaling real-time web interfaces that process tens of millions of messages daily. This isn't just a dashboard; it is a high-throughput monitoring and execution tool where every millisecond and every pixel matters. You will ensure our traders and risk managers have a robust, low-latency, and highly reliable view of the markets to make split-second decisions that directly impact our trading performance.

As a key member of the UI Engineering Team, you’ll:

- Develop and optimise high-performance, real-time web applications using Angular and RxJS
- Architect systems capable of handling massive data streams (10M+ messages/day) without compromising UI responsiveness or stability
- Work closely with traders and risk managers to translate complex financial requirements into intuitive, robust interactive tools
- Write clean, testable, and highly performant code with a deep focus on memory management and execution efficiency
- Collaborate with backend engineering teams to define efficient data schemas and streaming protocols
- Maintain a high bar for attention to detail, recognising that UI errors can have direct financial consequences in a live trading environment
requirements:
We’d love for you to have:

- At least 3+ years of experience in professional software development with a focus on modern frontend frameworks
- Deeply familiarity with reactive programming patterns, state management and managing complex data flows in high-frequency environments with Angular/RxJS or React
- Exceptional understanding of computer science fundamentals, including algorithms, data structures, and asynchronous programming
- Experience in profiling and optimising web applications (e.g., minimising change detection cycles, managing memory leaks, optimising bundle sizes).
- Strong experience with TypeScript, Unit Testing and CI/CD pipelines
- A track record of solving complex technical challenges with creative, scalable solutions

Nice to haves:

- Familiarity with financial markets, trading concepts, or risk management systems
- Knowledge of low-latency communication protocols
- Experience with data visualisation libraries (e.g., D3.js, Chart.js) for real-time charting
- Basic understanding of backend languages like C++, Rust, or Python
benefits:
- 15 days annual leave
- Bao Viet health insurance for employee and direct family
- 100% salary in probation time
- Annual Dental & Wellness budget
- Annual salary review
- Competitive Compensation
- Training trips to Singapore
- Annual company trip in 5 stars hotel (domestic and oversea)

reasons:

jobDescription:
About the Role

We're seeking an Engineering Manager to build and lead some engineering teams. The teams are focused on the authentication and authorization architecture for the GoTymeX.

This is a unique opportunity arising from our successful growth. You'll start with some strong teams of existing and new backend/frontend engineers, and a Product Manager. Initially, you'll be about 40-50% hands-on, gradually transitioning to a more leadership-focused role. You'll architect scalable, maintainable, and secure solutions while mentoring and developing your team.

You'll collaborate with other Engineering Managers, Product Managers, Designers, Solution Architect, Technical Lead, and Product Engineers to define roadmaps, drive execution, and uphold best practices. You'll contribute to the codebase and guide your team in developing innovative solutions for our customers.

What You’ll Do

- Lead and grow a team of engineers, fostering collaboration and excellence.
- Own the full lifecycle of a product or component - from design and development to deployment and optimization.
- Shape the technical roadmap alongside product and design teams.
- Influence architecture and processes to ensure scalability, quality, and maintainability.
requirements:
Technical Foundation

- Experience as an individual contributor for a significant part of career, being able to reason about systems and integrations on the level of an experienced senior engineer.
- Ability to review technical proposals and participate meaningfully in discussions
- Experience with microservices architecture, cloud infrastructure, and integration patterns

Leadership Experience

- 5+ years engineering teams (20+ engineers total)
- Track record of scaling teams and processes in high-growth environments
- Demonstrated success in stakeholder management and cross-functional collaboration

Business & Product Thinking

- Strong planning and execution skills with focus on business impact over technical novelty
- Track record of delivery of complex projects in reasonable budget, time and scope constraints
- Experience translating complex business objectives into actionable technical initiatives
- Comfort operating in ambiguous environments while providing clear direction

Cultural Fit

- You help people grow, coaching and creating future leaders.
- Strong communication skills in English
- Passion for renewable energy and sustainable technology

Overall Qualifications

- Strong engineer or engineering manager with hands-on leadership experience within an Authorization or Authentication environment, taking full ownership of products from concept to production in product-driven companies.
- Strong end-to-end ownership mindset—you take products or major components from concept to production, owning the full lifecycle.
- Excited to join a mission-driven, high-growth environment shaping the energy future.
benefits:

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (PHP, MySQL, Vue.js, API)
company: Công Ty Tnhh Hello Việt Nam
jobDescription:
Chúng tôi đang xây dựng một nền tảng công nghệ tài chính xử lý các giao dịch từ USDT sang tiền pháp định (fiat), kết hợp cơ sở hạ tầng blockchain với các kênh thanh toán truyền thống.

Công nghệ hiện tại của chúng tôi:

- PHP 8.3 (Laravel)
- MySQL
- Vue.js
- Cơ sở hạ tầng dựa trên Docker
- AWS

Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một Lập trình viên Full-Stack cấp cao có thể làm việc trên cả phần backend và frontend của nền tảng, giúp chúng tôi xây dựng cơ sở hạ tầng tài chính đáng tin cậy. Bạn sẽ làm việc chặt chẽ với Trưởng nhóm kỹ thuật (Tech Lead) và đội ngũ sản phẩm cốt lõi, đồng thời chịu trách nhiệm cho các phần quan trọng của hệ thống.

Trách nhiệm

- Phát triển và bảo trì các dịch vụ backend bằng Laravel.
- Triển khai và bảo trì các API REST.
- Xây dựng và cải thiện các thành phần frontend bằng Vue.js.
- Làm việc với các luồng giao dịch tài chính.
- Triển khai các tích hợp đáng tin cậy với API bên ngoài.
- Đảm bảo xử lý an toàn và có tính lũy đẳng (idempotent) cho các hoạt động tài chính.
- Tối ưu hóa các truy vấn cơ sở dữ liệu và hiệu suất ứng dụng.
- Tham gia thảo luận về kiến trúc hệ thống.
- Viết mã nguồn sạch, dễ bảo trì và được kiểm thử kỹ lưỡng.
- Thực hiện đánh giá mã (code review) và đóng góp vào các tiêu chuẩn kỹ thuật.
requirements:
Phát triển Backend (Backend Development)

- Hơn 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong phát triển backend.
- Kinh nghiệm vững chắc với PHP 8+.
- Kiến thức sâu về framework Laravel.
- Kinh nghiệm thiết kế và triển khai API REST.
- Hiểu biết về:Giao dịch cơ sở dữ liệu (database transactions)Tình trạng tranh chấp (race conditions)Các hoạt động lũy đẳng (idempotent operations)Xử lý đồng thời (concurrency)
- Giao dịch cơ sở dữ liệu (database transactions)
- Tình trạng tranh chấp (race conditions)
- Các hoạt động lũy đẳng (idempotent operations)
- Xử lý đồng thời (concurrency)

Cơ sở dữ liệu (Database)

- Kiến thức vững chắc về MySQL.
- Kinh nghiệm về:Tối ưu hóa truy vấnChiến lược lập chỉ mục (indexing)Quản lý giao dịchTính toàn vẹn dữ liệu
- Tối ưu hóa truy vấn
- Chiến lược lập chỉ mục (indexing)
- Quản lý giao dịch
- Tính toàn vẹn dữ liệu

Frontend

- Kinh nghiệm dày dặn với Vue.js.
- Hiểu biết về kiến trúc frontend hiện đại.
- Kinh nghiệm xây dựng giao diện SPA.
- Quen thuộc với việc tích hợp API và quản lý trạng thái (state management).

Hiểu biết về Cơ sở hạ tầng (Infrastructure Awareness)

- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với Docker.
- Hiểu biết về:NginxCachingHàng đợi (queues)Các tác vụ chạy ngầm (background jobs)
- Nginx
- Caching
- Hàng đợi (queues)
- Các tác vụ chạy ngầm (background jobs)

Kinh nghiệm FinTech / Thanh toán (Ưu tiên)

- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các hệ thống thanh toán.
- Hiểu biết về luồng giao dịch tài chính.
- Kinh nghiệm tích hợp API bên ngoài.
- Kinh nghiệm xử lý webhook.
- Có kinh nghiệm tích hợp blockchain hoặc thanh toán tiền điện tử là một điểm cộng lớn.

Điểm cộng khác

- Kinh nghiệm với hàng đợi Redis.
- Kinh nghiệm thiết kế các hệ thống hướng sự kiện (event-driven systems).
- Kinh nghiệm với các dịch vụ backend chịu tải cao.
- Kiến thức về các phương pháp bảo mật tốt nhất.
- Quen thuộc với quy trình CI/CD.

Phẩm chất cá nhân

- Tinh thần trách nhiệm cao (ownership mindset).
- Chú ý đến chi tiết (cực kỳ quan trọng đối với các hệ thống tài chính).
- Khả năng làm việc độc lập.
- Tư duy kỹ thuật thực tế.
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt.
- Khả năng cộng tác trong một nhóm nhỏ nhưng có tác động lớn.
benefits:
- Lương tháng 13 và thưởng theo hiệu quả kinh doanh của công ty.
- Thưởng theo dự án, thưởng hiệu suất làm việc.
- Được tham gia đầy đủ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định của pháp luật.
- Nghỉ phép năm và các ngày nghỉ lễ theo quy định.
- Môi trường làm việc năng động, thân thiện, nhiều cơ hội học hỏi và phát triển.
- Tham gia các hoạt động nội bộ của công ty: team building, sinh nhật, sự kiện nội bộ
- Cơ hội phát triển nghề nghiệp và lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng.

title: Senior Backend Developer (PHP/ Laravel/ SQL/ API)
company: Công Ty Tnhh Hello Việt Nam
jobDescription:
- Thiết kế và triển khai các dịch vụ backend bằng PHP 8 / Laravel.
- Phát triển và bảo trì các API REST.
- Triển khai quy trình xử lý giao dịch tài chính đáng tin cậy.
- Xây dựng các tích hợp với API tài chính và blockchain bên ngoài.
- Đảm bảo việc xử lý giao dịch an toàn và có tính lũy đẳng (idempotent).
- Triển khai các tác vụ chạy ngầm và quy trình làm việc dựa trên hàng đợi (queue-based workflows).
- Tối ưu hóa hiệu suất cơ sở dữ liệu và các truy vấn.
- Cải thiện độ tin cậy và khả năng chịu lỗi của hệ thống.
- Tham gia vào các cuộc thảo luận về kiến trúc hệ thống.
- Duy trì chất lượng mã nguồn cao và các tiêu chuẩn kỹ thuật.
requirements:
Phát triển Backend (Backend Development)

- Hơn 5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển backend.
- Kiến thức vững chắc về PHP 8+.
- Kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu với Laravel.
- Kinh nghiệm xây dựng và bảo trì các API trong môi trường thực tế (production).
- Hiểu biết về:Giao dịch cơ sở dữ liệu (database transactions).Xử lý đồng thời (concurrency).Tình trạng tranh chấp (race conditions).Các hoạt động lũy đẳng (idempotent operations).
- Giao dịch cơ sở dữ liệu (database transactions).
- Xử lý đồng thời (concurrency).
- Tình trạng tranh chấp (race conditions).
- Các hoạt động lũy đẳng (idempotent operations).

Cơ sở dữ liệu (Database)

- Kinh nghiệm dày dặn với MySQL.
- Kiến thức về:Chiến lược lập chỉ mục (indexing strategies).Tối ưu hóa truy vấn.Tính nhất quán của giao dịch (transactional consistency).Tính toàn vẹn dữ liệu (data integrity).
- Chiến lược lập chỉ mục (indexing strategies).
- Tối ưu hóa truy vấn.
- Tính nhất quán của giao dịch (transactional consistency).
- Tính toàn vẹn dữ liệu (data integrity).

Kiến thức cơ bản về Hệ thống phân tán (Distributed Systems Basics) Hiểu biết về:

- Xử lý bất đồng bộ (asynchronous processing).
- Các tác vụ chạy ngầm (background jobs).
- Cơ chế thử lại (retry mechanisms).
- Xử lý lỗi (error handling).
- Kiến trúc dựa trên hàng đợi (queue-based architectures).
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm với Redis queues hoặc các hệ thống tương tự.

Tích hợp API (API Integration)

- Kinh nghiệm tích hợp với các API bên ngoài.
- Xử lý an toàn các webhook.
- Chiến lược xử lý lỗi và thử lại.
- Kinh nghiệm với API thanh toán hoặc tài chính là một điểm cộng lớn.

Nhận thức về Bảo mật (Security Awareness) Hiểu biết về các phương pháp bảo mật backend tốt nhất:

- Xác thực API (API authentication).
- Giới hạn tốc độ (rate limiting).
- Kiểm chứng dữ liệu đầu vào (input validation).
- Xử lý webhook an toàn.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm làm việc với dữ liệu tài chính hoặc nhạy cảm.

Điểm cộng (Nice to Have)

- Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các hệ thống thanh toán.
- Kinh nghiệm tích hợp tiền điện tử (crypto) / blockchain.
- Kinh nghiệm với các dịch vụ backend chịu tải cao (high-load).
- Kiến thức về kiến trúc hướng sự kiện (event-driven architectures).
- Kinh nghiệm triển khai nhật ký kiểm tra (audit logging).
- Quen thuộc với Docker và CI/CD.

Phẩm chất cá nhân

- Tinh thần trách nhiệm cao (ownership mindset).
- Chú ý đến từng chi tiết.
- Khả năng thiết kế các hệ thống đáng tin cậy.
- Tư duy kỹ thuật thực tế (pragmatic engineering approach).
- Kỹ năng gỡ lỗi (debugging) và giải quyết vấn đề tốt.
- Khả năng làm việc trong một nhóm nhỏ và tốc độ nhanh.
benefits:

- Thưởng theo dự án, thưởng hiệu suất làm việc.
- Được tham gia đầy đủ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định của pháp luật.
- Nghỉ phép năm và các ngày nghỉ lễ theo quy định.
- Môi trường làm việc năng động, thân thiện, nhiều cơ hội học hỏi và phát triển.

title: Sr .NET Fullstack Dev (ReactJS/Angular/Blazor) Up $3000
reasons:
- Flexible Work from Home.
- Opportunity to improve English skills.
- Attractive Salary and Benefits.
jobDescription:
This position is for a Senior Fullstack Developer (.NET, ReactJS or Angular or Blazor) to join our CodeHQ Vietnam team in HCMC (Quan 12).

We have two upcoming projects you may find interesting: a Medical Management platform and a Transport & Logistics system. You will be working on web applications that require strong .NET skills along with modern frontend frameworks such as ReactJS, Angular or Blazor. Experience with cloud technologies will also be advantageous.

Our team practices agentic AI-assisted development using tools like GitHub Copilot Enterprise and Claude Code, combined with Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Behaviour-Driven Development (BDD), Test-Driven Development (TDD), and end-to-end testing with Playwright.
requirements:
Essential dev skills:

- Strong .NET Core, C# and Web API
- Strong experience in any of React, Angular, Blazor or HTMX
- Database design and optimization (SQL Server, PostgreSQL, or MySQL)
- Microservices architecture and cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud)
- Unit and integration testing
- APIs
- Good understanding of the Agile/Scrum development methodology

Preferred dev skills:

- Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, or CI/CD pipelines
- Knowledge of authentication and security best practices (OAuth, JWT, Identity Server)
- Experience working with AI-related technologies or integrations
- Familiarity with agentic AI development workflows (e.g., using agents in GitHub Copilot Enterprise, Claude Code)
- It would be helpful to have hands-on experience with DDD, BDD, TDD, and/or Playwright for end-to-end testing

Essential soft skills:

- Good English communication skills, both verbal and written. IELTS certification preferred.
- Strong team player, positive attitude, and professionalism.
- 5+ years’ practical experience in designing, developing and delivering commercial software applications
- Experience with working with overseas customers.

Interviews are online or optionally at our CodeHQ office in QTSC, District 12.
benefits:
At CodeHQ, building great software is all about people who understand and care about the problem, who love collaborating and take pride in getting it done. We all know how important it is to be a part of our clients’ cultures and how we can add to it.

We have some amazing customers you’ll get to work with, and no two days are ever the same. We enjoy the cultural diversity of our Vietnam and New Zealand offices, always celebrating success and recognising those that go above and beyond the norm.

Apply today to join our winning team for:

● 14-day annual leave and 4-day sick leave

● 13th-month bonus

● Lunch allowance

● Attractive Salary, reviewed annually

● Hybrid work model – work from home or office

● Additional accident and healthcare insurance

● English training programme and practical use with NZ colleagues and customers.

● Access to premium learning and development resources

● Modern office space, well equipped including fully-stocked pantry

● Cash gifts for special occasions including Tet holiday, Vietnam National Day and Liberation Day.

● Team vacation trip, team building activities, and monthly happy hour.

● Plus much more.

Trách nghiệm chính:

- Quản lý và phát triển đội ngũ đa chức năng gồm Business Analyst, Project Manager.
- Quản lý danh mục dự án, đảm bảo việc ưu tiên, phân bổ nguồn lực và kiểm soát tiến độ triển khai hiệu quả.
- Đảm bảo chất lượng các tài liệu nghiệp vụ và yêu cầu hệ thống (BRD, SRS, Functional Specification).
- Tham gia đánh giá, phê duyệt các giải pháp công nghệ đáp ứng yêu cầu kinh doanh.
- Tư vấn cho các đơn vị nghiệp vụ về các giải pháp khả thi, có khả năng mở rộng, tối ưu chi phí và kiểm soát rủi ro
- Phối hợp với các đơn vị Business, Công nghệ và đối tác nhằm đảm bảo hiệu quả triển khai các chương trình, dự án trọng điểm
- Xây dựng quy trình, chuẩn hóa phương pháp làm việc và nâng cao năng lực quản trị dự án, quản trị yêu cầu trong tổ chức.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên các chuyên ngành CNTT, Khoa học máy tính, Hệ thống thông tin, Kỹ thuật phần mềm, Khoa học dữ liệu, Quản trị kinh doanh, Tài chính – Ngân hàng hoặc các ngành liên quan.
- Tối thiểu 08 năm kinh nghiệm chuyên môn và 04 năm kinh nghiệm quản lý.
- Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm quản lý đội ngũ BA, PM hoặc các nhóm triển khai dự án CNTT.
- Hiểu biết tốt về Quản trị danh mục dự án (Portfolio Management) và Quản trị dự án (Project Management).
- Có kiến thức về Database, API, System Architecture và các hệ thống CNTT.
- Thành thạo các công cụ phân tích và mô hình hóa nghiệp vụ như Visio, Bizagi, Draw.io, UML, BPMN.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên sở hữu các chứng chỉ Business Analysis, Project Management, ISTQB hoặc các chứng chỉ chuyên môn liên quan.
benefits:
Phúc lợi, đãi ngộ:

- Thời gian làm việc: Thứ 2 – Thứ 6, nghỉ thứ 7 và Chủ nhật
- Nghỉ phép: 12 ngày phép năm. Mỗi 5 năm được tăng thêm 1 ngày theo quy định của luật Lao Động
- Nghỉ lễ Tết: 11 ngày theo quy định luật lao động Việt Nam
- Nghỉ ốm: hưởng nguyên lương đóng BHXH (75% do BHXH chi trả, 25% do Công ty chi trả)
- Ngày sinh nhật: Nghỉ hưởng nguyên lương 01 ngày (chế độ tương đương ngày nghỉ phép)
- Bảo hiểm: Bên cạnh Bảo hiểm bắt buộc theo quy định, Mcredit hỗ trợ Bảo hiểm sức khỏe MIC theo quy định hàng năm của công ty.
- Chế độ dành riêng cho các mẹ đang nuôi con nhỏ: Happy mom’s room, Happy mom’s hour (được nghỉ tối đa 2h/tháng để đưa đón con đi học từ cấp 1 trở xuống). Các chế độ khác (khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm, nghỉ mát, thăm hỏi ốm đau…) theo quy định của MC từng thời kỳ.
- Hoạt động team building, du lịch, thể thao, Happy Hour hàng tháng…v..v…

title: Backend Dev (Golang, AI) - Lương cạnh tranh
reasons:
- Performance & salary review yearly
- Competitive Package
- Full salary-based social insurance
jobDescription:
About Buymed

Buymed is the leading B2B healthcare platform in Southeast Asia, operating across Vietnam, Cambodia, and Thailand. We serve over 35,000 pharmacies, clinics, and hospitals with a mission to make healthcare more accessible and efficient. As we scale rapidly, recruitment must evolve from manual and reactive to systemized and data-driven, and that’s where this role comes in.

We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer skilled in React, Next.js, HTML, and CSS to build user-friendly web applications for CIRCA’s POS and operation systems. You’ll develop and optimize key modules like inventory, orders, payments, and reporting, working closely with backend engineers and UI/UX designers.

Key Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services using Golang.
- Work with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, ElasticSearch, Redis, and RabbitMQ to build scalable, distributed systems.
- Implement APIs using REST or JSON-RPC protocols.
- Deploy and maintain services using Docker, Kubernetes, and GCP (or equivalent cloud platforms).
- Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability.
- Collaborate with frontend and product teams to deliver complete features.
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to overall system architecture.
requirements:
Qualification

Must-Have:

- Solid understanding of AI Agents, including: agents, skills, MCP, and context management
- Experience using Claude Code or same tool (Codex, Cursor, ...)
- Strong product mindset with the ability to independently build products
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field.
- 3-5 years of experience in back-end web development, hands on experience in Front-end (Reactjs) & Golang
- Proficiency in concurrency patterns, microservices, and distributed architectures.
- Strong experience with: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, ElasticSearch, Redis, RabbitMQ
- Familiarity with cloud infrastructure, especially GCP, and container orchestration with Kubernetes.
- ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Augment, Cursor
- Able to leverage AI to improve coding speed, testing, debugging, and technical decision-making

Nice-to-Have:

- Experience with POS, ERP, or retail inventory systems.
- Exposure to frontend frameworks like Next.js or SolidJS.
- Product mindset and care for user impact.
- Good English communication skills.
benefits:
- Performance & salary review yearly
- Paid social insurance based on full salary
- Bao Viet Insurance
- Medical Checkup
- 15 days of annual leave
- Parking allowance
